name: Aberration Kinship
description: Your mind resonates with the inscrutable thought processes that inhuman aberrations use to communicate.

name: Acrobatic Performer
description: You're an incredible acrobat, evoking wonder and enrapturing audiences with your prowess.

name: Acupuncturist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou've studied the routes by which qi flows through the body.

name: Acute Vision
description: When you are raging, your visual senses improve, granting you darkvision.

name: Adapted Cantrip
description: Through study of multiple magical traditions, you've altered a spell to suit your spellcasting style.

name: Adaptive Vision
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.After years of using black powder weaponry in dimly lit spaces, you've become accustomed to dazzling flashes of light and sudden shifts in illumination.

name: Additional Lore
description: Your knowledge has expanded to encompass a new field.

name: Adhyabhau
description: You descend from the rare psychic vampires known as vetalaranas.

name: Adopted Ancestry
description: You're fully immersed in another ancestry's culture and traditions, whether born into them, earned through rite of passage, or bonded through a deep friendship or romance.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: In the heat of battle, you are capable of amazing feats of strength.

name: Adroit Manipulation
description: Access Mihrini ethnicity You've fiddled with knots, locks, and blacksmith's puzzles since you were a child to give your hands something to do.

name: Advanced Weaponry
description: Your eidolon's attack evolves.

name: Aegis of the Dissolution
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You are a friend of shadows and know how to avoid the troubles they bring.

name: Aeonbound
description: Your lineage is influenced or directly tied to the supernatural inhabitants of the Perfect City of Axis, a realm of pure and absolute order.

name: Aerial Boomerang
description: A blade of shearing wind races away from you in a @Template[line|distance:60].

name: Ageless Spirit
description: You remember more about your previous incarnations than most leshys.

name: Agile Shield Grip
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield with a shield boss or shield spikes in one hand.

name: Air Cushion
description: Trigger A creature within 60 feet is falling.

name: Alabaster Eyes
description: In place of the normal vishkanyan golden eyes, you were born with especially perceptive snow-white eyes.

name: Alchemical Assessment
description: You can identify alchemical items quickly.

name: Alchemical Crafting
description: You can use the Craft activity to create alchemical items.

name: Alchemical Familiar
description: You have used alchemy to create life, a simple creature formed from alchemical materials, reagents, and a bit of your own blood.

name: Alchemical Scholar
description: You gain the feat.

name: Alghollthu Bound
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: Although you may not even be aware, the alghollthus your ancestors once served maintain a stranglehold on the deepest, tethered parts of your mind.

name: All of the Animal
description: You know how to make the best and most efficient use of a hunted animal's carcass.

name: All This Will Happen Again
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You fail or critically fail a Will save against an emotion effect.Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, you find solace in the notion that this feeling is fleeting; all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle.

name: Ambersoul
description: Your elemental heritage is reflected in the oils and fragrances of plants, in tree resin that fossilizes into amber, or in the gentle smell of a flower.

name: Ammunition Thaumaturgy
description: You're so used to handling your implement, weapon, and esoterica in the heat of combat that adding a few bullets or arrows to the mix is no extra burden.

name: Anadi Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You've learned how to provide for your community, be it through hard-earned sustenance or useful crafts.

name: Ancestral Blood Magic
description: The magic of your bloodline mixes with that of your ancestry.

name: Ancestral Insight
description: You have extensive knowledge of your ancestors' ancient origins.

name: Ancestral Linguistics
description: Over your extensive lifespan, you've studied many languages.

name: Ancestral Longevity
description: You have accumulated a vast array of lived knowledge over the years.

name: Ancestral Mind
description: By unraveling memories and connections passed down from your progenitors and buried within your unconscious mind, you learn to convert your inherent magic into psychic power.

name: Ancient Memories
description: In the long years since Ghorus's day, you've done pretty much everything at one time or another.

name: Android Lore
description: You have a keen interest in the origins of your people.

name: Angelkin
description: You descend from an angel, a winged messenger from Nirvana or one of the other celestial realms.

name: Animal Accomplice
description: You build a rapport with an animal, which becomes magically bonded to you.

name: Animal Companion
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you on your adventures and obeys any simple commands you give it to the best of its abilities.

name: Animal Companion (Ranger)
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you and obeys simple commands.

name: Animal Elocutionist
description: You hear animal sounds as conversations instead of unintelligent noise, and you can respond in turn.

name: Animal Empathy
description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

name: Animal Senses
description: You gain one of the following senses available to your inherent animal: darkvision, low-light vision, or scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

name: Apparition Sense
description: You can see and interact with things others can't.

name: Aquatic Eyes
description: As your connection to water grows, you can see more easily in places with less light, such as the depths of the ocean.

name: Arcane Communication
description: You can deliver silent messages.

name: Arcane Dragonblood
description: You descend from a dragon that wields mastery of their magical abilities, such as a fortune dragon or mirage dragon.

name: Arcane Eye
description: Your eye has been magically enhanced to pierce darkness.

name: Arcane Fists
description: Your physical training encompasses unarmed combat forms.

name: Arcane Sense
description: Your study of magic allows you to instinctively sense its presence.

name: Arcane Tattoos
description: Access Varisian ethnicity or New Thassilon nationality You have tattoos on your body corresponding to one of the ancient Thassilonian schools of magic.

name: Armor Assist
prerequisites: trained in Athletics or Warfare Lore
description: After your service aiding armored combatants, you are practiced in helping yourself and others don heavy gear.

name: Armor in Earth
description: Stone encases you like armor.

name: Armor Proficiency
description: You become trained in light armor.

name: Artisanal Crafter
description: Like many minotaurs, you take pride in creating items made from stone or metal.

name: As in Life, So in Death
description: Specific memories of your old life are hard to hold onto, but you know things without remembering why.

name: Ash-Piercing Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Neither cinders nor winds shall prevent you from seeing those who need help.

name: Ask the Bones
description: Frequency once per dayYou keep the bone of an ancestor or a friend to call upon for advice.

name: Assurance
prerequisites: trained in at least one skill
description: Even in the worst circumstances, you can perform basic tasks.

name: Athamaru Lore
description: You've immersed yourself in community learning, particularly around navigating the waters and tending to animals.

name: Athamaru Weapon Familiarity
description: You wield weapons designed to work underwater with ease.

name: Automaton Armament
description: You've been provided a body part designed for combat.

name: Automaton Lore
description: You have come to better understand the process that made your body and the magic that powers it.

name: Avenge in Glory
description: Frequency once per day Access mountain dwarf ethnicity Trigger An ally within 30 feet gains the condition.

name: Avowed Insight
prerequisites: Yaksha heritage with an edict that requires you to confront a certain type of creature
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You become trained in the Lore skill corresponding to one creature type mentioned by your vow (for example, Fey Lore if your heritage is deny the firstborn pursuit).

name: Awakened Animal Lore
description: You have taken the time to learn about the process of awakening and the experiences of your fellow awakened animals.

name: Awakened Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You once held the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, and it awakened a mysterious power in your own.

name: Awakened Magic
description: When you awakened, primal magic was released within you.

name: Axiomatic Lore
description: You possess a strong understanding of process among mortals and lawful outsiders alike.

name: Azarketi Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You have learned the history and origins of your people and how to connect to both your land and sea heritage.

name: Azarketi Weapon Familiarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You are familiar with weapons that excel underwater.

name: Bamboo and Silt Repose
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: At home among mire and copse, you flit from river to tree with a dragonfly's shimmering grace.

name: Bardic Lore
description: Your studies make you informed on every subject.

name: Bargain Hunter
description: You can using Diplomacy, spending your days hunting for bargains and reselling at a profit.

name: Battle Medicine
description: Requirements You're holding or wearing a healer's toolkit.

name: Battleblooded
description: You descend from those whose lives were touched by legendary einherjars, who were crafted from the souls of mighty warriors slain in battle and chosen by valkyries to serve as foot soldiers to many gods.

name: Beast Trainer
description: You have an impressive innate ability to tame and command ferocious beasts.

name: Beastbrood
description: One of your ancestors was a rakshasa, the corrupt and aristocratic reincarnated souls that call Golarion home.

name: Bestial Manifestation
description: Part of your body has an animalistic influence from a planar creature.

name: Blast Lock
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.

name: Blessed Blood (Sorcerer)
prerequisites: bloodline that grants divine spells, you follow a deity
description: Your deity's blessings manifest in your blood-borne power.

name: Blood Rising
description: Trigger A creature targets you with a spell of the same tradition as your bloodline.The magic in your blood surges in response to your foe's spell.

name: Blowgun Poisoner
description: You can capably deliver toxins with a .

name: Bon Mot
description: You launch an insightful quip at a foe, distracting them.

name: Bone Magic
description: Your connection to your iruxi ancestors manifests as a simple primal spell that you cast using a fragment of an ancestor's bones.

name: Bouncy Goblin
description: You have a particular elasticity that makes it easy for you to bounce and squish.

name: Breath Control
description: You can breathe even in hazardous or sparse air.

name: Breath of the Dragon (Dragonblood)
description: Tapping into the physiology of your draconic ancestor, you can exhale a torrent of energy in a @Template[cone|distance:15] or a @Template[line|distance:30], dealing 1d4 damage.

name: Brightsoul
description: The fire inside you asserts itself as beaming, radiant light.

name: Brilliant Flash
description: Your light cleanses souls of fear.

name: Brine May
description: Your mother was a sea hag, granting you one sea-green or blue eye.

name: Brinesoul
description: Your elemental ancestor's legacy asserts itself as brackish water, like the seawater of the ocean.

name: Built-In Tools
description: You've built tools into your innovation so you can access and use them easily.

name: Burn It!
description: Fire fascinates you.

name: Burning Jet
description: A condensed burst of flame shoots behind you, propelling you forward with its sheer force.

name: Cackle
description: Your patron's power fills you with confidence, letting you sustain a magical working even as a quick burst of laughter leaves your lips.

name: Callow May
description: You are among the most common of changelings—those born to sweet hags—and a vibrant green eye signifies that parentage.

name: Canny Acumen
description: Your avoidance or observation is beyond the ken of most in your profession.

name: Canopy Sight
description: You can see equally well even in dense jungles where only a small amount of light shines through.

name: Cantorian Reinforcement
description: The life energy that helped create the first hobgoblins is particularly potent in you, protecting you from ongoing maladies.

name: Cat Fall
description: Your catlike aerial acrobatics allow you to cushion your falls.

name: Cat Nap
description: Frequency once per hourYou can regain your energy quickly with a brief nap.

name: Cat's Luck
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a Reflex saving throw.

name: Catch the Details
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You are quick at recognizing broad details about people and things around you.

name: Catfolk Dance
description: You have a habit of always being in the way when other creatures attempt to move.

name: Catfolk Lore
description: Growing up among catfolk has taught you the traditional values of freedom, stewardship, and quick reactions to trouble.

name: Catfolk Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the catfolk trait.

name: Cattle Speech
description: You can understand the lowing of cattle and similar animals as its own language.

name: Cauldron
description: You can brew magic in your cauldron, creating useful magical concoctions.

name: Caustic Nectar
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: You have specialized glands inside your throat, which produce acidic nectar that you can spit long distances.

name: Cel Rau
description: You are a cel rau, child of a strigoi, one of the first vampires to walk Golarion.

name: Centaur Lore
description: You've learned how to nurture your environment and to care for your people.

name: Centaur Weapon Familiarity
description: You've trained in the weapons favored by your people, becoming a skilled archer and jouster.

name: Ceremony of Protection
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You manipulate your exoskeleton to overlap itself.

name: Ceremony of the Evened Hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have cultivated your exoskeleton's form for close combat, using knots, whorls, and reinforced branches.

name: Chance Death
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would die as a result of a failed recovery check or saving throw.Your previous life ended due to sheer poor luck, struck by lightning or choking on a fish bone.

name: Changeling Lore
description: All too aware of your true nature, you've studied hags and their powers.

name: Channeler's Stance
description: You enter a stance that allows power to flow through you.

name: Charlatan
description: You've learned to mimic the abilities of spellcasters by studying their flourishes and words.

name: Charmed Sleep
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When you sleep, you turn into an inanimate object a little smaller than a human's thumb—easily overlooked and carried.

name: Charming Liar
description: Your charm allows you to win over those you lie to.

name: Cheek Pouches
description: Your cheeks are stretchy, and you can store up to four items of light Bulk or less in these cheek pouches.

name: Childlike Plant
prerequisites: chrysanthemum leshy heritage or peachchild leshy heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're adept at hiding your plantlike features to pass as a human.

name: Cindersoul
description: The fire of your elemental ancestor manifests like dying embers of a blaze, and your inner charcoal helps staunch bleeding, purify simple poisons, and absorb acid.

name: Circle of Spirits
description: Frequency once per roundWith a thought, word, or gesture, you reach your mind out to another spirit.

name: City Scavenger
description: You know that the greatest treasures often look like refuse.

name: Clan Lore
description: Your identity as a member of your clan is as central to your sense of self as your dwarven ancestry.

name: Clan Pistol
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.Raised in the ancient halls of Dongun Hold or the surrounding region, you display your lineage with a clan pistol, rather than a clan dagger.

name: Clan's Edge
description: By moving your clan dagger with rapid precision, you can protect yourself more effectively.

name: Cleansing Subroutine
description: Your nanites help purge your body of harmful chemicals and toxins.

name: Climbing Tail
description: Your tail makes it much easier for you to climb.

name: Clone-Risen
description: You were formed from a clone ritual or alchemical experiment.

name: Cold Minded
description: The subtle strands of beguiling magic leave little impression on your mind.

name: Collapse
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger An enemy's Strike against you is a critical hit.

name: Combat Assessment
description: You make a telegraphed attack to learn about your foe.

name: Combat Climber
description: Your techniques allow you to fight as you climb.

name: Community Knowledge
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You attempt a skill check requiring 3 actions or fewer.

name: Community-Minded
description: You are familiar with all the members of your community and their typical movements, and you have learned how to apply these patterns outside those circles.

name: Concealing Legerdemain
description: Rather than hide an object somewhere the inspectors won't search, you're skilled at keeping the object on the move so it's never where they look.

name: Conrasu Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have learned about your history and your people from shapers.

name: Conrasu Weapon Familiarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have taken it upon yourself to learn the ways of combat to aid with your tasks, perhaps in a role as a corrector.

name: Consult the Stars
description: You find wisdom in the movements of the heavens.

name: Contract Negotiator
description: Your experience with bargaining and deciding terms as part of Highhelm's guilds helps you make deals in other situations.

name: Cooperative Nature
description: The short human life span lends perspective and has taught you from a young age to set aside differences and work with others to achieve greatness.

name: Coral Symbiotes
description: You've tended to your coral jewelry so well that you have formed a symbiotic relationship with it.

name: Corgi Mount
description: The smallest of fey have ridden corgis as mounts since time immemorial, leading to a pattern on corgis' backs called a "faerie saddle." You have formed a magical connection with a corgi that can serve as your mount.

name: Counter Thought
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell with the mental trait.

name: Counterspell (Prepared)
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell that you have prepared When a foe Casts a Spell and you can see its manifestations, you can use your magic to disrupt it.

name: Counterspell (Spontaneous)
description: Trigger A creature casts a spell that you have in your repertoire.

name: Courteous Comeback
description: Access Keleshite nationality Requirements You're in a settlement or community, and you haven't used Courteous Comeback in this settlement or community within the past month.

name: Courtly Graces
description: You were raised among the nobility or have learned proper etiquette and bearing, allowing you to present yourself as a noble and play games of influence and politics.

name: Cover Fire
description: Frequency once per round Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow.

name: Crafter's Appraisal
description: Your knowledge of items' construction allows you to discern their magical effects as well.

name: Crane Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmoredYour arms flutter like a crane's wings.

name: Crawling Form
prerequisites: born of animal or born of celestial heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can transform into a small animal or celestial creature to scurry and spy.

name: Creative Prodigy
description: You have a powerful creative drive that is clear to any who interact with you.

name: Cringe
description: Trigger A creature you are aware of critically succeeds on a Strike against you and would deal damage to you.With pitiful posturing, you cause your foe to pull back a deadly attack.

name: Critter Shape
description: Once per hour, you can use to enter a critter shape.

name: Croak Talker
description: You can communicate with the simplest of frogs and other similar creatures using long-winded croaks.

name: Crocodile's Twin
prerequisites: bakuwa lizardfolk heritage or makari lizardfolk heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your egg contained your twin, a crocodile.

name: Crossbow Ace
description: Requirements You are wielding a crossbow with reload 1 or higher.

name: Crossbow Crack Shot
description: You're exceptionally skilled with the crossbow.

name: Crown of Bone
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When you came of age, you were blessed by the Mother Earth with a thickened skull, which was celebrated as an auspicious sign among your community.

name: Crunch
description: Your jaws can crush bone and bite through armor.

name: Crystal Healing
description: You know how to stimulate a body's natural healing abilities through the application of resonant crystals.

name: Crystal Luminescence
description: Your horn glows with bioluminescent color, casting bright light in a @Template[emanation|distance:20] (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

name: Cynical
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You've been approached with suspicion and distrust throughout your life and return these sentiments back to the strangers you encounter.

name: Dance of the Mousedeer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You move your body in a pattern that evokes the small and clever Sister Mousedeer, misdirecting enemies and filling their vision with shadows to hide behind.

name: Deadly Simplicity
prerequisites: deity with a simple or unarmed attack favored weapon, trained with your deity's favored weapon
description: When you are wielding your deity's favored weapon, increase the damage die size of that weapon by one step.

name: Deceptive Worship
description: Members of your cult frequently pass themselves off as worshippers of other religions.

name: Deep Vision
description: Your vision is suited for night or the underground.

name: Defensive Advance
description: With the protection of your shield, you dive into battle!

name: Deflecting Wave
description: Trigger You would take acid, bludgeoning, fire, or slashing damage from an enemy's attack, spell, or other hostile effect.

name: Deity's Domain
description: You embody an aspect of your deity.

name: Deliberate Death
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are about to gain the dying condition as a result of another creature's attack or ability, and that creature is within your melee reach.Once, you died because someone—murderer, monster, or soldier—chose to strike you down.

name: Demonbane Warrior
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against demons.

name: Desperate Prayer
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You begin your turn and have no Focus Points.You call out to your deity in a plea for their aid.

name: Devil's Advocate
description: Access Chelaxian nationality You know more about the habits of devils than is entirely safe.

name: Diehard
description: It takes more to kill you than most.

name: Different Worlds
prerequisites: ability to select ancestry feats from multiple ancestries
description: Your separate experiences in different societies have evolved into entirely separate lives.

name: Dig Quickly
description: Requirements You are standing on dirt, sand, snow, or similar particulate material.

name: Dirty Trick
description: Requirements You have a hand free and are within melee reach of an opponent.You hook a foe's bootlaces together, pull their hat over their eyes, loosen their belt, or otherwise confound their mobility through an underhanded tactic.

name: Disarming Flair
description: You knock weapons from the hands of your foes with style.

name: Distracting Shadows
description: You have learned to remain hidden by using larger folk as a distraction to avoid drawing attention to yourself.

name: Diverse Lore
description: Your wandering studies mean you've heard rumors or theories about almost every topic...

name: Divine Castigation
description: Your deity's grace doesn't extend to your sworn enemies.

name: Divine Disharmony
description: From your collection of religious trinkets, you pull out opposing divine objects-such as the religious symbols of two deities that are hated enemies-and combine them in a display that causes discordant clashes of divine energy that are especially distracting to the faithful.

name: Divine Dragonblood
description: You can trace your lineage to a dragon with almost deific powers, such as a diabolic dragon or empyreal dragon.

name: Dokkaebi Fire
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can create illusory wisps of ghostly blue flame.

name: Domain Initiate
description: Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers.

name: Dongun Education
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You're knowledgeable in trades that are important to your people's survival and commercial interests.

name: Double Slice
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Draconic Arrogance
description: Few can sway you from your goals while the fury of combat fills you.

name: Draconic Aspect
description: You have an obvious draconic feature, such as sharp claws, a snout full of sharp teeth, or strong reptilian tail, that you can use offensively.

name: Draconic Resistance
description: Draconic magic safeguards you against harm.

name: Draconic Sight
description: You have a fraction of the senses of your draconic forebear.

name: Draconic Sycophant
description: You have an affect that dragonkind find unusually pleasing—and when that fails, you know when to duck.

name: Dragon Lore
description: You've set your mind on learning more about your ancestor and their kin, and perhaps you were even raised by a dragon parent.

name: Dragon Spit
description: Many Tian-Dan claim to have dragon blood in their veins, and in your case, this is true-you can spit energy, and you might have an especially visible sign of your draconic heritage.

name: Dragon Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored You enter the stance of a dragon and make powerful leg strikes like a lashing dragon's tail.

name: Dragon's Presence
description: As kin to dragonkind, you project unflappable confidence (that collapses catastrophically against the deadliest foes).

name: Dream May
description: You are the child of a cuckoo hag, making one of your eyes violet or even black.

name: Dual Studies
description: You and your eidolon have some skills you practice on your own.

name: Dual-Weapon Reload
description: Requirements You're wielding two one-handed weapons, each in a different hand, one of which is a ranged weapon.You carry your ammunition in a way that allows you to reload while holding two weapons.

name: Dualborn
description: Your suli heritage can be traced back to two geniekin ancestors of opposing elements, or to an elemental ancestor that embodied two combined elements.

name: Dubious Knowledge
prerequisites: trained in a skill with the Recall Knowledge action
description: You're a treasure trove of information, but not all of it comes from reputable sources.

name: Duskwalker Lore
description: You either found another duskwalker who taught you the secrets of your kind, or you managed to research your unusual heritage.

name: Duskwalker Weapon Familiarity
description: You have familiarity with the bo staff, longbow, composite longbow, scythe, and staff—for the purpose of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

name: Dustsoul
description: Your earth elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as dust and dirt, like the soil of a field or the hot desert sands.

name: Dwarven Doughtiness
description: You are naturally calm and collected in the face of imminent danger.

name: Dwarven Lore
description: You eagerly absorbed the old stories and traditions of your ancestors, your gods, and your people, studying subjects and techniques passed down for generation upon generation.

name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
description: Your kin have instilled in you an affinity for hard-hitting weapons, and you prefer these to more elegant arms.

name: Earned Glory
description: Elves often struggle with underestimating aiuvarins, and you are experienced at telling stories of your accomplishments to gain their respect.

name: Eidetic Ear
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have an amazing memory for sound.

name: Elegant Buckler
description: You've learned a flexible way to position your to provide more protection.

name: Elemental Assault
description: Frequency once per day You shroud your arms and held weapons in elemental magic.

name: Elemental Embellish
description: You can summon a harmless but impressive elemental display.

name: Elemental Eyes
description: You can see in the darkness as easily as an elemental.

name: Elemental Familiar (Kineticist)
description: A small creature made of elemental matter springs forth from your kinetic gate.

name: Elemental Lore
description: You've devoted yourself to researching the secrets of the Inner Sphere.

name: Elemental Trade
description: You have a strong connection with stone and metal.

name: Elemental Wrath
description: You are so attuned to the land that you can call forth a bolt of energy from your surroundings.

name: Elf Atavism
description: Your elven blood runs particularly strong, granting you features far more elven than those of a typical aiuvarin.

name: Eliminate Red Herrings
description: You have a keen sense for avoiding spurious lines of inquiry.

name: Elucidating Vision
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your eyes have seen many things in your past lives, and your sight seems to have grown more powerful over your lifetimes.

name: Elven Aloofness
description: As much as you might care for them, you've come to terms with the ephemeral nature of non-elves, and it makes their threats feel less troublesome.

name: Elven Lore
description: You've studied traditional elven arts, learning about arcane magic and the world around you.

name: Elven Verve
description: While all elves are immune to the paralyzing touch of ghouls, you can shake off flesh-numbing magic of all kinds.

name: Elven Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor bows and other elegant weapons.

name: Elver Pet
description: Athamarus have bonded with eels more closely than any other fish.

name: Ember's Eyes
description: Your eyes blaze with inner flame.

name: Emberkin
description: A peri's roaring spirit burns in your soul.

name: Embodied Legionary Subjectivity
description: Access You're from Nex.

name: Emit Defensive Odor
description: Frequency once per dayWhile athamarus' natural pheromones are typically used for communication, you have developed yours into a defense mechanism to ward off foes.

name: Emotional Partitions
description: You have created strong mental partitions in your mind to filter out negative emotional influences.

name: Emotionless
description: Your malfunctioning emotional processors make it difficult for you to feel strong emotions.

name: Empathetic Plea
description: Trigger You are attacked by a creature that you haven't yet acted hostile toward.

name: Energized Spark
description: The energy of your spirit manifests as crackling lightning, the chill of winter, or the power of an element.

name: Energy Beam
description: You can channel your core's power through the magical gem that serves as your eye.

name: Energy Heart
description: Your eidolon's heart beats with energy.

name: Esteemed Visitor
description: Your polite manners and natural ability to comfort others make it easy for you to break down cultural barriers and earn strangers' trust.

name: Eternal Torch
description: You open a connection to your kinetic gate, large enough for a torch flame to flow.

name: Evanescent Wings
description: You've manifested wings that can flutter for brief spurts.

name: Everstand Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield.

name: Everyday Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: There's nothing better than being a tanuki, but sometimes you need a less conspicuous form when going into the big city or other crowded places.

name: Exacting Strike
description: You make a controlled follow-up attack, fully accounting for your momentum.

name: Expanded Senses
description: Your eidolon evolves more acute senses.

name: Experienced Professional
description: You carefully safeguard your professional endeavors to prevent disaster.

name: Experienced Smuggler
description: You often smuggle things past the authorities.

name: Experienced Tracker
description: Tracking is second nature to you, and when necessary you can follow a trail without pause.

name: Explosive Leap
description: You aim an explosion from your innovation downward to launch yourself into the air.

name: Explosive Savant
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You've spent a lifetime wielding guns and explosive ordinance.

name: Express Rider
description: You can encourage your mount to cover ground quickly.

name: Extend Boost
description: You can increase the duration of your eidolon's boosts.

name: Extended Kinesis
description: You've refined the control you can exert over your elements.

name: Extra Squishy
description: Your rubbery physique makes it easier for you to wedge yourself into tight spaces and more difficult for your enemies to dislodge you.

name: Extravagant Parry
description: Requirements You're wielding one or more one-handed weaponsYou use one-handed weapons to parry with style.

name: Eye for Masonry
description: Your familiarity with architecture allows you to easily spot subtle stonework.

name: Eye for Numbers
description: You've learned to quickly estimate the number of items in a group with relative accuracy at only a glance.

name: Eye for Treasure
description: You know good artisanship when you see it and can wax poetic about crafting techniques and forms.

name: Eyes of Night
description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a true vampire.

name: Faithful Steed
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion as a mount.

name: False Faith
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: Droskar knows you may need to disguise yourself in societies that oppose your faith.

name: Familiar
description: Magus, Sorcerer An animal serves you and assists your spellcasting.

name: Fang Sharpener
prerequisites: irongut goblin or razortooth goblin heritage
description: You have filed your teeth into jagged points and have an unusually powerful jaw, making your mouth a dangerous weapon.

name: Fangs
description: Your incisors have grown into true fangs: long, sharp, and well-suited to drawing blood.

name: Far Lobber
description: You've learned how to throw a longer distance.

name: Fascinated by Society
description: Just as some humanoids find themselves driven to study nature, you are obsessed with the artificial constructs of society and can't get enough.

name: Fascinating Performance
description: When you , compare your result to the Will DC of one observer.

name: Fast Recovery
description: Your body quickly bounces back from afflictions.

name: Faultspawn
description: You bear a grudge, inherited from a blasphemous asura forebear in your bloodline, against a particular deity and their works.

name: Feather Step
description: You step carefully and quickly.

name: Ferrousoul
description: Whether in their pure elemental forms or as part of an alloy such as steel, the elemental metal in your soul resonates strongly with iron, bronze, and other sturdy, practical metals suitable for weaponry.

name: Fetchling Lore
description: You've learned obscure lessons about your fellow fetchlings.

name: Fey Cantrips
description: You've learned the cantrips sprites have used since time immemorial.

name: Fey Fellowship
description: Your enhanced fey connection (either through your blood or via prolonged contact with their kind) affords you a warmer reception from creatures of the First World as well as tools to foil their tricks or withstand their magic.

name: Fire Lung
description: A lifetime of proximity to flames has inured your lungs and eyes to smoke.

name: Fire Savvy
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You've grown up around a forge and are well-suited to dealing with smoke and flame.

name: First World Magic
description: Your connection to the First World grants you a primal innate spell, much like those of the fey.

name: Fisheye
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYou can gain the magic of the seas by eating your favorite seafood.

name: Flashforge
description: An artificial metal object forms in the hands of you or a willing ally within 30 feet.

name: Flashy Dodge
description: Trigger A creature you can see targets you with an attack.

name: Fledgling Flight
description: Frequency once per round You can fly through the air in short bursts.

name: Fleet
description: You move more quickly on foot.

name: Flexible Form
description: Your body is as supple as a sapling, capable of bending without breaking.

name: Flexible Studies
description: You've collected a cross-section of information on various disciplines you can refer to when preparing for various tasks.

name: Flood Stance
description: The lessons of the flood teach a stance that distributes and circulates a single breath through the body and allows your punches to contain the focused power of a torrent of water.

name: Flying Blade
description: You apply your flashy techniques to thrown weapons as easily as melee attacks.

name: Flying Flame
description: A Tiny shape of flame appears, taking a form of your choice—such as a bird, an arrow, or a simple sphere.

name: Focused Fascination
description: When you use in a combat encounter, you need only a success, rather than a critical success, to Fascinate your target.

name: Folk Healer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your community recognizes you as a shaman or other animist, a status you obtained through lineage, apprenticeship, or a supernatural event.

name: Folksy Patter
description: You are adept at disguising coded messages as folksy idioms.

name: Forager
description: While using Survival to Subsist, if you roll any result worse than a success, you get a success.

name: Forensic Acumen
description: You understand the principles of forensic medicine, making you better at examining a body to determine the cause of death or injury.

name: Foretell Harm
description: Frequency once per round Requirements Your previous action was to Cast a non-cantrip Spell that dealt damage.Your magic echoes ominously as you glimpse injury in the target's future.

name: Forge-Day's Rest
description: Access underground dwarf ethnicity Your unusual rest cycle allows you to recover faster.

name: Forlorn
description: Watching your friends age and die fills you with moroseness that protects you against harmful emotions.

name: Four Winds
description: Mimicking the anemoi-monarchs of the four winds-you propel four creatures.

name: Foxfire
description: A crack of your tail sparks wisps of blue energy.

name: Fresh Produce
description: You grow a nourishing nut, vegetable, seed, or fruit.

name: Friendly Nudge
description: You don't always have time to wait for your allies to make room, so it's best to politely move them yourself.

name: Fumesoul
description: The air inside you asserts itself as a toxic miasma, inuring you to most poisons.

name: Gemsoul
description: The earth inside you asserts itself as crystallized gemstones or metals, like a cluster of quartz or veins of iron and gold.

name: General Training
description: Your adaptability manifests in your mastery of a range of useful abilities.

name: Genie Weapon Familiarity
description: You've trained with weapons used by your genie ancestors.

name: Geologic Attunement
description: You tune to the earth and stone around you, extending your senses through it in rippling waves.

name: Ghoran Lore
description: The very first memories ghorans have are those of their creation, and even after thousands of years, those memories have never faded for you.

name: Ghoran Weapon Familiarity
description: Over the course of your long, long existence, you've had a chance to practice with traditional ghoran weapons.

name: Ghost Hunter
description: Your connection to the Boneyard ensures that your blows strike true against spectral beings.

name: Gildedsoul
description: Your elemental lineage manifests in the polished gleam of precious metals, such as silver and gold, or even rare and valuable skymetals like adamantine or orichalcum.

name: Glean Contents
description: You are adept at quickly scanning loose papers and carefully discerning the contents of sealed letters without damaging the seal.

name: Glean Lore
description: You tap into the collected lore of the divine, accessing a variety of potentially useful information.

name: Glider Form
description: Your eidolon evolves wings, a buoyant body, or some other means to control descent.

name: Gloomseer
description: Gloom holds few terrors for you, and the pall of darkness over Nidal has made you comfortable in dim light.

name: Gnome Obsession
description: You might have a flighty nature, but when a topic captures your attention, you dive into it headfirst.

name: Gnome Polyglot
description: Your extensive travels, curiosity, and love of learning help you to learn languages quickly.

name: Gnome Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor unusual weapons tied to your people, such as blades with curved and peculiar shapes.

name: Goading Feint
description: Your tricks make foes overextend their attacks.

name: Goblin Lore
description: You've picked up skills and tales from your goblin community.

name: Goblin Scuttle
description: Trigger An ally ends a move action adjacent to you.

name: Goblin Song
description: You sing annoying goblin songs, distracting your foes with silly and repetitive lyrics.

name: Goblin Weapon Familiarity
description: Others might look upon them with disdain, but you know that the weapons of your people are as effective as they are sharp.

name: Goloma Courage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: The most important thing you've learned living with fear is how to overcome it.

name: Goloma Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You lived an insulated life focused on avoiding danger.

name: Gorilla Stance
description: You lower yourself to the ground and take an imposing, knuckle - walking stance.

name: Grasping Reach
description: You can extend a tangle of vines or tendrils to support your arms and extend your reach.

name: Gravesight
description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a psychopomp.

name: Grim Insight
description: Others' attempts to scare you often grant you insights about your would-be bullies that you can then exploit.

name: Grimspawn
description: Your lineage traces back to a daemon, one of the manifestations of horrific forms of death that devour souls within their foul home of Abaddon.

name: Group Coercion
description: You can strong-arm people effectively, even when you don't have them isolated.

name: Group Impression
description: When you , you can compare your Diplomacy check result to the Will DCs of up to 10 targets you conversed with, with no penalty.

name: Grove-Harbored
description: You are accustomed to exploring thick woodlands and defending yourself against the attacks of magical plants.

name: Hag Claws
description: When you came of age, your fingernails grew long and sharp.

name: Hag's Sight
description: You've nurtured the supernatural abilities gifted by your hag mother, particularly your sight.

name: Hail of Splinters
description: A fusillade of jagged splinters flies from you.

name: Halfling Lore
description: You've dutifully learned how to keep your balance and how to stick to the shadows where it's safe, important skills passed down through generations of halfling tradition.

name: Halfling Luck
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a skill check or saving throw.

name: Halfling Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor traditional halfling weapons, so you've learned how to use them more effectively.

name: Halo
description: You have a halo of light and goodness that sheds light with the effects of a divine cantrip.

name: Handy with your Paws
description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to non-magical items, and you don't need a Repair Kit for such repairs as long as you have any amount of junk, spare parts, or debris at your disposal.

name: Haphazard Repair
description: You quickly fix your innovation, at the cost of its stability.

name: Hard Tail
description: Your tail is much stronger than most, and you can lash out with it with the strength of a whip.

name: Hard to Fool
description: You're accustomed to seeing through shifting darkness and bewildering magic.

name: Hardwood Armor
description: Wood and bark grow over your body like armor.

name: Harming Hands
description: The mordant power of your void energy grows.

name: Harmless Doll
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You look like nothing more than an ordinary toy, doll, or statuette, and you can fool others with your innocuous appearance.

name: Harmlessly Cute
description: Your size and demeanor make it easy for you to convince others that you mean no harm.

name: Haughty Obstinacy
description: Your powerful ego makes it harder for others to order you around.

name: Haunt Ingenuity
description: Your cunning knowledge grants you the ability to notice the emotional echo of a soul that passed on, leaving a haunt in its wake.

name: Heal Companion
description: You have a deep devotion to your animal companion that enables you to magically heal their wounds.

name: Healing Hands
description: Your vitality is even more vibrant and restorative.

name: Hefty Hauler
description: You can carry more than your frame implies.

name: Hellspawn
description: Your lineage descends from devils, conniving schemers of Hell.

name: Helpful Poppet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You're particularly skilled at helping others with a task.

name: Hidden Thorn
description: Some flowers can hide their thorns, and yours happen to be hidden along your arms.

name: Hit the Dirt!
description: Trigger A creature you can see attempts a ranged Strike against you.

name: Hobgoblin Lore
description: You've studied traditional hobgoblin exercises and fieldcraft, all of which have a militaristic bent.

name: Hobgoblin Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the hobgoblin trait.

name: Hobnobber
description: You are skilled at learning information through conversation.

name: Hold Mark
description: You bear scars or tattoos enhanced by the mark of your community's prowess.

name: Howling Aspect
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesPulling your hair loose into flames and gnashing your teeth into ragged fangs, you howl a vow of ire, and your form surges to meet the demands of your deadly promise.

name: Hungry Eyes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your eyes can see through darkness with an oni's visual acuity.

name: Hunted Shot
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0.You take two quick shots against the one you hunt.

name: Hunter's Defense
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger A creature with the animal, beast, elemental, fey, fungus, or plant trait attacks you, and you can see the attacker.Your canny understanding of natural and primal creatures helps you predict and dodge their attacks.

name: Hydraulic Deflection
description: Drawing moisture from the atmosphere, you create a disc of hovering water that deflects attacks.

name: Hyena Familiar
description: Hyenas serve kholo as pets and trackers.

name: Hymn of Healing
description: You learn the composition spell, which imbues your music with rich melodies that help your allies recover from harm.

name: Idyllkin
description: Your wild, unique features betray your agathion birthright.

name: Illusion Sense
description: Your ancestors spent their days cloaked and cradled in illusions, and as a result, sensing illusion magic is second nature to you.

name: Impressive Performance
description: Your performances inspire admiration and win you fans.

name: Improvisational Defender
description: You are always prepared for fights that frequently disrupt seemingly peaceful times.

name: Improvise Tool
description: You can jury-rig solutions when you don't have the proper tools on hand.

name: Incredible Initiative
description: You react more quickly than others can.

name: Inherit the Dreaming Heirloom
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Whether you always carried it or perhaps only recently inherited, you have a pusaka—an heirloom containing a spirit who you communicate with in your dreams.

name: Initiate Warden
description: You've trained with one of the ranger sects known as wardens, who practice a specialized type of primal magic.

name: Innate Understanding
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Vague connections to the knowledge and prowess of your past help guide you in tasks that this life might not understand.

name: Inner Fire (Naari)
description: You can call the fire inside you into the palm of your hand.

name: Innocuous
description: Access Jaric ethnicity Halflings have been unobtrusive assistants of larger folk for untold ages, and your people count on this assumption of innocence.

name: Inoculation
description: You have practice combating plague, and your patients are less likely to succumb to the same disease again for a time.

name: Internal Cohesion
description: Axis's order suffuses your body and helps it maintain coherency.

name: Internal Compartment
description: You can hide a small object of up to light Bulk inside a hollow cavity on one of your forearms.

name: Intimidating Glare
description: You can with a mere glare.

name: Intuitive Cooperation
description: Access Jaric ethnicity You are accustomed to working alongside others, relying on each other to get by.

name: Intuitive Crafting
description: Your affinity with process and order makes you a natural artisan.

name: Inventive Offensive
description: You can jury-rig your weapons to perform in unexpected ways.

name: Iron Belly
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: A good laugh comes from the belly, and by laughing every day, yours has grown quite strong.

name: Iron Fists
description: Your fists have been forged by battle, your naturally tough skin and dense bone further hardened by conflict.

name: Iron Repercussions
description: Disobeying your has lasting consequences.

name: Irrepressible (Nephilim)
description: Your slight otherworldly nature allows you to easily brush off emotional manipulation.

name: Iruxi Armaments
description: Your weapons are those you were born with.

name: It Takes a Village
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your community bond creates better dynamics when working together.

name: Jungle Strider
description: You are adept at dodging roots, foliage, and other jungle obstacles.

name: Junk Tinker
description: You can make useful tools out of even twisted or rusted scraps.

name: Keen Nose
description: Accustomed to the foul air of underground tunnels, your sense of smell is sharpened, and noxious scents are less offensive.

name: Keep up Appearances
description: Access Taldan nationality Trigger You are affected by an emotion effect.

name: Kholo Lore
description: You paid close attention to the senior hunters in your clan to learn their tricks.

name: Kholo Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kholo trait.

name: Kitsune Lore
description: You excel at navigating social situations and keeping secrets.

name: Kitsune Spell Familiarity
description: You've picked up a few magical tricks.

name: Know Oneself
description: Frequency once per day Access Vudrani ethnicity Trigger You roll a critical failure on a saving throw against an emotion effect.

name: Know Your Own
description: You've spent countless hours studying the history of elves on your world and beyond and are a studied expert in your people's ways.

name: Known Weaknesses
description: Whenever you , you can also attempt a check to Recall Knowledge as part of that action before rolling the d20.

name: Kobold Breath
description: You channel your draconic exemplar's power into a gout of energy that manifests as a @Template[line|distance:30] or a @Template[cone|distance:15], dealing @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[@actor.flags.pf2e.draconicExemplar.damageType]|options:area-damage] damage.

name: Kobold Lore
description: You attentively learned key kobold survival strategies from your elders.

name: Kobold Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kobold trait.

name: Koi Secrets
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originDue to their beautiful colors, ornamental koi are often found in parks and gardens where townsfolk roam.

name: Land Legs
description: You are comfortable on land for a short time.

name: Lavasoul
description: Your elemental lineage manifests as magma and molten rock, and you can focus the magma into your hand to attack your foes.

name: Lawbringer
description: You trace your lineage to archons, guardians of the seven-tiered mountain of Heaven and nurturers of law and virtue within mortals.

name: Learn by Watching
description: Before your awakening, you watched humanoids performing some skill near you frequently.

name: Leech-Clip
description: You are trained to capture deserters, or "leeches." Make a melee Strike with weapon from the flail group.

name: Lengthy Diversion
description: When you critically succeed to , you continue to remain after the end of your turn.

name: Leshy Familiar
description: You call a minor spirit of nature into a plant body, creating a leshy companion to aid you in your spellcasting.

name: Leshy Lore
description: You deeply understand your people's cultural traditions and innate strengths.

name: Leshy Superstition
description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a spell or magical effect, but haven't rolled yet.

name: Lesser Enhance Venom
description: Your venom grows deadlier and more plentiful.

name: Lie to Me
description: You can use Deception to weave traps to trip up anyone trying to deceive you.

name: Life-Giving Magic
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You cast an innate spell from a gnome heritage or ancestry feat.

name: Lightning Tongue
description: Your tongue darts out faster than the eye can see to retrieve loose objects.

name: Lingering Composition
description: By adding a flourish, you make your compositions last longer.

name: Living Weapon
description: You've learned to use part of your form as a weapon.

name: Lizardfolk Lore
description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

name: Made for Combat
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can use your body as a deadly weapon.

name: Magnetic Pinions
description: Small pieces of metal fly from you, propelled with magnetism at great velocity.

name: Magus's Analysis
description: You make an assessment informed by your knowledge of how a creature fights.

name: Maiden's Mending
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You cast a non-cantrip occult spell or an innate spell from a changeling ancestry feat.

name: Mariner's Fire
description: You conjure uncanny orbs of spiritual flame that float above or below the water's surface.

name: Marsh Runner
description: When you use the Step action, you can ignore difficult terrain caused by flooding, swamps, or quicksand.

name: Martial Performance
description: Your muse has taught you how to handle a wider variety of weapons than most bards, empowering you to effortlessly blend your performance into combat tools.

name: Medical Researcher
description: Kassi has taught you not only how to apply medicines with your medical skills but how to craft them as well.

name: Meld into Eidolon
description: Your physical form can combine with that of your eidolon, granting benefits but limiting your capabilities.

name: Mental Buffer
description: Your mind deflects some amount of harm from attacks that induce pain or manipulate your mind directly.

name: Mental Sustenance
description: You can sustain yourself with the power of your mind.

name: Merfolk Lore
description: You paid close attention to your lessons in school.

name: Merfolk Weapon Familiarity
description: You were taught the most effective weapons of the sea.

name: Metal Carapace
description: Sheets of bent and rusted metal cover you in an armored shell.

name: Meticulous Restorer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Waste not, want not; your steady eye allows you to restore craftwork quickly while conserving valuable material.

name: Minotaur Lore
description: You were raised in a minotaur enclave or have spent a great deal of time studying your culture and ancestry.

name: Minotaur Weapon Familiarity
description: Your elders taught you to wield weapons that can split skulls and smash through shields.

name: Minuscule Mentee
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've found a fellow poppet on the cusp of awakening and decided to help.

name: Miresoul
description: You have a connection to the muddier denizens of the Plane of Earth from its border with the Plane of Water, and your elemental lineage manifests as clay or mud, reflecting that bond.

name: Mirror-Risen
description: You were created from magic involving mirrors and still retain some ability to seek refuge in reflected illusions.

name: Mistsoul
description: You have a connection to vaporous forms of water, such as fog and mist.

name: Moldersoul
description: Your connection to elemental wood asserts itself in the form of decay, like forgotten logs left to rot and the char that remains after a forest fire, cycles of devastation clearing away what was to make room for the next generation of life.

name: Molten Wit
description: Your elemental soul has sparked not just your body but also your mind.

name: Moment of Clarity
description: You push back your rage for a moment in order to think clearly.

name: Monastic Archer Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored and wielding a longbow, shortbow, or a bow with the monk trait.

name: Monastic Weaponry
description: You have trained with the weaponry of your monastery or school.

name: Monster Hunter
description: You quickly assess your prey and apply what you know.

name: Monstrous Peacemaker
description: Your dual human and orc nature has given you a unique perspective, allowing you to bridge the gap between humans and the many intelligent creatures in the world that humans consider monsters.

name: Moon May
description: Your mother was a moon hag, a handmaiden of Groetus, and you have a single scarlet eye and a sliver of her supernal foresight.

name: Morph-Risen
description: You were once a shapeshifter or spellcaster using polymorph magic, but something went wrong, and you became trapped in the form of the creature you were imitating.

name: Morphic Strike
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can lash out with a portion of your previous self.

name: Mountain Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored and touching the groundYou enter the stance of an implacable mountain—a technique created by dwarven monks—allowing you to strike with the weight of an avalanche and block blows with your garments.

name: Mountain Strategy
description: Dwarves have a long history fighting common foes, and you've mastered the ancient tactics to better face these enemies.

name: Multilingual
description: You easily pick up new languages.

name: Munitions Crafter
description: Bullets and bombs can be scarce in some parts, so you've learned to make your own.

name: Musetouched
description: Your blood sings with the liberating power of the azatas, living embodiments of freedom from the wild realm of Elysium.

name: Nagaji Lore
description: You're the vassal or apprentice of a learned naga, and you've studied the secrets of naga magic and concocting intricate poisons.

name: Nagaji Spell Familiarity
description: Either through study, exposure, or familial devotion, you have the magic of nagas bubbling in your blood.

name: Nalinivati's Light
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your slit eyes expand to absorb light and can see in the darkest of places.

name: Nanite Surge
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You attempt a skill check requiring three actions or fewer.

name: Native Waters
description: You were born with or obtained a special connection to either fresh water or salt water.

name: Natural Ambition
description: You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field.

name: Natural Medicine
description: You can apply natural cures to heal your allies.

name: Natural Mutagen
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can distill your natural shapeshifting ability into an elixir that grants a lesser ability to morph.

name: Natural Performer
description: Entertainment comes naturally to you.

name: Natural Senses
description: You have retained your sharp animal senses even after awakening.

name: Natural Skill
description: Your ingenuity allows you to learn a wide variety of skills.

name: Nephilim Eyes
description: Your eyes can see through darkness with visual acuity akin to that possessed by most extraplanar beings.

name: Nephilim Lore
description: You know the secrets of the Multiverse.

name: Nightvision Adaptation
description: The nanites in your ocular processors have adapted to darkness, enhancing your ability to see in the dark.

name: Nimble Dodge
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

name: Nimble Elf
description: Your muscles are tightly honed.

name: Nimble Hooves
description: You possess hooves, ankle wings, or some other feature that hastens your movement.

name: Nimble Reprisal
description: You can use at greater distance.

name: No Cause for Alarm
description: You attempt to reduce panic.

name: No! No! I Created You!
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger Your construct companion would become or .You appeal to your construct companion's bond with its creator to have it break free of a controlling effect.

name: Nocturnal Charm
description: The supernatural charm of your vampiric progenitor hangs about you, and you've learned to use it on mortals.

name: Nocturnal Tripkee
description: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life.

name: Nosoi's Mask
description: Many psychopomps wear masks when dealing with the living, and many cultures believe that seeing an unmasked psychopomp's face invites death.

name: Nudge the Scales
description: You lay a finger on the scales of life and death to heal a creature, regardless of whether it's living or undead.

name: Occult Dragonblood
description: Your blood contains a tiny fragment of unusual or inexplicable power from a mysterious dragon, such as a conspirator dragon or omen dragon.

name: Ocean Wariness
description: Stories about those who have mistreated your people in the past (particularly stories about alghollthu mind control) left you untrusting of those outside your community.

name: Ocean's Balm
description: A blessing of the living sea salves wounds and douses flames.

name: Ocean's Bite
description: Your jaws open wider than a humanoid mouth should, showing off multiple rows of serrated shark teeth or a viperfish-like nest of needles.

name: Oddity Identification
description: When you become aware of a magical effect or see a spell being cast, you can immediately determine if it twists minds (with the mental trait), fights against fortune (with the fortune or misfortune trait), or reveals secrets (with the detection, prediction, revelation, or scrying traits).

name: Old Soul
description: Your immortal lineage has granted you a lifespan much longer than most mortals, and you've learned a lot along the way.

name: One for All
description: With precisely the right words of encouragement, you bolster an ally's efforts.

name: One-Toed Hop
description: Assuming a peculiar stance, you make a short hop on each toe.

name: Ongoing Selfishness
description: Your powerful personality and incredible ego demand that you protect yourself above all else.

name: Oni Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your horns flash briefly as you grow in size and ferocity.

name: Oni Weapon Familiarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Oni prefer large, cruel weapons for smashing their foes to pieces, and so do you.

name: Open Mind
description: You have inherent psychic abilities that allow you to tap into the power of your mind.

name: Oracular Warning
description: Trigger You are about to roll initiative.You have a premonition about impending danger that you use to warn your allies.

name: Orc Ferocity
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

name: Orc Lore
description: The hold elders taught you your people's histories, told tales of great athletic feats, and shared with you the hardships your ancestors endured so that you can pass this wisdom down to future generations.

name: Orc Sight
description: Your orc blood grants you the keen vision of your forebears.

name: Orc Superstition
description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a spell or magical effect, and have not yet rolled.

name: Orc Warmask
description: You paint your face to create a Warmask, an invested magic item of negligible Bulk with an item level equal to your level and a usage of worn (mask).

name: Orc Weapon Familiarity
description: In combat, you favor the brutal weapons that are traditional for your orc ancestors.

name: Otherworldly Magic
description: Your elven magic manifests as a simple arcane spell, even if you aren't formally trained in magic.

name: Overextending Feint
description: You goad a foe into overextending.

name: Overlooked Mastermind
description: Many consider half-orcs little more than dumb brutes.

name: Pack Hunter
description: You were taught how to hunt as part of a pack.

name: Pack Rat
description: You've learned how to cram vast quantities into small spaces.

name: Pantheon Magic
description: The touch of divine meddling still runs through you, whether you want it or not.

name: Parthenogenic Hatchling
description: You were hatched from an unfertilized egg during hard times for your people, and are a biological copy of your mother.

name: Pelagic Aptitude
description: You've learned special tricks to survive underwater.

name: Perfect Dive
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You dive into the water with exceptional skill and connection to the waves, urging the water itself to cushion your fall.

name: Pet
description: You have a pet—a Tiny animal of a type you choose, such as a cat, bird, or rodent.

name: Phantom Visage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You cloak yourself in illusions to mask your nature.

name: Pheromonal Message
description: Your communicative pheromones are particularly well developed from years of living with other athamarus.

name: Pickpocket
description: You can or that's closely guarded, such as in a pocket, without taking the –5 penalty.

name: Pierce the Darkness
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your eyes have adapted to see in all circumstances, even without the assistance of light.

name: Pilgrim's Token
prerequisites: trained in Religion, follower of a specific religion
description: You carry a small token of protection from a site holy to your faith.

name: Pitborn
description: Your blood bears the mark of a demon, a living embodiment of sin from the fetid depths of the Outer Rifts.

name: Plant Empathy
description: You have a connection to flora that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

name: Plant Evidence
description: You can put a single item you're holding of light or negligible Bulk onto a person without them noticing by succeeding at a @Check[thievery|defense:perception] check against their Perception DC.

name: Play Dead
description: You lie and pretend to be an ordinary skeleton.

name: Plumekith
description: Your blood soars with the power of the magnificent garuda, proud and stoic avian warriors.

name: Plummeting Roll
description: Through nimble movements, a graceful landing, and a bit of luck, you can manage to fall from spectacular heights without a scratch.

name: Point Blank Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon.

name: Political Acumen
description: You have spent years following the political maneuvering and secret alliances of elves in Iadara.

name: Polymorphic Escape
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You would become , , , or .You polymorph into a tiny vermin, a cloud of leaves, or another shape that allows you to escape.

name: Practiced Brawn
description: You're accustomed to long days filled with hard physical labor.

name: Prairie Rider
description: You grew up riding your clan's shaggy ponies and riding dogs.

name: Premonition of Avoidance
description: Trigger You are about to roll a saving throw against a hazard.

name: Prepare Elemental Medicine
prerequisites: trained in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou diagnose your patient, then prepare and administer a dose of elemental medicine to a creature.

name: Primal Dragonblood
description: A dragon with a deep connection to the natural world, such as an adamantine dragon or a horned dragon, resides somewhere on your family tree.

name: Progenitor Lore
description: You didn't just inherit your physical form from your progenitor; you also retained some of their knowledge.

name: Proteankin
description: Your blood bubbles with the roiling quintessence of the Maelstrom, the infinite sea of primal chaos that long ago spawned the other Outer Planes.

name: Prototype Companion
description: You have created a construct companion, and while it might not be an innovation, it serves as a trustworthy minion.

name: Proximity Alert
description: You're unnaturally in tune with your surroundings and react instinctively to danger.

name: Psychic Rapport
description: Your telepathic sensitivity intensifies when you're affected by mental magic, making it easier for you to link to other creatures.

name: Puncturing Horn
description: While many kashrishi never use their horns for more than cracking open hard-shelled fruits or amplifying their psychic powers, you've practiced using yours offensively.

name: Pyrophilic Recovery
description: You rely on fire and extreme heat to sprout and regrow.

name: Qi Spells
description: You have cultivated your qi to produce magical effects.

name: Quadruped
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You were crafted in a form with four legs rather than two.

name: Quah Bond
description: Access Shoanti ethnicity You grew up among the Shoanti tribes, with the spirits watching over you, and they offer you guidance.

name: Quick Bomber
description: You keep your bombs and bomb-related reagents in easy-toreach pouches from which you draw without thinking.

name: Quick Coercion
description: You can bully others with just a few choice implications.

name: Quick Identification
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You can Identify Magic swiftly.

name: Quick Jump
description: You can use and as a single action instead of 2 actions.

name: Quick Repair
description: For you, the activity loses the exploration trait and takes 1 minute instead of 10 minutes.

name: Quick Shape
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Quick Squeeze
description: You Squeeze 5 feet per round (10 feet on a critical success).

name: Quicksoul
description: The elemental metal in your bloodline literally courses through your veins in the form of liquid metals like mercury, rubidium, gallium, and djezet, giving your actions a languid fluidity.

name: Radiant Circuitry
description: Your biological circuitry emits light like a torch, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

name: Raging Intimidation
description: Your fury fills your foes with fear.

name: Raging Thrower
description: Thrown weapons become especially deadly in your fury.

name: Rain of Embers Stance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You are unarmored.

name: Raise a Tome
description: Requirements You're holding a book.

name: Rat Familiar
description: You have a pet rat that has become magically bonded to you.

name: Ratfolk Lore
description: Years of experience among ratfolk communities have made you nimble, and you've learned to run and hide when enemies threaten.

name: Ratspeak
description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with rodents, including beavers, mice, porcupines, rats, and squirrels, but not with other mammals, such as dogs or bats.

name: Ravening's Desperation
description: Your study of the Beast of Gluttondark has taught you how to make do in the most trying of circumstances rather than succumb to weakness.

name: Razzle-Dazzle
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You blind or dazzle a creature.

name: Reach Spell
description: You can extend your spells' range.

name: Reactive Shield
description: Trigger An enemy hits you with a melee Strike.

name: Read Lips
description: You can read lips of others nearby who you can clearly see.

name: Read Psychometric Resonance
description: With a touch, you can read the psychic impressions left on objects by their previous owners.

name: Reassuring Presence
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet gains the frightened condition.

name: Recognize Spell
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism or Religion
description: Trigger A creature within line of sight casts a spell that you don't have prepared or in your spell repertoire, or a trap or similar object casts such a spell.

name: Refined Motion in Darkness
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The ability to move elegantly and undetected through darkness aided your people as they fled the Netherworld.

name: Reflective Defense
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger A creature within 30 feet of you targets you, and you can see the attacker.

name: Reflective Ripple Stance
description: Requirements You're unarmored.You enter a stance of fluid grace as small amounts of water flow with your movements and attacks.

name: Reinforced Chassis
description: Your body is designed to be particularly resilient.

name: Relinquish Control
description: Trigger Your turn begins.Your apparition takes over and shields you from outside influence.

name: Remnants of the Past
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Memories of your first life are strong and continually return to you, even after several incarnations.

name: Remorseless Lash
description: You're skilled at beating an enemy when their morale is already breaking.

name: Reptile Rider
description: To you, crocodilians, giant lizards, and dinosaurs are loyal steeds, not monsters.

name: Reptile Speaker
description: You hear the sounds of reptiles as language.

name: Retractable Claws
description: You gain a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage.

name: Reveal True Name
prerequisites: trained in Intimidation, trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You attempt to get a creature to do as you wish by threatening them with your knowledge of their true name.

name: Ride
description: When you you're mounted on to take a move action (such as Stride), you automatically succeed instead of needing to attempt a check.

name: Riftmarked
description: Long ago, qlippoth marked someone in your lineage, most likely through their ancient runestones that dot Golarion's surface.

name: Rimesoul
description: The water inside you is cold and frozen, like sheets of ice and frigid glaciers.

name: Risky Surgery
description: Your surgery can bring a patient back from the brink of death, but might push them over the edge.

name: Rivethun Disciple
