description: Access Rivethun Adherent background or you are a member of the Rivethun By studying with the dwarven shamans of Highhelm, you have become aware of the friction between your body and spirit.

name: Rock Runner
description: Your innate connection to stone makes you adept at moving across uneven surfaces.

name: Root Magic
description: Your talismans ward against foul magic.

name: Root to Life
description: Marigold, spider lily, pennyroyal-many primal traditions connect flowers and plants with the boundary between life and death, and you can leverage this association to keep an ally on this side of the line.

name: Rough Rider
description: You are especially good at riding traditional goblin mounts.

name: Round Ears
description: Your elven lineage is subtle enough that you look barely different from other humans, and you've learned to use that to your advantage.

name: Ru-shi
description: You were born to a jiang-shi, one of the so-called hopping vampires found most often in Tian-Xia.

name: Rushing Goat Stance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're unarmored.You enter the stance of an unruly goat, lowering your body and preparing to butt heads with your foes.

name: Saber Teeth
description: You have long fangs, natural or augmented.

name: Sage of Scattered Leaves
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The epics of your people's tragic yet proud history blaze like burning leaves in the forests of ancestral memory.

name: Samsaran Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You have untold ages of knowledge beneath your belt, focused on the pursuit of enlightenment.

name: Samsaran Weapon Memory
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The training of your past lives and even of those of samsarans who came before is deep-seated and guides your movements in combat.

name: Sanctified Soul
description: You've drawn a line in the sand in the cosmic struggle between good and evil and chosen a side.

name: Saoc Astrology
description: Frequency 3 times per day Access Lirgeni nationality Requirements You must spend 10 minutes just after your daily preparations examining the sky or consulting a star chart or you can't use this action that day.

name: Sarangay Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

name: Scaly Hide
description: You were born with a layer of scales across your entire body that resemble those of your draconic progenitor.

name: Scamper
description: Requirements You are adjacent to at least one enemy.You Stride up to your Speed, with a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement.

name: Scamper Underfoot
description: You are used to ducking under foes and can scurry around the battlefield with ease.

name: Scavenger's Search
description: You're always on the lookout for supplies and valuables.

name: Scholar's Inheritance
description: Your parents devoted themselves to alchemical experiments involving elemental energy.

name: Schooled in Secrets
description: You notice the signs and symbols that members of mystery cults and other secret societies use to declare their affiliation to fellow members.

name: Scorched on the Crackling Mountain
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: By ritualistically marking your fur with fire, like an infamous tanuki of legend, you protect yourself against future flames.

name: Scorching Column
description: With an upward gesture, you shape a vertical column of extreme heat.

name: Scroll Thaumaturgy
description: Your multidisciplinary study of magic means you know how to activate the magic in scrolls with ease.

name: Scuttle Up
description: Your environment requires you to climb cave walls or tree trunks with great regularity.

name: Sea Legs
prerequisites: You don't have a swim Speed.
description: You are comfortable on the water for short bursts.

name: Seasoned
prerequisites: trained in Alcohol Lore, Cooking Lore, or Crafting
description: You've mastered the preparation of many types of food and drink.

name: Seasong
description: Sound carries far beneath the waves, and your people have strong, enchanting voices.

name: Secret Speech
description: Choose a secret society (such as the Lacunafex or the Bellflower Network).

name: Seedpod
description: Your body produces a nearly endless supply of hard seedpods.

name: Sensitive Nose
description: Your large black nose isn't just for show.

name: Sequestered Spell
description: You consumed so much of a type of magic as a larva that you can now cast it purely on instinct.

name: Serpent's Tongue
description: You subconsciously flick your tongue through the air to taste the world around you.

name: Seven Changes Performance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: While kitsune are known for their magical illusion powers, you're skilled at stage magic, especially costuming and quick changes.

name: Shackleborn
description: Your lineage shows the signs of velstrac tampering, including some curious quirk bequeathed by those shadowy surgeons of flesh and souls.

name: Shadow Blending
description: Trigger A creature attempts a flat check to target you while you're or due to dim light or darkness.

name: Shadow of the Wilds
description: It's difficult to notice your passage through wild areas.

name: Shapechanger's Intuition
description: A lifetime of experience helps you see through disguises.

name: Shard Strike
description: Jagged metal shards form in the air and lash out from you.

name: Share Thoughts
description: You have an uncanny knack of communicating with other elves without speaking, though this habit that is often uncomfortable to observers.

name: Shield Block
description: Trigger While you have your shield raised, you would take physical damage (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing) from an attack.

name: Shiny Button Eyes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You've polished your eyes to reflect the smallest details in dimmest light.

name: Shisk Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You hoard knowledge like a dragon hoards gold.

name: Shoony Lore
description: Growing up in shoony society, you learned the value of honesty, friendship, and hard work, even during trying times.

name: Shore Step
description: The shallows and tide pools have always called to you and let you pass unhindered.

name: Shrouded Magic
description: Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list.

name: Shrouded Mien
description: You're used to dealing with dangerous situations and sinister creatures.

name: Sign Language
description: You learn the sign languages associated with the languages you know, allowing you to sign and understand signs.

name: Silent Stone
description: You've lived in the shadow of the Shattered Range, and the patience of those ancient mountains expresses itself in your stillness.

name: Sinister Appearance
description: You possess horns, a tail, or red eyes, or could otherwise be mistaken for a tiefling.

name: Skill Training
description: You become trained in the skill of your choice.

name: Skilled Herbalist
description: You've been taught how to craft healing remedies with a variety of herbs and plants.

name: Skittertalk
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with spiders and other arachnids.

name: Skull Creeper
description: You wear skulls to demoralize foes.

name: Slag May
description: Your mother was an iron hag known for physical prowess, and you have one violet or steel-gray eye.

name: Slink
description: You can move through gloom with the speed of darkness.

name: Slither
description: You are an expert at moving through extremely tight spaces.

name: Small Speak
description: You understand the languages of most small insects and can speak to them.

name: Smashing Tail
description: You have a tail that serves as a potent weapon.

name: Smokesoul
description: You have a connection to smoke and haze.

name: Snagging Strike
description: Requirements You have one hand free, and your target is within reach of that hand.

name: Snare Crafting
description: You can use the Craft activity to create snares.

name: Snare Setter
description: You are adept at the time-honored kobold art of making traps.

name: Sneaky
description: Stealth is an important tool in your arsenal.

name: Snow May
description: You're the child of a winter hag, with one blue-white eye and an affinity for rime and snow.

name: Sociable
description: You're extremely extroverted, and you often spend your time carousing or otherwise socializing.

name: Social Camouflage
description: You have the uncanny ability to quickly blend into the lifestyle of whatever settlement in which you find yourself.

name: Soothing Vials
description: The healing chemicals in your versatile vials also help calm a patient's mind.

name: Speak with Bats
description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with bats.

name: Specialty Crafting
description: Your training focused on Crafting one particular kind of item.

name: Speedrun Strats
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Whenever you take a move action to Stride, you can attempt a @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] check to roll forward.Critical Success You gain 5 extra feet of movement to your Speeds and can move through solid obstacles such as walls until the end of your Stride action.

name: Spellbook Prodigy
description: You are particularly adept at learning spells to add to your spellbook.

name: Spelunker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Living underground, you have learned to find your way without landmarks or even solid ground.

name: Spine Stabber
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: The quills on your arms are particularly sharp and sturdy.

name: Spirit Coffin
prerequisites: bakuwa lizardfolk heritage or Tian Xia origin
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: A hump forms on your back that allows you to attack and trap spirits.

name: Spirit Familiar (Animist)
description: When you attune to your apparitions during your daily preparations, you can choose to dedicate a small amount of your life force to allow one of them to physically manifest as a familiar, which gains the spirit trait.

name: Splinter Faith
description: Your faith in your deity is represented in an extremely unusual way that some might call heretical.

name: Springsoul
description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as fresh blossoms, spring fruits, and the seeds of new life, and you harness this power to spread vitality and abundance.

name: Sprite's Spark
description: You can fling a portion of your magic at foes.

name: Squawk!
description: Trigger You critically fail a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check against a creature that doesn't have the tengu trait.You let out an awkward squawk, ruffle your feathers, or fake some other birdlike tic to cover up a social misstep or faux pas.

name: Star Orb
description: Your magic has crystallized into a spherical stone.

name: Startling Appearance (Fleshwarp)
description: You are trained in Intimidation (or another skill of your choice, if you were already trained in Intimidation) and gain the skill feat as a bonus feat.

name: Steady Balance
description: You can keep your balance easily, even in adverse conditions.

name: Steady on Stone
description: Your connection to the earth makes natural uneven surfaces less of a hindrance for you.

name: Steadying Stone
description: The earth has taught you how to remain unyielding and firm.

name: Steelhoof
description: You've girded your hooves in steel or other reinforcements aimed to inflict maximum damage.

name: Stepping Stones
description: Disks of rock fly to points that you designate to make a new path.

name: Stitch Flesh
description: You can use to restore Hit Points to undead creatures, not just living ones.

name: Stoked Flame Stance
description: Requirements You're unarmored.

name: Stone Face
description: You've mastered the art of composure, even in the face of fear.

name: Stonemason's Eye
description: You understand the intricacies of stonework.

name: Storm Born
description: You are at home out in the elements, reveling in the power of nature unleashed.

name: Storm's Lash
description: Wind and lightning have always been friends to you.

name: Stormsoul
description: Your elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as tumultuous, thundering storms, with dark clouds and bolts of lightning.

name: Story Crooner
description: You're a talented story weaver and use your voice effectively.

name: Straveika
description: You descend from one of the truly ancient vampires, a nosferatu cursed to eternal life but not eternal youth.

name: Streetwise
description: You know about life on the streets and feel the pulse of your local settlement.

name: Striking Retribution
description: You have an appropriately intense hatred for alghollthus.

name: Strix Defender
description: Your ancestral feud with humans gives you experience dealing with vicious foes, and your vengeance knows no bounds.

name: Strix Lore
description: You're well connected to your tribe and perhaps even strix communities beyond your own, where you've learned about the land and techniques of graceful movement.

name: Student of the Canon
description: You've researched many faiths enough to recognize notions about them that are unlikely to be true.

name: Studious Magic
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You've taken an interest in anadi arcane traditions.

name: Stumbling Stance
description: You enter a seemingly unfocused stance that mimics the movements of the inebriated-bobbing, weaving, leaving false openings, and distracting your enemies from your true movements.

name: Sublime Mobility
description: Your heritage has granted you either impressive athletic skill or a physical feature that aids in traversal.

name: Subtle Theft
description: When you successfully something, observers (creatures other than the creature you stole from) take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Perception DCs to detect your theft.

name: Sudden Charge
description: With a quick sprint, you dash up to your foe and swing.

name: Sudden Mindfulness
description: Trigger You roll a success on a saving throw against an effect that would make you or .

name: Sudden Terror
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You leverage your body's amorphous nature to spook others.

name: Suli-jann
description: Your elemental ancestor was a janni, genies that walk the mortal world and embody all four elements together.

name: Sunlit Vitality
description: You gain nourishment through photosynthesis, like trees and other green plants.

name: Sure Feet
description: Whether keeping your balance or climbing, your feet easily find purchase.

name: Surface Culture
description: Access any surface dwarf ethnicity Your interactions with other cultures on the surface have not only taught you about many other ancestries, but have also helped you realize the value of your own.

name: Surface Skimmer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: By sinking gently beneath the waves, you obscure your presence and utilize the water as a barrier between you and land combatants.

name: Surki Lore
description: Either through the tales of elders in your settlement or through the messages thumped by those who oversaw your generation dig, you hold the knowledge of many surkis before you.

name: Surki Weapon Familiarity
description: Surki weapons favor utility and practicality over grace and brutality.

name: Survey Wildlife
description: You can study details in the wilderness to determine the presence of nearby creatures.

name: Svetocher
description: You were born to a moroi, the most common vampires, and you share their supernatural fortitude and power of persuasion.

name: Swift
description: You move with the wind always at your back.

name: Swimmer's Guidance
description: You're always ready to help those floundering in the water.

name: Sword and Pistol
description: You're comfortable wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand and a melee weapon in the other, combining melee attacks with shots from the firearm.

name: Syncretism
description: You have come to see the overlap between two deities' teachings.

name: Take Flight
description: Frequency once per round Though it's not fully effective, much of your ability to fly has stayed with you.

name: Takedown Expert
description: You've mastered combat practices that let you get up close and bring down perpetrators alive.

name: Tame Animal
description: Animals born and raised far from humanoid settlements rarely get along with two-legged beings, whom they assume to be dangerous predators.

name: Tamper
description: You tamper with a foe's weapon or armor, using a free hand.

name: Tangle of Limbs
prerequisites: dokkaebi goblin heritage or Tian Xia origin
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Dokkaebi have a strong tradition of wrestling.

name: Tangle-Tongue's Wit
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your talent for language is a blessing from the yaksha makers of old.

name: Tanuki Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Tanuki love to play two things: tricks and music.

name: Tap into Blood
description: Requirements You are benefiting from a blood magic effectThe power in your blood allows you to perform minor feats of magic.

name: Teakettle Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your shapeshifting is advanced enough to take the form of not just creatures, but objects as well.

name: Tengu Lore
description: You learned skills for surviving in the place where your people were dispersed.

name: Tengu Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tengu trait plus the katana, khakkara, temple sword, and wakizashi.

name: Terrain Expertise
description: Your experience in navigating a certain type of terrain makes you supremely confident while doing so.

name: Terrain Stalker
description: Select one type of difficult terrain from the following list: rubble, snow, or underbrush.

name: Terrifying Croak
description: You release a haunting croak that reminds those around you of their fears.

name: That's Odd
description: When you enter a new location, such as a room or corridor, you immediately notice one thing out of the ordinary.

name: Theoretical Acumen
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You succeed at a skill check to to identify a creature.

name: Throat Pocket
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've trained to use unique nagaji eating habits to your advantage.

name: Tidal Hands
description: With an emphatic gesture, you create waves that rush out from you in the shape of your hands.

name: Tide-hardened
description: You're at home in the unpredictable tides.

name: Tiger Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored You enter the stance of a tiger and can make tiger claw attacks.

name: Timber Sentinel
description: A slim, symmetrical tree travels from the Plane of Wood.

name: Tinkering Fingers
description: You're trained in Crafting.

name: Titan Slinger
description: You have learned how to use your sling to fell enormous creatures.

name: Titan Wrestler
description: You can attempt to , , , , or creatures up to two sizes larger than you, or up to three sizes larger than you if you're legendary in Athletics.

name: Tooth and Claw
description: You've become adept with your born weapons.

name: Tough Skin
description: Your skin is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, and has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of +3, and the comfort trait.

name: Toughness
description: Your body can withstand more punishment than most before succumbing.

name: Traditional Ways
description: You are a fervent follower of the long-standing elven traditions established when your people returned to Kyonin.

name: Train Animal
description: You spend time teaching an animal to do a certain action.

name: Trap Finder
description: You have an intuitive sense that alerts you to the dangers and presence of traps.

name: Traveler's Counsel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: On your travels, you've resolved countless disputes and counseled those in need.

name: Tremor
description: You unleash a small, localized tremor in a @Template[burst|distance:10] within 30 feet.

name: Trick Magic Item
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You examine a magic item you normally couldn't use in an effort to fool it and activate it temporarily.

name: Tripkee Lore
description: You are well versed in tripkee culture and tactics.

name: Tripkee Weapon Familiarity
description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tripkee trait.

name: Tumble Behind (Rogue)
description: You tumble under and behind your foe, your rapid movement letting you catch them off guard.

name: Tupilaq Carver
prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature with the divine or primal tradition
description: Access Erutaki ethnicity You know the truth behind old stories that tell of sending a fetish of bone and sinew to seek vengeance.

name: Tusks (Half-Orc)
description: Most half-orcs have visible tusks, but yours are particularly large and sharp, capable of gouging deep wounds.

name: Tusks (Orc)
description: You have particularly long, jagged tusks perfect for tearing meat from bone.

name: Twilight Dweller
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're accustomed to shaded forests and caves.

name: Twin Feint
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Twin Stars
description: Usage imbued into a one-handed weapon ikonYour divine spark embodies a primordial duality, and your ikon splits itself accordingly into two corresponding halves.

name: Twin Takedown
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Twisting Petal Stance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're unarmored.Your body moves like a petal twisting on the wind, confounding your opponents while using their energy against them.

name: Twitchy
description: You are naturally suspicious and wary of danger, especially when you suspect someone might be leading you into an ambush.

name: Unassuming Dedication
description: Access Uhlam ethnicity Your family instilled the values of care and patience into you from a young age.

name: Unbowed, Unbroken
description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as resilience—towering trees, rough bark, deep roots, and patient determination.

name: Unburdened Iron
description: You've learned techniques first devised by your ancestors during their ancient wars, allowing you to comfortably wear massive suits of armor.

name: Uncanny Agility
description: You have near-supernatural poise that lets you move swiftly across the most unsteady surfaces.

name: Unconventional Weaponry
description: You've familiarized yourself with a particular weapon, potentially from another ancestry or culture.

name: Undaunted
description: Your spirit has endured many challenges over its long existence.

name: Undead Empathy
description: Your relationship with undeath gives you a stronger bond with other undead.

name: Undead Spotter
description: Your studies of the undead have taught you telltale signs of a disguised undead creature.

name: Underwater Marauder
description: You've learned to fight underwater.

name: Underworld Investigator
description: Your work as an investigator makes you familiar with the criminal element.

name: Unexpected Shift
description: Trigger You would take damage from an attack, spell, or other effect.

name: Unfetter Eidolon
description: You can allow your eidolon to travel far from your side.

name: Unfettered Halfling
description: You were either pressed into indentured servitude or shackled in a prison, but you've since escaped and have trained to ensure you'll never be caught again.

name: Unimpeded Step
description: With a burst of divine liberation, your ally's movement from your is unaffected by difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, narrow surfaces, and uneven ground.

name: Untamed Form
description: You are one with the wild, always changing and adapting to meet any challenge.

name: Unwavering Guide
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Sharp-eyed and sure-footed, your presence is a boon to those you guide.

name: Unwavering Mien
description: Your mystic control and meditations allow you to resist external influences upon your consciousness.

name: Vampire Lore
description: You were raised by your vampiric parent, or you've invested substantial time and energy researching the secrets of your undead progenitors.

name: Vanara Lore
description: You attained the cultural training of a ba-sadhak, a seeker of treasures and rare delights.

name: Vanara Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons steeped in vanaran tradition.

name: Variable Core
description: You adjust your innovation's core, changing the way it explodes.

name: Veil May
description: Born of a blood hag, a fiery blood drinker hidden behind a false skin, you have one blood-red eye and the ability to slough off your appearance in an instant.

name: Verdant Weapon
description: You cultivate a seed that can sprout into a wooden staff, vine whip, or another weapon.

name: Versatile Blasts
description: Accessing a wider realm of elemental manifestations, you can make blasts with rare forms of your elements.

name: Versatile Performance
description: You can rely on the grandeur of your performances rather than ordinary social skills.

name: Very Sneaky
description: Taller folk rarely pay attention to the shadows at their feet, and you take full advantage of this.

name: Vestigial Magicsense
description: While most surkis' ability to taste magic fades once they metamorphose into their adult form—replaced by keener darkvision—you've retained some of this sense.

name: Vestigial Wings
description: You possess small, weak wings that aid in balance.

name: Vibrant Display
description: Frequency once every 10 minutes Whereas most gnomes' coloration is static or changes slowly, you can cause your hair, eye, and skin color to scintillate in brief and disorienting bursts.

name: Vicious Critique
description: Trigger You are about to attempt to a merchant or crafter.

name: Vicious Incisors
description: Your jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage instead of 1d4, and gains the backstabber trait.

name: Vicious Swing
description: You unleash a particularly powerful attack that clobbers your foe but leaves you a bit unsteady.

name: Vicious Vengeance
description: While your vengeance is painful for both you and your foe, none can doubt that your enemies suffer more.

name: Vigorous Health
description: You can withstand blood loss startlingly well.

name: Viking Shieldbearer
description: Access Ulfen ethnicity You trained with shields and weapons as soon as you were old enough to hold them, eager to win honor and glory for yourself.

name: Virga May
description: Born of a storm hag, you have one crystal-blue or rain-gray eye.

name: Virtuosic Performer
description: You have exceptional talent with one type of performance.

name: Vishkanya Lore
description: You deeply understand vishkanyan strengths and cultural traditions.

name: Vishkanya Weapon Familiarity
description: You favor weapons historically used in subtle work and in ceremony.

name: Voice of the Night
description: You hear and understand the words of creatures you share the darkness with.

name: Vow of Mortal Defiance
prerequisites: You are not sanctified with the holy or unholy trait
description: Having seen the wreckage left by the gods and their servitors as they play in their great war of good and evil, you've come to the only reasonable conclusion: they all must be cut from their silken thrones.

name: Warped Reflection
description: Frequency once per minute Due to your origins, your form is more flexible than most.

name: Warren Friend
description: You're adept at making contact with other ysoki.

name: Warren Navigator
description: You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival.

name: Wash Out
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Toxins seep out of your artificial body quickly.

name: Watchful Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You use your many eyes to look in all directions at once, making you extremely observant for a short period of time.

name: Watchful Halfling
description: You pay close attention to the people around you, allowing you to more easily notice when they act out of character.

name: Water Nagaji
description: Much like a water naga, you've formed a connection to a sacred or pristine body of water, either as a home or a place to protect.

name: Wave Speaker
description: Being part fish yourself, you can speak the language of the sea.

name: Waxed Feathers
description: Your feathers are coated in a waxy substance that repels water.

name: Wayang Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can use your knowledge to enhance your performances or aid you in hiding.

name: Wayang Weapon Familiarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You learned to fight with weapons that help you keep your distance or make the most of striking from shadows.

name: Weapon Infusion
description: With a signature flair, you shape blasts of elemental power into the form of a weapon, such as a sword made of whirling wind or a bow that shoots flames.

name: Weapon Proficiency
description: You become trained in all martial weapons.

name: Web Walker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have plenty of practice navigating webs.

name: Web Weaver
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You can produce a soft silk to weave into useful items.

name: Weight of Guilt
description: Guilt clouds the minds of those who ignore your .

name: Well-Met Traveler
description: You naturally adopt a pleasant and affable demeanor when meeting others.

name: Well-Versed
description: You're resilient to performative influences that aren't your own.

name: Whisper on the Wind
description: You speak in a whisper, a soft wind carrying your words far away.

name: Whispers of Weakness
description: Voices whisper to you how to best lay a creature low.

name: Whitecape
description: You're shorter and wider than many vanaras of your heritage, and the hair on your shoulders and your head is particularly thick and luxurious, like a majestic cape.

name: Widen Spell
description: You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area.

name: Wildborn Magic
description: Access Mualijae ethnicity You have learned to access the old magic of wild places.

name: Wilderness Born
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: You're at home in the wilderness and easily disappear into it.

name: Willing Death
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An ally within 30 feet takes damage that would otherwise reduce them to 0 Hit Points and give them the condition.

name: Wind Pillow
description: The winds have whispered to you all your life, and the essence of air itself helps you at times, making you somewhat buoyant when you're suspended in space.

name: Wind Tempered
description: You are at home in tempestuous weather and accustomed to even the harshest winds.

name: Winter Cat Senses
description: Your eyes are keen and accustomed to winter conditions.

name: Winter's Clutch
description: Gleaming flakes of chilling snow fall in a @Template[burst|distance:10] within 60 feet.

name: Witch Warden
description: Access Kellid ethnicity You and your family have fought long and hard against witches, particularly the winter witches of Irrisen, and you've learned to be wary of their curses and the otherworldly powers their patrons grant.

name: Witch's Armaments
description: Your patron's power changes your body to ensure you are never defenseless.

name: Wolf Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmoredYou enter the stance of a wolf, low to the ground with your hands held like fangs.

name: Woodcraft
description: You have a innate familiarity with forested areas.

name: Woodworker
description: Denizens of the Plane of Wood take immense pride in the magnificent works of art they can craft from wood, and practicing your own woodcraft helps you feel a connection with your planar heritage.

name: Wortwitch
description: You have a particular affinity for leafy plants.

name: Yaoguai Historian
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You know extensively about your own kind.

name: You're Next
description: Trigger You reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points.Rogue After downing a foe, you menace another.

name: You're So Cute!
description: You know how to put on the charm, doing playful tricks to win favor.

name: Zoophonic Communication
description: Your studies have expanded your ability to parley and negotiate into the animal realm.

name: Acrobat Dedication
description: You become an expert in Acrobatics.

name: Acute Scent
description: When your anger is heightened, your sense of smell improves.

name: After You
description: Trigger You're about to roll initiative.You allow your foes to make the first move in a show of incredible confidence.

name: Agent of all Holds
description: Trigger You critically fail a Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance check.Orcs across Belkzen recognize you as an honored lorekeeper.

name: Aggressive Block
description: Trigger You use the Shield Block reaction, and the opponent that triggered Shield Block is adjacent to you and is your size or smaller.

name: Alacritous Action
description: Your eidolon moves more quickly.

name: Alchemist Dedication
description: You put your alchemical interest into practice.

name: Aldori Duelist Dedication
description: Access You are from the Broken Lands region.Your Aldori duelist training teaches you martial techniques and increases your dedication to the Aldori dueling sword.

name: Alkenstar Agent Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Deception and at least one firearm
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Access You have been initiated by the grand duchess of Alkenstar or one of her agents.You put on the persona of a rough and tumble outlaw, but your real goals are to report threats to Alkenstar back to the grand duchess.

name: Alter Ego Dedication
description: You make yourself into a living mirror, becoming a double of someone unremarkable, and you slip into exactly the role that can get you past security or into a sensitive facility.

name: Amphibious Form
description: Your eidolon adapts to life on land and underwater.

name: Ancestral Weaponry
prerequisites: Monastic Weaponry, a feat granting access to all weapons with an ancestry trait (such as elf or orc)
description: You blend monastic techniques with the ancestral fighting styles of your people.

name: Animal Empathy (Ranger)
description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

name: Animal Trainer Dedication
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: You gain the services of a young animal companion that travels with you and obeys simple commands as best as it can.

name: Animist Dedication
description: You have formed a bond with an apparition and can cast divine spells.

name: Anoint Ally
description: You forge a mystical connection with an ally using your body as a focus, allowing them to benefit from your magic.

name: Antagonize
description: Your taunts and threats earn your foes' ire.

name: Archaeologist Dedication
description: You are a student of peoples and their histories, and are in constant pursuit of knowledge and artifacts from the past.

name: Archer Dedication
description: You have familiarity with all weapons in the bow and crossbow weapon groups.

name: Armored Stealth
description: You have learned techniques to adjust and modify your armor and movements to reduce the noise you make.

name: Artillerist Dedication
description: Artillery is a team sport, where every member of the crew has to rely on the other members.

name: Assassin Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Deception, trained in Stealth
description: You've trained to assassinate your foes, and you do so with tenacity and precision.

name: Assisting Shot
prerequisites: You are wielding a ranged weapon
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon.Using your last shot to gauge your accuracy, you can fire off a quick shot to interfere with a foe in combat.

name: Assured Identification
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You rarely misidentify an item.

name: Athletic Strategist
description: You know how to calculatedly manipulate joints and body weight.

name: Aura Sight
description: Frequency once per hour You've learned how to read the natural auras of other living creatures.

name: Automatic Knowledge
prerequisites: expert in a skill with the recall knowledge action, Assurance in that skill
description: You know basic facts off the top of your head.

name: Automatic Writing
description: Frequency once per day When confronted with the unknown, you can receive knowledge beyond your own experience via written messages delivered by your hand.

name: Avenger Dedication
description: Your training regimen has given you particular advantages when it comes to enforcing the interests of your faith.

name: Backup Disguise
description: You have a specific disguise that you keep at the ready, worn underneath your outer garment.

name: Barbarian Dedication
description: You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Bard Dedication
description: You cast spells like a bard and gain the Cast a Spell activity.

name: Bashing Charge
description: You smash, bust, and charge through solid obstacles without hesitation.

name: Basic Lesson
description: Your patron grants you a special lesson, revealing a hidden facet of its nature.

name: Bastion Dedication
description: You are particularly skilled at using a shield to protect yourself in combat.

name: Battle Harbinger Dedication
description: You have trained extensively in combat, battlefield tactics, and stamina, focusing on being an exceptional warrior for your faith in exchange for less time studying the traditional spells and scriptures.

name: Battle Planner
description: You are constantly drawing up plans and battle scenarios, assembling strategies and gathered intelligence for later use.

name: Beastmaster Dedication
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you and obeys your commands.

name: Bestial Snarling
description: You can convey the subtle menace of a low growl or predatory rumble.

name: Blade Brake
description: Trigger You would be moved by a forced movement effect.

name: Bleed Out
description: Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell that granted you a blood magic effect.You channel the residual energy from the last spell you cast into a ranged bloodletting.

name: Blessed One Dedication
description: You are touched by a deity and gifted with the ability to alleviate the suffering of others.

name: Bloodrager Dedication
description: Drinking powerful blood has awakened magical potential within you.

name: Bonded Animal
description: You forge strong connections with animals.

name: Bounty Hunter Dedication
description: When focused on finding your quarry, you're relentless.

name: Brandishing Draw
description: You draw and attack with the same motion.

name: Brawling Focus
description: You know how to make the most of your attacks when fighting hand-to-hand.

name: Bright Lion Dedication
prerequisites: member of the Bright Lions, not a worshipper of Walkena, trained in Stealth, Bright Lion Background
description: Access backgroundYou become trained in your choice of Deception or Diplomacy and in Mzali Lore; if you were already trained, you become an expert instead.

name: Brutal Beating
description: Your critical hits shakes your foes' confidence.

name: Brutish Shove
description: Requirements You are wielding a two-handed melee weapon.

name: Bullet Dancer Dedication
description: You mix guns and melee into a deadly art.

name: Call Implement
description: Requirements You have a free hand.

name: Call of the Wild
description: You call upon the creatures of nature to come to your aid.

name: Campfire Chronicler Dedication
description: You've gained Isthralei's attention and can now offer stories up to him, either passing on your own stories or collecting those of travelers as he did.

name: Cantrip Expansion
description: Bard, Oracle, Sorcerer Study broadens your range of simple spells.

name: Cathartic Mage Dedication
prerequisites: Charisma +2 or ability to cast spells from spell slots
description: You've learned to harness a particular emotion and mix it into your magic.

name: Cavalier Dedication
description: You gain a young animal companion that serves as your mount.

name: Celebrity Dedication
description: The more people you have looking at you, the more content you are, and you take every opportunity to show up others when their performances are less than perfect.

name: Certain Stratagem
description: You know exactly where to strike a foe to target their weak spots.

name: Champion Dedication
description: Choose a deity.

name: Charmed Life
description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw, but you haven't rolled yet.When danger calls, you have a strange knack for coming out on top.

name: Chromotherapy
description: You firmly believe in the technique of strengthening one's life force, spiritual energies, and bodily fluids through the application of colored light.

name: Chronoskimmer Dedication
description: You became partially unstuck from time and have learned how to manipulate your place in flow of time.

name: Clawdancer Dedication
prerequisites: permanent unarmed claw or talon attack (such as one granted by your ancestry or a graft)
description: You've practiced the art of fighting with your natural claws, hooking them into prey and thrashing at targets surrounding you.

name: Cleric Dedication
description: You cast spells like a cleric.

name: Clever Gambit
description: Trigger Your Strike critically hits and deals damage to a creature you've identified with .

name: Clockwork Reanimator Dedication
description: You can animate corpses through cunning engineering.

name: Clotting Elixirs
description: Your restorative concoctions have a clotting effect on the drinker's blood.

name: Collapse Armor
description: Requirements You are wearing your armor innovation, or holding it in both hands in its compact form (see text).You've modified your armor innovation to collapse into a more compact form so you can don or remove it in an instant.

name: Collapse Construct
description: You've modified your construct companion and built it out of light materials, enabling you to collapse it into a carrying case or other compact and innocuous form.

name: Combat Grab
description: Requirements You have one hand free, and your target is within reach of that hand.

name: Communal Crafting
description: You can have other PCs help you an item, under your direction.

name: Communal Healing
description: You're an exceptional conduit for vitality and, as you channel it through you, you can divert some to heal yourself or another creature.

name: Conceal Spell
description: Animist You speak with the unheard voice of the spirits.

name: Confabulator
description: Even when caught in falsehoods, you pile lie upon lie.

name: Continual Recovery
description: You zealously monitor a patient's progress to administer treatment faster.

name: Convergent Tides
description: Your footwork is like the convergence of tides, granting your body supernatural power and fluidity.

name: Cooperative Crafting
description: You've learned to make the most of working with others on your crafting projects, a must when working with the various guilds of Highhelm.

name: Corpse Tender Dedication
description: You have a connection to mindless undead that allows you to communicate your intentions to them on a rudimentary level.

name: Criminal Connections
description: You have dealings with a variety of unsavory characters, which you can leverage to trade favors or meet powerful people.

name: Crushing Grab
description: Like a powerful constrictor, you crush targets in your unyielding grasp.

name: Cultivator Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Through an esoteric, often exacting, regimen of meditation, diet, and exercise, you've learned to transform your body's inner workings into a crucible of planar and spiritual energies.

name: Curse Maelstrom Dedication
prerequisites: You are cursed or have previously been cursed.
description: A horrible curse has left a lingering stain on your soul, and its effects continue to plague you even if the curse's other effects have ended.

name: Dancing Leaf
description: You are as light as a leaf whirling in the breeze.

name: Dandy Dedication
description: You are a consummate student of dignity, etiquette, and fashion.

name: Defensive Armaments
description: You use bulky firearms or crossbows to shield your body.

name: Demolition Charge
description: You can rig your bombs to inanimate objects in order to cause destruction to the surrounding area.

name: Demolitionist Dedication
description: You know how to set explosives to cause the maximum possible damage to buildings and other structures.

name: Devoted Guardian
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Requirements Your last action was to Raise a Shield.

name: Directed Audience
description: You can shape the area of your composition spells.

name: Discreet Inquiry
description: You are subtle in your efforts to learn the things you need to know.

name: Distracting Feint
description: Your Feints are far more distracting than normal.

name: Distracting Performance
description: Your performances are especially distracting, allowing your allies to away with ease.

name: Divine Aegis
description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a magical effect, but you haven't rolled yet.A barrier offers protection against other magic but leaves you exposed to divine energy.

name: Divine Grace
description: Trigger You attempt a save against a spell, but you haven't rolled yet.You call upon your deity's grace, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to the save.

name: Divine Health
description: Your faith makes you resistant to disease, protecting you as you offer succor to the ill.

name: Domain Acumen
description: Every oracle's mystery touches on a divine domain of the deities that fuel it; you can access that power.

name: Dragging Strike
description: You aim your weapon to snag a foe's armor, clothing, or flesh to pull them closer.

name: Dragon Disciple Dedication
description: Access You are a kobold with the dragonscaled or spellscaled heritage, a dragon instinct barbarian, or a draconic bloodline sorcerer.You choose to study or worship one type of dragon, and your focus grants you a measure of its power.

name: Drow Shootist Dedication
description: Every chance you get, you practice with the hand crossbow to increase your draw speed and accuracy.

name: Druid Dedication
description: You cast spells like a druid.

name: Dual-Weapon Warrior Dedication
description: You're exceptional in your use of two weapons.

name: Dueling Parry
description: Requirements You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.You can parry attacks against you with your one-handed weapon.

name: Duelist Dedication
prerequisites: trained in light armor and simple weapons
description: You are always ready to draw your weapon and begin a duel, no matter the circumstances.

name: Edgewatch Detective Dedication
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace
description: You become trained in Society or Thievery; if you are already trained in both of these skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Eldritch Researcher Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, trained in Occultism
description: You gain the ability to cast a single arcane or occult cantrip of your choice (which is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up).

name: Elemental Evolution
description: The elemental power within you is more mutable and versatile than most.

name: Elemental Fist
description: You can color your qi in bright elemental energy.

name: Elementalist Dedication
description: Each day when you make your daily preparations, you can attune yourself to one element of your choice from your elemental philosophy.

name: Embed Aeon Stone
description: You discover the secrets to embedding aeon stones into your flesh.

name: Emblazon Armament
description: Carefully etching a sacred image into a physical object, you steel yourself for battle.

name: Embodiment of the Balance
description: Your place in the balance between the forces of life and entropy expands the spells you can pull from the spirit realms.

name: Emotional Push
description: Trigger An enemy you're aware of fails its save against an emotion spell.

name: Encouraging Words
description: Requirements The target ally lost Stamina Points within the last round.

name: Energy Ablation
description: As you direct destructive energy at a foe, you can divert some of its power into a protective barrier that shields you from harm.

name: Energy Fortification
prerequisites: Prepare Elemental Medicine, expert in Occultism
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Minkai or Forest of Spirits originYou learn Minkaian traditions about the void and know how to manipulate the five elements to fortify vitality and void energies in the body.

name: Enhanced Familiar
description: Animist You are able to materialize more of your attuned apparition's essence, creating a more powerful vessel for it to inhabit and aid you with.

name: Enjoy the Show
description: You address an ally or any onlookers to your combat, flaunting to your foes how little attention they require.

name: Entreat with Forebears
prerequisites: a bloodline that corresponds with a creature trait
description: Something about your presence causes creatures of your bloodline to, consciously or not, recognize you as one of their own, and you become inured to their tricks.

name: Esoteric Polymath
description: You keep a book of occult spells, similar to a wizard's spellbook, and can use its spells to supplement your spell repertoire.

name: Esoteric Warden
description: When you apply antithetical material against a creature successfully, you also ward yourself against its next attacks.

name: Exemplar Dedication
description: A spark of inherent divine power has lit itself within you.

name: Exhort the Faithful
prerequisites: expert in Religion, follower of a specific religion
description: Your knowledge of the tenets of your faith gives you insight into the best ways to get others of your faith to help you or to follow your directions.

name: Expansive Spellstrike
description: You can blast the energy of a spell out around the target of your attack.

name: Exploit Blunder
description: Trigger A creature you Devised a Stratagem against on your most recent turn fails or critically fails a Strike against you.By watching your foes closely, you can make the most out of their mistakes.

name: Express Driver
description: You can optimize your vehicle's performance, coaxing extra speed and choosing paths to avoid slowdowns.

name: Eye of the Arclords
description: Frequency once per day Access You are a member of the Arclords of Nex.

name: Eyes of the City
description: You can track down targets with the help of locals.

name: Fake Out
description: Trigger An ally is about to use an action that requires an attack roll, targeting a creature within your weapon's first range increment.

name: Familiar Master Dedication
description: You have forged a mystical bond with a creature.

name: Familiar Oddities
prerequisites: Curse Maelstrom Dedication, trained in Occultism or Curse Lore
description: Perhaps due to the curse within you, curses occasionally perceive you as an extension of themselves and readily reveal themselves to you.

name: Familiar's Language
description: You've learned to speak with your familiar and other creatures like it.

name: Fan Dancer Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou sweep across the battlefield, manifesting both the gentle spring breeze and the crisp autumn gusts.

name: Fane's Fourberie
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Stella Fane has perfected a technique for using playing cards as weapons that's one part sleight of hand and one part magic.

name: Favored Terrain
description: You have studied a specific terrain to overcome its challenges.

name: Fighter Dedication
description: You become trained in martial weapons.

name: Finishing Follow-Through
description: Finishing a foe maintains your swagger.

name: Firework Technician Dedication
description: You've learned the secrets of making fire and sound bloom using black powder, metals, and paper.

name: First Frost
description: The gelid shard within your heart may sap your ability to feel and experience emotion, but it also lets you create and manipulate cold.

name: Fleeing Diversion
description: You are quick to capitalize on your distractions.

name: Flexible Spellcaster Dedication
description: You now have four cantrips per day instead of three.

name: Folklorist Dedication
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You are a master archivist and entertainer, capable of pulling wisdom from the tales you tell and weaving your allies and enemies into a powerful narrative.

name: Force Fang
description: You can turn your attack into an unerring blur of force.

name: Fresh Ingredients
description: It is amazing the difference fresh herbs can make.

name: Furious Finish
description: Desperate to finish the fight, you pour all your rage into one final blow.

name: Game Hunter Dedication
description: You are skilled at tracking big game animals and similar creatures.

name: Geomancer Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Nature, ability to cast spells from spell slots, at least one spell with the air, cold, earth, fire, plant, or water trait
description: You feel a deep connection to the world no matter where you are, a phenomenon known as "terrain attunement." When you expend a spell slot to cast a spell with a trait that corresponds to the type of terrain you are currently in (as listed below), you gain the terrain attunement effect for that type

name: Ghost Dedication
prerequisites: You died and returned as a ghost.
description: You have risen as a shell of your former self, a spirit of mist and anguish.

name: Ghost Eater Dedication
description: You have trained as a ghost eater, a hunter specialized in the destruction of spirits.

name: Ghost Hunter Dedication
description: You have focused your training on hunting and defeating ghosts, spirits, and all manner of haunts.

name: Ghoul Dedication
prerequisites: You were killed by ghoul fever.
description: You have succumbed to ghoul fever, dying and returning as a ghoul, an undead cursed with a never-ending hunger for dead flesh that slowly overrides your reason and willpower until you would do anything for the meal you crave.

name: Glad-Hand
description: First impressions are your strong suit.

name: Gladiator Dedication
description: You know how to turn combat into a form of entertainment.

name: Godless Healing
prerequisites: Battle Medicine, can't have a patron deity
description: You recover an additional 5 Hit Points from a successful attempt to Treat your Wounds or use on you.

name: Grasping Spirits Spell
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesGaining substance from your magic, your apparitions increase the range of your spells, which then pull your enemy closer.

name: Gunslinger Dedication
description: You excel in using specific types of ranged weapons.

name: Half-Truths
description: You are able to weave your words in such a way that you never use actual lies, but still mislead people to certain conclusions.

name: Hallowed Necromancer Dedication
prerequisites: good alignment, able to cast spells using spell slots, able to cast at least one necromancy spell, expert in Religion
description: You've studied techniques allowing you to blend so-called hallowed necromancy into your own spellcasting to bolster the living and destroy the undead.

name: Harrower Dedication
description: You become trained in Occultism; if you are already trained in this skill, you become trained in a different skill of your choice instead.

name: Hellknight Armiger Dedication
prerequisites: member of a Hellknight order, trained in heavy armor, trained in your order's favored weapon
description: Access You are from Old Cheliax.Your Hellknight training teaches you to terrorize others into compliance, but you also study the structure and hierarchy of Hell.

name: Herbalist Dedication
description: You can create natural remedies.

name: Horizon Walker Dedication
description: You've mastered travel within a specific type of terrain.

name: Hunter's Aim
description: When you focus on aiming, your attack becomes particularly accurate.

name: Hurl at the Horizon
description: Usage imbued into a thrown or melee weapon ikonYour weapon flies from your hand as if propelled under its own power.

name: Improvise Admixture
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You have fewer than your maximum number of versatile vials, and you're either holding or wearing an alchemist's toolkit.You scrounge together enough ingredients from what's left in your alchemist's toolkit to produce a few more versatile vials on the fly.

name: Intimidating Prowess
description: In situations where you can physically menace the target when you or , you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Intimidation check and you ignore the penalty for not sharing a language.

name: Intimidating Strike
description: Your blow not only wounds creatures but also shatters their confidence.

name: Inventor
description: You are a genius at Crafting, easily able to determine how things are made and create new inventions.

name: Inventor Dedication
description: You become trained in Crafting and inventor class DC.

name: Investigator Dedication
description: You gain the class feature, which grants you both the Pursue a Lead activity and Clue In reaction.

name: Juggle
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You can Juggle items and still use your hands between tosses.

name: Juggler Dedication
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: You become trained in Performance; if you were already trained in Performance, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Kinetic Activation
description: Rather than incantations and gestures, you can use your kinetic gate to directly unlock the potential of elementally empowered magic items.

name: Kineticist Dedication
description: You become trained in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

name: Kitharodian Actor Dedication
description: Access You are from Taldor or have attended Kitharodian Academy.You've studied classic Taldan theater and learned to embody various roles to a sublime degree.

name: Lasting Coercion
description: When you successfully someone, the maximum time they comply increases to a week, still determined by the GM.

name: Lastwall Sentry Dedication
prerequisites: member of the Knights of Lastwall, Shield Block
description: Access You are from the Eye of Dread region.You've sworn yourself as a sentry for the Knights of Lastwall, the first line of defense against incursions by the Whispering Tyrant throughout Golarion.

name: Lead Climber
description: When climbing, you can prepare routes for others to follow, and you can pull your allies up to avoid disaster.

name: Leap the Falls
description: Usage imbued into a body ikonReinforcing your legs with divine energy, you can leap the battlefield as powerfully as a salmon clearing a waterfall.

name: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Medicine, attended the University of Lepidstadt
description: Before everything else, before the blood and the monsters and the Stasian technology and the horror, you are a doctor.

name: Leverage Connections
prerequisites: expert in Society, Courtly Graces or Streetwise
description: You know the right people who can get things done for you in certain circles.

name: Lightning Swap
description: Exemplar You have practiced quickly switching between combat styles and the equipment needed for them, especially if you wield more than one weapon ikon.

name: Linguist Dedication
prerequisites: You speak at least three languages.
description: You have studied languages and their development.

name: Lion Blade Dedication
prerequisites: member of the Lion Blades, trained in Performance
description: Access You are from Taldor.Your lion blade spy training helps you conceal yourself and your identity.

name: Living Monolith Dedication
prerequisites: Ancient Osiriani and Sphinx languages, trained in Crafting
description: Access You are from the Golden Road region.You've begun to inscribe a magical stone called a that you will some day tie to your soul.

name: Living Vessel Dedication
description: Whether willingly or not, you've become a vessel for a being of unimaginable power.

name: Loremaster Dedication
prerequisites: trained in at least one skill to Decipher Writing
description: You've compiled a vast repository of information that touches on nearly every subject.

name: Loremaster's Etude
description: You magically unlock memories, making them easier to recall.

name: Lunge
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon.

name: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Arcana or Nature, member of the Magaambya of attendant rank
description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.

name: Magic Hide
description: You can defend your companion in battle.

name: Magic Warrior Dedication
description: Access You are from the Mwangi Expanse.You have taken up a nameless mask and sworn the oath of the magic warriors.

name: Magical Crafting
description: You can magic items, though some have other requirements.

name: Magical Shorthand
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: Learning spells comes easily to you.

name: Magical Understudy
description: Your eidolon evolves to cast spells.

name: Magus Dedication
description: You cast spells like a magus, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

name: Malleable Movement
prerequisites: Mind Smith Dedication, expert in Athletics
description: Trigger You Leap.

name: Marshal Dedication
prerequisites: trained in martial weapons and either Diplomacy or Intimidation
description: You've combined your social skills and combat training to become a talented combat leader.

name: Martial Artist Dedication
description: You have trained to use your fists as deadly weapons and can deliver devastatingly powerful blows with them.

name: Mauler Dedication
description: You specialize in melee weapons that require two hands.

name: Meddling Futures
description: You open yourself to the guidance of whatever spirits or powers deign to help you.

name: Medic Dedication
description: You become an expert in Medicine.

name: Mental Balm
description: Your spells release soothing mental waves.

name: Mind Smith Dedication
description: You've learned to imagine a shape in your mind, to envision it so strongly it takes form in the material world.

name: Minor Magic
description: You've dabbled in minor magical abilities.

name: Mobility
description: You move without leaving an opening.

name: Monk Dedication
description: You become trained in unarmed attacks and gain the class feature.

name: Monster Warden
description: You understand how to defend against your prey.

name: Mortal Healing
prerequisites: Godless Healing, You follow the Laws of Mortality
description: You grant greater healing when the gods don't interfere.

name: Multifarious Muse
description: Your muse doesn't fall into a single label.

name: Mummy Dedication
prerequisites: you are dead and were mummified (by natural or ritualistic means)
description: Whether through natural processes or foul rituals, your body was mummified, and you've risen as an undead mummy.

name: Nantambu Chime-Ringer Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Performance, trained in Society
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You've studied the basics of harmony and resonance in magic, exemplified by the ringing of chimes.

name: Nimble Crawl
description: You can incredibly swiftly—up to half your Speed, rather than 5 feet.

name: No Escape
description: Trigger An enemy within reach attempts to move away from you.You keep pace with a retreating foe.

name: Nonlethal Spell
description: You can alter offensive spells to be less deadly.

name: Oath of the Avenger
description: You've sworn an oath to punish wicked acts you witness.

name: Oath of the Defender
description: During your daily preparations, you can swear an oath to defend against a certain kind of enemy during your deeds that day.

name: Oath of the Slayer
description: During your daily preparations, you can swear an oath to defeat, topple, or destroy a certain kind of enemy during your deeds that day.

name: Oatia Skysage Dedication
description: Your study of the stars unlocks supernatural insights and magic.

name: Oil Fire
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You have a foe .Your armor includes flame-resistant gauntlets with oil-filled finger joints.

name: Oozemorph Dedication
description: You are plagued by sporadic anatomical rearrangements, which grant you insights into other creatures with unusual anatomies.

name: Oracle Dedication
description: Choose a .You become trained in Religion and the mystery's skill; if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Order Explorer
description: You have learned the secrets of another druidic order, passing whatever rites of initiation that order requires and gaining access to its secrets.

name: Ostilli Host Dedication
description: Access surki ancestryYou've bonded with an attached symbiote known as an ostilli.

name: Overwatch Dedication
description: You have an innate knack for tactical observation, and you've innovated to apply that knack in a variety of ways that allow you to assist your allies.

name: Pactbinder Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Diplomacy as well as either Arcana, Nature Occultism, or Religion
description: The first step toward forming a successful pact is an understanding of the magic behind it, along with skill at negotiation.

name: Pactbound Dedication
prerequisites: Erutaki or Jotun language, trained in Nature, must have earned the trust of a saumen kar who initiates you into the archetype
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You befriended one of the last saumen kar and were infused with a fraction of their power, granting you the potential to become a guardian of their ancient pact.

name: Palatine Detective Dedication
description: You have delved into the study of the occult and divine, becoming exceptionally skilled at identifying when such forces are at work.

name: Panic the Dead
description: Vitality strikes terror in the undead.

name: Pathfinder Agent Dedication
description: Access You are from Absalom.Your Pathfinder training has broadened your horizons and made you more flexible at various skills, since you never know when you might need an obscure skill to complete your mission.

name: Pei Zing Adept
prerequisites: Prepare Elemental Medicine, expert in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou're practiced at timing preparations to the point where you can treat multiple patients at once.

name: Performer's Treatment
prerequisites: expert in Medicine, expert in Performance
description: With your experience as a performer, you can keep a set of medical tools handy at all times.

name: Pernicious Poison
description: You can add a toxic additive to an alchemical poison to make it splash poison on its target.

name: Person of Interest
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesSometimes, you need to follow the leads as they come in the middle of an investigation.

name: Pirate Dedication
description: As a pirate, you sail the seas in search of enemy ships to plunder and great adventures to embark on.

name: Pistol Phenom Dedication
prerequisites: trained in at least one type of one-handed firearm, trained in Deception, trained in Performance
description: You catch an opponent by spinning your weapon.

name: Pistol Twirl
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded one-handed ranged weapon.

name: Poison Resistance
description: Alchemist Repeated exposure to toxic reagents has fortified your body against poisons of all kinds.

name: Poisoner Dedication
description: You make a point of always having a few toxins near at hand—you never know when some arsenic or the like might prove useful.

name: Powder Punch Stance
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Access You're from Alkenstar or the Mana Wastes.

name: Powerful Leap
description: You can jump 5 feet up with a vertical without making a .

name: Predict Weather
description: By observing often subtle indicators in the environment, you may try to predict the day's weather.

name: Propelling Sorcery
description: The force of your magic can be used to propel yourself or another.

name: Psi Burst
description: Frequency once per round With a passing thought, you direct violent psychic energies at a nearby creature.

name: Psychic Dedication
description: You feel something awaken within your mind.

name: Quick Contacts
prerequisites: expert in Society, Connections or Criminal Connections
description: You know where to go, who to talk to, and how to make new connections, fast.

name: Quick Disguise
description: You can set up a disguise in one-tenth the usual time (generally 1 minute).

name: Quick Draw
description: You draw your weapon and attack with the same motion.

name: Quiet Allies
description: You're skilled at moving with a group.

name: Ranged Combatant
description: Spines, flame jets, and holy blasts are just some of the ways your eidolon might strike from a distance.

name: Ranger Dedication
description: You become trained in Survival; if you were already trained in Survival, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice.

name: Rapid Mantel
description: You easily pull yourself onto ledges.

name: Rapid Response
description: Trigger An ally is reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Razmiran Priest Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Crafting, trained in Deception
description: You have earned entry to the priesthood of Razmir, either at the Exalted Lodge or another temple where Razmir's holy masks are forged.

name: Reanimator Dedication
prerequisites: able to cast animate dead with a spell slot
description: You have dedicated your studies to the art of raising and commanding undead.

name: Rebounding Toss
description: Requirements You are wielding a thrown weapon.

name: Red Mantis Assassin Dedication
prerequisites: trained in sawtooth sabres, deity is Achaekek, member of the Red Mantis assassins
description: Access You are from Mediogalti Island.You have learned how to stalk your foes and slay them with a sawtooth saber.

name: Red-Gold Mortality
description: Usage imbued into a weapon ikonBy channeling your divinity into a creature along with a strike, you can disrupt their ability to recover.

name: Reinforce Eidolon
description: You buffer your eidolon.

name: Relentless Stalker
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: Trigger An adjacent creature you are hunting attempts to move away from you using an action that has the move trait Your hunted prey cannot escape your relentless pursuit.

name: Reliable Squire
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You know the path to victory isn't traveled alone, and you lend aid to your companions whenever you can.

name: Resilient Mind
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You're firm in your convictions and have girded your mind against outside influence.

name: Retreating Finisher
description: You make a calculated attack without letting down your guard.

name: Reverse Engineer
description: You are incredibly skilled at reverse engineering items to learn their formulas or disassembling them just to disable them.

name: Revivifying Mutagen
description: Requirements You are under the effects of a mutagen.You metabolize a mutagen to heal yourself.

name: Risky Reload
description: Requirements You're wielding a firearm.

name: Rivethun Emissary Dedication
description: Access Followers of Rivethun have access to this feat.You're a practicing Rivethun emissary, skilled at interacting and bonding with the spirits of living creatures.

name: Rivethun Invoker Dedication
description: Access Followers of Rivethun have access to this feat.You're a practicing Rivethun invoker, able to enter a trance that connects you physically and mentally to surrounding spirits.

name: Rivethun Involutionist Dedication
description: Access Followers of Rivethun have access to this feat.You're a practicing Rivethun involutionist, with a deep well of inner power.

name: Robust Recovery
description: You learned folk medicine to help recover from diseases and poison, and using it diligently has made you especially resilient.

name: Rogue Dedication
description: You gain a skill feat and the rogue's class feature.

name: Rolling Landing
description: You land with quick rolls that help you keep your momentum.

name: Runelord Dedication
description: Your connection to your sin suffuses all magic you use.

name: Runescarred Dedication
description: Access You are from the Saga Lands.Whether through blood (if you're Varisian, Shoanti, or New Thassilonian) or by exposure to rune magic, you have become runescarred, with visible, glowing runes on your body in the form of tattoos or scars.

name: Sanctify Water
prerequisites: expert in Religion, must worship a deity that lists "holy" or "unholy" in their sanctification
description: You imbue water with your deity's blessing.

name: Sanguimancer Dedication
description: The life essence in your blood recovers naturally over time.

name: Sap Life
description: You draw the life force out of your enemies.

name: Scatter Swarm
description: Your patron reaches through your familiar to magically disperse a group of smaller threats.

name: Scout Dedication
description: You are a highly skilled scout, capable of guiding your allies, detecting imminent threats, and avoiding the attention of dangerous enemies.

name: Scroll Trickster Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You've studied scrolls in depth.

name: Scrounger Dedication
description: While others need specialized tools and a dedicated space, you have found a way to build just about anything, anywhere.

name: Searing Restoration
description: They told you there was no way that explosions could heal people, but they were fools… Fools who didn't understand your brilliance!

name: Second Wind
description: You can enter a second rage, but afterward you need to catch your breath.

name: Seneschal Witch Dedication
description: As you work to understand the connection with your missing patron, it's increasingly easy to form bonds with those around you.

name: Sentinel Dedication
description: You have trained carefully to maximize the protective qualities of your armor.

name: Shadow Mark
description: You have learned special tricks that help you follow individuals without them noticing you.

name: Shadowcaster Dedication
description: You've sacrificed a piece of your spirit, allowing the powers of shadow into your being and changing the nature of your magic.

name: Shake it Off
description: You concentrate on your rage, overcoming fear and fighting back sickness.

name: Shared Stratagem
description: The plans you make include your allies as well as yourself.

name: Shieldmarshal Dedication
description: Your elite shieldmarshal training makes you equally at home in the squalor of Smokeside and the splendor of Skyside.

name: Shooting Stars Stance
description: You enter a stance that lets you throw shuriken with lightning speed.

name: Sleek Reposition
description: Requirements You are wielding a finesse weapon or polearm.While your opponent is still recovering from your prior attack, you snag its armor, clothing, or flesh to move it as you please.

name: Slippery Prey
description: You're able to escape bonds more easily than others.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: You can add a tarry additive to an alchemical bomb to make it emit smoke.

name: Snare Hopping
description: You can magically move your snares around.

name: Snarecrafter Dedication
description: You have studied the art of crafting snares and laying traps, and few have shown more talent in these arts than you.

name: Sniping Duo Dedication
prerequisites: trained in at least one type of weapon in the bow or firearm groups, trained in Stealth
description: When you take this dedication, choose one willing, non-minion ally to act as your spotter.

name: Solid Lead
description: Sometimes your case splinters into smaller mysteries, but you never lose sight of the big picture.

name: Song of Strength
description: Your performances inspire strength in your allies to aid them at physical tasks.

name: Sorcerer Dedication
description: Choose a .

name: Soul Warden Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Occultism or Religion, worships Pharasma or a psychopomp usher
description: You can take 10 minutes to emblazon Pharasma's holy sigil-a spiraling comet that represents the winding path a soul takes through its existence-upon a shield, tabard, banner, or other prominent object that your wear or wield.

name: Soulforger Dedication
prerequisites: Wisdom +2 or ability to cast divine spells
description: You can manifest the power of your spirit in combat to realize your motivations.

name: Sow Rumor
description: You spread rumors, which may or may not be true, about a specific subject.

name: Spell Parry
description: Requirements You have one or more hands free.

name: Spell Trickster Dedication
