prerequisites: Able to cast spells, trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your experience with magic and its traditions lets you specialize in the casting of certain spells, customizing familiar spells to create novel effects.

name: Spellshot Dedication
description: You cast arcane spells like a wizard, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

name: Spirit Sheath
description: You've magically constructed an extradimensional sheath for your weapon that you access through your clothing, typically through a pocket, sleeve, or seam.

name: Spirit Speaker
description: You know that when an animal dies, its spirit lingers briefly before moving on.

name: Spirit Warrior Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou're a warrior who trains your spirit and body to work in perfect harmony, enhancing your attacks with your spiritual energy while fighting with a ferocious martial technique that combines blade and fist.

name: Spiritual Expansion Spell
description: Your apparitions manifest to scatter the energy of your spell.

name: Staff Acrobat Dedication
prerequisites: Dexterity +3, trained in Acrobatics, trained in Athletics, trained with at least one of the following weapons: staff, bo staff, halfling sling staff, or any weapon in the spear or polearm group (referred to in this archetype as "your staff")
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: When you , , or while wielding your staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to any Athletics check required and add 5 feet to the distance you can Leap vertically and horizontally.

name: Stalwart Defender Dedication
description: Access You are a dwarf or have undergone defender training in a dwarven settlement such as Highhelm.You have completed your initial training in the ways of a stalwart defender.

name: Starlit Sentinel Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've been chosen by one of the constellations of the Tian Xia zodiac.

name: Steed Form
description: Your eidolon changes to make it particularly effective as your mount.

name: Sterling Dynamo Dedication
description: You obtain a sterling dynamo prosthetic, which allows you to replace or augment a limb, or even add a simple new non-prehensile limb, such as a tail.

name: Stone Brawler Dedication
description: You've learned to call the primal power of elemental stone to your aid.

name: Stonebound Dedication
description: You bind yourself to the very essence of stone.

name: Strong Arm
description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, the weapon's range increment increases by 10 feet.

name: Student of Perfection Dedication
prerequisites: powerful fist or expert in unarmed attacks, member of a House of Perfection
description: Access You are from Jalmeray.You have learned the martial arts techniques of your House of Perfection.

name: Student of Water
description: Following your studies of water, your qi stirs the water of the natural world.

name: Stunning Blows
description: The focused power of your flurry threatens to overwhelm your opponent.

name: Summoner Dedication
description: You've formed a bond with an eidolon, an entity that manifests in a physical body only through its link to your life force.

name: Swarmkeeper Dedication
description: Your body has become a symbiotic hive for a swarm of crawling insects.

name: Swashbuckler Dedication
description: Choose a swashbuckler's style.

name: Talisman Dabbler Dedication
description: You are trained in the use of talismans and similar magical paraphernalia.

name: Talisman Esoterica
description: You know how to assemble the supernatural objects in your esoterica into a number of temporary talismans.

name: Tattoo Artist
description: You can craft tattoos, including magical tattoos.

name: Tattooed Historian Dedication
prerequisites: Constitution +1, trained in Belkzen Lore, Orc Lore, Orc Pantheon Lore, or (at the GM's discretion) a related Lore skill
description: You become trained in Diplomacy or Performance; if you are already trained in both skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

name: Terrifying Resistance
description: The spells of those you have are less effective on you.

name: Thaumaturge Dedication
description: You've uncovered basic thaumaturgy.

name: Thlipit Contestant Dedication
prerequisites: You have a long prehensile tongue or a tail. At the GM's discretion, similar flexible appendages, such as tentacles, can be used to qualify instead.
description: Grueling practice has strengthened your tongue or tail to the point where it's become a formidable weapon.

name: Trick Driver Dedication
description: You are equally at home piloting any vehicle, adapting yourself instantly to varied controls, movements, and handling.

name: Triumphant Boast
description: You relate a loud and impressive tale of your triumph over a formidable foe.

name: Tumble Behind (Swashbuckler)
description: Your tumbling puts your foes on the back foot.

name: Tumbling Teamwork
description: Your tumbling distracts a foe enough to create an advantage for one of your allies.

name: Turn Away Misfortune
description: Trigger You would attempt a roll affected by a misfortune effect.

name: Turpin Rowe Lumberjack Dedication
description: Access You must befriend at least one Turpin Rowe logger.Your logging training has made you intimately familiar with all aspects of forestry, and you have trained extensively to reach around trees and utilize their bulk to your advantage.

name: Tweak Appearances
description: You spend 1 minute making quick adjustments to someone's clothing and appearance, causing their words to carry more weight with an audience of your choice.

name: Twilight Speaker Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Society, you are an Ilverani elf
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: You have carefully studied the histories, customs, and etiquette of many of the younger peoples of Golarion.

name: Unbalancing Blow
description: Interweaving attacks, you unbalance your foes.

name: Unbalancing Finisher
description: You attack with a flashy assault that leaves your target off balance.

name: Undead Master Dedication
description: You gain the services of an undead companion that travels with you and obeys your commands.

name: Undead Slayer Dedication
description: Your training has prepared you to recognize most undead on sight.

name: Underground Network
description: You're connected to groups that know what's going on in the streets, and you can get information out of them quickly.

name: Underhanded Assault
description: You capitalize on the distraction provided by an ally.

name: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication
description: Frequency once per dayWho needs skill when you've got dumb luck?

name: United Assault
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Through countless battles, you've learned you're stronger when working alongside your allies.

name: Unmistakable Lore
description: You never get information about your areas of expertise wrong.

name: Unusual Treatment
description: Your medical training extends to less obvious conditions.

name: Uplifting Overture
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which aids your allies' skills with the inspiring nature of your performance.

name: Ursine Avenger Form
description: You draw the Ursine Avenger Hood over your head and its fur over your arms, assuming an ursine form that has traits of your original form as well as that of a bear.

name: Vampire Dedication
prerequisites: You were a killed by a vampire drinking your blood.
description: You're a newly risen vampire.

name: Vasodilation
description: Using the power of your own blood, you encourage increased blood flow to nourish damaged tissue or stifle the flow to clot wounds or prevent the spread of poison and disease.

name: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication
description: You are adept at designing and maintaining mechanical vehicles, and you lavish your attention and ingenuity on one vehicle in particular.

name: Vengeful Oath
description: You've sworn an oath to hunt down wicked evildoers and bring them to judgment.

name: Verduran Shadow Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Stealth, trained in Survival
description: Your awareness of primal energies allows you to explore forests with preternatural ease.

name: Versatile Font
prerequisites: harmful font or healing font, deity that allows clerics to have both fonts
description: As you explore your deity's aspects, you move beyond restrictions on healing or harming.

name: Vigilante Dedication
description: You have two identities, each with its own name and abilities.

name: Viking Dedication
description: Vikings spend long periods of time at sea, only to leap from their boats at a moment's notice, charge through the surf, and take their enemies by storm.

name: Vindicator Dedication
description: Your church ensures that you are cared for.

name: Voice of Elements
description: You can speak with the secret tones of elements you channel, finding words in the crackle of flame, the grinding of stone.

name: Wandering Chef Dedication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Whether trained in a noble kitchen or a humble home, you know how to cook delicious dishes and source ingredients from the wilderness or urban settings.

name: Ward Medic
description: You've studied in large medical wards, treating several patients at once and tending to all their needs.

name: Warning Shot
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.Who needs words when the roar of a gun is so much more succinct?

name: Warp Space
description: You use your magic to bend space, causing your spell to strike from a strange vector.

name: Warpriest's Armor
description: Your training has helped you adapt to ever-heavier armor.

name: Warrior of Legend Dedication
description: You have been given a powerful blessing of battle that is also your cursed doom.

name: Wary Disarmament
description: If you trigger a device or set off a trap while disarming it, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC or saving throw against the device or trap.

name: Waterfowl Stance
description: In your hands, swords dance like rainfall over the waves; who can tell where the storm ends and the sea begins?

name: Weapon Improviser Dedication
description: You don't take the normal –2 penalty to attack rolls with improvised weapons.

name: Wellspring Mage Dedication
description: There's no longer a limit on how many temporary spell slots you can gain per day from wellspring magic.

name: Werecreature Dedication
description: Requirements You were born into a lineage of true werecreatures or were afflicted with the curse of the werecreature.You're a werecreature, able to shift between your humanoid shape, an animal shape, and a monstrous hybrid of the two.

name: What's That up Your Sleeve
description: Whether as a dealer or player, you've learned to spot cheaters.

name: Wild Mimic Dedication
description: Fighting in the wilds has honed your understanding of the unique abilities many creatures have.

name: Wilderness Spotter
source: Pathfinder Adventure: The Fall of Plaguestone
description: Select one type of terrain from the following list: aquatic, arctic, desert, forest, mountain, plains, sky, swamp, or underground.

name: Winged Warrior Dedication
prerequisites: you have permanent wings (such as from an ancestry or graft)
description: Through rigorous training, you have strengthened your wings, granting you enough thrust to gain additional altitude.

name: Witch Dedication
description: You cast spells like a witch.

name: Wizard Dedication
description: You cast spells like a wizard, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

name: Worm Caller Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Nature or Cave Worm Lore
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You pledge yourself to understanding and emulating one of the most powerful creatures of the Darklands: the mighty cave worm.

name: Wrestler Dedication
description: Your training in the wrestling arts has made you particularly adept at moving, striking, and grappling while unencumbered.

name: Wukong Extension
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin or worshipper of Sun WukongInvoking the name of Sun Wukong's extending cudgel, Ruyi Bang, you activate hidden levers and cranks in your innovation, making it swiftly extend outward like a battering ram.

name: Zephyr Guard Dedication
description: Access You are from Katapesh.As a Zephyr Guard, you're always vigilant against crime and threats to the city's safety.

name: Zombie Dedication
prerequisites: You died and were animated as a husk zombie.
description: Despite your death and subsequent reanimation as a rotting corpse, you retain most of your mind and identity.

name: Additional Circus Trick
prerequisites: You must have a signature trick
description: Your signature trick can have one additional trait beyond the normal number.

name: Ancestral Paragon
description: Whether through instinct, study, or magic, you feel a deeper connection to your ancestry.

name: Aurochs-Headed
description: Your words and body language can subconsciously unsettle orcs, giving you an advantage when convincing them to see things your way.

name: Folk Dowsing
description: You can find what you're looking for using a dowsing rod or pendulum.

name: Graft Technician
description: You can create and implant grafts.

name: Hireling Manager
description: You are able to find and secure better labor than most.

name: Improvised Repair
description: You can hastily patch damaged equipment together, but the temporary fix lacks the full care required for lasting repairs.

name: Keen Follower
description: Your keen observation of your allies has made you better at following their lead.

name: Know the Beat
description: You become trained in your choice of Guild Lore, Legal Lore, Mercantile Lore, or Underworld Lore.

name: Pick up the Pace
description: You lead by example and can help others push themselves beyond their normal limits.

name: Prescient Planner
description: Cost the Price of the chosen item Requirements You haven't used this ability since the last time you were able to purchase goods.

name: Robust Health
description: Your physiology responds well to first aid.

name: Skitter
description: You can scoot swiftly across the ground.

name: Steel Your Resolve
description: Cost 1 Resolve Point Regain Stamina Points equal to half your maximum.

name: Thorough Search
description: You take your time searching to ensure you find everything.

name: Untrained Improvisation
description: You've learned how to handle situations when you're out of your depth.

name: We're on the List
prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication or Archaeologist Dedication, trained in Society
description: Trigger An ally you can see and hear is about to attempt a Deception check to someone or .

name: Accelerating Touch
description: Your healing energies are infused with bounding energy.

name: Acclimatization
description: Your time spent in the hostile parts of the world has inured you to extreme climates.

name: Additional Companion
description: Another animal joins you in your travels.

name: Advanced Alchemy
description: You gain the Advanced Alchemy benefits, and you can create 4 alchemical consumables during your daily preparations.

name: Advanced Construct Companion
description: You've upgraded your construct companion's power and decision-making ability.

name: Advanced Reanimated Companion
description: Your corpselike construct companion becomes much more powerful and can act with limited autonomy to follow your greater directives.

name: Advanced Warden
description: You unlock more powerful primal spells.

name: Aeon Resonance
description: You gain the resonant power of one embedded aeon stone as if it were placed in a .

name: Agile Hand
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast mage hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its target to be a .

name: Air Shroud
description: Turbulent air suffuses your kinetic aura.

name: Alchemical Discoveries
description: You've devoted extra time in the lab to improve your knowledge of alchemy.

name: Alchemical Shot
description: Requirements You have an alchemical bomb worn or in one hand, and are wielding a firearm or crossbow.You've practiced a technique for mixing alchemical bombs with your loaded shot.

name: Aldori Parry
description: Requirements You are wielding only an Aldori dueling sword and have your other hand or hands free.

name: Always Ready
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Extensive training against undead has taught you to cover your weak points, even when you think that you're alone.

name: Ambush Bladderwort
description: You plant the seed of a giant bladderwort in an unoccupied square of ground or water within 30 feet.

name: Ambush Tactics
prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain
description: You've made a study of the best practices for laying ambushes in terrains you've spent time learning about, be it the best way to ambush foes or the best methods of reacting to surprise attacks in those terrains.

name: Angel of Vindication
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Requirements Your mark is an undead creature.

name: Animal Actor
description: You participated in a performance of The Leaping Lion, a play focusing on Cyricas, the animal-loving adventurer who traveled with his ape friend Mardu and remains a favorite hero among Taldan youth.

name: Animal Fleetness
description: You're adept at using your animal shape's natural means of locomotion.

name: Ankle Biter
description: You fight just as well on the ground as you do standing up.

name: Anthropomorphic Shape
description: Humanoids' supposed place apart from animals is folly—taking on their forms just requires some extra practice.

name: Aphet Flash
description: Requirements Your swarm is outside your body.Your swarm can emit a bright flash, much like aphet beetles, a genus of flash beetles once used by Osirian miners as sources of light.

name: Apparition's Enhancement
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell.Spiritual power encases your weapon or unarmed attack.

name: Arcane Evolution
description: Your arcane legacy allows you to perceive how magic affects everything.

name: Arcane School Spell
description: You gain your school's initial school spell.

name: Ardent Armiger
description: Archetype Hellknight Armiger You have been trained to resist the manipulations of fiends, and your Hellknight discipline makes you difficult to influence.

name: Astral Tether
description: You spin out a thread of psychic energy that connects you to an ally, using it as a conduit for your abilities.

name: Attunement Shift
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Requirements Your previous action was to cast a spell with the air, cold, earth, fire, plant, or water trait.

name: Aura Enhancement
description: You've enhanced your training with your battle magic, allowing you access to a more potent divine font.

name: Aura of Courage
description: You stand strong in the face of danger and inspire your allies to do the same.

name: Aura of Despair
description: Your presence as an avatar of evil makes your foes more susceptible to terror and makes it almost impossible for them to shake off fear when you are near.

name: Axe Climber
description: When you are climbing a wooden surface and have a or in each hand, you have a climb Speed equal to half your normal Speed.

name: Barbarian Resiliency
prerequisites: Barbarian Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 10 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each barbarian archetype class feat you have.

name: Barreling Charge
description: You rush forward, moving enemies aside to reach your foe.

name: Barrier Shield
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify the spell to create a solid barrier you can use for Cover, but not for blocking.

name: Base Kinesis
description: You gain the Base Kinesis impulse.

name: Basic Animist Spellcasting
description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

name: Basic Arcana
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level wizard feat of your choice.

name: Basic Bard Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Blood Potency
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level sorcerer feat.

name: Basic Bloodline Spell
description: You gain your bloodline's initial bloodline spell.

name: Basic Breakthrough
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level inventor feat of your choice.

name: Basic Captivator Spellcasting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your innate ability to fascinate others develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

name: Basic Cathartic Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Cleric Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Concoction
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level alchemist feat.

name: Basic Deduction
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level investigator feat of your choice.

name: Basic Devotion
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level champion feat.

name: Basic Dogma
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level cleric feat.

name: Basic Druid Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Flair
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level swashbuckler feat of your choice.

name: Basic Fury
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level barbarian feat.

name: Basic Glory
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level exemplar feat.

name: Basic Hunter's Trick
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level ranger feat.

name: Basic Kata
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level monk feat.

name: Basic Maneuver
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level fighter feat.

name: Basic Martial Magic
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level magus feat of your choice.

name: Basic Muse's Whispers
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level bard feat.

name: Basic Mysteries
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level oracle feat of your choice.

name: Basic Oracle Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Psychic Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Red Mantis Magic
prerequisites: trained in Religion, Red Mantis Assassin Dedication
description: You have learned limited divine magic from your Red Mantis training.

name: Basic Rivethun Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Benefits.

name: Basic Shooting
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level gunslinger feat of your choice.

name: Basic Skysage Divination
description: The stars move, granting you a sliver of their magic.

name: Basic Sorcerer Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Synergy
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level summoner feat of your choice.

name: Basic Thaumaturgy
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level thaumaturge feat of your choice.

name: Basic Thoughtform
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level psychic feat of your choice.

name: Basic Trickery
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level rogue feat.

name: Basic Wilding
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level druid feat.

name: Basic Witch Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Witchcraft
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level witch feat of your choice.

name: Basic Wizard Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Battering Wings
description: Though not powerful enough for flight, your wings can deliver a thrashing to anyone who gets close.

name: Battle Assessment
description: With careful observation during battle, you identify an enemy's strengths and weaknesses.

name: Beast Speaker
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: You constantly have the effects of as a 2nd-rank innate primal spell.

name: Beastkin Resilience
description: You've regained beastkin protections after becoming a full werecreature.

name: Bespell Strikes
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell.Oracle You siphon spell energy into one weapon you're wielding, or into one of your unarmed attacks, such as a fist.

name: Big Game Trapper
description: You can set snares specifically for big prey, leaving smaller creatures unscathed.

name: Black Powder Boost
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.You fire your weapon as you jump, using the kickback to go farther.

name: Blazing Wave
description: Flames flow out of you in a cascade, engulfing everyone in a @Template[cone|distance:30].

name: Bless Shield
prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication, you worship a good-aligned deity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your uttered prayers become an aegis, drawing the blessing of your deity across the surface of your shield.

name: Blessed Medicine
description: Trigger You fail a check to Treat a Disease that was inflicted by an undead (such as ghoul fever or mummy rot).

name: Blessed Sacrifice
description: You gain the domain spell as a devotion spell.

name: Blessing of the Sun Gods
description: The Old Sun Gods share their power with you.

name: Blood Calls Blood
description: Trigger You fail a flat check to Cast a Spell or your spell would be disrupted by another creature's reaction.The magical potency of your blood will not be denied.

name: Blood Shield
description: Cost 1 or more sanguimancy Hit PointsYou raise a defensive barrier of your own blood to protect you.

name: Bloodletting Claws
description: Your eidolon inflicts bleeding wounds on a telling blow.

name: Born to the Trees
description: You adapt a creature to live among the trees, improving its ability to climb, balance, and leap.

name: Breached Defenses
description: You can find the one weak point in a creature's scales, wards, or armor to get past its resistances.

name: Brilliant Crafter
description: Your skill at crafting is unparalleled.

name: Broadside Buckos
description: Shimali Manux trains every Salt Breaker to fight in the cramped quarters below deck, and you've learned how to use these techniques with your crew.

name: Brutal Crush
description: Requirements Your last action dealt bludgeoning damage using an unarmed Strike granted by a morph or polymorph effect.

name: Bullet Dancer Burn
description: Requirements You're wielding a simple combination weapon or an attached bayonet or reinforced stock.The fiery blaze of your weapon shocks your enemies.

name: Bullying Staff
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are wielding your staff.

name: Butterfly Blade Dedication
description: Access Defeat a member of the Butterfly Blades in a sanctioned bout.

name: Calcifying Sand
description: Trigger A creature damages you with an attack using an unarmed attack or a non-reach melee weapon.

name: Calculated Splash
description: You have calculated all the angles to maximize a bomb's splash.

name: Call Wizardly Tools
description: You're mystically connected to your wizardly tools, ensuring you can always find them when you've misplaced them.

name: Canopy Predator
prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication, trained in Athletics
description: You are as at home in the treetops as you are beneath their branches.

name: Captivator Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Deception or Diplomacy, Charisma +2
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your ability to captivate others borders on the preternatural.

name: Careful Explorer
description: You've explored enough dusty tombs and hidden vaults to gain a sixth sense about traps, and you sometimes notice them even when you're not trying to.

name: Cathartic Focus Spell
description: You learn the focus spell listed under your emotion's entry.

name: Cavalier's Banner
description: Requirements You have pledged your service to a specific organization or ideal (see Cavalier Pledges, below).You fly the banner of your pledge from your mount, raising your allies' spirits.

name: Cavalier's Charge
description: Requirements You are riding your mount.You to order your mount to twice.

name: Champion Resiliency
prerequisites: Champion Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each champion archetype class feat you have.

name: Change of Face
description: You know that for the best disguise to work, one requires not only the right skills but also the right look-luckily you can copy both using special magical techniques.

name: Channel Smite
description: Cost Expend a or spell.

name: Channeled Protection
description: Requirements You are in Channeler's Stance and your last action was to Cast a Spell from your spell slots.Your apparition uses excess energy to protect you.

name: Chemical Purification
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You use Quick Alchemy to craft an alchemist's fire or ghost charge, and that bomb's level is at least 2 levels lower than your advanced alchemy level.

name: Claw Snag
description: Trigger A creature attempts to while you have them grappled or .

name: Claws of the Dragon
description: Your fingernails grow into razor-sharp claws, and scales speckle your fingers, hands, and wrists.

name: Clinging Climber
description: You climb like a spider.

name: Cobra Stance
description: You enter a tight stance, coiled up like a lashing cobra with your hands poised as venomous fangs.

name: Combat Reading
description: You use a performer's cold reading techniques, aura reading, and other tricks to discover your foe's strengths and weaknesses.

name: Command Corpse
prerequisites: ability to cast harm, Corpse Tender Dedication
description: You gain the feat, but you can use it only to transform the effects of spells you cast on mindless undead.

name: Command Elemental
description: You grasp the animating force within an elemental creature and bend it to your will.

name: Command Undead
description: You grasp the animating force within an undead creature and bend it to your will.

name: Companion's Cry
description: You can urge your companion to do its utmost.

name: Consolidated Overlay Panopticon
description: You volunteered for a controversial experimental procedure to install clockwork prosthetic eyes.

name: Contortionist
description: You can squeeze out of tight situations surprisingly quickly, gaining an advantage against foes that try to pin you down.

name: Corpse Tender's Font
description: You easily tend to the wounds of the dead.

name: Coughing Dragon Display
description: This display emits a cascade of loud bangs or glittering trails.

name: Courageous Advance
description: With a rousing call, you exhort an ally to advance.

name: Creature Comforts
description: Trigger You become frightened.

name: Cruelty
description: The harm you deal with your corrupting touch saps the strength from your enemy's body.

name: Cryptic Spell
description: Requirements You're in natural terrain.

name: Crystal Keeper Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Elven Lore or Society
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: You can use Arcana, Occultism, Religion, or Society to by meditating before a crystal, regardless of the type of writing.

name: Crystal Ward Spells
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: Your study of crystals and the energies held within a gem's facets grants you special arcane crystal ward spells, which are a type of focus spell.

name: Cycle Spell
description: Your devotion to the cycle of souls grants you an additional divine spell.

name: Dashing Pounce
description: Requirements You are in claw stance and have two open hands.

name: Dastardly Dash
description: You dash past an opponent, confounding them with underhanded tactics.

name: Dead Reckoning
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, trained in Survival
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've trained yourself to maintain a strong sense of direction at all times, even when you can't use a compass or see the sky above.

name: Decry Thief
prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication, trained in Intimidation
description: When you attempt to , you can make it harder for the target to flee, in place of the action's normal effects.Critical Success For 1 round, the target takes a -10-foot status penalty to Speed and a -4 status penalty to Stealth.

name: Defend Summoner
description: Your eidolon blocks attacks against you.

name: Deflect Projectile
description: Trigger You are the target of a physical ranged attack.

name: Deft Cooperation
description: When you set things up to help your allies, you also gain some of the fruits of your labors.

name: Detective's Readiness
description: When you're on a case, you stay watchful and resolute to avoid tricks your suspect might pull.

name: Devastating Spellstrike
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, inexorable iron hybrid study, Spellstrike
description: Requirements You are in Arcane Cascade stance and your Spellstrike is charged.

name: Devout Magic
description: You gain a devotion spell of your choice listed in the devotion spells class feature, following the same restrictions listed there.

name: Devrin's Cunning Stance
description: You've learned Devrin Arlos's guileful ways, and his sly teachings help you remind your allies to keep their wits about them.

name: Devrin's Dazzling Diversion
description: Devrin Arlos has a habit of using whatever is at hand to temporarily blind others in combat.

name: Diabolic Certitude
description: Trigger Your turn begins and you can observe a devil.

name: Directed Channel
description: You can shape the energy you channel in a single direction.

name: Disarming Block
description: Trigger You Shield Block a melee Strike made with a held weapon.With deft and practiced movement, you block at an angle to potentially dislodge the weapon.

name: Disengaging Twist
description: Trigger A creature gives you the or condition.

name: Disrupt Prey
description: Trigger Your hunted prey is within your reach, and it uses a manipulate action, uses a move action, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

name: Distant Waterbird's Poise
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You hit a target with a .You flow around your foe, using the magic of your attack to carry you away.

name: Distracting Flattery
description: Trigger You observe a target's attitude toward yourself or your allies decrease as a result of an ally's behavior.

name: Distracting Spellstrike
description: Requirements You're in Arcane Cascade stance and have a hand free.

name: Disturbing Defense
description: Your internal organs and blood vessels have shifted and changed, and even you don't know precisely where in your body they are.

name: Divert Streamflow
description: Trigger You're damaged by a melee Strike by a creature in your reach.With a brief gesture, you adapt swiftly to an attack like a flowing stream.

name: Divine Evolution
description: The divine might provided by your bloodline flows through you.

name: Divine Infusion
description: You pour energy into the subject of your healing to empower its attacks.

name: Diving Armor
description: You've modified your armor with fins, rotors, and other devices to make it easy for you to move through the water, plus mechanical gills that can help you extract breathable air from water.

name: Doctor's Visitation
description: You move to provide immediate care to those who need it.

name: Double Shot
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0.

name: Dousing Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, water is in your elemental philosophy
description: You enhance your spell with elemental water, soaking the target.

name: Draconic Scent (Dragon Disciple)
description: Your sense of smell is uncanny, much like a dragon's.

name: Dragon Arcana
prerequisites: ability to cast spells from spell slots, Dragon Disciple Dedication
description: You've discovered how to add the magic of dragons to your tradition.

name: Dread Marshal Stance
description: Putting on a grim face for the battle ahead, you encourage your allies to strike fear into their foes with vicious attacks.

name: Dread Striker
description: You capitalize on your enemies' fear to slip past their defenses.

name: Dual Energy Heart
description: A second energy dwells in your eidolon.

name: Dual Thrower
description: You know how to throw two weapons as easily as strike with them.

name: Dual-Form Weapon
description: Your innovation has replaceable interlocking pieces that you can use to transform it into another type of weapon.

name: Dual-Handed Assault
description: Requirements You are wielding a one-handed melee weapon and have a free hand.

name: Duelist's Challenge
description: Select one enemy you can see and proclaim a challenge against it.

name: Duelist's Edge
description: Trigger You roll initiative, and you can observe at least one opponent.

name: Duo Dragon Kick
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements Your construct innovation is adjacent to you.You've practiced an impressive spin technique with your construct, automatically attacking in tandem as you launch each other through the air.

name: Eclipsed Vitality
prerequisites: Assassin Dedication or Scout Dedication, master in Stealth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You shroud yourself in ashes that hide the vital essence sought by life-sensing undead.

name: Efficient Alchemy (Alchemist)
description: Thanks to the time you've spent studying and experimenting, you know how to scale your formulas into larger batches that don't require any additional attention.

name: Efficient Explorer
prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain
description: You are more efficient at exploring uncharted territories.

name: Elaborate Flourish
description: You embellish your spellcasting with entrancing flourishes and grand pronouncements, making it harder to identify or counter.

name: Elbow Breaker
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You bend your opponent's body or limbs into agonizing positions that make it difficult for them to maintain their grip.

name: Elemental Existence
description: Your body becomes infused with elemental earth.

name: Elemental Familiar
description: Your familiar becomes an elemental spirit capable of taking on aspects of the elements.

name: Elemental Summons
description: You can call the elements to you.

name: Emergency Targe
description: Trigger An enemy hits you with a melee Strike or a melee spell attack roll, or you fail a save against an enemy's spell.

name: Emissary Familiar
description: You forge a mystical bond with a spirit or create a spirit from a fragment of your own soul.

name: Empathic Envoy
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: You believe that treating others with respect is the fastest way into their hearts, and in turn others are more likely to believe in your good intentions and write off bad first impressions as flukes.

name: Enduring Alchemy
description: You've learned how to make your personal energy last just a little bit longer when quickly brewing ad hoc concoctions.

name: Engine Bay
prerequisites: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication, expert in Crafting
description: You are practiced at working in vast garages of vehicles and can work on many machines at a time.

name: Entity's Strike
description: The more you try to force your body to stay yours, the more it warps to channel the energy flowing through you.

name: Environmental Explorer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've traversed enough untamed wilderness to gain an intuitive understanding of the dangers that exist in such places.

name: Esoteric Spellcasting
description: Your study of a variety of esoteric texts and supernatural matters has broadened your mind and improved your spellcasting.

name: Even the Odds
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Everstand Strike
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield in two hands.

name: Executioner Weapon Training
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Your Gray Gardener training has made you deeply skilled with the weapons that execute with a swift chop to the neck.

name: Exemplar Resiliency
prerequisites: Exemplar Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each exemplar archetype class feat you have.

name: Exorcist Dedication
description: You've learned to attract, quell, and purify spirits, housing them in a special receptacle called a spirit dwelling until they're ready to move on.

name: Expanded Domain Initiate
description: You have long venerated one of your deity's lesser-known aspects.

name: Experienced Harrower
description: When you perform the ritual, the DC for the Primary Check is never more than the standard DC by level, and the cost for the ritual is halved.

name: Expert Backstabber
description: You excel at quickly dispatching your foes.

name: Eye of Ozem
prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication, expert in Perception
description: You've learned how to spot danger at a distance, allowing you to serve as a sentry with ease.

name: Fake It Till You Make It
description: When you take on a role, you become more capable with all sorts of tasks involving that role.

name: Familiar Conduit
prerequisites: Familiar Master Dedication, able to cast spells
description: Requirements You have line of effect to your familiar.

name: Familiar Foe
prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication, expert in Religion or Undead Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You regularly face off against undead and can identify many with a glance.

name: Familiar Mascot
description: When selecting master abilities, you can choose an ally to benefit from any specific master ability.

name: Familiar Sage Dedication
prerequisites: You have a familiar, you're able to cast spells
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've forged an empowered mystical bond with your familiar.

name: Fancy Moves
description: You show off your fighting style to discourage your foes.

name: Fane's Escape
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You have a deck of playing cards in your possession.

name: Far Shot
description: Your experience in the field has taught you how to focus your aim at a distance, increasing your accuracy.

name: Farabellus Flip
prerequisites: trained in Acrobatics and medium armor
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger An enemy targets you with a melee Strike.

name: Favored Prey
description: You have studied a specific type of wild creature and can hunt it more easily.

name: Feast
description: Requirements You are adjacent to a or creature, or a deceased creature that died in the past hour.

name: Feral Senses
description: The eyes and noses of animals are naturally sharper than most humanoids.

name: Fermenting Liquors
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You have a hand free.You always have a special batch of preserved liquor ready for each day.

name: Ferocity Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have encountered a creature who has kept fighting or dealt damage after being reduced to 0 Hit Points (such as via death throes or Ferocity) or have identified a creature with such an ability in combat
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.You have trained yourself to continue fighting even when your body is screaming for you to stop.

name: Fighter Resiliency
prerequisites: Fighter Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each fighter archetype class feat you have.

name: Final Rest
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: As stubborn in death as you are in life, you vow you'll never aid your hated enemies.

name: Finishing Precision
description: You've learned how to land daring blows when you have Panache.

name: Fire Resistance
description: Your connection to heat and flame means that fire is reluctant to bring its full force to bear against you.

name: Firebrand Braggart Dedication
prerequisites: second mark member of the Firebrands, Charisma +2
description: Your Firebrand training has taught you that achieving something is more satisfying if you boast about it first.

name: First Revelation
description: You gain your mystery's initial revelation spell.

name: Flamboyant Athlete
description: Your Panache allows you to perform incredible feats: climbing, swimming, and leaping far beyond your normal capacity.

name: Fleet Tempo
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: Frequency once per hour To rush after a criminal or reach someone in need, you ring a sprightly tone.

name: Flurry of Maneuvers
description: You flurry is a combination of maneuvers.

name: Fly Swat
description: You've learned the secret of swatting away annoying pests and occasionally getting an easy meal out of it.

name: Flying Kick
description: You launch yourself at a foe.

name: Focused Juggler
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Folktales Lore
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You can pull bits of wisdom from any tale.

name: Forceful Push
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast mage hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its target to be 1 creature.

name: Forest Passage
description: You can always find a path, almost as if foliage parted before you.

name: Form Control
description: With additional care and effort, you can take on an alternate shape for a longer period of time.

name: Frightful Moan
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You lament your fate, forcing each living creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] to attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

name: Gadget Specialist
description: Rather than just using your gadgets for various boosts and tweaks, you also craft a few specific temporary consumable gadgets each day.

name: Gear Gnash
description: Snares you create have complicated inner workings that are quite difficult to disable.

name: Ghost Blade
description: Frequency once per hour You alter your weapon's phase so it can more easily strike incorporeal creatures.

name: Ghost Wrangler
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Spirits around you coalesce upon your fists, enabling you to seize and harm other ghosts and spirits.

name: Ghostly Resistance
description: Your ghostly form becomes innately weaker but also gains resistance to many forms of damage.

name: Giant Hunter
description: You have studied giants and hunt them with efficiency.

name: Gossip Lore
description: Your time gossiping in fashionable salons keeps you informed on every topic.

name: Grave's Voice
description: You can use your choice of Spirit Lore or Haunt Lore to Make an Impression or Request things of incorporeal creatures.

name: Gravelands Herbalist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Access Knights of Lastwall have access to this feat.

name: Greenwatch Initiate
description: You've received the basic training developed for all Greenwatch recruits.

name: Guarded Movement
description: Your guard is up, even while moving.

name: Guardian's Deflection (Swashbuckler)
description: Trigger An ally within your melee reach is hit by an attack, you can see the attacker, and a +2 circumstance bonus to AC would turn the critical hit into a hit or the hit into a miss.

name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded one-handed firearm.Your flair keeps foes' attention, as your motions with your gun draw your foes into a deadly game.

name: Gusting Spell
description: You manipulate the currents of your spell's energy, allowing you to gracefully glide with your wings.

name: Haft Striker Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a two-handed hammer, spear, or polearm.You enter a stance that allows you to leverage the haft of your weapon to brutal effect as an effective and frighteningly efficient weapon in its own right.

name: Hallowed Initiate
description: You've expanded your focus spellcasting to techniques used by clerics and wizards.

name: Harmonize Self
description: You can restore your health by tapping into your qi.

name: Harrow Casting
description: Requirements You have an active harrow omen.

name: Harsh Judgement
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Choose one creature you can see, and loudly declare the creature's life forfeit by your judgment.

name: Head Stomp
description: Make an unarmed melee Strike against a target.

name: Heal Animal
description: You can heal your animal companion's wounds.

name: Healing Bomb
description: You can add a foamy catalyst to an elixir of life to turn it into a topical projectile.

name: Heaven-Earth Encompassing Sleeves
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your magic extends to your garments.

name: Heaven's Step Offense
description: Trigger Your melee Strike reduces a creature to 0 Hit PointsYour lessons from the stage find life in the storied mercy and fearlessness of Grand Prince Gennaris III.

name: Heroic Defiance
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You gain the condition.Even as shadows of your doom haunt the corners of your vision, your implacable spirit surges and cries out that your time has not yet come.

name: Hidden Magic
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion, Vigilante Dedication
description: You've learned to hide the magical auras of your gear.

name: Hideous Ululation
description: Your throat has multiple separate chambers that can give your voice an eerie echo.

name: Hijack Undead
description: Frequency once per hour Your clockwork devices can commandeer the bodies of undead, bending them to your will.

name: Homing Beacon
description: As your spell strikes a target, you plant a beacon in the target's mind that announces its presence to those nearby.

name: Hunter's Sanctum
description: You establish a safe house where you can prepare for your hunt.

name: Hurling Charge
description: You make a ranged Strike with a thrown weapon you already have in your hand, Stride, and then to draw another weapon.Special If you are Raging, and end the Stride adjacent to an enemy, that enemy is against the next Strike you make against it with the weapon you drew before the end of your next turn

name: Hybrid Study Spell
description: Gain the conflux spell from a hybrid study of your choice.

name: Ice Crafter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: The ancient ice-crafting techniques of the saumen kar awaken within you.

name: Igneogenesis
description: You can create a permanent stone object, either sculpting stone pulled directly from your kinetic gate or manipulating earth and stone around you.

name: Immortal Lightness
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You breathe, allowing your golden core to release qi into the meridians governing your lower body, and break into a burst of speed that could shame arrows in flight.

name: Impaling Finisher
description: You stab two foes with a single thrust or bash them together with one punch.

name: Impressive Mount
description: You've trained your mount to become a powerful force on the battlefield.

name: Improved Familiar (Witch)
description: You find it easy to attract a powerful and unusual familiar to your side.

name: Improvised Pummel
description: When you make a Strike with an improvised weapon you're wielding, you gain a +1 item bonus to the attack roll, and you can have the Strike deal two weapon damage dice instead of the improvised weapon's normal number.

name: In Lightning, Life
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Requirements You're wearing or holding a ."In lightning, there is life." This lesson is whispered throughout Lepidstadt, and you can put it to practical use.

name: In Plain Sight
description: People often only see what they want to see, a weakness you know how to take full advantage of.

name: In Tune
description: You attune your great skill in performing to another, granting them a small measure of your skill as though anyone could do it.

name: Initial Eidolon Ability
description: Your link to your eidolon becomes stronger, granting it a new ability.

name: Inked Panoply
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack, and you can see the attacker.Your tattoos can briefly animate and extend from your skin, granting you a spectral shield-bearer who protects you from harm.

name: Inspiring Marshal Stance
description: You become a brilliant example of dedication and poise in battle, encouraging your allies to follow suit.

name: Inspiring Resilience
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger You and at least one other creature become the target of a spell or effect with the emotion, fear, or mental trait that allows a saving throw, and you haven't rolled the save yet.

name: Instant Backup
description: Trigger Your attack with a firearm misfires.Even as your firearm misfires, you quickly draw a backup.

name: Instructive Strike
description: You attack your foe and analyze how it reacts.

name: Inured to Alchemy
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Access You're from Alkenstar or the Mana Wastes.

name: Investigate Haunting
description: You are skilled at noticing the telltale signs of ghosts and hauntings.

name: Investigator's Stratagem
description: You play out battles in your head, allowing you to Strike when the time is right.

name: Invigorating Elixir
description: You can mix an aromatic salve into an elixir with the healing trait to soothe physical maladies.

name: Invoke Offense
description: Requirements You're under the effects of .You manifest a physical attack of the spirits all around you, such as the claw of an animal spirit or the whipping vine of a nature spirit.

name: Irezoko Tattoo
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: Access You are a member of the College of Mysteries Your face bears an intricate magical tattoo known as the irezoko, a badge of your understanding of your chosen field of magic and a recognition of your advancement within Absalom's College of Mysteries.

name: Jalmeri Heavenseeker Dedication
prerequisites: Student of Perfection Dedication, or you've trained with a champion of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven
description: You become trained in either Acrobatics or Occultism; if you were already trained in both these skills, you become an expert in one of them instead.

name: Just the Tool
description: You temporarily change your weapon's shape to assist you in the field.

name: Ka Stone Ritual
prerequisites: Living Monolith Dedication, a sphinx or living monolith with this feat performs a ritual with you
description: You inscribe your true name on your ka stone, as well as oaths to gods and pharaohs, and embed it in your forehead in a special ritual with a sphinx or with a living monolith who already has this feat.

name: Kaiju Defense Oath
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've sworn an oath to defend the helpless from dangerous titanic beasts, including kaiju that roam the surface of Golarion.

name: Knock Sense
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You attack carefully to knock some sense into a creature whose actions aren't their own.

name: Knowledge of Shapes
description: Inspiration lets you surpass your preconceptions of your spells' limits.

name: Kreighton's Cognitive Crossover
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger You gain no information from a Recall Knowledge check (usually because you failed the secret check) using one of the two skills you chose for this feat.

name: Lassoing Lash
prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication, trained in Athletics
description: Requirements The target can't be more than one size larger than you.You quickly wrap your lash around an opponent and pull them toward you.

name: Lava Leap
description: You wreath yourself in molten stone and hurtle toward your enemy.

name: Leading Dance
description: Requirements You are adjacent to an enemy.You sweep your foe into your dance.

name: Leshy Familiar Secrets
description: The leaf order's secrets allow your familiar to take advantage of its leshy form.

name: Lie Detector
description: You're adept at noticing the tells of a liar—sweat, flushing, a quavering voice, a quickening pulse.

name: Lifelink Surge
description: You learn the link spell.

name: Light of Revelation
description: You've learned to call upon light to reveal what is hidden.

name: Lightning Dash
description: For an instant, you transform yourself into a being of pure lightning and fly forward, shocking anyone in your way.

name: Linked Focus
description: You have linked your bonded item to the well of energy that powers your school spells.

name: Lion's Might
description: You've trained with the weapons of the Bright Lions.

name: Listener's Boon
description: Isthralei has given you a gift to assist you on your journey.

name: Living Bonfire
description: Roots and branches of living wood writhe in elemental fire at your command, forming a bonfire fearsome enough to scare off predators in the night.

name: Log Roll
description: Requirements You and an adjacent creature are both on a narrow surface or uneven ground and the other creature is off-guard.

name: Loose Cannon
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Your unpredictable gunfire often catches enemies off guard or hits unprotected areas.

name: Lost in the Crowd
description: You've learned how to move as one with crowds and hide among them, vanishing into a busy street in the blink of an eye.

name: Lucky Escape
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature targets you with an attack, even if you aren't aware of it.

name: Magic Warrior Aspect
description: You can alter your form to gain an aspect of the animal your mask represents.

name: Magic Warrior Transformation
description: You can transform fully into the animal your mask represents.

name: Magical Edification
description: You've learned those tidbits of magic that are most conducive to furthering your acquisition and transmission of knowledge.

name: Magical Scholastics
description: While study is key to your success, a bit of magic can be a helpful aid in discovering the secrets of the past.

name: Magical Trickster
description: Whether you're using magic items, wielding innate magic, or dabbling in spellcasting, you can sneak spells past your foes' defenses as easily as any blade.

name: Magnetic Field
description: A magnetic field surrounds you.

name: Mammoth Lord Dedication
description: You've undertaken the ultimate challenge of the Mammoth Lords and tamed a megafauna.

name: Manipulative Charm
prerequisites: Vampire Dedication, trained in Deception or Diplomacy
description: Against humanoids, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to , and to Diplomacy checks to and .

name: Mask Familiar
description: Your mask takes on a personality of its own, allowing it to serve as your familiar.

name: Masquerade of Seasons Stance
description: You have mastered the opening steps to the Masquerade of Seasons, a dance that channels the power of spring, summer, winter, and autumn.

name: Mature Animal Companion (Druid)
description: Your animal companion has grown up over the course of your adventures, becoming a mature animal companion and gaining additional capabilities.

name: Mature Beastmaster Companion
description: All of your animal companions grow up, becoming mature animal companions and gaining additional capabilities.

name: Megaton Strike
description: You activate gears, explosives, and other hidden mechanisms in your innovation to make a powerful attack.

name: Melodious Spell
description: You subtly weave your spellcasting into a performance.

name: Mental Forge
description: Your experiences in combat shape your mind's capability to strengthen and shape your weapon to match the way you move in combat.

name: Mercy
description: Your touch soothes the body or mind.

name: Minion Guise
prerequisites: animal companion or familiar, expert in Deception, Vigilante Dedication
description: When you are in your social identity, you can also grant a social identity to an animal companion, familiar, or other minion you gained from a class feature.

name: Modular Dynamo
description: Your dynamo has modular configurations, allowing you to swap between various different possibilities with ease in order to adapt to various situations in combat.

name: Monk Resiliency
prerequisites: Monk Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each monk archetype class feat you have.

name: Morning Side Dishes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You know a proper breakfast should have a variety of sides.

name: Mortification
description: Your reckonings have prepared your body for physical punishment.

name: Mountain Skin
description: You become trained in medium and heavy armor.

name: Mug
description: You make a quick attack and rob your foe in the process.

name: Multilingual Cipher
description: You use multiple languages to create and break codes.

name: Named Artillery
description: It is a tradition among artillerists to name the siege weapon most important to them and closest to their heart—much as a sailor on a ship, the weapon is their livelihood.

name: Natural Conduit
description: Requirements You have line of effect to your animal companion or another friendly animal within 60 feet.

name: Natural Swimmer
description: Water flows around you, letting you cut through the waves as if born to it.

name: Necromantic Resistance
description: As part of your training, you've inured yourself against necromancy through repeated exposure.

name: Necromantic Resistance (Undead Slayer)
description: As part of your training, you've inured yourself against necromancy through grueling, repeated exposure.

name: Never Tire
description: Trigger You would gain the condition.

name: Nocturnal Kindred
description: You have an innate connection with other creatures of the night and understand some of them.

name: Nonlethal Takedown
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You prefer to use nonlethal means against living opponents, but the weapons you carry are lethal enough to destroy undead.

name: Numbing Spice Exhalation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can mix alchemically preserved peppers into an alchemical food consumable to spice it up with alchemical fire.

name: Observant Explorer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Thanks to the time you've spent wandering through wild and untamed environments, you've gained an intuitive sense about creatures.

name: Occult Evolution
description: Glimpses of the obscure secrets of the universe loan you power.

name: One with the Land
description: Your connection to your bound terrain strengthens, making you unhindered by local weather.

name: Ongoing Investigation
description: You're always investigating what's around you, even as you perform other activities.

name: Only the Worthy
description: You can designate your ikons as movable by only your own hand, leaving them fixed in place as surely as if they were lodged in stone.

name: Order Magic
description: You have delved deeper into the teaching of a new order, gaining access to a coveted order spell.

name: Order Spell
description: You gain the initial order spell from your order.

name: Orthographic Mastery
description: You understand the principles that underlie all written words, allowing you to read nearly any text.

name: Ostentatious Reload
description: Requirements You're wielding two one-handed firearms.

name: Oversized Throw
description: Requirements You have one or more hands free.

name: Pact of Fey Glamour
description: You've sworn a pact with fey powers, granting you the otherworldly appearance of your dreams in exchange for oaths of hospitality.

name: Pact of Huldra's Renewal
description: You've sworn a pact with Zemnaïdé, a huldra professor at Cobyslarni, to help renew his former homeland of the Sarkoris Scar.

name: Paired Link
description: You break a trinket such as a lodestone or jade pendant in two, creating a sympathetic link between the halves that bridges distance.

name: Paired Shots
description: Requirements You're wielding two weapons, each of which can be either a loaded one-handed firearm or loaded one-handed crossbow.

name: Parting Shot
description: Requirements You are wielding a loaded ranged weapon or a ranged weapon with reload 0.

name: Patch Job
description: You can patch up damage to an object with a quick fix.

name: Patron's Glamour
description: Gathering up threads of your old connection, you can temporarily disguise yourself as your missing patron.

name: Peafowl Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a sword that has the monk trait in one hand.

name: Perfect Strike
description: You gain the ki spell.

name: Perfect Weaponry
description: You gain the monk class feat.

name: Petal Step
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You have a mastery over your own movement and can distribute your weight to dance lightly over the ground like petals drifting on the water.

name: Phonetic Training
description: You can pronounce and repeat words with near-perfect accuracy even if you don't understand their meaning, and you can write them down in a phonetic script that allows you or another creature with Phonetic Training to read it later.

name: Pirate Combat Training
description: You're particularly skilled at wielding the weapons used traditionally by pirates.

name: Plate in Treasure
description: Precious metal flows from your fingers to plate an object.

name: Play to the Crowd
description: Trigger You reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points during a non-trivial combat encounter with spectators.

name: Poison Weapon
description: Requirements You are wielding a weapon.You apply a contact poison or injury poison to the required weapon; if you have a free hand, you can Interact to draw a poison as part of this action.

name: Poisoner's Twist
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful melee Strike that dealt damage against a target afflicted by a poison, and you know which poison.

name: Portents of the Haruspex
description: Trigger A creature within 30 feet is reduced to 0 Hit Points in a way that doesn't destroy their body.Although the divinations of a haruspex traditionally require organs and lengthy interpretation, you've learned how to glimpse the future in a more simple fashion by reading creatures' wounds.

name: Posse
description: Requirements You have designated prey with Hunt Prey.By spending 1 minute giving guidance to help hunt down your prey, you instruct up to five willing creatures to assist you.

name: Poultice Preparation
description: When you create an herbal elixir, you can prepare it as a poultice instead.

name: Power Slide
description: Requirements You are piloting a vehicle.You throw the vehicle into a barely controlled skid, turning sharply to evade pursuit or bring your weapons to bear.

name: Powerful Shove
description: You can push larger foes around with your attack.

name: Prayer-Touched Weapon
prerequisites: divine spells, you follow a good-aligned deity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip divine spell.

name: Predictable!
description: By observing an opponent, you can get a sense of their next move and prepare to counter or resist it.

name: Primal Evolution
description: You can call upon the creatures of the wild for aid.

name: Psi Strikes
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to or to Unleash your Psyche.

name: Psychic Duelist Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Occultism, you have been in a psychic duel
description: Through experience and in-depth visualizations of mental battles, you've grown adept at psychic duels.

name: Psychopomp Familiar
description: Your familiar becomes a masked psychopomp-an extraplanar guardian of the cycle of souls.

name: Push Back the Dead!
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You call to your ally and strengthen their resolve and abilities to defend against the horrific tricks undead bring to bear.

name: Pyre Ant Sting
description: Requirements Your swarm is outside your body.Your swarm's stings burn with agonizing pain, much like that caused by the bright red pyre ants that make their tunnels within the parched sands of deserts like Qadira.

name: Quick Fix
description: You can attach a talisman using only a bit of glue and some string.

name: Quick Juggler
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: When you start to juggle or add another item to those you are Juggling, you add two items instead of one.

name: Quick Mount
description: Requirements You are adjacent to a creature that is at least one size larger than you and is willing to be your mount.

name: Quick Reversal
description: Requirements You are flanked by at least two enemies.

name: Quick Shot
description: You draw your bow and attack with the same action.

name: Quick Study
description: During your daily preparations, you can study a particular subject to gain the trained proficiency rank in one Lore skill of your choice.

name: Raging Athlete
description: Physical obstacles can't hold back your fury.

name: Raging Stories
description: When you Offer a Story about wild chances and fighting against all odds, you can wrap yourself in spectral flame in place of the normal benefits.

name: Rain of Rust
description: You conjure a red raincloud in a @Template[burst|distance:10] within 60 feet, which pours rust-colored rain directly below it.

name: Raise Symbol
description: Requirements You are wielding a religious symbol.

name: Rallying Anthem
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which protects you and allies.

name: Ranger Resiliency
prerequisites: Ranger Dedication, class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier
description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each ranger archetype class feat you have.

name: Ravel of Thorns
description: Thorny vines grow in geometric patterns on surfaces in your kinetic aura.

name: Ravenous Charge
description: Hungry for the flesh of the living, you hurl yourself into the fray, teeth gnashing.

name: Reach Beyond
description: You've learned to move your spiritual energy past yourself to attack spirits where others can't.

name: Reactive Dismissal
description: Trigger Your eidolon would take damage.

name: Reactive Pursuit
description: Trigger An adjacent foe moves away from you, and you can reach at least one space adjacent to the foe with a Stride action.

name: Reactive Striker
description: You gain the reaction.

name: Rebel's Map
prerequisites: Horizon Walker Dedication or Scout Dedication
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Reflexive Catch
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements The item or thrown weapon is of a Bulk you can Juggle.

name: Regurgitate Mutagen
description: Requirements You are under the effects of a mutagen.You redirect a mutagen within your body to spit a stream of stomach acid at a foe.

name: Remember Your Training
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Frequency once per day During your training to become a Pathfinder Agent you were schooled on a wide variety of creatures you might encounter, and you can think back to that training to gain crucial insight in times of need.

name: Rend Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have seen a creature use Rend or have identified a creature that has Rend in combat
description: Requirements You have hit the same enemy with two consecutive melee Strikes that each dealt slashing damage.Taking advantage of the brutal efficiency of hacking away at a target with two slashing attacks, you've mastered the art of punishing a foe caught between your slices.

name: Repeating Hand Crossbow Training
description: You become trained in the and gain access to repeating hand crossbows and .

name: Replenishing Consumption
description: When you devour corpses and satiate your hunger, you also recover from some of your wounds, your necrotized blue flesh knitting back together almost immediately as soon as you begin shoveling the chunks of dead flesh down your throat.

name: Rescuer's Press
description: Any shield you wield gains the shove trait.

name: Restorative Strike
description: Requirements You have a or spell you can cast.

name: Restore Omen
description: Requirements You do not have an active harrow omen.

name: Return to the Sea
description: You adapt a creature to living and moving in water.

name: Reverse Engineering
description: Your nigh-constant tinkering and fiddling with objects means you are able to reverse engineer items into formulas more effectively than most.

name: Rip and Tear
description: Requirements Your last action dealt piercing or slashing damage using an unarmed Strike granted by a morph or polymorph effect.

name: Rise, My Creature!
description: You have created life!

name: Rising Blood Magic
description: The power within your blood grows.

name: Rites of Convocation
description: Your patron grants you the power to summon other creatures to aid you.

name: Ritual Researcher
description: Careful research into the art of rituals has made you better at performing them.

name: Ritualist Dedication
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: You have begun to master the difficult art of casting rituals.

name: Rope Runner
prerequisites: trained in Acrobatics, trained in Athletics, Pirate Dedication
description: You run and climb across ropes and rigging almost as easily as on the ground.

name: Running Reload
description: You can reload your weapon on the move.

name: Sabotage
description: Requirements You have a free hand.

name: Sacral Lord
description: By right of ritual or sheer stubbornness, you have claimed rulership of the land.

name: Sacred Ground
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You pray continuously for 1 minute to call a subtle shadow of your deity's realm over a @Template[burst|distance:30] centered on you.

name: Sacred Spells
description: Add , , , , , , and to your spell list.

name: Sacred Wilds Oath
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've sworn an oath to protect the holy places within nature and the spirits that dwell within, from ancient trees to primordial wild guardians.

name: Safe Elements
description: Elements are wild and dangerous, but you've found ways to reduce their risk.

name: Safe House
description: You establish a safe house-a secure space in which to hide your secrets from the outside world.

name: Safety Measures
description: You're often careful to be sure you're not hoisted on your own petard, or anyone else's, for that matter.

name: Scales of the Dragon
description: Scales grow across your body, protecting you against physical and magical threats.

name: Scalpel's Point
description: Your stratagems benefit from your precise knowledge of anatomy.

name: Scars of Steel
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An opponent critically hits you with an attack that deals physical damage.When you are struck with the mightiest of blows, you can flex your muscles to turn aside some of the damage.

name: Scion of Domora Dedication
prerequisites: Familiar Master Dedication, you have befriended a spirit guide and it bonded with you using its Bond with Mortal ability.
description: You gain a spirit guide ally.

name: Scoundrel's Surprise
description: You drop your disguise at the right moment and surprise your target.

name: Scout's Charge
description: You meander around unpredictably, and then ambush your opponents without warning.

name: Scout's Warning
description: Trigger You are about to roll a Perception, Stealth, or Survival check for initiative.You visually or audibly warn your allies of danger, granting them each a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls, or a +2 circumstance bonus if you're using the exploration activity.

name: Security
description: Those you shield can benefit from your lasting protection.

name: Seeker of Truths
description: Your devotion to discovering and hoarding abstruse truths borders on the fanatical, and you can bring this devotion to bear.

name: Semblance of Life
description: Trigger You deal damage to a living creature with your fist Strike or with Desiccating Inhalation.

name: Seneschal Spell
description: Frequency once per hourYou can channel even complex spells through your connection to your charge.

name: Sense Alignment
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace
description: You read the body language of an intelligent creature within 30 feet and pick up on subtle cues to detect its general propensity for good or evil and law or chaos.

name: Senses of the Bear
description: While in ursine form, you gain low-light vision and scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

name: Settlement Scholastics
description: Your studies open up new horizons.

name: Shadow Spells
description: Hidden darkness whispers to you, teaching you secrets of shadow beyond other spellcasters of your tradition.

name: Shared Attunement
description: When you would gain a benefit from your terrain attunement, you can grant it to one ally within 30 feet instead of yourself.

name: Shattering Spellstrike
description: Requirements You're in Arcane Cascade stance and wielding an improvised weapon.You intentionally channel a rampaging cascade of magic through your weapon, breaking it to deal more damage.

name: Sheltering Cave
description: Requirements You're standing on ground composed of earth, stone, or a similar material.

name: Shielded Stride
