description: When your shield is up, your enemies' blows can't touch you.

name: Shining Arms
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast light
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its target to be 1 melee weapon, either unattended or possessed by you or a willing ally, and modify its duration to be 1 minute.

name: Shorthanded
description: Typically, a siege weapon is meant to be run by a crew with a very specific minimum number of members designed to ensure that your crew can account for every possible variable and necessity in loading, aiming, and firing the weapon.

name: Shrink Down
description: Your eidolon can shrink to fit into small spaces.

name: Skilled Partner
description: Your eidolon gains a 1st-level skill feat and a 2nd-level or lower skill feat.

name: Slam Down
description: You make an attack to knock a foe off balance, then follow up immediately with a sweep to topple them.

name: Slayer's Strike
description: You've dedicated yourself to studying ancient techniques and memorized minor prayers against undead to swiftly dispatch them.

name: Sleepwalker Dedication
description: You've learned to manipulate states of consciousness, beginning with your own.

name: Snap Out of It! (Marshal)
description: You give a quick shout, hoping to shake the fog clouding your ally's thoughts.

name: Snare Specialist
description: You specialize in creating quick traps to obstruct your enemies on the battlefield.

name: Sneak Attacker
description: You gain the class feature, except it deals 1d4 damage, increasing to 1d6 at 6th level.

name: Snowcaster
description: Your magical power grows as the shard's icy influence spreads ever deeper into your being.

name: Snowdrift Spell
description: The howling wind and precipitation of your magic turn to thick snow.

name: Sociable Vow
description: You can leverage your vow in more social interactions.

name: Social Purview
description: You have built a reputation for yourself in your social identity.

name: Solo Dancer
prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication, expert in Performance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You often dance alone with a grace exceeding that of most other performers, carrying yourself with a poise and confidence that draws the attention of those around you.

name: Soothing Pulse
description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to help staunch your wounds, granting you the action.

name: Soul Flare
description: Trigger An attack you made with a soulforged weapon or shield misses a creature, or a creature hits you with an attack while you're either wearing manifested soulforged armor or have your soulforged shield raised.

name: Special Sentinel Technique
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can channel the power of your constellation into a unique technique.

name: Spell Protection Array
description: You inscribe a circle of arcane runes that dampen enemies' magic.

name: Spell Runes
description: The magical runes on your body grant you several magical abilities.

name: Spell-Woven Shot
description: You combine your own magic with that of your magical crossbow or firearm.

name: Spellstriker
description: You gain the magus's activity.

name: Spirit Companion
description: You gain the service of a young animal companion, which has been blessed by the spirits of this world.

name: Spirit of the Beast
description: You imbue your companion with the aspect of another animal.

name: Spirit Spells
description: Your ability to confront incorporeal menaces develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

name: Spiritual Awakening
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level animist feat.

name: Spiritual Explorer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You're familiar with the danger that lingering spirits can pose to an unwary adventurer, and you're particularly attuned to their presence.

name: Spiritual Guides
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, a Perception check or a skill check.Though no one sees them and only you can hear them, the spirits around you constantly chatter, save when you are raging.

name: Split Shot
description: You fragment a ranged spell.

name: Spot Translate
description: Trigger Another creature within 60 feet uses a linguistic effect in a language you understand.You bridge a language gap, repeating the message in a different language that you know.

name: Spyglass Modification
description: Your enhanced visual gear includes a regulating scope and reflectors, combined in an ingenuous setup that allows you to see around corners within the area of your overwatch field.

name: Stage Fighting
description: You pull punches to give a better show.

name: Stand Still
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using You strike out when your foe tries to flee.

name: Stargazer's Eyes
description: Long hours in darkened observatories have sharpened your senses.

name: Starlit Eyes
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, starlit span hybrid study
description: Starlight shines in your sight, enhancing your perception and range.

name: Steady Spellcasting (Magus)
description: Confident in your technique, you don't easily lose your concentration when you Cast a Spell.

name: Steel on Steel
description: Usage imbued into a melee weapon ikon or worn ikon made of metal, stone, or a similarly hard materialThe ring of divinely empowered steel assails your enemies.

name: Steel Skin
description: You wear your armor like a second skin, taking comfort in the protection it offers.

name: Steel Yourself!
description: You encourage an ally to toughen up, giving them a fighting chance.

name: Stone Guardian
description: You learn to call a powerful guardian of earth and stone to your side.

name: Stoney Skin
description: Your skin takes on the hardness of stone.

name: Strange Script
description: You have such familiarity with obscure texts that you can compel them to reveal their secrets.

name: Strategic Assessment
description: You learn your foes' strengths and weaknesses by watching them move.

name: Strategic Repose
description: You've trained extensively in fighting the undead and have learned to infuse a small amount of vitality energy into your weapon.

name: Strategist Stance
prerequisites: Marshal Dedication, trained in Society or Warfare Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You find the most strategic options for you and your allies.

name: Striker's Scroll
description: You can attach a scroll to your weapon or to blend its spell into an attack, carefully folding it around a part of the weapon or sealing it to the weapon's surface.

name: Student of the Staff
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, twisting tree hybrid study
description: You've studied the staff extensively to learn the hidden capabilities of your chosen weapon.

name: Summon Ensemble
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast summon instrument
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its duration to be sustained, up to 1 minute.

name: Sun Blade
description: Access The following class feat is available to Knights of Lastwall.

name: Supernatural Senses
description: Your scent is preternaturally sharp, and you can always rely on your sense of smell to help guide you when your vision is compromised.

name: Suplex
description: Requirements You have a creature or .

name: Sure Foot
prerequisites: Horizon Walker Dedication, expert in Acrobatics, expert in Athletics
description: You know the secrets of moving in your .

name: Surprise Attack
description: You act before foes can react.

name: Surprise Snare
description: You install one of your snares prepared for quick deployment in a space that's occupied by an opponent.

name: Swaggering Initiative
description: Trigger You are about to roll initiative.You swagger readily into any fight.

name: Swift Leap
description: Your undead physiology allows you to leap quickly toward or away from your opponent.

name: Swipe
description: You make a wide, arcing swing.

name: Sympathetic Strike
description: Frequency once per round You collect your patron's magic into one of your witch armaments, causing them to shine with runes, light, or another signifier of your patron.

name: Syu Tak-nwa's Skillful Tresses
description: You can expertly control your living hair and use it to perform various tasks.

name: Tactile Magic Feedback
description: Your ostilli can sense nearby spellcasters.

name: Take the Wheel
description: Requirements You are adjacent to a vehicle's point of entry.Diving into a moving vehicle and seizing the controls is nothing new for you.

name: Talon Sweep
description: Trigger A creature attempts to Strike you while it's flanking you.

name: Tandem Movement
description: You and your eidolon move together.

name: Tandem Onslaught
description: You have trained your body and mind to work in tandem, and you can combine your combat and spellcasting prowess to better support yourself in battle.

name: Tenacious Toxins
description: Your victims tend to expire long before your poisons, since the latter have been specifically formulated to last longer.

name: Terrain Scout
description: You have mastered movement in many different environments.

name: Text Decoder
description: Thanks to your constant involvement with cryptic texts, you have attained an almost-supernatural ability to decipher complex codes and understand ancient writings.

name: That's Not Natural!
description: Your mastery at surviving in the wild has given you a sort of sixth-sense when it comes to noticing creatures that aren't part of the natural order.

name: Thaumaturgic Ritualist
description: Your studies into the supernatural have resulted in an especially strong knowledge of rituals.

name: The Dead Tell Tales
description: New campfire chroniclers are inundated with the stories of the ghosts below Pulura's Fall and the lessons learned there.

name: The Harder They Fall
description: You make your foes fall painfully when you trip them.

name: Thermal Nimbus
description: You direct waves of warmth into or out of your kinetic gate to drastically shift the temperature around you.

name: Thorough Reports
description: Your reports are thorough and informative, and putting your thoughts to paper helps you retain the information.

name: Thoughtform Summoning
description: You can create a prototypical creature from the depths of your imagination instead of calling one from elsewhere.

name: Thousand Visions
description: You open your senses to numerous visions of the immediate future.

name: Through the Gate
description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level kineticist feat of your choice.

name: Through the Needle's Eye
description: Usage imbued into a weapon ikonYour weapon strikes with the perfection your will demands.

name: Tools of the Trade
description: You're well-versed in weapons that allow you to bring bounties back in one piece, or at least alive.

name: Tracing Sigil
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast sigil
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: The target leaves a magical trail that you and others can try to follow.

name: Trapsmith Dedication
description: You use glimmering gears and gnashing mechanisms to manufacture snares using specialized parts.

name: Treat Condition
description: Requirements You are holding healer's tools, or you are wearing them and have a hand free.You treat an adjacent creature in an attempt to reduce the clumsy, enfeebled, or sickened condition.

name: Triangulate
description: Your spotter's quick signals help you make even difficult shots seem simple.

name: Tributary Circulation
description: Never distant from water's succoring presence, your refined breathing techniques focus your awareness and control of water inward.

name: Tricksterbane Oath
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've sworn an oath to ferret out and destroy malevolent shapechangers who pose as mortals with evil intent.

name: Triple Time
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which speeds up you and your allies for a round.

name: Tumbling Lumber
description: A slew of logs eject from the Plane of Wood and slam into your enemies.

name: Tunnel Wall
description: Requirements You are in Tenacious Stance.

name: Turn Back the Clock
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a skill check or saving throw.

name: Tut-Tut
description: Trigger You hit a creature with a melee attack roll.

name: Twin Distraction
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Twin Parry
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, one in each hand.

name: Twirl Through
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You sweep across the battlefield in a fluttering of movement honed from years of coordinating perfectly spaced movements alongside fellow dancers.

name: Twirling Throw
description: Your thrown weapons seem to defy physics as they soar through the air and spin back to you after a strike.

name: Underbrush Trailblazer
description: You gain the feat, selecting the underbrush terrain; if you already have Terrain Stalker for underbrush, you can select a different type of difficult terrain.

name: Undying Conviction
prerequisites: able to create or control undead, cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard
description: Your presence has a bolstering effect on your undead minions.

name: Unnerving Expansion
description: You gather your curse around you and impel it to pour outward, expanding your maelstrom.

name: Venture-Gossip Dedication
prerequisites: member of the Pathfinder Society, Pathfinder Agent Dedication
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Look, the motto of the Pathfinder Society is "explore, report, cooperate" and you're just reporting what you hear!

name: Versatile Mutation
description: Your ostilli's darts can deal different types of damage.

name: Versatile Signature
description: While most bards are known for certain signature performances and spells, you're always tweaking your available repertoire.

name: Vibration Sense
description: Your eidolon gains as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

name: Viking Weapon Familiarity
description: From childhood, you have been exposed to traditional viking combat techniques, and you soon learned to handle axe, sword, and shield in battle.

name: Violent Unleash
description: Trigger You Unleash your Psyche.

name: Voice of Authority
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners, expert in Intimidation
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: You easily command the attention of others, and when the time comes to turn threats into action, your authoritative voice causes foes to falter.

name: Walk the Wilds
description: You know the ways of birds and beasts and have gained the right to wear their forms.

name: Warding Light
description: You gain a tattoo that serves as a special ward to defend you against Walkena's forces.

name: Watch and Learn
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger An ally you can see succeeds or critically succeeds at a Strength- or Dexterity-based skill check, using a skill in which you are untrained.

name: Wayfinder Resonance Tinkerer
description: You can use the unusual resonance of your wayfinder to grant it additional effects.

name: Weaver's Web
description: Requirements Your swarm is outside your body.Your swarm can spin dense webs much like those left by stone-gray weaver spiders under eaves and in derelict city buildings, especially along the coasts of Varisia.

name: Wellspring Control
description: When you generate a wellspring surge, roll twice on the Wellspring Surges table and take the result of your choice.

name: Whirling Grindstone
description: A whirling grindstone made of flint appears in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

name: Wild Lights
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast dancing lights
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its duration to be 1 minute and modify its standard effects to create a single floating light in the shape of a Tiny creature, instead of up to four floating lights.

name: Wing Bounce
description: You rush forward, flapping your wings for a bit of lift, and can use that momentum to knock down a foe.

name: Winter Sleet
description: Bone-chilling, swirling sleet surrounds you, cruel as deepest winter.

name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
description: With a bit of hide, some antlers, and some cast-off fur, you can create a disguise that will fool even an experienced hunter.

name: Worm Sense
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You emulate the senses of the cave worm.

name: Wormskin
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Your flesh grows thick and bloated, protecting you against harm.

name: Wounded Rage
description: Trigger You take damage and are capable of entering a rage You roar in pain, awakening the rage within you.

name: You're an Embarrassment!
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet fails a Will saving throw against an incapacitation effect.

name: Zoophonic Composition
description: Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a composition spell.

name: Absorb Strength
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You are adjacent to an enemy's corpse who has been dead for no longer than 1 minute.You consume a piece of your enemy, absorbing their strength.

name: Accommodating Mount
description: You've trained to serve as a mount, if only for your most trusted allies.

name: Adaptive Adept
prerequisites: Adapted Cantrip, can cast 3rd rank spells
description: You've continued adapting your magic to blend your class's tradition with your adapted tradition.

name: Advanced Targeting System
description: Your ocular processors are augmented with advanced targeting systems, which allow you to more easily pinpoint your enemy and read their movements.

name: Affliction Resistance
description: Your diet has strengthened you against diseases and poisons.

name: Ageless Patience
description: You work at a pace born from longevity that enhances your thoroughness.

name: Agonizing Rebuke
description: When you terrorize your enemies, you also cause them painful mental distress.

name: Alarming Disappearance
description: Your ability to move unseen is startling for one your size, causing panic among your enemies.

name: All This Has Happened Before
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You're about to roll initiative.You instantly recall a memory from one of your countless past lives that heightens your awareness of your surroundings and quickens your response.

name: Ally's Shelter
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You attempt a saving throw while adjacent to one or more allies, but you haven't rolled yet.You follow your allies' example.

name: Ambush Awareness
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks attempted as initiative rolls.

name: Among Humanity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYour talents in shapechanging allow you to pass unseen.

name: Amorphous Aspect
description: Your body is supremely flexible.

name: Ancestral Suspicion
description: Long-lived elves have seen civilizations rise and fall, often at the hands of outside forces.

name: Anchoring Roots
description: Small roots sprout from your feet, steadying you as you move.

name: And Will Do So Once More
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've learned how to let go of most worries and move past them.

name: Animal Speaker
prerequisites: ability to communicate with some type of animals (such as bats or arthropods)
description: You can speak to all animals, not just a particular subset.

name: Animalistic Resistance
description: Your animalistic connections help you resist natural afflictions.

name: Ankle Bite
prerequisites: Fang Sharpener or razortooth goblin heritage
description: Trigger A foe gives you the or condition using a part of its body.

name: Apprentice Sea Witch
description: You're familiar with the basic spells that most educated merfolk know.

name: Aquatic Conversationalist
description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals with the amphibious or aquatic traits.

name: Arcane Safeguards
description: The magic powering you makes it difficult for outside magic to affect you.

name: Athletic Might
description: Surviving in hostile terrain has given you a great talent for mobility.

name: Awakened Yaoguai Heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've delved into the power of your legacy.

name: Azarketi Weapon Aptitude
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You become familiar with using your weapons both in and out of water.

name: Beast of Burden
description: Your broad frame can allow you to carry weights that immobilize smaller creatures.

name: Bestial Brutality
description: Your animalistic unarmed attack grows more dangerous.

name: Blast Resistance
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You're used to the clamor of steel, the crack of a firearm, and the thunderous blast of explosions.

name: Blessed Blood (Nephilim)
description: Your spilled blood is sanctified, with effects similar to those of .

name: Blood Like Water
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The watery fluid in your veins doesn't flow in the same way as traditional blood.

name: Bloodsoaked Dash
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Injuries don't bother you anymore—in fact, the pain invigorates you.

name: Bloody Blows
description: Your lethal unarmed attacks leave bloody gouges or cause severe internal bleeding.

name: Bold Defiance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You Change Shape.You harden your form as you dance between shapes.

name: Boulder Roll
description: Your dwarven build allows you to push foes around, just like a mighty boulder tumbles through a subterranean cavern.

name: Briny Beverage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can survive off the sea as well as gain insight from its waters.

name: Bristle
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You curl into a posture that splays out your bone spines.

name: Call to Battle
description: Trigger You lose the condition.You channel the undying spirit of the einherjar to join to fight.

name: Called
description: You've heard the Call, and by resisting it, you've developed a bulwark against effects that target your mind.

name: Catchy Tune
description: You create a tune so catchy, your foes can't help but dance along.

name: Ceremony of Knowledge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You tap into aeon knowledge.

name: Ceremony of Sunlight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have learned how to master the power contained within sunlight, just like the trees that form your body.

name: Chemical Trail
description: You can leave a faint chemical trail as you move and can use the chemical trails of other surkis to navigate.

name: Chosen of Lamashtu
description: You bear the favor and blessings of , the Mother of Monsters.

name: Clan Protector
description: Your can protect your allies as easily as yourself.

name: Clever Improviser
description: You've learned how to handle situations when you're out of your depth.

name: Clever Shadow
description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your shadow, such as opening an unlocked door.

name: Climate Adaptation
description: Like evergreen trees, which stay healthy and vibrant from winter through summer, you too can adapt to a variety of extreme climates.

name: Climbing Claws
description: You can extend your claws to aid you in climbing.

name: Cloud Gazer
description: Your connection to air allows you to see through obscuring mists.

name: Colugo's Traversal
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Forbidding valleys and sheer cliffs can't curb your vows to reunite the lost.

name: Conductor's Redirection
description: Trigger You are hit by an attack, spell, or other effect that deals electricity damage.

name: Conrasu Weapon Understanding
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You have come to know conrasu weapons as you know yourself.

name: Coral Growth
description: The difference between yourself and your coral symbiotes is nearly impossible to tell apart as your bodies are so intertwined.

name: Cornered Fury
description: If a foe of a larger size than you critically hits and damages you, that foe is to you for 1 round.

name: Cultural Adaptability
description: During your adventures, you've honed your ability to adapt to the culture of the predominant ancestry around you.

name: Cunning Hair
description: Your hair moves under your control.

name: Cunning Tinker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Time spent tending to your own form has unlocked your ability to fix other things.

name: Cutting Flattery
prerequisites: Dandy Dedication or Pirate Dedication, trained in Intimidation
description: Repeated entries in Firebrand bragging and flyting contests have taught you how to twist pretty words into concealed insults.

name: Darkseer
description: smiles upon you-even if you curse his name-granting you pitch-black eyes that allow you to see in shadows and darkness.

name: Darting Monkey
description: You have a heightened awareness in combat, and your darting strikes prevent your foes from distracting you or breaking your focus.

name: Deadly Aspect
description: You have honed the unarmed attack your draconic heritage has granted you to a lethal degree.

name: Debilitating Venom
description: Your venom is particularly potent, affecting targets in different ways.

name: Defensive Needles
prerequisites: Cactus Leshy or Pine Leshy heritage
description: Your body is covered in sharp needles or spines which you can use to defend yourself.

name: Defiance Unto Death
description: Access Spiresworn elf You loathe the alghollthus and their mind magic, and you've been trained to be willing to die rather than give into mental manipulation.

name: Deflecting Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You're the target of a ranged attack while you possess your head gem.

name: Defy Death
description: You're exceptionally difficult to kill.

name: Defy the Darkness
description: Using ancient dwarven methods developed to fight enemies wielding magical darkness, you've honed your darkvision and sworn not to use such magic yourself.

name: Demonblood Frenzy
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Access Matanji ethnicity Frequency once per minute Trigger You successfully Strike a living creature that has the fiend trait with your tusks unarmed attack.

name: Devil in Plain Sight
description: You've learned to draw your fiendish nature into a small ball of corruption and hide it in your soul.

name: Devilish Wiles
description: Traditionally, fiends are exceptionally good at persuading people to do things, even when their targets know it's a bad idea.

name: Dissolution's Clarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in an area of darkness.The Dissolution teaches that darkness can bring clarity and focus, serenity and strength—and so you draw on nearby shadows to replenish your magic.

name: Distant Archer
description: You've trained to harry your foes from great distances, using your swiftness to maintain distance and keen eyesight to stay on target.

name: Distant Cackle
description: It takes a very brave person to enter the laughter-haunted forest where you dwell.

name: Dogfang Bite
description: You can swing your beak to slash your foes when piercing attacks won't do.

name: Draconic Scent
description: Your sense of smell has heightened to be as keen as that of a dragon.

name: Drag Down
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: While swimming in water at least 10 feet deep, you grab an adjacent creature (on nearby land or in the water) and pull it below the surface.

name: Dragon's Flight
description: Frequency once per roundYou have grown a small pair of draconic wings or have honed your use of the wings you've had since birth.

name: Duck!
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your long experience with your erratic patrons and their peers has given you a lot of practice in hitting the deck when you hear the rumbling of a powerful entity.

name: Dwarven Reinforcement
description: You can use your knowledge of engineering and metalwork to temporarily strengthen thick objects and structures.

name: Easily Dismissed
description: Access Chelaxian nationality You are practiced at blending into the background of the streets and halls of larger folk to ensure that you are overlooked.

name: Eat Fortune
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 60 feet uses a fortune or misfortune effect.As someone tries to twist fate, you consume the interference.

name: Eclectic Obsession
description: Frequency once per day Your desire for stimulation has led you from one pursuit to another and granted you a smattering of expertise with myriad crafts and professions.

name: Elemental Bulwark
description: Trigger An enemy is about to damage you with cold, electricity, or fire, or with a spell that has the air, earth, fire, or water trait.

name: Elemental Spark
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin (but see Special)You've learned to alter the magic of your sprite's spark, imparting them with elemental energies.

name: Elven Instincts
description: Your senses let you react rapidly.

name: Embodied Dreadnought Subjectivity
description: Access You're from Nex.

name: Empathic Calm
description: Once per day, you can cast either or as an innate occult spell, heightened to half your level rounded up.

name: Energize Wings
description: Your magic energizes your wings, allowing you to fly farther.

name: Energized Font
prerequisites: focus pool, at least one innate spell from a gnome heritage or ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells
description: Frequency once per day You can focus your mind more quickly thanks to the magic that flows within you.

name: Enthralling Allure
description: The powers of domination employed by your progenitors have manifested in you as well.

name: Envenom Fangs
description: Frequency once per hourYou envenom your fangs.

name: Expanded Luck
description: You are luckier even than most catfolk.

name: Expert Drill Sergeant
description: While exploring, when you are leading and allies are Following the Expert, instead of granting a +2 circumstance bonus in the applicable skill, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus if you're an expert and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master.

name: Extinguish Light
description: Frequency once every 10 minutes You wrap shadow around a single unattended light source within 120 feet that's no larger than a torch.

name: Extraplanar Haze
description: Frequency once per dayYour body emits tiny particles of extraplanar matter, such as crystalline motes or smoky vapor, that surround you in a haze.

name: Extraplanar Supplication
description: You call upon divine power to place a benediction upon your allies or a malediction upon your foes.

name: False Priest Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Nobody respects tanuki, but most everyone respects an esteemed priest, so what better form to take if you want to get by a little easier?

name: Fantastic Leaps
description: Your leaps seem to defy gravity as you soar through the air in a single bound.

name: Favorable Winds
description: You wrap a shell of favorable wind around a weapon you wield.

name: Feathered Cloak
description: To blend in with the grounded and wingless, you fold your wings just so on your back, creating the illusion of a feathered cloak.

name: Feed on Pain
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You deal mental damage.

name: Fey Disguise
description: You can disguise yourself with magical illusions.

name: Fey Influence
description: You have been exposed to powerful fey magic.

name: Fierce Grasp
description: Requirements You have an opponent or .

name: Fighting Horn
description: You can modify the size and shape of your horn over time using your mental powers.

name: Finned Ridges
description: The ridges and flaps of your skin steer you through the water.

name: Firesight
description: You can see through the haze of flame.

name: Fishblooded
description: There's nothing beneath the waves that can slow you down.

name: Flexible Tail
description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door.

name: Fluid Contortionist
description: You can ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to Squeeze.

name: Focused Cat Nap
description: When you , you can also as you dream of a relevant activity.

name: Forest Stealth
description: Requirements You are in a forest or jungle environment near an environmental feature that would allow you to Take Cover.

name: Formation Training
description: You know how to fight in formation with your brethren.

name: Fortify Shield
description: Frequency once per day You reinforce your shield with a rocky outgrowth of metal and stone.

name: Friend of the Family
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You come from a long line of imperial kobolds—if you meet a stranger who has some political standing in Tian Xia, they might know someone from your family line.

name: Friendform
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: The shared bond between you and your allies allows you to act on their behalf.

name: Gaping Flesh
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature you are aware of damages you with a melee Strike.

name: Garuda's Squall
description: Garudas' marksmanship and magic are second nature to you.

name: Gecko's Grip
description: You cling to walls with a preternatural grip.

name: Genie Weapon Flourish
description: Whenever you critically hit using a , , , , or a geniekin weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

name: Ghoran Weapon Practice
description: With plenty of practice, the memories of previous fights from previous lives come flooding back.

name: Glorious Gamtu
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYou can access the mystical power that dokkaebi refer to as a hat.

name: Gnaw
description: With enough time and determination, you can chew through nearly anything.

name: Graceful Guidance
description: You can demonstrate how to quickly twist out of the way of dangerous effects.

name: Greater Animal Senses
description: Your senses advance to match those of your animal aspect.

name: Grovel
description: You convince your foe you're less of a threat.

name: Growing Eel Friend
description: Your eel pet grows larger and stronger.

name: Guided by the Stars
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are about to attempt a skill check or saving throw.

name: Halfling Ingenuity
description: While your willingness to dig into a task you know little about might get you into trouble, your incredible luck often saves you from danger.

name: Hasty Celebration
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll against an enemy, or an enemy critically fails their saving throw against one of your effects.After even the briefest success, you get caught up in the moment and begin to party, cheering your allies on.

name: Healer's Halo
description: Trigger You or allies within 30 feet recover Hit Points while your is active.Your halo can enhance positive energy.

name: Healing Flesh
description: Some legends claim that the flesh of a merfolk, if consumed, can grant health, longevity, and even immortality.

name: Heat Wave
description: Trigger An effect would deal fire damage to you, even if you resist all the damage.

name: Histrionic Injury
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger A creature you can see damages you with a melee Strike.

name: Hopping Stride
description: You've internalized the hopping gait of your vampiric forebear.

name: Hunter's Fangs
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your fangs are exceptionally painful.

name: Hybrid Form
description: When you Change Shape, you retain elements of your kitsune form, allowing you to speak in a fox form, use kitsune unarmed attacks in a tailless form, or gain a tail in your tailless form to use abilities that require one.

name: Hybrid Shape
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Mastery of your shapeshifting lets you combine the best features of your humanoid and spider forms.

name: Hypnotic Lure
description: Frequency once per hour Your unblinking gaze is so intense it can befuddle the mind of others, drawing your victims toward you even against their better judgment.

name: Immobile Form
prerequisites: born of item, born of elements, or born of vegetation heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You take on the shape you had before you awoke to hide in plain sight.

name: Inoculation Subroutine
description: Your nanites reject diseases with ease.

name: Inspire Imitation
description: Your actions inspire your allies to great achievements.

name: Insulated Poppet
prerequisites: tsukumogami poppet heritage, you have a metal or ceramic body
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've used insulating wraps or special glazes to reduce your weakness to current and temperature.

name: Integrated Armament
description: Your mechanical body houses a weapon or shield that you can quickly draw and stow, leaving you prepared for combat at all times.

name: Intuitive Illusions
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Inured to the Heat
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your have a love for extreme heat.

name: Iruxi Glide
description: You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet forward through the air.

name: Jungle Runner
description: You run through the jungle as easily as you would through an open field.

name: Juvenile Flight
description: Your wings become stronger, allowing you to fly farther.

name: Kin Hunter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're adept at combating other supernatural creatures.

name: Kitsune Spell Mysteries
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a kitsune heritage or ancestry feat
description: You know more kitsune magic.

name: Kneecap
description: You deliver a punishing blow to an enemy's knee, shin, or other vulnerable anatomy within your reach.

name: Lab Rat
description: You've spent more than your share of time in an alchemy lab.

name: Labyrinthine Echoes
description: You can make your voice reverberate off any surface.

name: Late Awakener
description: Whether due to a more gradual process or your animal and sapient sides being especially in conflict, your awakening was a little slower than most, but your eyes are now fully open and your abilities have returned.

name: Leaf Transformation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You know how to run an enterprise that others would never be able to get off the ground—some say it's your savvy acumen or jovial manner, but you know it's because you can cut costs by transforming leaves into money.

name: Left-Hand Blood
description: Frequency once per hourIt's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

name: Leshy Glide
prerequisites: leaf leshy heritage or Cat Fall skill feat
description: Using your own leaves, you can control your descent.

name: Lifesense
description: You have a limited ability to sense life force, like your psychopomp forebears.

name: Light Paws
description: You can balance on your toes to step carefully over obstructions.

name: Lightless Litheness
description: Your body is almost as flexible as your shadow.

name: Long Tongue
description: You've learned to stretch your exceptionally long tongue beyond its original limits.

name: Long-Nosed Form
description: You transform into a specific, curious-looking human form.

name: Loud Singer
description: Staying on pitch, proper breath control, and remembering the words are all less important than the real measure of a good singer: volume!

name: Loyal Empath
description: You have incredible empathy for your friends and family, and you have an innate timing for helping others in distress.

name: Lucky Break
description: You are luckier even than most catfolk.

name: Magical Resistance
description: Your animating magic provides some defense.

name: Magpie Snatch
description: You move quickly, snatching a shiny item that catches your eye.

name: Marine Ally
description: You've befriended a sea creature, which becomes magically bonded to you.

name: Martial Experience
description: You've crossed blades with a wide variety of foes wielding a wide variety of weapons, and you've learned the basics of fighting with nearly any of them.

name: Mask of Power
description: Your warmask sharpens your connection to the source of your mask's power.

name: Mask of Rejection
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a saving throw against an effect from your warmask's magical tradition.

name: Metabolic Control
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're able to better control your body's metabolism to preserve energy.

name: Mist Child
description: You blend in with unnatural subtlety.

name: Mistaken Identity
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You're about to attempt a saving throw against a mental effect.

name: Murderous Thorns
description: Your thorns are many, vicious, and sharp.

name: Mutate Weapon
description: Select one unarmed attack you gained with Living Weapon.

name: Myriad Forms
description: With a bit of self-discovery, you find a new form.

name: Nagaji Spell Mysteries
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat
description: You've learned more naga magic.

name: Nanite Shroud
description: Frequency once per day Your nanites fly out of your body, swarming around you in a cloud.

name: Natural Ambassador
description: You remember what it was like to speak easily with other animals, using old, familiar ways of communication to learn what they want and ask for favors in return.

name: Natural Illusionist
description: By drawing upon the First World's magic, you can siphon a portion of that malleable world to create a convincing illusion.

name: Natural Orienteering
description: There are few twisting paths that can disorient you.

name: Necromantic Physiology
description: Your unusual physiology has developed in a way that makes it difficult for parasites and other infestations to prey upon you.

name: Nephilim Resistance
description: You resist energy like your extraplanar predecessors.

name: No Hands, No Problem
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: After a lifetime of using temporary, ghostly limbs to manipulate objects, you hardly need real hands.

name: Noble Bloom
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access chrysanthemum leshy heritage Trigger An ally within 30 feet would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

name: Noble Resolve
description: Once, genies ruled vast kingdoms, and a remnant of that confidence and power is reflected in your strong will.

name: Nothing but Fluff
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your fluffy interior lacks specific organs and struts, with few weak spots to injure.

name: Nourishing Symbiosis
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: As you recuperate from your wounds, life energy flows from you to the land and back to you again.

name: Noxious Odor
description: You have developed your skill with your defensive pheromones and have concentrated them into a noxious form.

name: Offensive Analysis
description: You can enhance your senses and mental state to consider every aspect of an attack.

name: Oni's Mask
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You aren't as malleable as your oni ancestors but still can disguise yourself.

name: Ornate Tattoo
description: You expand your tattoos to encompass greater magic.

name: Pack Stalker
description: Ambushes are an honored kholo tradition.

name: Past Life
description: Flashes of your life become clearer and more frequent, allowing you to apply skills you developed while alive.

name: Phantom Resemblance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYour can now draw from experience to wear any face you remember.

name: Plague Sniffer
description: You can sniff out the pungent tang of disease.

name: Ponpoko
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: No true tanuki would ever be caught without a musical instrument to play under the full moon.

name: Powerful Guts
description: Your stomach is particularly durable.

name: Practiced Paddler
description: You're skilled at navigating bogs and marshes, even for a paddler shoony.

name: Precious Alloys
description: Choose cold iron or silver.

name: Pride Hunter
description: You avoid the attention of creatures focused on your allies.

name: Prodigious Climber
description: Your natural climbing ability and technique has made you a potent climber.

name: Project Persona
description: Where others etch their armor to serve as a conduit for their imaginations, your vivid mind and bold personality allow you to project a more fitting persona over your lackluster armor.

name: Protective Claws
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: The chitin on your claws is so hard you can defend against attacks with them.

name: Protective Sheath
description: When you lash out with your , you keep its sheath close at hand.

name: Protective Subroutine
description: Your nanites can augment your defenses.

name: Proud Mentor
description: You enjoy mentoring others and take pride in your students' accomplishments.

name: Puzzle Solver
description: Frequency once per hour You have a natural affinity for problem-solving and the unknown.

name: Quick Root
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: Trigger A creature successfully Shoves or Trips you, or you fail a saving throw against an effect that would move you or knock you .

name: Quick Stow (Ratfolk)
description: Frequency once per roundYou Interact to store one item you're holding in your cheek pouches (provided it fits).

name: Rabid Sprint
description: Requirements You have both your hands free.You run on all fours as fast as you can.

name: Ragdya's Revelry
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An adjacent creature you can see fails an attack roll against you.

name: Rat Magic
description: There always seems to be a little rat around to carry messages for you.

name: Ratfolk Roll
description: You roll up into a ball and move up to four times your Speed in a straight line down an incline.

name: Read the Roots
description: Requirements You are standing on the ground, and there are plants rooted in the ground within 100 feet of you.

name: Recognize Ambush
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Reflective Pocket
description: You've formed a connection with a small hand mirror, allowing you to use it as an extradimensional storage space.

name: Rekindled Light
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You or an ally within 30 feet of your familiar would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.You temporarily drain your star orb familiar's energy to save an ally.

name: Renewing Quills
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your spines grow back much faster than other shisks.

name: Replicate
description: You've learned to reshape your malleable form.

name: Resilient Physiology
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're afflicted by a disease or poison, or are taking persistent damage.Your ordered physiology rejects unwelcome elements, allowing you to reject the negative effects of poisons and diseases or shrug off other lasting negative effects.

name: Restoring Blood
description: Your body can process an alternative to your venom that heals wounds.

name: Reveal Hidden Self
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're to at least one enemy.

name: Right-Hand Blood
description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

name: Riptide Mount
description: Requirements You are underwater and adjacent to a creature that is at least one size larger than you, has a swim Speed, and is willing to be your mount.

name: Ritual Reversion
description: You can temporarily revert to a less conspicuous form without diminishing your senses.

name: Runtsage
description: Unlike most of your kind, who dismiss goblins as embarrassments or expendable annoyances, you have studied the methodology behind their irresponsible and incomprehensible actions.

name: Scar-Thick Skin
description: Glorious, storied scars cover and protect much of your body, girding you in fleshly armor that resists any wound weaker than those you have already survived.

name: Scion of Many Planes
description: The long and complicated history of your bloodline manifests in your ability to draw power from more planar sources than most other nephilim.

name: Scurry!
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Sealed Poppet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You've reinforced your interior parts with sealant or other flame-retardant materials, protecting you from fire.

name: Secondary Adaptation
description: You've continued to adapt to the rigors of your environment by continuing your metamorphosis, even as an adult.

name: Sense Allies
description: Like many humans raised in a close-knit community, you have always been strongly attuned to the presence of others.

name: Shadowplay
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements Your last action was a melee Strike that damaged your opponent.As your blow lands, you detach from your shadow to get the drop on your enemy.

name: Shadowy Disguise
description: You wrap yourself in shadow to change your appearance.

name: Shame the Sin
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You critically hit a demon with a Strike.Your conviction against the sins that all demons grow from is so strong that you can force a demon to suffer from its sins when you strike a sound blow against them.

name: Shared Luck (Halfling)
description: You are evidence that it's lucky to travel with a halfling.

name: Shed Tail
description: Trigger You become .

name: Sheltering Slab
description: The stone around you is your ally, and you have learned to use it to shore up your weaknesses.

name: Shifting Faces
description: Frequency once per day You wear many faces, even those that don't belong to you.

name: Shoki's Argument
description: You feel a connection to shokis, the rambling collectors of wayward souls, and might have found old texts written by one.

name: Signature Weapon
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your energy saturates one of your weapons; it might be one inherited or one tied to your history.

name: Skilled Climber
description: You can navigate vertical surfaces with ease.

name: Skilled Swimmer
description: You move through the water with ease, mastering your movements with years of practice.

name: Skillful Climber
description: You can scamper up or down surfaces as nimbly as a monkey.

name: Skillful Tail (Geniekin)
description: You were born with a tail, and with practice you've learned how to perform simple Interact actions with it, such as opening an unlocked door.

name: Skillful Tail (Nephilim)
description: You've always had a tail, but with practice, you've learned to use it for more than signaling your mood.

name: Skin Split
description: Frequency once per day You claw open the top layer of your scales and peel off the premature shed in order to remove harmful substances from your skin.

name: Slip with the Breeze
description: You create gusts of wind when you jump, allowing you to carry yourself across greater distances.

name: Smoke Through Bamboo
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've spent significant time slipping silently between bamboo thickets, and your light-footedness allows you to navigate even the thickest forests and brush with ease.

name: Snare Genius
description: If the snare normally takes 1 minute to Craft, you can Craft it with 3 Interact actions instead.

name: Soaring Flight
description: Frequency once per roundYou Fly.

name: Spark Fist
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

name: Spark of Independence
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You touch a creature with the minion trait and share the heightened sense of autonomy you've discovered.

name: Speak with Flowers
description: At your very heartwood, you're a flower animated by elder magic, and with a little effort, you can speak to your kindred.

name: Speak with Kindred
description: You have a connection with creatures that share your physiology.

name: Speak with the Sleeping
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou can speak to all inanimate objects and the slumbering spirits within them.

name: Speaker in Training
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or the ability to cast a divine or primal spell
description: You've begun your training as a Speaker.

name: Spell Survivor
description: Once you've resisted an opponent's magic, anything else they throw your way becomes less effective.

name: Spirit Soother
description: You are attuned to the minute sounds and sensations of restless spirits.

name: Springing Leaper
description: Your powerful legs allow you to make sudden and dramatic leaps.

name: Statue Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: An inconspicuous statue in front of a shop is the perfect form to wait for things to blow over.

name: Steam Spell
description: You transform your fire spells into steam, making them more effective underwater.

name: Stem the Tide
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can cast as a 1st-rank primal innate spell once per day.

name: Step Lively
description: Trigger A Large or larger enemy ends a move action adjacent to you.

name: Storming Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can open or energize a notable third eye on your forehead to strike with storming power.

name: Stretching Reach
description: You can leverage your size and muscle to extend your reach and attack more distant foes.

name: Strix Vengeance
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You, or a strix ally you can see, are damaged by an enemy's critical hit.You dedicate yourself to destroying those who harm your kin.

name: Strong of Wing
description: You can fly with a greater distance.

name: Strong Tail
description: From sheer necessity, you've gotten surprisingly good at moving around on land.

name: Supernatural Charm
description: The elven magic in your blood manifests as a force you can use to become more appealing or alluring.

name: Swamp Stealth
description: Requirements You are in a swamp environment near an environmental feature that would allow you to .In swamplands, you are particularly skilled at quickly hiding behind bits of underbrush or foliage, or moving quietly through murky water.

name: Swift Swimmer
description: You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.Special If you have the wetlander lizardfolk heritage, your swim Speed instead increases to 25 feet.

name: Swimming Poppet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your fins, flippers, or other accessories assist with steering you through water.

name: Tail Snatch
description: You can whip your tail around to lash items from the unwary's grip.

name: Tail Spin
description: You excel at using your tail as a weapon to upend your foes.

name: Taste Blood
prerequisites: Cel Rau, Straveika, Svetocher, or another lineage from a vampire with the Drink Blood ability
description: You retain not only your vampiric parent's taste for blood but their ability to gain vitality from it.

name: Tenacious Net
description: Escaping your nets is no simple task.

name: Tengu Feather Fan
description: You've learned to bind some of your feathers together into a fan to focus your ancestral magic.

name: The Moon Weaver's Art
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've learned to create minor illusions by collecting strands of moonlight and weaving them together to create small images or cloaking veils.

name: Thousand-Year Grudge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You succeed at a check.You can call upon your former lives and project all of your accumulated frustration, failure, and despair through your eyes at a target, overwhelming their senses.

name: Thrown Voice
description: You've learned how to throw your voice through the winds, tricking others as to your location.

name: Tikling Bird Twirl
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You roll a critical hit on a melee Strike against an enemy.You trained your footwork by dancing to music between snapping bamboo poles, and your increased mobility helps you succeed when hunting dangerous beasts or fighting multiple opponents.

name: Tomb-Watcher's Glare
description: When you critically hit an undead creature, or an undead creature critically fails a saving throw against one of your abilities, you drive your divine wrath home in your enemy's heart.

name: Tongue Disarm
description: You lash out with your tongue to disarm your foe.

name: Torch Goblin
description: You've spent enough time on fire that you know how to use it to your advantage.

name: Tough Tumbler
description: You've taken your share of licks while scurrying around the battlefield and know how to defend yourself against opportunistic attackers.

name: Towering Presence
description: Frequency once per hourYou fill an area with your force of will, towering beyond where your true form should be.

name: Traditional Resistances
prerequisites: Arcane Dragonblood, Divine Dragonblood, Occult Dragonblood, or Primal Dragonblood
description: Due to your blood, you have some resistance to certain types of magic.

name: Tranquil Sanctuary
description: Whenever possible, you follow the serene path and encourage others to do the same.

name: Transposable Compliance
description: Your protean vitality is fecund and many-succoring: your veins run with life-giving ichor that adapts to the blood and physiology of any body, and your skin molts on command, creating wound-stanching sheaths of tissue for yourself and others.

name: Treacherous Earth
description: Frequency once every 10 minutes You have the power to shatter the earth into a shape of your devising.

name: Tree Climber (Goblin)
prerequisites: tailed goblin or treedweller goblin heritage
description: Your time in forest or jungle canopies has taught you how to scramble across branches with sure feet.

name: Tree's Ward
description: You've lived among trees for so long they recognize your presence and seek to protect you from harm.

name: Treespeech
description: Your connection to elemental wood allows you to communicate with trees in the Universe in Muan, the language of wood elementals.

name: Tripkee Glide
description: Requirements You must have at least one hand free.You can use your webbed feet to guide your fall.

name: Tunnel Roll
description: You can more easily navigate underground tunnels by rolling up into a ball.

name: Unassuming Heroes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Access peachchild leshy heritageYou have a talent for making friends through simple kindness, often among stray animals or other creatures that people tend to overlook, and your inherent magic can make these acts take on additional power.

name: Uncanny Awareness
description: You have a keen sense of movement around you.

name: Undead Companion
description: Your companion is also touched by undeath, a mix of a traditional companion and a skeleton, zombie, or stranger form of unlife.

name: Undead Slayer
description: Your knowledge of your own not-quite-living anatomy, combined with your experience in combat, helps you take down undead foes with ease.

name: Unlock Secret
description: You delve deeper into your psychic potential.

name: Urban Jungle
prerequisites: Fascinated by Society, expert in Society or Survival
description: Cities are just a new form of wilderness.

name: Vanara Weapon Trickery
description: You've learned how to trick your foes using vanara weapons.

name: Vandal
description: You have a knack for breaking and dismantling things.

name: Venom Gulp
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can store prepared venom in your throat and spit it at your foes in addition to your own toxic spray.

name: Venom Spit
description: You've learned the art of lobbing toxic spittle at vulnerable spots on your foes, especially the eyes.

name: Victorious Vigor
description: Trigger You bring a foe to 0 Hit Points Your victories in battle fill you with pride and imbue you with the energy to fight a bit longer despite your wounds.

name: Vishkanya Weapon Arts
description: You are graceful and efficient in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

name: Vomit Stomach
description: Trigger You gain the condition or fail a saving throw against an ingested poison.

name: Vulpine Scamper
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You're especially nimble while in your full fox shape.

name: Ward Against Corruption
description: Your soul is warded against the power of undeath and plague, as well as that of the evil former psychopomps known as sahkils.

name: Warding Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: A life of hunting and battle has caused your head gem to attune to the waxing moon, which has manifested in the power to protect you from harm.

name: Warp Likeness
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You hit a creature with a melee Strike on your last action.

name: Water Conjuration
description: You carry the ocean with you wherever you go.

name: Wavetouched Paragon
description: You have been blessed by the sea, granting you the ability to swim like a fish.

name: Well of Potential
prerequisites: focus pool, at least one innate spell from a kashrishi heritage or  ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells
description: Frequency once per day Your mind is a deep well of psychic potential.

name: Well-Armed
description: Your detachable limbs offer flexibility.

name: Well-Groomed
description: You are fastidious about keeping clean.

name: Wild Stride
description: Requirements You have a free hand.

name: Wildborn Adept
description: The whispers of the jungle grant you more diverse access to simple primal magic.

name: Winglets
description: Through the lingering influence of your warren's patron, you've sprouted a small set of wings.

name: Withstand the Storm
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would take cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic damage.Your skin hardens like bark and gains the sheen of glazed clay, lessening the wild's ruinous sting against your body.

name: Abscission Shards
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful frenzied claw or spinning talon Strike.

name: Adaptive Mask Familiar
description: Your mask familiar adapts quickly to material form, allowing it to gain more familiar and master abilities.

name: Additional Recollection
description: Trigger You succeed or critically succeed at a check to on your hunted prey.

name: Additional Servings
prerequisites: Wandering Chef Dedication, expert in Crafting or Cooking Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.Special At 12th level or higher, you can select this feat a second time to increase your number of versatile vials per day to 6.

name: Advanced Arcana
description: You gain one wizard feat.

name: Advanced Blood Potency
description: You gain one sorcerer feat.

name: Advanced Bloodline
description: You draw more power from your bloodline.

name: Advanced Breakthrough
description: You gain one inventor feat.

name: Advanced Concoction
description: You gain one alchemist feat.

name: Advanced Deduction
description: You gain one investigator feat.

name: Advanced Devotion
description: You gain one champion feat.

name: Advanced Dogma
description: You gain one cleric feat.

name: Advanced Element Control
description: You gain one kineticist feat.

name: Advanced Elemental Spell
prerequisites: flame stone storm or wave order
description: Your connection to one of the great elemental aspects of nature deepens, allowing you further control over its powers.

name: Advanced Flair
description: You gain one swashbuckler feat.

name: Advanced Fury
description: You gain one barbarian feat.

name: Advanced Glory
description: You gain an exemplar feat.

name: Advanced Herbalism
description: Your herbalist talents continue to grow with use and you have become potent at making even more remedies from less.

name: Advanced Hunter's Trick
description: You gain one ranger feat.

name: Advanced Kata
description: You gain one monk feat.

name: Advanced Maneuver
description: You gain a fighter feat.

name: Advanced Martial Magic
description: You gain one magus feat.

name: Advanced Monastic Weaponry
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your rigorous training regimen allows you to wield complex weaponry with ease.

name: Advanced Muse's Whispers
description: You gain one bard feat.

name: Advanced Mysteries
description: You gain one oracle feat.

name: Advanced Poisoncraft
description: You can create up to 6 poisons per day with advanced alchemy.Special At 10th level or higher, you can select this feat a second time to increase the number to 8.

name: Advanced Qi Spells
description: Your talent at controlling your qi has reached new heights.

name: Advanced Revelation
description: Divine power reveals greater mysteries to you.

name: Advanced Shooter
description: You've dedicated your training to the most complex and weird weapons of your favorite group.

name: Advanced Shooting
description: You gain one gunslinger feat.

name: Advanced Synergy
description: You gain one summoner feat.

name: Advanced Thaumaturgy
description: You gain one thaumaturge feat.

name: Advanced Thoughtform
description: You gain one psychic feat.

name: Advanced Trickery
description: You gain one rogue feat.

name: Advanced Weapon Training
description: You've studied the art of wielding an advanced weapon.

name: Advanced Wilding
description: You gain one druid feat.

name: Advanced Witchcraft
description: You gain one witch feat.

name: Advantageous Assault
description: After compromising your enemy's movement, you deliver a more deadly blow.

name: Agile Maneuvers
description: Your easily maneuver against your foes.

name: Aldori Riposte
description: Requirements You are benefiting from Aldori Parry.

name: Align Qi
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You Cast a Spell that has the monk trait.The power of your qi soothes your wounds and energizes you for battle.

name: Analyze Idiolect
prerequisites: Linguist Dedication, expert in Deception, expert in Society
description: You break down a specific individual's idiolect, memorizing their speech mannerisms and habits.

name: Analyze Weakness
description: Requirements You have identified a creature with .

name: Animal Skin
description: Your proficiency in unarmored defense increases to expert.

name: Animal Strength
description: You tap into the primal strength of your animal feature.

name: Animate Net
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast animate rope
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its target to be 1 .

name: Animist's Power
description: You gain one animist feat.

name: Anticipate Ambush
description: You keep watch for any creatures or dangerous sites, moving at half your travel Speed.

name: Antler Rush
description: Requirements You're in your moose or hybrid shape.

name: Apparition Stabilization
description: Your attuned apparition ensures that even if you would be distracted or disrupted, your magic does not go to waste.

name: Arcane Sensitivity
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace
description: You can sense the presence of the supernatural, even if you don't have any magical ability yourself.

name: Archaeologist's Warning
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger You are about to roll a Perception, Society, or Thievery check for initiative.

name: Armor Specialist
description: You have trained hard to optimize your armor's unique protective qualities to maximize the materials used in its creation.

name: Artery Map
description: While you've learned all the places a scalpel can cause extensive bleeding to avoid disasters in surgery, such knowledge can serve other purposes.

name: Artokus's Fire
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You use to craft an Alchemist's Fire, and that bomb's level is at least 2 levels lower than your level.

name: Ash Strider
description: You discorporate into a cloud of whirling ash and Stride.

name: Assured Knowledge
description: You can procure information with confidence.

name: Axe Thrower
description: You have mastered the weight and balance of a variety of axes and can lob them with ease.

name: Basic Magus Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Scroll Cache
description: You have a vast and overflowing collection of scroll scraps, riddled with errors and misspellings and leaking energy like a sieve.

name: Basic Summoner Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Bear Hug
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful claw Strike.

name: Bear Hug (Werecreature)
description: Requirements You're in bear or hybrid shape, and your last action was a successful claw Strike.

name: Beast Gunner Dedication
prerequisites: expert with at least one type of firearm, trained in Arcana or Crafting, you own a beast gun and have slain the type of creature associated with your beast gun in a fair hunt
description: You've unlocked the first hints of your weapon's hidden potential.

name: Beastmaster's Trance
description: You can enter a trance that allows you to briefly inhabit the body of one of your animal companions and share its senses.

name: Bellflower Dedication
prerequisites: expert in Stealth, expert in Survival, member of the Bellflower Network, Charisma +2
description: You dedicate yourself to freeing slaves and escorting them to freedom.

name: Benevolent Spirit Deck
description: Requirements You have an active harrow omen.

name: Bestial Protection
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion that's Large or greater
description: Your companion's mere presence is enough to rattle creatures that fall under its shadow.

name: Betraying Shank
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: Requirements You are within melee reach of a target, but it is not in combat with you.

name: Binding Serpents Celestial Arrow
description: Usage imbued into a ranged weapon ikon, or a melee weapon ikon with the thrown traitAs you prepare to shoot your weapon, you invoke divine serpents that bind your enemies.

name: Blazing Spirit
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger A creature damages you with a melee attack.

name: Blazing Talon Surge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You are in .

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Requirements Your eidolon's last action dealt bleed damage to a living creature.

name: Boaster's Challenge
prerequisites: expert in Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation, Firebrand Braggart Dedication
description: You call out a foe, causing them to become flustered and easier to defeat.

name: Bolera's Interrogation
source: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace
description: Frequency Three times per dayYou focus your attention on a single creature within 30 feet.

name: Brains!
description: Trigger You Feast upon a humanoid's brain.

name: Brutal Bully
description: You push your foes around and leave bruises.

name: Burning Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, fire is in your elemental philosophy
description: You enhance your spell with elemental fire, causing it to set the target on fire.

name: Butterfly's Kiss
description: You can make nonlethal Strikes with a butterfly sword without taking a penalty.

name: Butterfly's Sting
description: You gain the class feature.

name: Cadence Call
description: Frequency once per minuteYou call out a quick cadence, guiding your allies into a more efficient rhythm.

name: Cannon Corner Shot
description: By loading special ammunition in a particular way, you can make your siege weapons do all manner of tricks that other siege engineers can barely even imagine.

name: Captivating Intensity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your ability to captivate others has grown, and you can use your captivator abilities more often.

name: Cascade Bearer's Flexibility
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Cascade Bearers affiliation
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You haven't yet acted on your turn.

name: Cascade Countermeasure
description: When in Arcane Cascade, you can make yourself resistant to magic.

name: Cast Down
description: The sheer force of your faith can bring a foe crashing down.

name: Cast Out
description: You attempt to cast a malevolent entity out of the creature or object it's possessing.

name: Cauterize
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm and you or an adjacent ally are taking persistent bleed damage.

name: Ceremonial Knife
description: You have prepared a special knife to direct energies when spellcasting.

name: Champion's Reaction
description: You can use the champion's reaction associated with your cause.

name: Clean Take
description: Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, a Deception or Performance check to portray a famous figure.Thanks to many long hours of rehearsals, your acting skill is infinitely adaptable.

name: Clear as Air
description: Compact layers of air diffract and bend light around your body, making you appear as clear as the sky on a perfect day.

name: Clear the Way
description: Requirements You're wielding a melee weapon in two hands.You put your body behind your massive weapon and swing, shoving enemies to clear a wide path.

name: Cleave
description: Trigger Your melee Strike reduces an enemy to 0 Hit Points, and another enemy is adjacent to that creature.You swing clear through one foe and into another.

name: Clinch Strike
description: Trigger A creature you had or successfully Escapes.

name: Cloaking Pulse
description: Your ostilli can emit illusion magic to mask your position, granting you the action.

name: Clockwork Celerity
description: Trigger Your turn begins.You can use unstable clockwork devices in your innovation to push your invention to act more quickly.

name: Combination Finisher
description: You combine a series of attacks with a powerful finishing blow.

name: Combine Elixirs
description: You can add the full ingredients of a second elixir to an elixir you make to create a hybrid concoction.

name: Confounding Image
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast mirror image
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its duration to be sustained up to 1 minute and modify its range to 30 feet.

name: Connect the Dots
description: Ephemeral connections between people, places, and concepts are invisible to most, but seeing them is your stock and trade.

name: Construct Shell
description: You've adjusted your construct innovation so that when you ride it, special plates, hollows, or similar form partial barriers around you to add additional protection.

name: Consume Power
description: Trigger You would take acid, electricity, fire, or sonic damage.

name: Convincing Illusion
description: Trigger A creature succeeded, but didn't critically succeed, at a Perception check or Will save to disbelieve an illusion from a spell that you cast.

name: Counter Element
description: Trigger You're targeted by or in the area of an effect that has the trait matching your kinetic element and originates from an enemy or hazard.

name: Counter Perform
description: You gain the composition spell.

name: Cozy Campfire
description: You spend 1 hour building a campfire in a single unoccupied square and whispering the stories of those you've met on your journeys.

name: Craft Facsimile
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, expert in Crafting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You're renowned for your ability to recover important items, whether they're from a long-abandoned temple or a thieves' den, and sometimes that requires creating a stand-in.

name: Crane Flutter
description: Trigger You are targeted with an attack by an observed attacker.

name: Crawling Fire
description: You mimic the motions of a beast of your devising, and it becomes real, with a flaming pelt and searing claws.

name: Crimson Shroud
description: Frequency once per dayYou swathe yourself in a veil of red mist for 1 minute.

name: Crossbow Terror
description: Your skill with a crossbow strikes terror into your opponents when you threaten them with the next bolt.

name: Crowd Mastery
description: You use the crowd to your advantage, diverting your foes' attention to potential hidden dangers in the crowd.
