name: Crown of the Saumen Kar
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: Your body begins to evolve and adapt, taking the first steps towards blending your very self with the ancient curse of the saumen kar.

name: Crushing Step
description: The weight of your armored feet casts aside natural impediments.

name: Culvert's Collapse
description: Requirements You are in Flood Stance and were damaged by an enemy since your previous turn.Under your foes' onslaught, the water within your violent blood stirs.

name: Current Spell
description: As you use your magic to manipulate air or water, you spin off some of its currents to form a barrier around you.

name: Cutting Heaven, Crushing Earth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your skill in combining fist and blade has grown into a seamless art where each attack makes an opponent more vulnerable to the next.

name: Daring Act
prerequisites: trained in Acrobatics or Athletics, Firebrand Braggart Dedication
description: You attempt a death-defying maneuver to distract your enemies.

name: Dash of Herbs
description: A small cloud of medicinal herbs heal a creature.

name: Daywalker (Vampire)
description: Through a profane pledge or a bloodline quirk, you can tolerate the sun's light.

name: Dazing Blow
description: Requirements You have a creature .

name: Dazzling Bullet
description: Your tricks discombobulate your opponent, leaving spots in their vision from the bright flash of your gunshot reflected straight into their eyes (or other visual organs).

name: Death Roll
description: Requirements You are in your crocodile or hybrid shape and have a creature .

name: Death Warden
description: With your intimate familiarity with the duality of vitality and void energy, you're able to stand as a bulwark against death and undeath alike.

name: Deathly Secrets
description: No means of creating or ruling the undead is beyond your grasp, even those of magical traditions not your own.

name: Debilitating Bomb
description: You can add a crystalline additive to an alchemical bomb to have it undermine your enemy.

name: Defend Mount
description: Trigger An enemy makes a Strike or spell attack against your mount while you're riding it.You interpose yourself between an attacker and your mount, defending your mount from harm.

name: Defensive Coordination
description: Like the storied heroes who persist in the face of overwhelming odds, you and your allies will hold the line.

name: Deflecting Pulse
description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to protect you from other magic, granting you the action.

name: Defy Fey
description: You are keen to the wiles of the fey and can usually shake off their magic.

name: Desert Wind
description: A vortex of sand and dust surrounds you.

name: Detonating Spell
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your spell becomes volatile and explosive.

name: Devout Blessing
description: You gain the blessing of the devoted class feature, choosing from the listed blessings or any other to which you have access.

name: Directional Bombs
description: You can lob bombs with great force and a precise trajectory to angle the splash in a cone that sprays in a single direction, potentially allowing you to avoid allies and splash deeper into enemy lines.

name: Dirge of Doom
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which frightens your enemies and keeps them from fully recovering from their fear.

name: Disarming Smile
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: Trigger You are the target of a melee attack and the attacker has not rolled yet.

name: Disarming Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.

name: Discerning Gaze
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: You have a sense for when people are lying.

name: Discerning Strike
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You have successfully identified the target with during this combat.

name: Disciple of Shade
description: You've delved deeper into the mysteries of shadow and become blessed with magical power that increases your skills in the arts of deception and persuasion.

name: Disk Rider
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast floating disk
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast Floating Disk, you can modify its duration to be sustained, up to 10 minutes.

name: Disrupting Strikes
description: You call forth vitality energy from within to help you destroy undead.

name: Distracting Bites
description: You know how to take advantage of those your swarm has attacked.

name: Diverting Vortex
description: Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell.

name: Divine Emissary
prerequisites: a familiar, you follow a good-aligned deity or patron
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your familiar is a divine emissary, sent to you by your deity or patron and infused with celestial powers.

name: Divine Rebuttal
description: Trigger Your ally is about to roll a saving throw against a magical ability of a creature you're adjacent to.

name: Divine Weapon
description: Frequency once per turn Trigger You finish Casting a Spell using one of your divine spell slots on your turn.

name: Dodge Away
description: Trigger You are the target of a melee attack.

name: Domain Spirit
description: You forge an intense spiritual bond of mutual trust and appreciation with a single spirit that you have already bonded with using Bond with Spirit.

name: Dragon Roar
description: Requirements You are in You bellow, instilling fear in your enemies.

name: Dragon's Rage Breath
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou breathe deeply and exhale powerful energy in a @Template[cone|distance:30], dealing @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[@actor.flags.pf2e.barbarian.instinct.dragon.damageType]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in the area with a @Check[reflex|against:barbarian|basic]

name: Drenching Mist
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast obscuring mist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify it to add the following heightened entry to its effects.

name: Drifter's Juke
description: Requirements You're wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand, and your other hand is either wielding a melee weapon or is empty.

name: Driving Rain
description: Heavy drops of rain batter down, hitting like sling stones and impeding vision.

name: Duel Spell Advantage
description: When you start a psychic duel, you gain a third natural psychic spell.

name: Echolocation
description: When you take the action, you can use hearing as a precise sense with a range of 40 feet until the start of your next turn.

name: Educate Allies
description: Trigger An ally benefiting from one of your composition spells is subject to an effect with the auditory, illusion, linguistic, sonic, or visual trait.

name: Eidolon's Opportunity
description: Trigger A creature within your eidolon's reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

name: Eidolon's Wrath
description: Your eidolon gains the focus spell, which it casts, instead of you.

name: Eldritch Archer Dedication
prerequisites: expert in at least one weapon from the bow or crossbow weapon group
description: You channel powerful magic with your archery, allowing you to deliver potent spells through the tip of an arrow rather than the more mundane flick of the wrist or whatever other gestures are usually used.

name: Electrogenesis
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have seen a creature deal electricity damage with an unarmed Strike or have identified a creature capable of dealing electricity damage with an unarmed Strike in combat
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesSome animals and beasts have electric organs in their body that they can use to jolt their prey.

name: Elemental Artillery
description: Spinning wood and metal together, you create a rugged wooden ballista.

name: Elemental Explosion
description: Requirements You're raging, and you haven't used this ability since you last Raged.

name: Emerald Boughs Accustomation
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Emerald Boughs Affiliation, expert in Society
description: You are comfortable and socially capable in almost any cultural context.

name: Endemic Herbs
description: The herbal items you create use medicinal plants endemic to your location.

name: Energetic Resonance
description: Trigger You would take acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage from a spell.

name: Energy Ward
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell that dealt energy damage.You convert energy from the last spell you cast into a protective ward.

name: Exigent Aura
description: The power of your deity and your own convictions leave an impression on creatures even when they normally would be unable to comprehend your words or the feelings spurred on by your god.

name: Expand Aura
description: You focus your divine power to extend your influence and protection.

name: Expanded Elemental Magic
description: You reach new understandings of the elements, taking an expansive view.

name: Expeditious Advance
description: Requirements You are unarmored or wearing light armor.

name: Expert Fireworks Crafter
prerequisites: Firework Technician Dedication, expert in Crafting
description: You're particularly adept at crafting fireworks, allowing you to create more powerful fireworks than you otherwise could.

name: Exploit Opening
description: Trigger Your spotter critically succeeds at a Strike against a creature, and that creature is within your crossbow or firearm's first range increment.You take advantage of your spotter's devastating attack to unleash your own follow-up attack.

name: Explosion
description: Your innovation can explode on command.

name: Explosive Arrival
description: Your summoned creature appears in a detonation of arcane runes.

name: Exsanguinate
description: Requirements On your last action, you dealt damage to a creature that isn't immune to bleed damage and is within 10 feet.

name: Familiar's Resolve
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When you weave magic, your familiar traces symbols that throw off fear and doubt.

name: Far Throw
description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, you take only a –1 penalty for each additional range increment between you and the target, rather than a –2 penalty.

name: Fearful Symmetry
description: Requirements You're in hybrid or tiger shape and your last action was a critically successful Strike with your unarmed attack.You attack with a feline grace as captivatingly beautiful as it is deadly.

name: Fearsome Familiar
description: Your familiar trades places with an elemental from its elemental plane.

name: Feathered Flechettes
description: Unfurling your wings in a quick snap, you send feathers scattering in all directions.

name: Feeding Frenzy
description: Your serrated teeth rip and tear at your prey.

name: Feeling Your Oats
prerequisites: Celebrity Dedication or Dandy Dedication, trained in Deception
description: Frequency once per hour You are incredible, impeccable, an icon of style and grace—and everyone knows it.

name: Feverish Enzymes
description: Your claws and fangs exude an infectious enzyme, related to the necrotic effects of ghoul fever, that causes a creature's wounds to heal slowly.

name: Fey Tracker
description: You are exceptionally skilled at noticing the subtle techniques fey use to avoid notice.

name: Field Artillery
description: While castles are generally obliging enough to stay in one place, out in the field positioning is of paramount importance—a gun in the wrong place is worse than useless.

name: Five-Breath Vanguard Dedication
prerequisites: Two of the five elemental stances (Ironblood Stance, Mountain Stance, Reflective Ripple Stance, Stoked Flame Stance, and Tangled Forest Stance)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin or exposure to Tian elementalismYou flow like the elemental cycle, adapting your stance and techniques constantly in response to whatever circumstances you face.

name: Fleeting Shadow
description: You're able to quickly disappear and then move about stealthily.

name: Flexible Ritualist
description: You can perform two aspects of a ritual yourself.

name: Flinging Updraft
description: A speeding wind heeds your call, picking someone up and depositing them nearby.

name: Flow of War
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger Your turn begins.Divine battle instincts take over your body, letting you move and lash out with instinctive speed.

name: Flowing Palm Deflection
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The simple and precise movements of your hands allow you to deflect blows with the same efficacy as a raised shield.

name: Fluttering Misdirection
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've trained in drawing the eyes of your audience to specific aspects of your performance through the careful manipulation of your fans and body.

name: Follow-Up Strike
description: Requirements Your last action was a missed Strike with a melee unarmed attack.You have trained rigorously to use all parts of your body as a weapon, and when you miss with an attack, you can usually continue the attack with a different body part and still deal damage.

name: Food Preservation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your techniques extend the storage life for certain ingredients and food through pickling, alcohol, or fermentation.

name: Forced Entry
prerequisites: expert in Athletics, Pathfinder Agent Dedication
description: You are trained to preserve the archaeological value of your location when entering.

name: Fortified Elixirs
description: Your treatments for diseases and poisons can be very efficacious, though they tend not to last as long.

name: Frighten Undead
prerequisites: Undead Slayer Dedication, trained in Intimidation
description: Your very presence chills creatures of the night down to their core and you can use the spiritual power and faithful life force of religious verses to frighten even mindless undead.

name: Frightful Condemnation
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners, Harsh Judgement
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Trigger You hit your condemned foe with a melee Strike in the same turn during which you condemned it with Harsh Judgment.

name: Fulminating Shot
description: Frequency once per round.You channel magic into your next shot.

name: Fulu Familiar
prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication, expert in Occultism or Religion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can imprint your familiar's spiritual essence into a fulu, a small paper charm that can be affixed to objects, creatures, or structures.

name: Fungal Exhalation
description: You can conjure toxic spores to infect enemies.

name: Furious Focus
description: You've learned to maintain your balance even when swinging furiously.

name: Gang Up
description: You and your allies harry an opponent in concert.

name: Gear Up
description: Whether it's wooden stakes, , or more unusual tools, you always have just the right thing to handle an undead's unusual weaknesses and vulnerabilities.

name: Ghost Strike
description: Once per day, you can infuse a weapon you are carrying with magical energies that allow it to strike true against incorporeal undead.

name: Ghostly Grasp
description: Your control over your ghostly form grows.

name: Giant's Stature
description: Requirements You are Medium or smaller.

name: Gifted Power
description: Your mystery grants you additional magic.

name: Gorilla Pound
description: Requirements You are in .

name: Grave Mummification
description: Exposure to the elements, magic, alchemy, and other phenomena intensified the changes from your mummification.

name: Grave Sense
description: Your time spent hunting the undead allows you to sense them.

name: Grave Strength
description: The flesh you've consumed over the course of your existence as a ghoul has made you stronger, gifting you with strange insights from the minds of the sapient creatures you've devoured and bringing you closer to a state of undead perfection.

name: Gravel Guts
description: Stone never becomes queasy, so why should you?

name: Greater Lesson
description: Your patron grants you greater knowledge.

name: Green Empathy
description: You can communicate with plants and fungi on a basic level and use Diplomacy to Make an Impression on them and to make very simple Requests of them.

name: Grown of Oak
description: You can make your skin take on the woody endurance of an ancient tree and have your familiar follow suit.

name: Grudge Strike
description: Requirements Your attuned apparition grants Heraldry Lore or Underworld Lore as an apparition skill.You channel the spiritual power of spiteful grudges.

name: Guardian's Deflection (Fighter)
description: Trigger An ally within your melee reach is hit by an attack, you can see the attacker, and the ally gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC would turn the critical hit into a hit or the hit into a miss.

name: Guide the Timeline
description: Frequency once per dayYou know the result you want and subtly nudge the timeline to your intended destination.

name: Guided Skill
description: Frequency once per day You ask your spirit guide for aid.

name: Halcyon Speaker Dedication
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, member of the Magaambya of conversant rank
description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.

name: Harbinger's Protection
description: You often work on missions alone, making sure to cover up your weaknesses more effectively than other members of your faith.

name: Harmonize
description: You can perform multiple compositions simultaneously, typically by performing in multiple ways at the same time, using special vocal techniques to double your voice, or creating occult magic that replicates your song or speech.

name: Harrow Ritualist
description: You immediately learn two of the following rituals: , , , , , or .

name: Heaven's Thunder
description: Until the end of your next turn, your unarmed attacks and any monk weapons you wield deal additional electricity and sonic damage; the amount of each damage type is equal to the number of damage dice for the weapon or unarmed attack.

name: Hedge Prison
description: You cultivate plants to entrap your foes.

name: Hellknight Dedication
prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication, lawful alignment, member of a Hellknight order, passed the Hellknight Test
description: You have forged your body to comply with the commands of your mind-orders steeped in the Measure and the Chain.

name: Hellknight Signifer Dedication
prerequisites: spellcasting class feature, Hellknight Armiger Dedication, lawful alignment, member of a Hellknight order, passed the Hellknight Test
description: You have bolstered your force of will with the power of the Measure and the Chain.

name: Hey! Over Here!
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory effect.Hey!

name: Hindquarter Kick
description: Requirements You are in claw stance and have a creature.

name: Holistic Care
description: You provide emotional and spiritual care.

name: Illuminating Stories
description: Stories serve as beacons in the night, illuminating valuable knowledge even if the tale itself misses the mark.

name: Implement Initiate
description: You gain your implement's initiate benefit.

name: Improved Familiar (Familiar Master)
description: You find it easy to attract a powerful and unusual familiar to your side.

name: Inertial Barrier
description: Your spell leaves behind barriers that reduce shock and motion.

name: Inexorable
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You imbue yourself with the resilience of the cave worm.

name: Infiltrate Dream
description: Entering a dream is as natural to you as stepping through a doorway.

name: Infused with Belkzen's Might
description: Your tattoos immortalize the conquests of orc war leaders, such as Belkzen besieging the dwarven Sky Citadel of Koldukar.

name: Inner Fire (Monk)
description: While you're in Stoked Flame Stance, you have cold and fire resistance equal to half your level, and any creature that hits you with an unarmed attack, tries to Grab or Grapple you, or otherwise touches you takes @Damage[@actor.abilities.wis.mod[fire]] equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).

name: Inner Strength
description: Your strength is part of your rage.

name: Inscribed with Elders' Deeds
description: Your tattoos commemorate unique exploits that (according to legends) only an orc could accomplish.

name: Insect Shape
description: Your understanding of life expands, allowing you to mimic a wider range of creatures.

name: Instinct Ability
description: You gain the instinct ability for the instinct you chose for Barbarian Dedication.

name: Instinctive Support
description: Trigger You Cast a non-cantrip spell that targets only your animal companion.

name: Intensified Element Stance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin Requirements You were the recipient of elemental medicine (see ) during your last daily preparations.You expend the elemental medicine in your body to empower your attacks, though you can't consume any more elemental medicine until the next day.

name: Interrogate
description: You ask questions you know will be answered.

name: Irresistible Magic
description: You've studied ways of overcoming the innate defenses against magic that dragons, otherworldly beings, and certain other powerful creatures have.

name: It's Alive!
description: You've mastered the use of electrical energy to power your clockwork creations.

name: Jagged Berms
description: You conjure up to six cube-shaped mounds of packed earth.

name: Keen Recollection
description: You can recall all sorts of information.

name: Keep Pace
prerequisites: Bounty Hunter Dedication or Game Hunter Dedication
description: Trigger Your prey is within reach and attempts to move away from you.Bounty Hunter - Once you are upon your prey, they can't escape.

name: Ki Cutting Sight
description: Everything is connected—all is part of the whole, and the whole is distributed throughout the infinite parts.

name: Knight Reclaimant Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Survival, trained in Stealth, any non-evil alignment, member of the Knights of Lastwall of knight rank
description: You have sworn the Crimson Oath and become a full member of the Crimson Reclaimers.

name: Knight Vigilant Dedication
prerequisites: trained in Religion, any good alignment, member of the Knights of Lastwall of knight rank
description: You are dedicated to the cause of the Shining Sentinels.

name: Knowledge is Power
description: When you critically succeed at a Recall Knowledge check about a creature, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll against the creature, to your AC against its next attack roll, and to your save against its next effect requiring a save.

name: Let My Creature Live!
description: You continue to tinker with your creation's muscles and rudimentary mind, granting it a limited form of autonomy.

name: Leverage Anguish
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail or critically fail a saving throw against a curse, death, emotion, or fear effect.You leverage your emotional turmoil to mend your physical form.

name: Liberate Soul
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements Your spiral is glowing.

name: Light Step
description: You aren't bothered by tricky footing.

name: Lightning Rod
description: You smash a metal rod into your foe and call lightning to it.

name: Living Rune
description: You've bridged a connection between the runes on your body and the magic of runestones, allowing you to place an armor rune on your living flesh.

name: Lotus Above the Wind
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your qi, dancing ever diligently toward cultivation, eludes the grasp of the world's muck and mire.

name: Loyal Warhorse
description: The loyalty you and your mount share is unbreakable.

name: Macabre Virtuoso
prerequisites: Reanimator Dedication, expert in Arcana, Occultism, or Religion
description: Any necromancer can create zombies and skeletons, but you know the secrets behind the creation of far more advanced undead monstrosities.

name: Mage Hunter
description: Requirements You've seen the target Cast a SpellYou use your hatred of magic to lash out at a known spellcaster.

name: Magic Hands
description: The blessing of your deity heightens your healing ability, integrating magical healing with the mundane.

name: Magical Scrounger
description: You can a temporary wondrous item using the magic scrounged from all around.

name: Mammoth Charge
description: Requirements You are riding your megafauna companion.

name: Master Summoner
description: During daily preparations, you can designate one of your spell slots to become two summoning slots of the same spell rank, from which you can cast only summoning or incarnate spells.

name: Masterful Warden
description: Your mastery of warden magic increases.

name: Mastermind's Eye
description: When you succeed at identifying a creature using , that creature is against your attacks until the start of your next turn; if you critically succeed, it's off-guard against your attacks for 1 minute.

name: Mature Animal Companion (Ranger)
description: Your animal companion becomes a mature animal companion and gains additional capabilities.

name: Mature Megafauna Companion
description: You've raised your megafauna companion to be a more powerful force on the battlefield than most of its kind.

name: Mature Trained Companion
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: Your animal companion grows up, becoming a mature animal companion.

name: Medium's Awareness
description: Your apparitions watch over you.

name: Megafauna Veterinarian
prerequisites: Mammoth Lord Dedication, Expert in Nature
description: By heeding the wise advice of elders in your following- and aided by your own experience-you've learned how to provide medical care to the megafauna of the Mammoth Lord followings.

name: Megavolt
description: You bleed off some electric power from your innovation in the shape of a damaging bolt.

name: Mesmerizing Gaze
description: When you meet someone's gaze, they're unable to look away from you.

name: Mind Shards
description: With a swing and a thought, you detonate your mind weapon into a burst of psychic shards that shred the mind.

name: Misty Transformation
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You transform due to a polymorph effect.

name: Mobile Swarm
description: The clicking of fast-moving legs accompanies your swarm in all kinds of environments.

name: Molten Wire
description: Spinning molten iron through a vortex of fire, you trap your foe in searing wires.

name: Momentous Charge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in .You rush into your enemies with great and reckless force.

name: Motionless Cutter
description: Usage imbued into a melee weapon ikon that deals slashing damageYour weapon is so sharp even an insect alighting upon its still blade would be severed.

name: Mountain Stronghold
description: Requirements You are in You focus on your connection to the earth and call upon the mountain to block attacks against you.

name: Mounted Shield
description: You've trained with your shield to defend both yourself and your mount.

name: Multifaceted Will
description: Without the firm hand of a patron, your power begins to reflect deeper complexities, sometimes latching onto entirely unexpected sources of magical potency.

name: Mummy's Despair
description: Frequency once per hour You force your mental anguish outward, projecting it upon those around you.

name: Munitions Machinist
description: You're adept at crafting ammunition.

name: Nameless Anonymity
description: Your mask protects you further from divination.

name: Narrative Conduit
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You act as a conduit for your companions just as your stories are a conduit between teller and listener.

name: Nature Prowler
description: When you begin your turn or unnoticed by your hunted prey, that creature is to you until the end of your turn.

name: Nature's Precision
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with an agile or finesse unarmed attack
description: Your companions pick at an enemy's weak points.

name: Night's Glow
description: The stars and moon lend you their light.

name: Nightwave Springing Reload
description: Training with the crew of the Nightwave has taught you their technique for reloading while leaping to board another ship.

name: Nimble Shield Hand
description: You are so used to wielding a shield that you can do so even while using the hand that's holding it for other tasks that require the dexterity of a hand.

name: No Hard Feelings
description: Despite the devastation your weapons tend to inflict upon their targets or the destruction you might unleash upon an area, your foes still manage to walk away at the end of a fight-at least sometimes.

name: Nocturnal Senses
description: Your senses gain even greater clarity.

name: Numb
description: As your body continues to rot and putrefy, your senses deaden and your undead powers grow.

name: Obscured Terrain
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast obscuring mist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify the spell to replace its standard effects with the following: You cause a cloud of thick fog to blanket the area, making it difficult to see the ground.

name: One More Activation
description: You've forged a deeper bond to your invested items, allowing you to activate them more than usual.

name: One-Inch Punch
description: You put all your force into a single mighty, carefully controlled blow.

name: Ostentatious Arrival
description: If the next action you take is to Manifest your Eidolon as a three-action activity, or to Cast a three-action summoning Spell, the creature appears in an explosion.

name: Pack Attack
description: You have mastered techniques for hunting alongside your pack.

name: Pact of Draconic Fury
description: You've sworn a pact with a dragon, giving you the ability to tap into the dragon's immeasurable power in exchange for adding to their hoard.

name: Pain Tolerance
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Access You're from Alkenstar or the Mana Wastes.

name: Palatine Enchantment
description: You have found yourself facing supernatural beings often and have learned how to combat them.

name: Parallel Breakthrough
description: You expand your mind beyond your area of psychic specialty.

name: Perfect Ki Adept
description: You gain the appropriate qi spell for your School of Perfection: for Unblinking Flame, for Unbreaking Waves, for Unfolding Wind, or for Untwisting Iron.

name: Perfect Truths
description: Your knowledge of Razmir's faith and doctrines has grown.

name: Performative Weapons Training
description: You're skilled with flashy weapons and can use them to great effect.

name: Perpetual Scout
description: You spot anything out of place in the areas you know best.

name: Phalanx Breaker
description: Requirements You're wielding a two-handed firearm or a two-handed crossbow.

name: Phase Out
description: Your eidolon phases out of reality slightly, gaining resistance to all damage (except force and negative) equal to half your level.

name: Pirouette
description: Requirements You're in Masquerade of Seasons Stance.

name: Pistolero's Challenge
description: With a stern call, carefully chosen barb, or some other challenging declaration, you demand your foe's attention in a duel.

name: Piston Punch
description: You lash out with a powerful punch, extending your dynamo to a greater length in order to attack two creatures in a row.

name: Plague Rat
description: Your bites carry a cursed infection.

name: Poison Coat
description: In nature, certain animals are covered in venomous spines, and just brushing against them can prove deadly.

name: Powerful Lash
description: You've learned to swing your lash ever faster and in wider arcs.

name: Practiced Opposition
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You've battled more undead than you care to remember, often with little time to prepare between foes, forcing you to rely on experience and muscle memory to guide your blade.

name: Precise Finisher
description: Even when your foe avoids your , you can still hit a vital spot.

name: Predatory Claws
description: Your nails grow into sharp claws, perfect for seizing and tearing your prey.

name: Predictive Purchase (Investigator)
description: You have just the thing for the situation.

name: Primal Proportions
description: You can mimic the sheer mass of the largest beasts.

name: Propulsive Mutation
description: Your ostilli can fire its dart farther.

name: Psi Development
description: You've found a new mental form.

name: Quick Snares
description: You can rig a snare in only moments.

name: Rain-Scribe Sustenance
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Rain Scribes affiliation
description: You use the power of your Rain-Scribe magic to draw on a stream of primal power for sustenance.

name: Rallying Charge (Marshal)
description: Your fearless charge into battle reinvigorates your allies to carry on the fight.

name: Ranger's Bramble
description: You can cause plants to grow and trap your foes with thorns.

name: Rapid Manifestation
description: Trigger You roll initiative or a hazard attacks you.

name: Reactive Strike
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

name: Read the Dust
description: Trigger an undead creature is reduced to zero Hit Points or a haunt is disabled within 60 feet of you You watch the creature or hazard as it collapses, careful for any sign it may return.

name: Red Mantis School Spell
description: You gain the Red Mantis magic school's initial school spell.

name: Reflexive Shield
description: You can use your shield to fend off explosions and the like.

name: Relentless Disarm
prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication, trained in Athletics
description: When you succeed, but don't critically succeed, at a check to a creature, your circumstance bonus to further checks to Disarm that creature is +4 instead of +2.

name: Reloading Trick
description: Frequency once per round Requirements You're holding an unloaded hand crossbow.

name: Remote Trigger
description: You've learned how to trigger snares from afar, creating ranged hazards to assail your opponents and allowing you to disarm enemies' snares harmlessly.

name: Repulse the Wicked
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger An undead within your reach critically fails an attack roll targeting you.

name: Resourceful Ritualist
description: You can cast difficult rituals that might otherwise be just beyond your skill.

name: Return Fire
description: Requirements You are in , are wielding a bow, and have a free hand.Snatching an arrow out of the air, you instantly put it to your bow and return fire.

name: Revealing Stab
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon that can deal piercing damage.

name: Ricochet Stance (Fighter)
description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

name: Rising Hurricane
description: A hurricane lifts your enemies into the air before bringing them crashing down in a bloody rain.

name: Roaring Heart
description: Requirements Your attuned apparition grants Mountain Lore as an apparition skill.You surge forward inexorably.

name: Rod of Rule
description: Your personal rune is connected more closely to your arcane bond.

name: Roiling Mudslide
description: You form water and earth into a mudslide that smashes your opponents and coats them in mud.

name: Rough Terrain Stance
description: Requirements You gained a terrain attunement benefit this turn.

name: Rushing Boar
description: Requirements You're in boar or hybrid shape.

name: Sacred Armaments
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Through the power of your faith or the blessing of a priest, your weapons are fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

name: Safeguard Spell
description: You are inured to the effects of your own spells.

name: Sand Snatcher
description: A figure of sand with grasping arms arises in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

name: Say That Again!
description: Trigger An opponent gets a critical failure when attempting to you or Lie to you.

name: Scatter Blast
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm that has the scatter trait.

name: Scholarly Defense
description: Your knowledge of strange creatures and their bizarre anatomy allows you to anticipate their physical attacks and reduce the damage you take from them.

name: Scouring Rage
prerequisites: an instinct that allows you to change your additional damage from Rage to a different damage type
description: Trigger You .You emit a powerful surge of instinctual energy when you unleash your anger.

name: Scout's Speed
description: You move faster, especially when traveling, allowing you to scout ahead and report back without slowing your allies.

name: Scrap Barricade
description: Ragged pieces of metal weld together into a ramshackle structure.

name: Scroll Esoterica
description: Your esoterica includes scraps of scriptures, magic tomes, druidic markings, and the like, which you can use to create temporary scrolls.

name: Scrollmaster Dedication
prerequisites: expert in any Lore skill, member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Scrolls
description: Your experience chronicling adventures and discoveries grants you heightened discernment and memory.

name: Second Shield
description: Trigger Your causes your shield to break or be destroyed.

name: Selective Energy
description: As you call down divine power, you can prevent some enemies from benefiting or some allies from being hurt.

name: Share Burden
description: Trigger An ally within 60 feet would be affected by a curse or misfortune effect, and you wouldn't be affected but you are an eligible target for the effect.

name: Shatter Defenses
description: Requirements A creature is in your melee reach.

name: Shield Wall
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger Your shield is raised and an adjacent ally Raises a Shield.

name: Shield Warden
description: When you have a shield raised, you can use your reaction when an attack is made against an ally adjacent to you.

name: Shielded Tome
description: During your daily preparations, you can magically fuse a shield into your favorite book, where it appears as an elaborate bookmark.

name: Shove Down
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful .

name: Silk Bracelet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originTaking inspiration from Desna's image as a giant silk moth in Tian Xia, you've attached a bracelet to your innovation that generates ultra-strong silk strands mixed with venom.

name: Simple Crystal Magic
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: As long as you meditate before a gemstone worth at least 10 gp as part of your daily preparations, you are capable of seeing magic as flowing runes that reveal information about magic objects, and you can scribe a personal rune that represents you.

name: Sinbladed Spell
description: Requirements You are holding a weapon in the polearm or spear group.You punctuate your spellcasting with a flourish of your weapon, imparting physical force to your magic.

name: Siphon Magic
description: Requirements Your last action was to Harvest the Blood of a creature that can cast spellsYou gorge upon the magical energies of your foe's blood.

name: Sixth Sense
description: Your psychic abilities also allow you to detect the lingering thoughts of spirits and similar entities.

name: Skirmish Strike
description: Your feet and weapon move in tandem.

name: Sky and Heaven Stance
description: Requirements You're unarmored.

name: Slice and Swipe
description: Access Help either the Washboard Dogs or the Diobel Sweepers destroy their rival.

name: Slinger's Readiness
description: You've learned a gunslinger's tricks for staking out your territory in a fight.

name: Sly Disarm
description: You can a creature through sleight of hand rather than brute force.

name: Smite
description: You single out one enemy to destroy in your deity's name.

name: Snap Falling Fruit
description: Trigger You or an ally within reach of your lash is the target of a physical ranged attack.

name: Snap Shot
description: You can react with ranged weapons when a creature is in close quarters.

name: Sniper's Aim
description: You take an extra moment to carefully sync your aim and breathing, then fire a shot with great accuracy.

name: Snow Step
description: Snow and ice are no hindrance to you.

name: Song of Marching
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which enables you and your allies to cross vast distances without strain.

name: Soul Arsenal
description: Choose an additional soulforged armament of a different type than the type you already chose, and choose one essence power for it.

name: Sound Mirror
description: You twist not just the visual, but the auditory as well, allowing you to pass without a sound and create minor noises as distractions-perfect for misdirection and infiltration.

name: Spear Dancer
description: Requirements You are wielding a weapon from the spear or polearm groupYou favor weapons that allow you to lash out viciously while keeping enemies at bay, giving you an opportunity to strike without fear of reprisal.

name: Spell Relay
description: Trigger An ally Casts a Spell and you are within that spell's range.

name: Spellmaster Dedication
prerequisites: Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma +2, ability to cast focus spells, member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Spells
description: As a Spellmaster, you are adept at identifying magic.

name: Spinning Stand
description: Requirements You're .

name: Spiral Sworn
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You trace a spiral in the air while intoning prayers to Pharasma, gaining her blessing for a time.

name: Spirit of the Blade
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You charge your blade with spiritual energy, allowing it to cut through spirits and fiends with fearsome efficiency.

name: Spirit's Absolution
description: Cost 1 spirit wisp or spirit remnant from your spirit dwelling Requirements You are holding your spirit dwelling.You purify a spirit by absolving it of its sins and regrets.

name: Spirits' Interference
description: You call forth protective spirits to ward off ranged attacks.

name: Spiritual Secret
description: Frequency once per hourYou gain deeper insights into your patron's abandoned power, allowing you to draw on that power more directly.

name: Spiritual Sense
description: You have a vague connection to the Ethereal Plane that enables you to notice spirits.

name: Spiritual Strike
description: Requirements You are wielding a weapon with at least one fundamental rune and your familiar is adjacent to you or in your space.Your spirit guide enhances your attacks with occult power.

name: Split Slot
description: You can prepare two spells in one slot, giving you the freedom to choose the spell when you cast it.

name: Staff Sweep
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are wielding your staff.

name: Staggering Fire
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You've learned how to fire at enemies to slow them down, allowing innocents and fellow knights alike time to escape.

name: Startling Appearance (Vigilante)
description: Requirements You are completely unnoticed by the target creature.

name: Steady Spellcasting
description: Confident in your technique, you don't lose spells easily.

name: Steam Knight
description: You shape your kinetic aura into swirling armor of steam that scalds your enemies and propels you on super-heated jet streams.

name: Stella's Stab and Snag
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You are wielding a piercing or slashing melee weapon.

name: Sticky Poison
description: A combination of additional viscosity and careful application keeps your weapons poisoned even when suffering significant wear and tear.

name: Stone Blood
description: You can selectively stop your bleeding with ease.

name: Stone Blood (Stonebound)
description: Your blood becomes thick and sluggish, but no less effective at oxygenating your cells.

name: Stonebound Magic
description: You've learned to manifest your connection to stone by conjuring it to your side.

name: Stoney Deflection
description: Requirements You are in Stonestrike Stance.

name: Storm Retribution
prerequisites: storm order, tempest surge order spell
description: Trigger An opponent adjacent to you critically hits you with a melee weapon or melee unarmed attack.

name: Strain Mind
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You cast a psi cantrip.

name: Stumbling Feint
description: Requirements You are in .

name: Sun's Fury
description: The Old Sun Gods have granted you a gift in your fight against Walkena.

name: Sunbird Glare
description: Requirements You're in bright light.By keeping your feathers clean and sleek, you can catch the light across your wings to create a startling glare in the eyes of a creature within 20 feet.

name: Superior Propulsion
description: By experimenting with the effects of momentum gained from your signature vehicle's movement, you have learned to get more from propulsion than just speed when the pilot pushes the vehicle to its limit.

name: Surface Tension
description: Requirements You're wielding a broken weapon.You encase the pieces of your broken weapon together with water you pull from the surrounding environment.

name: Surprise Strike
description: Whenever you make a Strike with an improvised weapon against a creature that hasn't seen you make a Strike using an improvised weapon or that is otherwise ignorant of your skill with improvised weapons, the creature is against you for that Strike.

name: Swashbuckler's Riposte
description: You've learned to riposte against ill-conceived attacks.

name: Sweeping Fan Block
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You're targeted by a ranged attack that uses ammunition.

name: Swift Guardian
description: Trigger You roll initiative.When danger appears, you quickly send away your active companion and call in a different animal ally.

name: Swift Intervention
description: Trigger An ally within your overwatch field fails in their attempt to , , , or .

name: Swift Tracker
description: Your keen eyes catch signs of passage even when you're moving.

name: Sword-Light Wave
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You channel spiritual energy through your weapon, unleashing it as a torrent of devastating power.

name: Swordmaster Dedication
prerequisites: Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution +2, member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Swords
description: Your Swords training taught you to never lose hold of your weapon.

name: Sympathetic Vulnerabilities
prerequisites: Exploit Vulnerability, mortal weakness or personal antithesis
description: When you apply your will to invoke a vulnerability, the result is more powerful, and the vulnerability ripples out in a web from your main target to affect a broader range of creatures.

name: Syu Tak-nwa's Deadly Hair
description: Your hair unarmed attack deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and gains the grapple trait.

name: Tandem Strike
description: Requirements A creature is in your and your eidolon's reach.

name: Tap Vitality
description: Frequency once per hourYou tap into the entity's life force to heal your wounds, though at the cost of the entity's personality bleeding into your own.

name: Targeted Redirection
description: You aim a shot at your spotter, intending for your spotter to redirect that shot off their own weapon or shield to hit your foe from a better angle, and avoid your foe's cover.

name: Tempest Cloud's Speed
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You aren't encumbered.You and your familiar coordinate to channel elemental air.

name: Tempest-Sun Redirection
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Tempest-Sun Mages affiliation
description: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots that damages other creatures, you can bend some of that spell's offensive energy, protecting allies in the area and boosting your own defenses against certain foes.

name: Tenacious Endurance
description: You encourage your companion to refuse to yield, against even the mightiest of foes.

name: Thorough Research
description: You have comprehensive knowledge in your fields of interest.

name: Three Clear Breaths
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Through your disciplined condensations and circulations of qi, you've caught a fleeting glimpse of cultivation's promise, and your health has handsomely profited along the way.

name: Thunder Clap
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: You slam your hands together to unleash a deafening blast.

name: Tiger Slash
description: Requirements You are in You make a fierce swipe with both hands.

name: Time Mage Dedication
prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature.
description: You might be a novice in the temporal arts now, but in the future, you'll hold time in the palm of your hand.

name: Toppling Transformation
description: Trigger Your size increases due to a polymorph effect.

name: Torrent in the Blood
description: A healing wave splashes across creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:30], its cleansing water driving afflictions from the body.

name: Tree of Duality
description: An ephemeral tree bursts forth, floating on air in an unoccupied square of your choice within 60 feet.

name: Triggerbrand Salvo
description: Requirements You're wielding a combination weapon.

name: Triple Shot
description: You can quickly fire multiple shots with greater control.

name: Twist the Knife
description: Requirements Your last action was a melee Strike that dealt sneak attack damage to an target.

name: Two-Element Infusion
description: Slamming one element into another, you combine their strengths.

name: Uneasy Rest
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast sleep
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: Subjects of your spell experience troubled dreams.

name: Unnerving Prowess
description: Trigger You critically succeed at a Strike or Disarm with your Aldori dueling sword.

name: Upset Balance
prerequisites: stalwart defender dedication, expert in Athletics
description: Trigger You are damaged by a melee Strike.

name: Urgent Upwelling
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger An enemy reduces you to 0 HP, an enemy critically hits you, or you critically fail a saving throw against an enemy's effect.

name: Uzunjati Storytelling
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Uzunjati affiliation, master in a Recall Knowledge skill
description: You tell a quick story or begin telling a longer tale.

name: Vacate Vision
description: Trigger You fail (but don't critically fail) a saving throw against an effect with the visual trait.

name: Vengeful Spirit Deck
description: Requirements You have an active harrow omen.

name: Verbose Distraction
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Trigger You are the target of a physical melee attack.You talk so much it can be distracting to your enemies and you're often quick to remind your enemies that you're just a little guy!

name: Verduran Ambush
prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication, expert in Stealth
description: You prepare to ambush a foe.

name: Vexing Tumble
description: You tumble around your foes, expertly avoiding their reactions.

name: Vision of Foresight
description: Requirements You're in a Daydream Trance You use your daydreams to predict the success of actions, rapidly envisioning the possibilities.

name: Visual Fidelity
description: You've found a way to use a hodgepodge combination of devices to enhance your visual abilities in every situation.

name: Volatile Grease
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast grease
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its target to be 1 creature.

name: Volcanic Escape
description: Trigger An enemy in your kinetic aura damages you.

name: Voluminous Vials
description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.Special At 12th level or higher, you can select this feat a second time to increase your number of versatile vials per day to 6.

name: Watch This!
description: Trigger An ally misses or critically misses an enemy you can see with their attack.

name: Watch Your Back
description: You menace the target, stoking their fears and drawing their attention.

name: Water Step
description: You can Stride across liquid and surfaces that don't support your weight.

name: Weight of Stone
description: A packed cloud of thundering boulders descends from the sky, beating down everyone in its path.

name: Westyr's Wayfinder Repository
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, Wayfinder Resonance Tinkerer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You have at least one 1st-rank spell slot and a wayfinder.

name: Wheeling Grab
description: You cartwheel on your claws, dancing over your foes.

name: Whirling Throw
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You propel your enemy away.

name: Wild Speech
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, Animal Empathy or the ability to speak with a type of animal
description: Your connection to the denizens of the wilds grows ever stronger, and you find yourself able to speak with animals like you would in your native tongue.

name: Wild Witch's Armaments
description: Your patron's power continues to enhance your natural offensive capabilities.

name: Wisteria-and-Peony Reunion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You Cast a focus spell.Your roots of qi stand firm, shaking off pains and aches like the returning flowers and leaves shed during winter's snow.

name: Witch's Charge
description: You forge a magical link with another creature, granting you awareness of that creature's condition and creating a conduit for spellcasting.

name: Wolf Drag
description: Requirements You are in You rip your enemy off their feet.

name: Wooden Palisade
description: Planks of wood, embellished with carvings, spring forth to form a wall within 120 feet.

name: Worm's Feast
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Frequency once per day You call forth a brood of infantile cave worms to feast on your enemy's flesh.

name: Xidao Sea Mine Drop
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou've rigged your armor innovation with a gizmo that can safely synthesize two sea mines a day, holding them in a protected compartment.

name: Zealous Inevitability
description: Requirements You are wielding your deity's favored weaponYou channel your zeal through a sacred weapon, bringing a foe closer to their demise.

name: Advanced First Aid
description: You use your medical training to ameliorate sickness or assuage fears.

name: Aerobatics Mastery
description: You move with grace in flight and can perform amazing aerial stunts.

name: Ashen Veil
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, expert in Religion, master in Stealth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: By smearing ash or tainted earth over your skin and armor, you shroud yourself from the dead.

name: Battle Cry
description: When you roll initiative, you can yell a mighty battle cry and an observed foe as a free action.

name: Battle Prayer
prerequisites: master in Religion, you follow a deity
description: Calling out to your deity, you recite scripture to harm a foe.

name: Beautiful Knifework
prerequisites: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication, master in Medicine
description: You perform surgical adjustments to disguise a willing ally or your construct companion.

name: Biographical Eye
description: In even a brief conversation or social interaction, you pick up on subtle social and visual cues to learn a great deal about a person's origin and history.

name: Bizarre Magic
description: You can draw upon strange variations in your spellcasting, whether or not you can cast occult spells.

name: Bless Tonic
prerequisites: master in Crafting, deity who grants heal divine font
description: You channel vitality energy into restoratives that ward against harm.

name: Bless Toxin
prerequisites: master in Crafting, deity who grants harm divine font
description: You pour void energy into toxins you create to further debilitate your targets.

name: Bloodsense
description: You're extraordinarily sensitive to the presence of blood.

name: Break Curse
description: You spend 8 hours praying or performing occult rites over the target, weakening a curse's power over them.

name: Chronocognizance
prerequisites: Time Mage Dedication, master in Perception
description: The flows and ebbs of time are obvious to you, as are the tangles that form when it's distorted.

name: Consult the Spirits
prerequisites: master in Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: Frequency once per dayYou have learned rites or meditations that enable you to perceive minor, spirits within a place.

name: Disturbing Knowledge
description: You utter a litany of dreadful names, prophecies, and descriptions of realms beyond mortal comprehension, drawn from your study of forbidden tomes and scrolls.

name: Doublespeak
description: You are skilled at saying one thing while meaning something different.

name: Efficient Controls
prerequisites: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication, master in Crafting
description: By reducing redundant systems and streamlining essential functions, you have made it easier for the vehicle to operate with fewer crew.

name: Entourage
description: You have a small group of admirers who tend to follow you around while you're in civilized settlements.

name: Environmental Guide
description: You can rapidly adapt to climates and help others do the same.

name: Evangelize
prerequisites: master in Diplomacy, follower of a specific religion or philosophy
description: You point out a detail that incontrovertibly supports your faith, causing a listener's mind to whirl.

name: Expeditious Search
description: You have a system that lets you search at great speed, finding details and secrets twice as quickly as others can.

name: Expert Disassembly
description: You can apply the same techniques you use to reverse engineer objects to disable dangerous traps and break apart locks.

name: Explosive Entry
prerequisites: Demolitionist Dedication, master in Engineering Lore
description: You know exactly how to make a memorable entrance...

name: Fabricated Connections
description: You can about having taken an action so convincingly that you acquire all the tangible benefits of having successfully completed it.

name: Foil Senses
description: You are adept at foiling creatures' special senses and cautious enough to safeguard against them at all times.

name: Go with the Flow
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature detects your attempt to , and you're within 30 feet of at least one other creature.

name: Graceful Leaper
description: Mass and muscle are meaningless when you propel yourself through the air; only grace and balance matter.

name: Grudging Compliment
description: Trigger An enemy within 30 feet damages you or succeeds at a skill check.Every Firebrand can recognize the skill of others, but you've turned it into an art you can wield in combat.

name: Impeccable Crafting
description: You craft flawless creations with great efficiency.

name: Influence Nature
description: With patience and time, you can make bird calls, leave game trails, and ultimately influence the behavior of a certain type of animals in the region to favor and even aid you in the days to come.

name: Kip Up
description: You stand up.

name: Master of Apprentice
prerequisites: master in Crafting, Performance, or a Lore skill
description: Teaching is a difficult art form, but you've gotten a pretty good handle on it.

name: Monster Crafting
description: You can use the parts of monsters to aid in crafting.

name: Morphic Manipulation
description: You've attuned your natural aura to that of plant life, coaxing it to grow faster than normal.

name: Muscle Mimicry
prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication, trained in Athletics, master in Deception
description: Trigger An enemy makes a successful , , , , or attempt.

name: Numb to Death
prerequisites: Diehard, You have died at least once
description: Frequency once per dayYour past has left you numb to death's call.

name: Paragon Battle Medicine
description: Kassi Aziril taught you her techniques that originated the modern use of Battle Medicine.

name: Party Crasher
description: You attend all the fashionable society parties, no matter how exclusive they might be.

name: Planar Survival
description: You can Subsist using Survival on different planes, even those without resources or natural phenomena you normally need.

name: Prepare Papers
prerequisites: Alkenstar Agent Dedication, master in Society
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: You're practiced at creating forgeries that establish your outlaw credentials or augment your legal authority.

name: Prescient Consumable
description: You can predict which consumables you might need in advance.

name: Propeller Attachment
description: You've mastered attaching clockwork propellers to your daily quick-deploy snares that use gears.

name: Push It
description: You can push your vehicle's performance beyond the limits envisioned by its makers.

name: Quick Change
description: You can shift between your identities with ease.

name: Quick Climb
description: When Climbing, you move 5 more feet on a success and 10 more feet on a critical success, up to your Speed.

name: Quick Recognition
prerequisites: Master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism or Religion, Recognize Spell
description: You Recognize Spells swiftly.

name: Quick Setup
description: You have learned to setup simple crafting jobs with ease.

name: Quick Swim
description: You Swim 5 feet farther on a success and 10 feet farther on a critical success, to a maximum of your Speed.

name: Quick Unlock
description: You can using 1 action instead of 2.

name: Rapid Affixture
description: You take only 1 minute to .

name: Read Shibboleths
description: All communication is filled with slight tells and signals.

name: Sacred Defense
prerequisites: master in Religion, you follow a deity
description: Frequency once per hour You call upon your deity to grant you their protective blessing.

name: Scholastic Identification
description: You have the knowledge needed to understand ancient texts and cultural artifacts.

name: Shameless Request
description: You can downplay the consequences or outrageousness of your requests using sheer brazenness and charm.

name: Signature Crafting
description: Magic items you create bear a stamp specific to your handiwork.

name: Skeptic's Defense
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are targeted by or are in the area of a mental spell or effect You don't believe in any mental twaddle, and you're certainly not afraid of it.

name: Slippery Secrets
description: You elude and evade attempts to uncover your true nature or intentions.

name: Speech of the Mammoth Lords
prerequisites: Mammoth Lord Dedication, Master in Diplomacy or Intimidation
description: You've learned the ancient tongue spoken by the creatures of the far north.

name: Subjective Truth
description: Your disparate identities allow you to defeat magic that detects lies.

name: Supertaster
description: You have refined your palate and have a discerning sense of taste that can detect abnormalities in the flavor and texture of food and beverages.

name: Swift Sneak
description: You can move your full Speed when you .

name: Talent Envy
description: You give off a bedazzling glow with every performance, sparking feelings of severe envy and inadequacy in those who compare their talent to yours.

name: Temperature Adjustment
prerequisites: master in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Hwanggot originYou learn Hwan temperature classifications for the elements—wood and water are cold elements, while fire, earth, and metal are hot elements.

name: Terrified Retreat
description: When you critically succeed at the action, if the target's level is lower than yours, the target is for 1 round.

name: That Was a Close One, Huh?
prerequisites: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication, master in Deception
description: Frequency once per round Requirements Either you used Accidental Shot and hit your opponent with the Strike this turn, or you used Lucky Escape since your last turn and the triggering attack missed you.You laugh innocently about the inexplicable luck of your last shot hitting its mark or how close t

name: Tumbling Theft
description: You reach for an opponent's item as you move past a foe.

name: Voice Cold as Death
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, master in Intimidation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Requirements You are not .

name: Wall Jump
description: You can use your momentum from a jump to propel yourself off a wall.

name: Water Sprint
description: Experience and training have taught you that water has just enough surface tension for a master sprinter to traverse the surface.

name: A Little Bird Told Me...
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: You transform into a small bird, such as a finch or a sparrow, allowing you to eavesdrop on others and gain information you wouldn't otherwise be able to acquire.

name: Able Ritualist
description: Your readings on rituals make you a skilled participant.

name: Accompany
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet Casts a Spell.

name: Accurate Swing
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners, Harsh Judgement
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: You strike cleanly with wide, sweeping attacks to inflict maximum damage, taking advantage of your judged foe's fear to land a felling blow.

name: Accursed Magic
description: When the curse within you spills out, you can lay curses on others and claim them for yourself with ease.

name: Accursed Touch
description: You've learned to harness the supernatural curse that animates you, imbuing your most powerful attacks with a terrible curse.

name: Achaekek's Grip
description: You sense if a creature you have slain in the last year has been restored to life, as long as you and that creature are on the same plane.

name: Acquired Tolerance
description: Trigger You fail a save against a poison.A small amount of poison, taken at nonlethal doses, can help the body build up resistance against a more deadly dosage.

name: Adamantine Body
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An attack or effect would deal damage to you.With your strong will and even stronger body, you shrug off an otherwise devastating blow.

name: Additional Ikon
description: Your story has grown rich enough that three ikons can't contain its full complexity.

name: Advanced Deity's Domain
description: Through your conviction, you have glimpsed the deeper secrets of your deity's domain.

name: Advanced Domain
description: Your prayers have unlocked deeper secrets of your deity's domain.

name: Advanced Hallowed Spell
prerequisites: Hallowed Necromancer Dedication, necromancer initial school spell or death initial domain spell
description: You dig deeper into the magical tools found in wizard schools and divine domains.

name: Advanced School Spell
description: You gain access to the advanced teachings of your arcane institution, learning a powerful new school spell.

name: Alter Admixture
description: Requirements You are holding or wearing an alchemist's toolkit.Sometimes, you need to adapt your alchemical mixtures to new situations.

name: Ambushing Knockdown
description: Access Side with the Washboard Dogs in the gang conflict.

name: Animal Rage
description: You transform into your animal.

name: Animalistic Brutality
description: You deepen the connection into your animal instincts.

name: Anthemic Performance
description: Your music, speech, or other performance inspires your allies to dive into battle.

name: Apparition Magic
description: You can cast more divine spells each day.

name: Apparition's Reflection
description: Frequency once per hourYour apparition infuses your body with additional power.

name: Arcane Breadth
description: Your thorough studies allow you to cast more arcane spells each day.

name: Archaeologist's Luck
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You fail a check against a trap, such as a Thievery check to Disable the trap or a Reflex save to avoid its effects.

name: Archer's Aim
description: You slow down, focus, and take a careful shot.

name: Armiger's Mobility
prerequisites: expert in heavy armor, Hellknight Armiger Dedication
description: You've learned how best to move in heavy armor.

name: Armored Rebuff
description: Trigger An adjacent foe critically fails an attack roll to Strike you with a melee weapon or unarmed attack.

name: Attuned Stride
description: You can move freely through terrain you're attuned to.

name: Back to Back
description: You excel at watching your allies' backs and helping them watch yours.

name: Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting
description: You've unlocked the first secrets of beast guns, granting you your own pool of magical might through the amplifying power of their synergistic magic.

name: Basic Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
description: You gain the Basic Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Basic Modification
description: You've learned to modify your innovation in order to enhance its capabilities beyond what an ordinary piece of equipment can accomplish.

name: Battle Hymn to the Lost
prerequisites: of verse unbroken or peerless under heaven
description: Frequency once per hourYour movements in combat are an artistic dirge to those spirits who could not fight to see another day.

name: Beacon Mark
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify the spell to add the following heightened entry.

name: Behold My Creation!
description: You have rebuilt your creation once more.

name: Black Powder Blaze
prerequisites: Bullet Dancer Dedication, Black Powder Boost
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.You launch yourself across the battlefield.

name: Bleeding Finisher
description: Your blow inflicts profuse bleeding.

name: Blessed Spell
prerequisites: Blessed One Dedication, ability to cast spells from spell slots, Mercy
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes When you focus your magic on an ally, you can remove harmful conditions.

name: Blind-Fight
description: Fighter, Rogue, Investigator Your battle instincts make you more aware of and opponents.

name: Bloodline Breadth
description: Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more spells of your bloodline's tradition each day.

name: Bloodline Resistance
description: Your magical blood makes you more resistant to magic.

name: Bond Conservation
description: Requirements The last action you used was to Cast a Spell enabled by .

name: Bonds of Death
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You have cast this turn.

name: Boost Summons
description: Augmenting your eidolon extends to creatures you summon.

name: Brain Drain
description: With a wresting of will, you siphon off a creature's mental energy to replenish your own.

name: Bravo's Determination
prerequisites: expert in Deception, Firebrand Braggart Dedication
description: Trigger A foe's Strike reduces you to 0 Hit Points; you were not at 1 Hit Point and you would not be killed.

name: Breath of the Dragon (Dragon Disciple)
description: You can use a powerful breath weapon, much like the dragon you emulate.

name: Bullet Split
description: Requirements You're wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand and a slashing (or versatile S) melee weapon in the other.You carefully align your weapon with the edge of your blade, splitting the projectile in two as you fire to attack two different targets.

name: Bullseye
description: You carefully take aim to avoid your foe's concealment and cover.

name: Call and Response
description: Your composition takes the form of a call-and-response chant that lets your allies continue the effect without you.

name: Call Gun
description: You build a powerful magical connection with a chosen gun or crossbow.

name: Call the Hurricane
description: Massive waves spiral around you, with you as the eye of the hurricane.

name: Call Ursine Ally
description: Frequency once per hourYou can cast a 3rd-rank as an innate spell, but only to summon a .

name: Call Your Shot
description: When you successfully Play to the Crowd, add the following to the list of benefits you can choose from:Choose a creature within 30 feet that can see you to become Frightened 2.

name: Calm and Centered
description: Your occult connection to the world helps you deal with being or .

name: Can't You See?
prerequisites: trained in Occultism, expert in Stealth
description: The eye rebels, the mind recoils-no matter how much those who can see you try to explain what's there, their friends' gazes just skitter over you, like a bird afraid to land.

name: Capture Magic
description: Trigger You succeed at your save against a foe's harmful spell, or a foe fails a spell attack roll against you from a harmful spell.

name: Carried with the Swarm
description: When your swarm is sharing your space and Strides, you can choose to have your swarm carry you with it.

name: Chaining Mutation
description: The dart fired by your ostilli can ricochet to strike another creature.

name: Challenge Insight
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature you can see Casts a Spell that is from the divine or occult tradition.

name: Chaotic Spell
description: This is the secret of chaotic magic - your foe can hardly predict and counter your moves if you yourself have no idea what will happen.

name: Chronomancer's Secrets
description: The secrets of time peel back, revealing deeper truths.

name: Clinging Shadows Initiate
description: You learn a mystical stance that transforms your qi into sticky smoke that shrouds your limbs.

name: Clue Them All In
description: You can clue in all your allies at once.

name: Conductive Sphere
description: A floating metal ball forms in a space within 30 feet, flashing with electricity.

name: Constricting Hold
description: Requirements Your eidolon has a creature or .

name: Controlled Blast
prerequisites: Demolitionist Dedication, Calculated Splash, Directional Bombs, or Expanded Splash
description: You maximize the effectiveness of your explosives by controlling every possible parameter of the blast meticulously.

name: Cornered Animal
description: Requirements You are in animal or hybrid form and are flanked.

name: Counter Curse
description: Requirements You are in a curse maelstrom state.

name: Countercharm
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell from the enchantment or illusion school.

name: Creed Magic
description: You've expanded your divine capabilities, granting you magic that better supports your combat focus.

name: Cremate Undead
description: Your overwhelming vitality sets undead alight.

name: Crossblooded Evolution
description: Odd interactions in your bloodline provide you with unexpected effects.

name: Crosscurrent Counter
description: Trigger You become or by a creature.You counter the creature with the power of elemental water, a tendril of it encasing your limb or weapon.

name: Crude Communication
description: Even if you don't speak a creature's language, you can rely on inflection, root words, and body language to infer rudimentary meaning.

name: Cultivator's Keen Eye
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Attuned to all arrangements of qi, you gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

name: Cursed Effigy
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike against the target of your , and the Strike dealt physical damage.After your attack, you grab a bit of blood, cut hair, or other piece of the creature's body.

name: Cyclonic Ascent
description: Whorls of wind surround your lower body, forming a cyclone that lifts you into the air.

name: Dark Persona's Presence
description: Trigger You Unleash your Psyche.

name: Deadly Aim
description: You aim for your prey's weak spots, making your shot more challenging but dealing more damage if you hit.

name: Deadly Butterfly
description: You gain access to the butterfly sword's critical specialization effect.

name: Deadly Mutation
description: The dart fired by your ostilli is more dangerous.

name: Death from Above
description: Requirements You are standing, climbing, or balancing on a surface at least 10 feet above your target.

name: Debilitating Dichotomy
description: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

name: Deeper Dabbler
description: With some streamlining to your process and a deeper collection of talisman materials, you make a greater number of talismans every day.

name: Defensive Stratagem
description: By scrutinizing a foe, you learn how to better avoid its attacks.

name: Deimatic Display
description: Imitating animal threat displays, you make yourself appear larger and more imposing.

name: Delay Trap
description: Trigger A trap within your reach is triggered.

name: Disarming Assault
description: You attack with enough force to knock the weapon out of your foe's hands.

name: Disorienting Opening
description: You use your foes' openings to expose even greater weaknesses.

name: Distracting Toss
