description: You toss one weapon into the air as a distraction as you throw another.

name: Diverse Recognition
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, master in a skill used to Recall Knowledge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You successfully Recall Knowledge about a creature you can see, using a skill in which you are a master.

name: Divine Breadth
description: As your understanding increases, your god grants you more divine spells each day.

name: Divine Healing
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, expert in religion, worship a deity with a divine font that grants heal
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Although you aren't a proper champion of your faith, your deity still recognizes your efforts and provides you with a small divine ability to help others.

name: Dream Magic
description: You learn dream-related magic to aid your studies.

name: Drifting Pollen
description: A haze of pollen floats around you.

name: Drive Back
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger An enemy within your reach Strikes an ally adjacent to you.

name: Dual Finisher
description: Requirements You wield two melee weapons, one in each hand.

name: Dualistic Synergy
description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots, you gain a benefit.

name: Dueling Riposte
description: Trigger A creature within your reach critically fails a Strike against you.

name: Duo's Aim
description: With assistance from your spotter, you aim for an especially accurate attack.

name: Ears of the Forest
description: Beyond relying on your own senses, you keep an ear open for nearby creatures for help in exploring your surroundings.

name: Eclectic Skill
description: Your broad experiences translate to a range of skills.

name: Eerie Environs
prerequisites: trained in Intimidation, trained in Stealth
description: The natural world can be scary to those not used to it-and you make it scarier still.

name: Eerie Traces
prerequisites: trained in Intimidation, trained in Survival
description: The tracks you leave behind are strange, somehow disconcerting and unnerving-they might travel backward, or through places no one would think to pass through.

name: Efficient Rituals
description: You can perform particularly extensive rituals in less time.

name: Elaborate Talisman Esoterica
description: As you continue to collect talismanic esoterica, you improve your ability to create temporary talismans.

name: Elemental Overlap
description: Though you've dedicated yourself to one element, you learn to mix that element with another.

name: Elude the Divine
description: You are able to escape inquisitions involving divine magic, allowing you to blend in well in Mzali but also to avoid unwanted attention in other oppressive theocracies.

name: Emblazon Energy
description: With elemental forces, you make your emblazoned symbols more potent.

name: Enchanting Shot
description: With a single whisper carried on the wind, you enchant your ammunition to make a foe more vulnerable to your attacks.

name: Energy Resistance
description: Your eidolon has stronger resistance.

name: Enhanced Psychopomp Familiar
description: Your psychopomp's continued service in Pharasma's name brings it favor from the goddess.

name: Enlarge Companion
description: You make your companion enormous.

name: Environmental Adaptability
description: Having experienced the harshest environs that nature has to offer, your body is able to adapt to intense heat and cold.

name: Equitable Defense
description: Trigger You take damage from a critical hit.

name: Explosion of Power
description: Your magic explodes.

name: Exude Abyssal Corruption
prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication, your entity is a demon
description: Most of the changes from the demon within you have harmed you so far, but you've found a way to expel some of the corruption within you to poison others.

name: Familiar Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You can use your magic to transform into a small creature of a type that commonly serves as a spellcaster's familiar, potentially allowing you to safely scout for your party while retaining a degree of spellcasting ability.

name: Familiar Ritualist
prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication, ability to cast a ritual
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your familiar's magical presence can serve as an aspect of a ritual.

name: Feline Dance
description: Access catfolk ancestry Frequency once per hour Trigger You attempt a basic Reflex save.

name: Felling Strike
description: Your attack can ground an airborne foe.

name: Feral Mending
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, you were not afflicted with the curse of the werecreature
description: Requirements Your previous action was to Change Shape.You can heal your wounds while reshaping your flesh.

name: Ferocious Shape
description: You've mastered the shape of dinosaurs.

name: Fey Caller
description: You have learned some of the tricks the fey use to bend primal magic toward illusions and trickery.

name: Fey's Trickery
prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication, your entity is a fey
description: Frequency once per hour You connect with the fey trickster within yourself to create whimsical illusory duplicates that distract your foes.

name: Fiery Retort
description: Trigger An opponent adjacent to you hits you with a melee weapon or a melee unarmed attack.

name: Flamboyant Cruelty
description: You love to kick your enemies when they're down, and you look fabulous when you do.

name: Flashing Shield
prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication, you worship a good-aligned deity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger You use the Shield Block reaction, and the opponent that triggered the Shield Block is undead and adjacent to you.

name: Flashy Roll
description: You can use Flashy Dodge before attempting a Reflex save, in addition to its original trigger.

name: Flensing Slice
description: Requirements Your last action was a , and both attacks hit the target.

name: Flickering Stories
description: Stories, like fires, can create shadows as much as they illuminate.

name: Floral Restoration
description: Frequency once per dayYou request that nearby plants share their vitality with you to replenish your body and magic.

name: Follow-Up Assault
description: Requirements You used your previous action to make a melee Strike that missed.Even in the face of failure you press the attack, determined to succeed.

name: Foolproof Instructions
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You feel confident that you can explain your scrolls so well that even your allies can use them...

name: Forgotten Presence
description: The world conspires to keep you forgotten and unnoticed-memories cloud, ink stains out your name in ledgers, and portraits of you crack and warp over your face.

name: Form Retention
description: You have trained your mind and body to tolerate polymorph magic for longer periods of time, so long as you prepare for the change appropriately.

name: Fortified Flesh
description: Your flesh takes on the hardness of stone.

name: Fortissimo Composition
description: Your anthems grow louder and more potent, bolstered by your muse's power.

name: Friendly Toss
description: Requirements You are adjacent to an ally and have one or more hands free.You toss your friends around the battlefield.

name: Frozen Breadth
description: Your attunement to arcane cold enhances the depths of your growing power.

name: Furious Bully
description: You bully foes across the battlefield.

name: Fused Staff
description: When you prepare a staff, you can hold it up to a weapon to merge the two items.

name: Future Spell Learning
description: More future memories of time magic percolate back to the present, teaching you spells you've yet to learn.

name: Garden Path
description: You can guide your crop to move without notice.

name: Gardener's Resolve
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You roll a failure (but not a critical failure) on a Will save against a fear effect.The Gray Gardeners are known for having nerves of steel and an unbreakable resolve.

name: Ghost Flight
description: Frequency once per day You can suppress your tether to the ground, overcoming your resistance to fly free.

name: Gigaton Strike
description: When you use a full-power Megaton Strike, you can knock your foe back.

name: Glitter Crystals
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can mix a blend of crushed flowers and alchemical salt into an alchemical elixir with the healing trait or alchemical food.

name: Glyph Expert
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've learned to recognize the telltale writings and other signs that indicate the presence of magical traps.

name: Gods' Palm
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You control your spirit energy when you attack, using it to reinforce yourself or to thrust past your enemy's physical defenses.

name: Golden Dragon's Bounty
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your familiar alters the material of a spell into that of a precious metal.

name: Golden League Xun Dedication
description: You are a xun for the Golden League, aiding the organization.

name: Golem Grafter Dedication
prerequisites: expert in Arcana and Crafting, or an ally with expert proficiency in those skills willing to augment you
description: Your flesh has been specially treated with the same arcane and alchemical processes used to toughen the skin of flesh golems.

name: Grand Dance
description: Requirements You're in Masquerade of Seasons Stance.

name: Great Boaster
description: Your bragging is particularly effective.

name: Greater Cruelty
description: The extent of your corruption devastates your foes' minds and reflexes.

name: Greater Mercy
description: Your faith enhances your ability to remove conditions.

name: Greater Security
description: Shield in hand, you offer your ally its full protection you do yourself.

name: Greenwatch Veteran
description: Trigger Your turn starts, and you're in combat against a creature you spent at least 10 minutes Tracking.

name: Grievous Blow
description: You know how to deliver focused, powerful blows that bypass your enemies' resistances.

name: Grit and Tenacity
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You fail a Fortitude or Will save.

name: Guardian Ghosts
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You would take damage from a Strike while one of your undead companions is adjacent to you.

name: Guardian Lion Roar
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your innovation is augmented with plates shaped to resemble the gaping maws of guardian lions, which you can energize to expel a stream of sonic energy reminiscent of a lion's powerful roar.

name: Guardian's Embrace
description: Requirements You are adjacent to your spirit guide or it is sharing your space.

name: Hamstringing Strike
description: You slow your foes with a well-aimed attack.

name: Harbinger's Armament
description: Your deity grants you extra power that you have learned to channel into your weapons.

name: Hazard Finder
description: You have an intuitive ability to sense hazards.

name: Heal Mount
description: Your devotion to your mount manifests as a surge of vital energy.

name: Heightened Captivation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You can infuse your enchantments and illusions with more power.

name: Helt's Spelldance
description: Ranik Helt knows a special technique to hide his spells as part of a performance, and you've learned this technique.

name: Hot Foot
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.Using a carefully aimed shot, you make a creature "dance." You shoot at the ground near a target's feet, causing them to react involuntarily; even mindless creatures have unconscious responses to dodge an attack, and you can capitalize off those uncontro

name: Hulking Size
description: Your eidolon grows substantially.

name: Ilverani Purist
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: All twilight speakers are trained to resist the alluring customs of younger peoples, but you have made it your mandate to keep the Ilverani way unchanged.

name: Impassable Wall Stance
description: You refuse to let foes past your guard.

name: Impenetrable Fog
description: Fog condenses in a chaotic, swirling pattern, thick enough that it seems to push back against you.

name: Impervious Vehicle
description: From armor plating and flexible components, to reinforced materials and backup redundant functionality, you have built safeguards to protect your vehicle from the rigors of combat.

name: Improved Command Corpse
description: When you use on a mindless undead, if the undead succeeds at its save but doesn't critically succeed, it becomes your minion for 1 round.

name: Improved Elemental Blast
description: The power of your elemental blast improves.

name: Improved Invigorating Elixir
description: Choose physical invigoration or mental invigoration, and add the listed conditions to those you can choose for an invigorating elixir you create to counteract: Physical Invigoration , , , , Mental Invigoration , controlled, , , , .Special You can select this feat a second time to choose a different

name: Improved Poison Weapon
description: You deliver poisons in ways that maximize their harmful effects.

name: Improvised Crafting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've learned to repair your equipment even in challenging circumstances, making use of what you have available.

name: Improvised Critical
description: You can apply critical specialization effects to improvised weapons you wield.

name: Incredible Aim
description: By spending a moment to focus, you can ensure your attack strikes true.

name: Incredible Beastmaster Companion
description: Your mature animal companions continue to grow and develop.

name: Incredible Companion (Druid)
description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

name: Incredible Construct Companion
description: Thanks to your continual tinkering, your construct companion has advanced to an astounding new stage of engineering, enhancing all its attributes.

name: Incredible Familiar
description: Thaumaturge By taking the best parts of each magical tradition, you've found a way to grant your familiar even more abilities than other familiars.

name: Incredible Megafauna Companion
description: Under your care and training, your megafauna companion has realized its innate potential.

name: Incredible Mount
description: Under your care and training, your mount has realized its innate potential.

name: Incredible Reanimated Companion
description: You imbue the necrotized flesh of your reanimated construct companion with strange chemicals and fine-tune the clockwork within, enhancing all its capabilities.

name: Innate Magical Intuition
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've spent countless hours learning to recognize and predict a creature's innate magical abilities.

name: Insistent Command
prerequisites: master in Nature, Animal Trainer Dedication
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: When you roll a success to Command an Animal, you get a critical success; if you roll a critical failure, you get a failure.

name: Inspired Stratagem
description: During your daily preparations, you can review stratagems for the day's adventures with up to five allies.

name: Instinctive Maneuvers
description: When you allow an apparition control over your body, it might vent its fury against your foes.

name: Instinctive Strike
description: You trust your instincts and your sense of smell, using all your senses to pinpoint your opponent's location.

name: Interrupt Charge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger A foe within reach attempts to move away from you.

name: Into the Fray
description: Requirements You are wielding a one-handed melee weapon in one hand and a shield in another hand.You charge into battle with shield-splintering fury.

name: Invoke Defense
description: Requirements You're under the effects of .You manifest a defensive quality of spirits all around, such as the thick hide of an animal spirit or the sturdy bark of a nature spirit.

name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
description: You can invoke the Crimson Oath to unleash blasts of ruby energy from your weapon.

name: Invulnerable Rager
description: Even the heaviest armors serve only to enhance your unbridled fury.

name: Ironblood Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored You enter the stance of impenetrable iron, refusing to yield to any blow.

name: Jellyfish Stance
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover Compilation
description: Requirements You are unarmored.

name: Jumping Jenny Display
description: This multi-sequence rocket blasts confetti at a series of altitudes.

name: Kaiju Stance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access You've encountered a kaiju and survived.

name: Kaleidoscopic Entreaty
description: If your next action is to cast , you can cause that spirit to unleash a brilliant display of color, light, and sound in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] centered on you.

name: Kindle Inner Flames
description: As a candle can light another, you awaken the latent potential to channel fire in other creatures.

name: Knight's Retaliation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger An undead creature within your reach critically fails a Strike against you.

name: Know Your Enemy
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in .You aim to turn knowledge into power against your foes.

name: Know-It-All
description: Bard - When you succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge, you gain additional information or context.

name: Knowledge is Power (Wizard)
description: Your academic knowledge about a creature allows you to subtly alter your magic to defeat them.

name: Larcenous Hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can remove its duration, modify its range to 20 feet, and modify its target to be an attended object within the spell's Bulk limit that wouldn't be time-consuming to remove.

name: Leap and Fire
description: You're quick enough to line up a shot even while diving to the ground.

name: Lethargy Poisoner
prerequisites: Drow Shootist Dedication, trained in Crafting
description: You've learned more than the use of from drow lore.

name: Levered Swing
prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication, master in Athletics
description: You can wrap your lash around a tree branch or railing, then pull yourself where you need to go.

name: Levering Strike
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are wielding your staff.

name: Lightning Rings' Intervention
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your familiar learns to empower spells with an electrical discharge.

name: Lingering Flames
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast fireball
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its effects, decreasing the base damage to 5d6 and causing it to deal 2 persistent fire damage to creatures that fail their save, doubled as normal on a critical failure.

name: Lion's Fury
description: You gain access to the Lion Scythe's and Sun Sling's critical specialization effects.

name: Live Ammunition
description: There are generally few things as ill-advised as being shot out of a cannon or launched by a trebuchet, but people use the tactic every so often in a desperate situation.

name: Living for the Applause
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points (but not immediately killed) during a combat encounter that has spectators.

name: Loaner Spell
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: During your daily preparations, you can gain the assistance of an allied prepared spellcaster to prepare one spell for the day.

name: Lobbed Attack
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are Juggling a thrown weapon.

name: Lore Seeker
description: You see what others don't, and you've developed magical tricks to find hidden truth.

name: Lorefinder
description: You know that fate sometimes conspires to keep dangerous knowledge or items from the eyes of those most able to understand them.

name: Magic Ammunition
description: You imbue your ammunition with raw and potent magic, transforming it to suit your needs in any situation.

name: Magic Finder
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've learned a few tricks to ensure you find every last magic item and interesting magical effect during your missions.

name: Magical Adept
description: Your eidolon gains more magic.

name: Magical Knowledge
prerequisites: Thaumaturge Dedication, trained in one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion, expert in another
description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion from expert to master and in another from trained to expert.

name: Majestic Proclamation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in your sentinel form.You announce your name to your enemies, bringing your constellation to bear in a blinding display.

name: Makeshift Strike
description: You quickly snatch up whatever is nearby and then attack with it as an improvised weapon.

name: Malleable Mental Forge
description: You open your mind to further weapon customization.

name: Manifold Modifications
description: You've modified your innovation using clever workarounds, so you can include another initial modification without compromising its structure.

name: Mantis Form
description: You gain the focus spell.

name: Many Guises (Vigilante)
description: You can take on any number of mundane guises.

name: Martyr
description: You go to extreme lengths to support your allies, even when it means bringing harm to yourself.

name: Masked Casting
description: Requirements You are wearing your signifer's mask.

name: Mental Static
description: Trigger You roll a critical success on a Will save against a mental effect from a creature.

name: Metabolize Element
description: Trigger You take damage from a foe's spell or magical ability with a trait of one of the elements in your elemental philosophy.

name: Mind Projectiles
description: You have learned to stretch your mind's influence further, releasing projectiles with a swing of your mind weapon.

name: Miniaturize
description: Your eidolon can shrink even further.

name: Minor Omen
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a Reflex save.

name: Mixed Maneuver
description: You leverage your knowledge of martial arts to mix different maneuvers together into a single flowing combination.

name: Mobile Shot Stance
description: Your shots become nimble and deadly.

name: Monk Moves
description: You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed when you're not wearing armor.

name: Monumental Maestro
description: You've studied the moving compositions of Andreas Romung, a legendary maestro whose Shining Crusade anthems live on in the music for the play Echoes of Glory.

name: Murksight
description: Your vision pierces through non-magical fog, mist, rain, and snow.

name: Mutable Familiar
description: Your familiar's supernatural spirit has outgrown its corporeal body.

name: Mutant Physique
description: Basic mutagens that affect your physical form can bring out the beast within you, turn you nigh invincible, or make your body more elastic.

name: Mysterious Breadth
description: Increase the spell slots you gain from oracle archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest spell ranks.

name: Necromantic Bulwark
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Regular exposure to necromantic effects left you better able to defend against them.

name: Necromantic Tenacity
description: Your training against necromantic effects allows you to escape the worst of their touch.

name: Nimble Roll
description: You throw yourself into a roll to escape imminent danger.

name: Occult Breadth
description: Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more occult spells each day.

name: Ooze Empathy
prerequisites: Oozemorph Dedication, at least two other class feats from the Oozemorph archetype
description: You can connect with oozes (and other amorphous aberrations, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level.

name: Opportune Backstab
description: Trigger A creature within your melee reach is hit by a melee attack from one of your allies.

name: Opportunistic Grapple
description: Trigger Your prey critically fails on an attack roll against you with a melee Strike.

name: Order Training
description: You gain the lesser order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

name: Ore Fists
description: When you enter the Stonestrike Stance, your fists appear to be covered with veins of unrefined ore.

name: Ouroboric Pact
description: You've studied pacts at Cobyslarni, or learned under someone who has, and understand them to not only create a bargain between individuals, but a separate entity altogether: the pact itself.

name: Out of Hand
description: Even when your limbs are severed, they remain a part of you.

name: Overdrive Ally
description: Requirements You are currently in overdrive.

name: Pack Movement
description: You and your companion move to take down a common enemy.

name: Pact of Infernal Prowess
description: You've sworn a pact with devils, granting you success in life in exchange for your soul in the afterlife.

name: Palatine Strike
description: Your strikes are particularly deadly against supernatural creatures.

name: Paralyzing Slash
description: Your enzymes can paralyze your foes rather than merely making it harder for them to heal their wounds.

name: Patron's Breadth
description: You can cast more spells each day.

name: Peer Beyond
description: You have uncanny insight into the way ghosts and haunts manifest, manipulate the mind, and rejuvenate.

name: Perfect Resistance
description: You gain resistance equal to half your level to all damage from effects with the appropriate trait for your School of Perfection: fire for Unblinking Flame, water for Unbreaking Waves, air for Unfolding Wind, and earth for Untwisting Iron.

name: Perpetual Breadth
description: You have expanded your supply of near-infinite items.

name: Persistent Creation
description: You can cast as an innate spell at will, choosing whether it is arcane or primal each time.

name: Phalanx Formation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You know how to clear a line of fire for your allies.

name: Physical Training
prerequisites: Swordmaster Dedication, expert in Athletics, expert in Acrobatics
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You spend a lot of time focusing on your physical fitness.

name: Piercing Doom
description: Requirements You are Doomed 2 or greater.You have grown accustomed to the curse that comes with your blessing, able to channel its effects through your attacks and forestall your own demise.

name: Pinning Fire
description: Trigger You use to make two ranged piercing weapon Strikes against the same target.

name: Pinpoint Poisoner
description: Unsuspecting targets are especially vulnerable to your poisons.

name: Pluck from the Sky
description: Access tengu, strix, or awakened animal (flying animal) ancestryThe skies are your rightful place, and you will not suffer another to occupy them.

name: Positioning Assault
description: Requirements You are wielding a two-handed melee weapon and your target is within your reach.

name: Positive Luminance
description: You learn how to create a luminous reservoir of vitality energy that you can use to punish undead who dare attack you.

name: Powerful Snares
description: Your snares are particularly difficult for enemies to avoid.

name: Practiced Guidance
description: Making one's way to safety can be harrowing, but you have extensive practice at helping others along that path.

name: Precious Ammunition
description: You have learned to mimic the power that lies between magic and material.

name: Predictive Purchase (Rogue)
description: You somehow manage to have just the thing for the situation.

name: Preventative Treatment
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You provide preventative remedies and care to help your patient fight off future maladies.

name: Primal Breadth
description: Increase the spell slots you gain from druid archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest druid spell slots.

name: Primal Howl
description: Your companion can let out a howl laced with your primal magic.

name: Projectile Snatching
description: You pluck missiles from the air and hurl them back at their source.

name: Protect Ally
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You place your body between your friends and your enemies, protecting your allies against oncoming attacks.

name: Protective Pose
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin Requirements You and your eidolon are within 30 feet of one another.Many physical poses can fortify one's health, but some poses need more than one body to accomplish.

name: Public Execution
description: Requirements You have designated a mark using .

name: Purify Element
description: You turn an element into its purest form.

name: Pushing Wind
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding a fan.As you spin and glide your fans alongside your allies, you kick up a mild wind that gently carries you all forward.

name: Quick Positioning
description: Requirements You could see your hunted prey when you rolled initiative at the beginning of the encounter, and this is your first action on your first turn of the encounter.

name: Quick Shield Block
description: You can bring your shield into place with hardly a thought.

name: Quick Stow (Swordmaster)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You know that situations can change rapidly and might leave you needing to change equipment in the middle of combat.

name: Raise Island
prerequisites: born of the bones of the earth or restless as the tide
description: Frequency once per hourYou churn the sea and fish up stone so your enemies together can receive their punishment.

name: Raise Menhir
description: Frequency once per hour You raise a druidic monument, such as a standing stone or warding tree, from the ground, creating a powerful primal ward that blocks other types of magic.

name: Read Disaster
description: You spend 10 minutes and open yourself to the divine mysteries of the world, peering into the most sinister portents of the future.

name: Reading the Signs
description: You have a knack for drawing the right card, be it from a harrow deck, in a game of cards, or even when drawing from a .

name: Recognize Threat
prerequisites: master in a Recall Knowledge skill, Pathfinder Agent Dedication
description: Requirements You have master proficiency in a skill to identify the triggering creature.

name: Recycled Cogwheels
description: You're able to scavenge the cogwheels from your daily quick-deploy snares that use gears.

name: Reflexive Courage
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses an auditory effect, manipulate action, or move action; makes a ranged attack; or leaves a square during its move action.

name: Reflexive Grip
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You keep hold of your weapons even when knocked out.

name: Rejoice in Solstice Storm
prerequisites: whose cry is thunder or dancer in the seasons
description: Frequency once per hourYou hold your arms out, and the fury of the seasons comes to your jubilant embrace.

name: Reminder of the Greater Fear
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger Another creature within 30 feet of you that can see you would gain the condition.

name: Remove Presence
description: Your spell reaches into the mind of a creature and removes you from it.

name: Renewed Vigor
description: Through the haze of battle, you quickly recover your raging vigor.

name: Resounding Bravery
description: Even your fears serve as fuel for your fighting spirit.

name: Restorative Channel
description: You can remove conditions with divine grace.

name: Retaliatory Cleansing
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger You would take damage from an adjacent creature's Strike.

name: Retch Rust
description: You exhale tendrils formed from flakes of rusted metal.

name: Reversing Charge
description: You dive into the fray before rewinding yourself to safety.

name: Ricochet Stance (Rogue)
description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

name: Rippling Spin
description: Trigger You're hit by a physical melee attack by an attacker you can see that's in reach.

name: Rivethun Devotion
description: Through study, dedication, and introspection, you've learned to wield magic that affects the spirit.

name: Rule of Three
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: Requirements You have Spun a Tale.

name: Runic Impression
description: You can temporarily replicate the effects of a property rune for your weapon or unarmed attacks.

name: Running Tackle
description: You charge, throwing your body at your foe in a vicious tackle.

name: Rupture Stomp
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You are in Tenacious Stance.

name: Sacrifice Armor
description: Trigger You are hit by a Strike that deals physical damage.

name: Safeguard Soul
description: You've girded your soul against outside interference.

name: Sanctify Armament
description: You touch a weapon and bring it into concordance with your deity.

name: Sanguivolent Roots
description: Blood-drinking vines grow from the ground in a @Template[burst|distance:15] within 120 feet.

name: Scarecrow
description: You fight fiercely to protect your crop.

name: Scattered Fire
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast fireball
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its area to be two non-overlapping 10-foot bursts.

name: Scattering in Spring
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An enemy within your reach targets you with a melee attack, and you're aware of the attack.

name: Scholar's Hunch
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You fail a Lore or Occultism skill check.

name: Second Blessing
description: Your inner grace attracts the attention of a second protective spirit.

name: Selfless Parry
description: You protect those near to you with a flash of steel and a stroke of good luck.

name: Sense Chaos
description: You sense chaos as an unsettling feeling of nervous energy.

name: Sense Holiness
description: The presence of goodness sickens you with its saccharine self-righteousness.

name: Sense Unholiness
description: You sense the truly wicked as a queasy or foreboding feeling.

name: Shadow Spell
description: You attach a piece of your shadow to a spell to cloud the senses and cause mischief.

name: Shadowdancer Dedication
prerequisites: master in Stealth, expert in Performance
description: You dedicate yourself to the shadows.

name: Shamble
description: You may be slower than you were in life, but your pace is unfaltering.

name: Share Rage
description: Requirements You haven't used this ability since you last Raged.You stoke an ally's fury.

name: Sheltering Pulse
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You thrust your hand or weapon into the ground and release a pulse that creates a sheltering nexus of energy for you and your allies.

name: Shoving Sweep
description: Trigger An enemy within your reach leaves a square during a move action it's using.

name: Show-Off
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You succeed at an Acrobatics or Athletics check deemed suitably challenging and meaningful by the GM.As is the tradition with many Firebrands, you call your shot and look to impress with an extra bit of panache or a greater stunt.

name: Sickening Bite
description: Your saliva causes severe nausea and mild fever in the living, weakening them so that you can more easily finish them off.

name: Sidestep
description: Trigger The attack roll for a Strike targeting you fails or critically fails.You deftly step aside and gently redirect an attack.

name: Silence the Profane
description: Trigger A creature you can observe within reach of your deity's favored weapon casts a spell.

name: Sin Reservoir
description: During your daily preparations, you can indulge in your associated sin or meditate on its values (and risks).

name: Siphoning Touch
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast vampiric touch
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of gaining the temporary Hit Points yourself, you can grant the temporary Hit Points to an ally within 30 feet.

name: Skill Mastery (Investigator)
prerequisites: Investigator Dedication, trained in at least one skill and expert in at least one skill
description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.

name: Skill Mastery (Rogue)
prerequisites: Rogue Dedication, trained in at least one skill and expert in at least one skill
description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.

name: Skim Scroll
description: You can activate the magic of a scroll with a cursory read as you draw it from your belt.

name: Skyseeker
description: Requirements You're in Sky and Heaven Stance.

name: Slayer's Blessing
description: You carry scraps of materials dangerous to undead and can apply them to your weapon.

name: Slurp Up
prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication, unarmed attack with your tongue
description: Your tongue darts out in search of refreshment.

name: Sly Striker
description: Your attacks deal more damage, even against creatures that aren't .

name: Smoke Curtain
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm and are wearing or holding a dose of black powder.

name: Smoldering Explosion
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast fireball
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast heightened to at least 4th rank, you can modify the spell to add the following to its standard effects: Your fireball leaves behind a brief cloud of smoke in its area.

name: Snakebird's Shadow
description: Requirements You are in Waterfowl Stance and are wielding a monk weapon from the sword group.Ganhil developed this technique through observing the sharp-beaked darters fishing Prada Hanam's waters, seeking to match their speed and suppleness with the elemental flash of his blade.

name: Snap Out of It! (Pathfinder Agent)
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, master in Medicine
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Pathfinders are trained to help each other be safe and successful, and you know how to jolt your allies back to their senses.

name: Soaring Shape
description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

name: Solar Detonation
description: Blinding flames explode in a swirling sphere!

name: Songbird's Call
description: You call to the wilds with the voice of a songbird, thereby summoning a cloud of its kin.

name: Soulsight (Bard)
description: Your muse has opened your senses to the world beyond.

name: Soulsight (Sorcerer)
prerequisites: bloodline that grants divine or occult spells
description: The spiritual essence in your blood has opened your senses to the world beyond.

name: Spell Swipe
description: Requirements Your Spellstrike is charged.

name: Spelldrinker
description: Requirements Your last action was to Harvest Blood.

name: Spike Skin
description: You touch a willing creature, causing its skin to harden and form spiky protrusions.

name: Spirit Familiar (Witch)
description: Your familiar can subsume its body to become pure spirit.

name: Spirit Walk
description: Your allied apparitions ward you against the predations of their restless peers.

name: Spirit's Anguish
description: Cost 1 spirit wisp or spirit remnant from your spirit dwelling Requirements You are holding your spirit dwelling.You purify a spirit by coaxing it to release its anguish in a final cathartic howl.

name: Sportlebore Choke
description: Requirements Your swarm is outside your body.Like nefarious sportlebores, a species of insect that plague adventurers by hiding in their rations as counterfeit food, your swarm can crawl down throats.

name: Stab and Blast
description: Requirements You're wielding a firearm with an attached bayonet or reinforced stock, a fire lance, or a combination weapon.You slice or smash your opponent with the melee portion of your weapon before pulling the trigger at point-blank range.

name: Stalwart Mind
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a Will save.

name: Standby Spell
description: You've honed one spell as your favored combat technique, and you've practiced it enough that you no longer need to prepare it to cast it.

name: Stasian Charge
description: Charging a living body with electricity may seem like a bad idea, but you know better.

name: Stasian Smash
description: Access You are from Ustalav.You've modified your dynamo with Stasian coils, allowing you to make a powerful attack that crackles with electricity.

name: Statement Strut
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You have an eye for fashion and know how to sell attitude and confidence with your walk.

name: Statue
description: Your body and equipment appear to be made of stone as you hold perfectly still.

name: Steal Vitality
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast vampiric feast
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of gaining temporary Hit Points, if your target fails or critically fails its saving throw, you can attempt a counteract check to remove the Clumsy 1 or Enfeebled 1 conditions on yourself, using the source of that condition to d

name: Sticky Bomb
description: You can mix in a sticky additive to an alchemical bomb to make its contents adhere and continue to deal damage.

name: Stitched Familiar
description: Your familiar can shed its material form, becoming a mass of animated magic.

name: Storm Shroud
description: Frequency once per hour You become surrounded by a swirling storm of rain, sand, snow, or clouds, whichever of those suits your bound terrain.

name: Storm Spiral
description: Dark thunderclouds swirl in a miniature storm, crisscrossed with lightning bolts; a tremendous thunderclap fills the air.

name: Strangle
description: Requirements You have a creature or .

name: Stunning Finisher
description: You attempt a dizzying blow.

name: Submission Hold
description: Requirements You have a creature or .Your iron grip saps your opponent's strength.

name: Subtle Shank
description: Access Help either the Washboard Dogs or the Diobel Sweepers destroy their rival.

name: Sudden Leap
description: Barbarian You swing at a foe while mid-leap.

name: Superimpose Time Duplicates
description: Frequency once per hour You call alternate versions of yourself, either from a different timeline or perhaps yourself from a different point in your current timeline, to aid you in combat.

name: Supreme Psychic Center
description: Trigger Your turn in a psychic duel begins.

name: Surging Focus
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An ally you can see falls to 0 Hit Points.

name: Surging Might
description: You focus the power of your spell to overcome enemies' resistances.

name: Surreptitious Spellcaster
description: You've learned that it pays for a Pathfinder to be able to cast spells without being noticed.

name: Survivor of Desolation
description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against unnatural weather events or environmental hazards occurring in blighted or otherwise unnaturally marred regions.

name: Swap Reflections
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You've learned how to use even your reflection to your advantage.

name: Swashbuckler's Speed
description: You move faster, with or without Panache.

name: Swim Through Earth
description: The earth parts before you, letting you swim through it.

name: Swipe Souvenir
description: Requirements You're or by a creature.

name: Syu Tak-nwa's Hexed Locks
description: Your hair unarmed attack gains the reach trait.

name: Tactical Entry
description: Requirements You rolled Stealth for initiative in this encounter, and neither you nor any enemies have acted yet.

name: Tail Guard
prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication, unarmed attack with your tail
description: Trigger A creature enters a square that would flank you.

name: Tangled Forest Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored You extend your arms like gnarled branches to interfere with your foes' movements.

name: Tear Tendons
description: Requirements You are in claw stance and have two open hands.

name: Terrain Master
description: You are able to adapt to your surroundings in any natural terrain.

name: Terrifying Transformation
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, you were afflicted with the curse of the werecreature
description: Your flesh tears and warps as you transform.

name: The Harder They Fall (Kingmaker)
description: You know how to make a larger creature hurt when it falls to the ground.

name: Thoughtsense
description: You can detect the flickers of mental activity let off by all thinking creatures.

name: Thrash
description: Requirements You have an enemy or .You thrash your foe around.

name: Thunderclap Spell
description: Your lightning splits the air, generating a booming shock wave.

name: To Battle!
description: With a resounding cry, you rally your ally to take the offensive.

name: Topple Giants
description: When you observe an ally try and fail to execute a strategic maneuver against your enemies, you coordinate with your other allies to finish the job, using the opening from the first attempt to keep your foe off-balance and ensure your eventual success.

name: Transcribe Moment
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You gain the focus spell.

name: Transfusion
description: Cost 5 or more sanguimancy Hit PointsYou bring forth the regenerative properties of blood on behalf of an ally or yourself.

name: Tumbling Strike
description: Requirements You are adjacent to an enemy.You deftly dive through a gap left by a foe to deliver an advantageous blow.

name: Twirling Strike
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding a fan.Your fans, one raised up alongside your head and the other alongside your hip, become a blur as you twirl across the battlefield.

name: Ubiquitous Gadgets
description: They thought you had used up all your devices, but they thought wrong!

name: Unbelievable Luck
description: While no one, not even you, might appear to understand why, you demonstrate a greater ability to hit your targets regardless of the obstacles in your way.

name: Unfazed Assessment
prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication, expert in Perception
description: You have witnessed hundreds of fighting styles and quickly adapt to defend against complicated maneuvers.

name: Unkillable
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You would be reduced to 0 HP.

name: Unravel Mysteries
prerequisites: master in a Decipher Writing skill, Scrollmaster Dedication
description: You can understand the true meaning of texts quickly, and even when you get lost or hit a dead end, you aren't discouraged from making further attempts to get to the bottom of things.

name: Unseen Passage
description: Frequency once per day You have mastered a magical technique for moving through dangerous woodlands unseen.

name: Unshakable Idealism
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant, expert in Will saves
description: Your faith and hope can't be shaken, and you won't flee when lives are at stake.

name: Unshaken in Iron
description: You know the precise limits of your armor, and trust it to save you from harm.

name: Vantage Shot
description: You and your spotter take advantage of each other's attacks to momentarily hide and throw your foes off-balance against your follow-up attack.

name: Vicious Fangs
description: You aim for your victim's prominent arteries.

name: Viking Vindicator
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You are one of the raiders eagerly planning to launch an assault by sea on the Whispering Tyrant's Isle of Terror.

name: Vivacious Bravado
description: Requirements You gained Panache this turn.

name: Void Siphon
description: The raw energy of the Void saps the essence of the living.

name: Wake to Strife
description: Requirements A creature within your reach is or swimming.You summon the explosive power of a geyser beneath a foe.

name: Waking Dream
description: While in your trance, you can blur the line between dreams and reality for others.

name: Walk the Plank
description: You frighten a foe into moving where you want them, traditionally demanding they walk the plank.

name: Wall Run
description: You defy gravity, traversing vertical planes as easily as the ground.

name: Warden's Boon
description: You point out vulnerabilities present in your hunted prey, granting the benefits listed in and your hunter's edge to an ally until the end of their next turn.

name: Warped Constriction
prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication, your entity is an aberration or outer entity
description: Requirements You have a foe or .The entity inhabiting your body is an aberrant being with unfathomable motivations, and when you hold a foe close, tendrils and tentacles unfurl from your body to crush your foe and pollute it with alien wrongness.

name: Watcher on the Wall
description: You claim a patron's symbol that you can etch onto any surface.

name: Water Walker
description: When in the throes of your curse, your steps take on a supernatural buoyancy.

name: Wayfinder Resonance Infiltrator
prerequisites: Pathfinder Agent Dedication, Wayfinder Resonance Tinkerer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You are adept at using the unusual resonance of your wayfinder to aid in any deceptions you might employ.

name: What Could Have Been
description: Rather than conjuring creatures from elsewhere in the world or the planes, you can temporarily pull a much different version of yourself from an alternate timeline-for instance, instead of summoning a generic or random troll with , you summon a troll version of yourself from a timeline where you're

name: Whirlpool's Pull
description: You briefly conjure a tendril of water that allows you to grab an improvised weapon and then subsume that water to power your magic.

name: Whispering Steps
description: Your spell leaves a lingering connection between you and a creature-one through which you can nudge the creature's mind this way or that.

name: Whodunnit?
description: Frequency once per dayYou carefully consider your case and narrow down some of the details.

name: Wild Winds Initiate
description: You learn a stance that lets you attack from a distance.

name: Wind Caller
description: You bid the winds to aid you, carrying you through the air and allowing you passage through the strongest headwinds.

name: Wind Seeker
description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

name: Wing Shove
description: Requirements You're flanked by at least two enemies.

name: Witch's Bottle
description: You spend 10 minutes and 1 Focus Point brewing a special potion containing the power of one of your hexes that targets a creature.

name: Work Yourself Up
description: Requirements You have a reaction available and aren't prevented from using .

name: World-Wise Vigilance
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: Your keen study of other cultures gives you insights into the ways those cultures fight.

name: Worm Empathy
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You can connect with cave worms (and other worm-related creatures, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level.

name: Wrath of the Hold
description: Your tattoos carry the strength of an innumerable horde, and you can expend one use of your storied skin's Living History ability to animate your tattoos as ghostly assailants that swarm your foes.

name: You Don't Smell Right
description: You can sniff out fellow werecreatures and master impersonators alike.

name: Zealous Rush
description: Trigger You cast a divine spell that takes 1 action or more to cast and that affects only you or your equipment.

name: Abjure the False Kin
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your vow reminds you that there can be brackish vinegar hiding within honeyed words, helping you detect attempts to influence your mind.

name: Aboleth Transmutation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You have tapped into the ancient magic used by alghollthu masters (also known as aboleths) to mold the flesh of your ancestors.

name: Absorb Toxin
prerequisites: You are not immune to diseases or poisons
description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a disease or poison effect that affects an area.Your skin readily absorbs poison and can consciously draw toxins into your body to spare others.

name: Accursed Claws
description: Your claws carry your mother's hag magic.

name: Agathion Magic
description: The harmonious magic of Nirvana flows through you.

name: Aggravating Scratch
description: Your claws carry an irritant that is harmless to you but can be damaging to others.

name: Alluring Performance
description: Frequency once per day You command the attention of those around you with an elegant display.

name: Ambush Hunter
description: You are always searching for the perfect opportunity to ambush your enemies.

name: Analyze Information
description: You can stoke your mind into a burst of analytical prowess.

name: Anarchic Arcana
description: The magic in your blood is unpredictable.

name: Ancestral Form
prerequisites: bakuwa lizardfolk heritage or makari lizardfolk heritage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Casting your memory back deep into the past, you take the form of an ancestral guardian.

name: Ancestral Healer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Following the traditions of those who came before you, you've learned how to banish effects that cloud the mind, body, and spirit.

name: Ancillary Motes
description: You can use Crystalline Dust one more time per day.

name: Animal Magic
description: Your shapeshifting grants you a magical connection to the animal world.

name: Animal Summoner
description: The connection between you and primal magic deepens.

name: Arcane Camouflage
description: You have developed magical techniques to aid you with stalking your prey.

name: Arcane Propulsion
description: Frequency once per dayYou redirect energy from your core to ports on your back or feet, allowing you to fly for a short time.

name: Arcane Slam
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You channel magical power from your core into your arm, empowering your attack as you attempt to slam your foe into the ground.

name: Asura Magic
description: You can cast and once per day each as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

name: Azarketi Purification
description: You can cast as a primal innate spell, but only on liquids.

name: Bark and Tendril
description: You wield primal magic.

name: Battleforger
description: You can sharpen weapons, polish armor, and apply special techniques to temporarily gain better effects from your armaments.

name: Between the Scales
description: You've learned to take advantage of slips in your foes' defenses.

name: Big Mouth
description: Instead of storing up to four items of Light Bulk in your cheek pouches, you can store up to 1 Bulk worth of items.

name: Blood Must Have Blood
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You tap into a bottomless hunger for carnage.

name: Bloodletting Fangs
description: You emulate your vampiric parent's techniques for drawing blood from a victim.

name: Bone Caller
description: Using a mixture of dinosaur bones and the bones of your ancestors to focus your magic, you animate lizards and dinosaurs to carry messages or serve as mounts.

name: Bone Missile
description: You can remove your ribs to use them as arrows or bolts.

name: Breath Like Honey
description: You smell of honey and savory things.

name: Briar Battler
description: When you're in difficult terrain from an environmental feature, you can , even if the feature wouldn't ordinarily be large enough for you to Take Cover.

name: Brightness Seeker
description: Once per day, you can spend 10 minutes studying your surroundings in search of omens related to a particular course of action to cast as an innate divine spell.

name: Brilliant Vision
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You ignore concealment from clouds, dust, fog, mist, smoke, and similarly loose matter.

name: Call of Elysium
description: The wild wonder of Elysium harmonizes within you, and in dire straits, you can share its benefits with your allies.

name: Cantorian Rejuvenation
description: Frequency once per dayThe life-giving energy that flows in your blood revitalizes you.

name: Captivating Curiosity
description: You can snare the attentions of onlookers with your unique appearance.

name: Catrina's Presence
description: You've adopted the calming presence of catrinas, the festive dead; you might have even danced with a catrina yourself!

name: Cautious Curiosity
prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat
description: You've learned a few magical techniques for getting yourself both into and out of trouble unnoticed.

name: Cave Climber
description: After years of clambering through caverns, you can climb easily anywhere you go.

name: Celestial Magic
prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials
description: You possess celestial magic.

name: Ceremony of Aeon's Guidance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your patron aeon has allowed you to call upon their gifts to serve their ends.

name: Ceremony of Aeon's Shield
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your patron aeon graced you with powers of protection.

name: Ceremony of Fortification
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your exoskeleton arranges itself into an optimal defensive shape.

name: Ceremony of Strengthened Hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your exoskeleton's weapons are even more potent.

name: Charred Remains
description: Frequency once per day Your next fire spell leaves embers in its wake.

name: Cling
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike and you have a free hand.

name: Close Quarters
description: If you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small or smaller ally.

name: Coating of Slime
description: An acidic ooze coats your limbs.

name: Constant Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your eyes keep a continual watch for dangers from all sides.

name: Consume Magic
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You attempt a saving throw against an area effect from the tradition matching your magiphage ability.

name: Cooperative Soul
description: You have developed a soul-deep bond with your comrades and maintain an even greater degree of cooperation with them.

name: Coral Detoxification
description: Frequency once per hour The coral colony that you've tended has merged with your kidneys to add an additional layer of filtration.

name: Core Attunement
description: Your core allows you to draw more power from it.

name: Cunning Climber
description: Whether you are climbing a ship's rigging, a jungle tree, or a clock tower, you have an uncanny knack for finding footholds and handholds where larger creatures can't.

name: Dance of the Tiger
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Tales tell of the Tiger stalking the Mousedeer for days, hidden and instilling dread upon its prey.

name: Dance Underfoot
description: You dart under the legs of your enemies in combat.

name: Dangle
description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

name: Dangle (Vanara)
description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

name: Death's Drums
description: Your life has been spent challenging death itself, and proximity to that implacable foe only makes your heart beat harder.

name: Defensive Instincts
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Requirements you are adjacent to at least two enemies Your body tenses up when surrounded, putting you on edge just enough to anticipate an attack.

name: Demolitionist
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You know how to destroy objects with a well-placed explosion.

name: Demon Hunter
prerequisites: expert in Religion or Demon Lore
description: The demons of Tanglebriar have long haunted your dreams, just as they have long threatened Kyonin.

name: Dig up Secrets
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You are an endless well of knowledge and can remember several vital pieces of information at once.

name: Disorienting Venom
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: The venom injected by your fangs disorients your foes.

name: Dissolution's Sight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency Once per hourAccepting your inner darkness means that no outer darkness can obscure your sight.

name: Divine Countermeasures
description: You've studied your extraplanar heritage with the intent of better defending yourself, whether against creatures aligned with or opposed to your extraplanar lineage, and you've found that your techniques are equally powerful against celestials, fiends, and other divine entities.

name: Divine Wings
description: Frequency once per day With effort, you can call forth magical wings from your back, similar in appearance to those of your extraplanar forebear, whether they be elegantly feathered wings or ominous bat wings.

name: Djinni Magic
description: The magic of djinn runs through your blood.

name: Dracomancer
description: Your inborn arcane power manifests as your exemplar's most time-honored spells.

name: Dragon Grip
description: Your hold has a unique draconic connection.

name: Dragon Prince
description: The blood of the Dragon Kings runs strong in your veins.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: You can put more effort into your Kobold Breath to channel greater draconic power, though it takes more out of you.

name: Dragonblood Paragon
prerequisites: strongjaw kobold heritage, venomtail kobold heritage, Dracomancer, or Kobold Breath
description: Your draconic anatomy becomes especially pronounced.

name: Drain Emotion
description: You touch an adjacent creature and attempt to draw out its excess emotion.

name: Duskwalker Magic
description: Your connection to psychopomps gives you the power to glimpse the near future and protect corpses from the ravages of undeath.

name: Earthsense
description: Your connection to earth and stone allows you to feel the slightest displacement that disturbs them, down to the shift of a pebble.

name: Echoes in Stone
description: Requirements You are standing on a stone or earthen surface.

name: Eerie Compression
description: Your limbs and even your torso can collapse in on themselves, allowing you to fit through tight spaces as though you were a Small creature.

name: Efreeti Magic
description: The magic of your efreeti ancestors flows through you.

name: Elf Step
description: You move in a graceful dance, and even your steps are broad.

name: Embodied Dragoon Subjectivity
description: When your allies call for swift reinforcements or lightning raids, you're ready to answer.

name: Emissary Assistance
description: As an emissary, you have assisted land-bound creatures in journeying underwater to visit your settlements.

name: Endless Memories
description: You've lived a thousand lives and done a hundred-thousand things.

name: Energy Blessed
description: Energy runs through your blood more powerfully.

name: Envenom Strike
prerequisites: you possess a Strike from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat that deals poison damage
description: You spit venom onto a weapon you're holding or a weapon held by a willing creature within 30 feet; you can also use this ability to envenom your nagaji fangs unarmed attack.

name: Evade Doom
description: You can elude supernatural disaster.

name: Evolved Spellhorn
description: Your inborn arcane power grows.

name: Expert Longevity
description: You've continued to refine the knowledge and skills you've gained through your life.

name: Extraplanar Cloud
description: When you use Extraplanar Haze, you can spend 1 additional action to disperse the particles as a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] cloud centered on you instead of as a haze; the activity gains the concentrate trait.

name: Fade Away
description: Your ability to blend into the background allows you to fade away entirely or appear innocuous even to magical effects.

name: Fell Rider
description: You have trained with your animal companion to become a terrifying juggernaut on the battlefield.

name: Ferocious Gust
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes With heavy wing beats, you whip up a furious gust and direct it at your opponents.

name: Fey Ascension
description: The fey influence on your form and features grows even more powerful and notable.

name: Fey Magic
description: You can use faerie magic to hide yourself and expose hidden foes.

name: Fiend-Trampling Stature
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Fiends unfortunate enough to be trampled beneath your feet or rent within your grasp are swiftly granulated into bone kindling and blood powder, and the pain of your strikes prevents them from action.

name: Fiendish Magic
prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends
description: You possess fiendish magic.

name: Fierce Competitor
description: Frequency once per day You challenge a single ally to a physical competition.

name: First World Adept
prerequisites: at least one primal innate spell
description: Over time your fey magic has grown stronger.

name: Fleeing Shriek
description: Frequency once per hourYou let out an ear-piercing screech.

name: Flower Magic
description: Certain magics in the world flow easily through your sap.

name: Flowering Path
description: Frequency once per day Vitality and elemental wood flows out from your body and into the earth, infusing it with a stream of new life.

name: Forever Among Humanity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Passing unseen within society is second nature to you now.

name: Formidable Breath
description: Thanks to rigorous breathing exercises and a diet similar to that of your lineage, your magical breath is more powerful.

name: Fortified Mind
description: Your mind is unusually resilient and resistant to influence.

name: Fortuitous Shift
description: You have grown more comfortable with your penchant for supernatural disappearance.

name: Four-Armed Aspect
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYou intone vows to shoulder others' pains; in response, your torso sprouts an additional pair of arms to help you bear those burdens.

name: Fox Arson
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When you critically hit with a Strike, the target takes an additional 1d4 persistent damage of the same type as the foxfire.

name: Fox Trick
description: Frequency once per hour You always have time for a joke or prank.

name: Freeze It!
description: You are no rime hag or Jadwiga, but the magic of the north has still left a mark on you.

name: Friendly Fling
description: Requirements You are adjacent to an ally.

name: Full Flight
description: Your flight is unbound, as natural as it was before you were awakened.

name: Fully Flighted
description: You can take to the skies at any time.

name: Garuda Magic
description: You are descended from the wondrous garudas, and their keen senses manifest in your magical prowess.

name: Glory and Valor!
description: Frequency once per dayYou call upon your ascendant blood with a mighty cry that fills you with a revitalizing energy for 1 minute or until you critically fail a Strike, whichever comes first.

name: Goblin Club
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYou can summon a mass of magic energy in your hand that, naturally, you use to smack those who offend you.

name: Goring Charge
description: Driven by the momentum of your thundering steps and powerful mass, your horns can pierce your foes.

name: Grand Metamorphosis
description: One of your nodes has adapted into a new magic-emitting organ.

name: Grandmother's Wisdom
description: You carry the bones of your ancestors with you, and you can ask them for counsel.

name: Greater Transformation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can assume your oni form more easily, and with greater benefits.

name: Green Dash
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency Once per 10 minutes Requirements You're adjacent to a tree, shrub, or plant that occupies at least a 5-foot square.The spirits of vegetation send you on your way, letting you move in a burst of speed.

name: Gripping Limbs
description: Nodules, hooks, or claws on your limbs allow you to cling to surfaces with ease.

name: Group Aid
description: Your upbringing emphasized teamwork, and helping your allies comes naturally to you.

name: Grow Tool
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: You grow a simple tool from your own body, coaxing flowers, vines, roots, and wood to grow and sprout from your flesh into the desired shape.

name: Guarded Thoughts
description: Your mind, like a dark naga's, foils attempts to read your thoughts.

name: Guiding Luck
description: Your luck guides you to look the right way and aim your blows unerringly.

name: Hardy Traveler
description: There's no journey too far or burden too heavy when you have friends at your side or hope within your heart.

name: Hefting Shadow
description: Your shadow can contain objects.

name: Heir of the Saoc
description: In the past, you would have been a proud initiate of the Saoc Brethren.

name: Helpful Halfling
description: When you aid a friend with a task, you find many ways to help and avoid interfering.

name: Herbal Forager
description: Your skill with herbs has improved.

name: Hero's Wings
description: Your wings have grown to their full, majestic form, granting you the unlimited power of flight.

name: Heroes' Call
description: The songs of ancient heroes echo through your mind and quicken your pulse, especially in dire straits.

name: Hone Claws
description: Frequency once per hourYou grind or gnaw a particularly wicked edge onto your claws.

name: Horn and Bone Incantation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You invoke mantras of tellurian rebirth.

name: Hungry Goblin
description: You'll eat anything and anyone.

name: Hypnotic Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can widen your field of vision, allowing you to affect more creatures with your .

name: I Will Return
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your special connection to death and rebirth allows you to sense when it's your time to enter the Great Beyond, and now isn't the time.

name: Ill Tide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 30 feet of you critically fails an attack roll, skill check, or saving throw Some land dwellers say that merfolk are bad luck.

name: Improvisational Warrior
description: When you use an improvised weapon, you apply the critical specialization of a brawling weapon to it.

name: Incredible Improvisation
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You attempt a check using a skill you're untrained in.

name: Inner Breath
description: Your body is capable of recycling its own air.

name: Internal Respirator
description: Your body can internally synthesize oxygen for limited periods of time.

name: Invoke the Elements
prerequisites: Brine May, Snow May, Veil May, or Virga May
description: Frequency once per dayYou summon an aura of shimmering heat, flurrying snow, crashing waves, or swirling wind and lightning.

name: Irrepressible (Halfling)
description: You are easily able to ward off attempts to play on your fears and emotions.

name: Jalmeri Rakshasa Magic
description: You can cast and once per day each as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

name: Janni Hospitality
description: You can use magic to show others desert hospitality.

name: Janni Magic
description: The magic of jann runs through your blood.

name: Kizidhar Magic
description: You can wield the arcane magic of a kizidhar, casting and once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

name: Kneel for No God
description: Access Vahird ethnicity Your ancestors' defiance of magic and your people's strictly egalitarian mindset mean that certain forms of magic have little effect on you.

name: Kodama Call
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originThe small spirits known as kodama pride themselves in taking care of trees and other vegetation, and they'll happily come to your aid as well.

name: Larcenous Tail
description: You can perform minor mischief with your tail.

name: Laughing Kholo
description: Your sinister giggle is a sound of warning and threat.

name: Legendary Size
description: The vanaras of old were tricksters able to step across wide rivers or slip into impossibly small spaces.

name: Lesser Augmentation
description: You know how to get the most out of your unique body and abilities.

name: Life Leap
description: Requirements You must be adjacent to a living creature.

name: Life's Blood
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your journey to enlightenment has made your blood possess nigh-immortal properties, allowing you to heal others.

name: Luck of the Clowder
description: When you use to reroll, any creatures you choose within 10 feet who also just failed against the same effect (such as a single spell) can also reroll their saving throws and use the better result.

name: Lucky Keepsake
description: You have a Keepsake that grants you luck.

name: Many Faces
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency three times per dayPutting on a new face offers a great way to get a fresh perspective on life.

name: Many Guises (Kitsune)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can use three times per day instead of once per day.

name: Marid Magic
description: You channel the magic of marids.

name: Mask of Pain
description: Trigger You succeed at a Demoralize check.Requirements You're wearing your warmask.Your mask has grown into a manifestation of your pain, which you can release.

name: Memory of Skill
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYour years of training in a previous life didn't go to waste with your death, and you can call upon this training when you most need it.

name: Mentor of Legends
description: You're an extraordinary teacher, capable of inspiring your students to amazing feats of athletics and ingenuity.

name: Methodical Magic
description: You can reorder the world with your magic.

name: Miraculous Repair
description: Geniekin can't grant magical wishes, but some echo of power lingers within you.

name: Mirror Refuge
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're within 5 feet of a mirrored surface.Your origin in the space behind mirrors enables you to use a mirror as a hideaway, like the spell .

name: Moderate Enhance Venom
description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with to moderate vishkanyan venom.

name: Moisture Bath
description: Frequency one per dayYour moist skin is especially resistant to damage from temperature-altering effects.

name: Moray Eel Mount
description: You have either trained a giant moray eel since its hatching or have tamed one in the wild.

name: Morrigna's Spider Affinity
description: Much like morrignas, you feel an affinity for spiders.

name: Mother's Mindfulness
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger An adjacent ally is hit by an attack.

name: Mountain's Stoutness
description: Your hardiness lets you withstand more punishment than most.

name: Mud Boat's Passage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You instinctively create magical boats that keep your feet dry (mostly).

name: Multitalented
description: You've learned to split your focus between multiple classes with ease.

name: Natural Magnetism
description: Your connection with elemental iron grants you a natural field of weak magnetic attraction.

name: Night Magic
description: You can tap into the magic that runs through your blood.

name: No Evidence
description: You leave little sign when attempting to remain unseen.

name: Nodal Healing
description: You can induce wound repair by circulating magic throughout your body.

name: Occult Resistance
description: Your study of occult practices has shown you how to best defend against them.

name: Offensive Subroutine
description: Nanites augment your attacks.

name: Otherworldly Acumen
prerequisites: at least one innate spell gained from an elf ancestry feat
description: The arcane magic you possess grows in power and complexity.

name: Overcrowd
description: As long as you are Small, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small ally.

name: Pack Tactics
