description: You have mastered how to hunt with your pack.

name: Paralyzing Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYour dedication to the ideals of art and beauty allows your head gem to access the power of the waning moon.

name: Perfume Cloud
description: Frequency once per hour You issue a cloud of your fragrance like a full-body sneeze—but one that might save your life as the powerful perfume makes your attackers' eyes sting and water.

name: Persistent Odor
description: Your pheromones now linger on creatures.

name: Pervasive Superstition
description: You steep yourself in superstition and practice ancient orc mental exercises for shrugging off the effects of magic.

name: Phantom Orchestra
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: An easy way to trick others is to throw your voice into a nearby forest or thicket to make strange noises.

name: Piercing Quills
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your quills can dig particularly deep into the flesh of your opponents.

name: Pinch Time
description: One of your parents has a human life span and another an elven life span, with your own somewhere between.

name: Political Virtuoso
description: Your mastery of the politics of your home nation is profound.

name: Pollinate
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: Trigger You take bludgeoning damage.

name: Predator's Growl
description: Trigger You successfully a or creature.You give a throaty growl to attempt to a creature you just found.

name: Preemptive Reconfiguration
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would take bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.Your body anticipates the blow.

name: Pride in Arms
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet brings an enemy to 0 Hit Points.With a shout of triumph, you grant inspiration to an ally fight on.

name: Qlippoth Magic
description: You've deeply studied the secrets of your blood and can force reality to act against its own wishes.

name: Quick Recovery
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins, and you have the wounded condition.You use your command over your form to repair life-threatening wounds.

name: Quietus Strikes
description: Your connection to the Boneyard empowers you to bring death to all forms of life and unlife, exploiting their weaknesses.

name: Quill Spray
prerequisites: quillcoat shisk or quill unarmed attack
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Frequency once per dayYou can launch a mass of quills at opponents.

name: Ragdya's Dance
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger An adjacent observed creature succeeds at an attack roll against you.

name: Rain of Bolts
description: Frequency once per dayThroughout the day, your body produces powerful projectiles within your chassis.

name: Rakshasa Magic
description: You remember the secrets of your rakshasa forebears and know how to apply those memories to get results.

name: Rakshasa Ravaged
description: You and your family know well the ravages of rakshasa predations, and you know how to best defend yourself against their growing corruption in the world.

name: Rat Form
description: You can transform into an innocuous-looking rat.

name: Read the Stars
prerequisites: trained in Astrology Lore or Occultism
description: You're incredibly skilled in iruxi astrology, and you can gain useful (if cryptic) hints from the stars' alignment.

name: Rejuvenation Token
description: You tie yourself to the Material Plane by implanting a piece of your consciousness into a weapon, piece of armor, or other item that's precious to you.

name: Repair Module
description: Frequency once per day You trigger your body's repair programming, causing your body's nanites to heal your wounds.

name: Replenishing Hydration
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: You draw life from the water around you.

name: Returning Throw
description: You have mastered the technique of arcing a projectile so that it returns to your hand after being thrown, though this requires a moment to precisely calculate the trajectory and possible ricochets.

name: Ricocheting Leap
description: You quickly use your momentum to topple and spring off of foes.

name: Ride On
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You would gain the condition.

name: Riptide
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: Requirements You are within 10 feet of water at least 10 feet deep, and your Speed is sufficient to reach the water in one Stride.

name: River Adaptation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Webbing sprouts on your legs and tail as you shift to a more aquatic form.

name: Rivethun Spiritual Attunement
description: Access Rivethun Adherent background or you are a member of the Rivethun Your time spent among the Rivethun has heightened your awareness of animate spirits around you, giving you the ability to sense them briefly.

name: Rokoan Arts
description: Ancestral spirits have begun to bond themselves to you, granting you powers characteristic of a rokoa.

name: Roll with It
description: Trigger A foe hits you with a melee weapon or unarmed attack.

name: Rolling White Bottle Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You Drop Prone or otherwise become .As you fall to the ground, you transform into a white bottle, gourd, or sake jar, then roll away before anyone can pick you up.

name: Rouse the Dreaming Relic
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The spirit within your pusaka resonates with other magical items in your possession.

name: Sash of the Wind
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originAt your request, the nature spirits of the air and wind spin themselves into an iridescent sash loosely draped around your shoulders that buoys you through the sky.

name: Scalding Spit
description: Your bodily fluids burn with surprising volatility, as if you ran on oil instead of blood.

name: Scaling Poppet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your construction integrates ropes, hooks, or other tools to help you move across steep surfaces.

name: Scarlet Strands
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The innate magic in your blood turns your signature crimson tresses into more than just a stylish coiffure.

name: Scorching Disarm
description: Frequency once per day You make a weapon unbearable to hold.

name: Sculpt Shadows
description: You coax nearby shadows into the shape of a simple weapon or a simple tool or item, using a tiny piece of your shadow to make it solid; in doing so, you lose 1 Hit Point.

name: Secrets of the Past
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've established a stronger connection with your past selves and can play out the memories of your lifetimes in an instant, helping you draw on knowledge that lives deep within your mind.

name: Sense for Trouble
description: You can tell when something's off.

name: Sense Thoughts
description: You have an even stranger knack for knowing what other people are thinking.

name: Serpentcoil Slam
description: Frequency once per minute Your people's ancient and storied rivalry with garudas led you to develop special techniques against flying foes.

name: Serpentine Swimmer
description: You undulate your body in a series of sinuous serpentine motions as you swim, drastically improving the speed at which you move through the water.

name: Shadow Sight
description: Frequency once per hour You draw on your connection with the Shadow Plane to see through all but the deepest darkness.

name: Shadow Tempo
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An ally within your reach uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action they're using.As your ally moves past you, you match your movements to their rhythm, following them across the battlefield.

name: Shaitan Magic
description: The magic of shaitans runs through your blood.

name: Shore Gift
description: Using old magic, you slip off your tail like an item of clothing and walk on two feet, resembling a humanoid ancestry, usually human but possibly elf, half-elf, or something stranger.

name: Shory Aeromancer
description: Your ancestors hailed from the flying cities of the Shory, and a few simple tricks have come down through the ages to you.

name: Silent Step
description: You Step, then or .

name: Siphon Torment
description: Your progenitors suffered greatly at the hands of a curse, a fate you willingly take upon yourself rather than let fall upon others.

name: Siren Song
description: Frequency once per day Prerequisites expert in Performance You can beguile and bewitch with your song.

name: Skeletal Resistance
description: Your body becomes resistant, your hardened bones deflecting weapons and other forms of damage.

name: Skittering Scuttle
description: You can scuttle farther and faster when maneuvering alongside allies.

name: Slip Into Shadow
prerequisites: ability to cast at least one spell with the darkness trait
description: Your shadow magic bleeds into the space around you.

name: Slip the Grasp
description: Requirements You are , , or .

name: Smoke Sight
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.You're used to fighting and hiding in a haze of smoke and flame.

name: Snare Commando
prerequisites: expert in Deception or Intimidation, Snare Crafting
description: Trigger A creature fails or critically fails a save against your snare.

name: Soaring Form
description: You have a fly Speed of 20 feet at all times.

name: Sodbuster
description: Years toiling in soil have made you an expert digger.

name: Solar Rejuvenation
description: Ghoran - The warmth and light of the sun gives you life.

name: Solidarity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou bestow some of your own life energies to mend damage.

name: Speaker's Defense
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or Speaker in Training
description: As a Speaker, you've forged a deep bond with powerful spirits who you can urge to rise up to defend you and your people.

name: Spiritual Echo
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You possess the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, which has begun to resonate with your own.

name: Spore Cloud
description: Frequency once per hour You unleash a cloud of pollen or similar spores.

name: Squad Tactics
description: You are adept at working with your allies to surround an enemy.

name: Stone Bones
description: Trigger You are struck by a critical hit that deals physical damage.

name: Stone Passage
description: Frequency once per hour Calling upon your knowledge of stonework and inherent magic, you momentarily make a section of stone insubstantial, allowing you to pass through.

name: Stonewalker
description: You have a deep reverence for and connection to stone.

name: Strand Strider
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your eight legs serve you well when climbing walls and webs alike.

name: Strong Swimmer
description: Your swim Speed increases to match your land Speed.

name: Stubborn Defiance
description: You're brave and stubborn and refuse to back down or bow to the wishes of another.

name: Studious Adept
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You achieve a breakthrough in your exploration of magic.

name: Swift Application
description: You expertly combine the motions of attacking and coating your weapon with venom.

name: Tears of Pearl
description: Frequency once per day You weep, and your tears become gleaming pearls as they fall to the ground, so beautiful others can't help but grab at them.

name: Telekinetic Slip
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins, and you're or .

name: Terrain Advantage
description: Non-lizardfolk creatures in difficult terrain are to you.

name: Tetraelemental Assault
description: Your Elemental Assault cycles through all four elements.

name: Thorned Seedpod
description: When your seedpods strike a felling blow, they burst into viciously thorny vines.

name: Tongue Tether
description: Your tongue can momentarily latch on as readily as your hands.

name: Towering Growth
description: You're capable of growing as tall as a pine tree for a short time.

name: Transcendent Realization
description: You've unleashed even more of your mind's limitless potential.

name: Tree Climber (Elf)
description: You've spent much of your life among the treetops and have become an expert at quickly and safely climbing them.

name: True Dragon's Flight
description: Your wings have grown more powerful, capable of keeping you aloft longer.

name: Two Truths
description: Your ability to imitate your progenitor is so strong, you can even convince yourself.

name: Uncanny Cheeks
description: You gain the and feats, except that you always withdraw the objects from your cheek pouches.

name: Undying Ferocity
description: You resist death's clutches with supernatural vigor, daring death to claim you while promising that any such attempt will surely fail.

name: Unhampered Passage
description: You won't allow others to restrain you.

name: Unleash Yaoguai Might
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day As you enter your yaoguai form, you draw upon your internal magic to assume an even greater form.

name: Unyielding Disguise
prerequisites: ability to cast humanoid form or illusory disguise
description: When you cast or to alter your appearance, the spell's duration is 2 hours.

name: Velstrac Magic
description: You know there's so much more to sensation than whips and chains—but whips and chains also have their place.

name: Viper Strike
description: Frequency once per minute You move and attack with a swiftness that most can't follow.

name: Virtue-Forged Tattoos
description: Your tattoos are a work of eldritch genius, a masterpiece of art, magic, and skin.

name: Vivacious Conduit
description: Your connection to the First World has grown, and its vital energy flows into you rapidly.

name: Wary Skulker
description: You can perform the exploration activity at the same time as the exploration activity.

name: Water Dancer
description: You glide through the water with graceful ease.

name: Water Strider
description: Water cradles your every step, allowing you to walk on its surface.

name: Web Hunter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Through the careful cultivation of highly sensitive hairs, you've developed the ability to sense creatures without seeing them.

name: Wheedle and Jig
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You make capering motions and silly sounds to captivate onlookers.

name: Whispers in the Night
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You weave your illusions with greater ability, allowing you to play tricks and slip through the night.

name: Wind God's Fan
description: Your fan can stir up even more powerful winds.

name: Wing Buffet
description: You have a pair of draconic wings strong enough to batter your foes away and shove them away.

name: Wing Step
description: With a sharp flap of your wings, you stay light on your feet as you move.

name: Winglet Flight
description: Frequency once per roundIntense use and exercise have made your winglets more powerful.

name: Wings of Air
description: Frequency once per day You can strain to call forth feathered or cloudy wings from your back.

name: Witness of Earth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The primal magic in your soul offers the patient earth's timeless counsel.

name: World-Protector's Hospitality
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Through your spiritual power, you impede starvation and restore pantries.

name: Accursed Clay Fist
prerequisites: Golem Grafter Dedication, expert in unarmed attacks
description: You have replaced one of your forearms with one made of clay and infused with cursed arcane magic.

name: Add Element
description: Choose a second kinetic element to add to the one you already have.

name: Advanced Domain Spirit
description: Your connection with your domain spirit has deepened.

name: Advanced Efficient Alchemy
description: You make an even-larger batch of alchemical items each morning.

name: Aerial Piledriver
description: Requirements You have a creature or .

name: Agile Grace
description: Your graceful moves with agile weapons are beyond compare.

name: Ancestral Mage
description: The magic of your ancestry and bloodline are one and the same.

name: Angel of Death
description: All your Strikes against a creature you have Marked for Death have the death trait, causing the mark to be instantly killed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Annotate Composition
description: By putting composition to paper, you can create a source of stirring words or song that others can read and understand.

name: Apparition's Quickening
description: Frequency once per round Requirements You are attuned to at least 2 apparitions.If your next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank spell slot you have, you can draw power from one of your attuned apparitions to reduce the number of actions to cas

name: Armor Rune Shifter
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: You learn the secrets of armor runes by viewing them through gems and can alter them at your discretion.

name: Armored Rest
prerequisites: Swordmaster Dedication, trained in light, medium, or heavy armor
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've slept many nights in your armor and gotten used to it.

name: Assured Ritualist
description: You can cover for a secondary caster's error.

name: Attunement to Stone
description: You become attuned to the stone around you.

name: Aura Shaping
description: You control the size of your kinetic aura.

name: Azure Fins
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: When submerged in water or another liquid, you form small fin-like arms along your body, granting you far greater maneuverability while swimming.

name: Bat Form
description: Frequency once per hour You can transform into a bat.

name: Bear Empathy
description: You have a magical affinity for bears and can speak to them through sounds and body language.

name: Beast Dynamo Howl
description: Access You are from Arcadia.You've incorporated beast tech from Arcadia into your dynamo, adding in components from various terrifying creatures to enhance your prosthesis's capabilities.

name: Beastmaster Bond
description: You can communicate telepathically with your animal companions within 100 feet.

name: Beneath Notice
prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication, expert in Deception
description: You are skilled at hiding from your foes and targets among the common populace.

name: Bestiary Scholar
prerequisites: Scrollmaster Dedication, master in Arcana, Crafting, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You learn how to apply your extensive knowledge of certain creatures using the lore you know.

name: Big Debut
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You're about to roll initiative.Now's your chance!

name: Black Powder Flash
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: Requirements You're in Powder Punch Stance.

name: Blade of the Heart
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The bonds of the heart are stronger than any steel, more powerful than any magic.

name: Blazing Streak
description: Requirements You're in Stoked Flame Stance.

name: Borrow Time
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Breath of Vital Ash
description: Usage imbued into a body ikonReddish ash stains your ikon, impossible to clean off.

name: Buckler Dance
description: Requirements You are wielding a .You spin your buckler defensively toward every attack.

name: Bullet Dancer Reload
description: Requirements You're in .You've learned to reload your firearms with uncanny grace, the ammunition simply falling into place as though part of a well-practiced kata.

name: Burrowing Form
description: Your eidolon can burrow through loose dirt.

name: Call Worm Spirit
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Frequency once per dayYou call forth a ghostly manifestation of the worm spirit.

name: Called Shot
description: You target a specific area of your foe's anatomy to debilitating effect.

name: Camouflage
description: You alter your appearance to blend in to the wilderness.

name: Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Cascade Bearers affiliation
description: Your Cascade Bearer training allows you to broaden the horizons of your halcyon spells further than most Magaambyans, weaving in spiritual magic.

name: Cascading Ray
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Spellstrike, and the spell you cast dealt energy damage (acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, sonic, vitality, or void).

name: Castigating Weapon
description: The force of your deity's castigation strengthens your body so you can strike down the enemy and its allies.

name: Cautious Delver
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've studied the many ways that ancient architects and spellcasters protected their possessions, such as by implementing deadly traps and curses, and learned some magic to counteract them.

name: Certain Strike
description: Even when you don't hit squarely, you can still score a glancing blow.

name: Chain Infusion
description: The elemental matter in your blast keeps reconstituting itself to travel onward, no matter how many bodies it collides with.

name: Channel Rot
description: You've learned to channel your curse through weapons you wield instead of solely through your flesh.

name: Close Formation
prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication, master in Performance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You practiced fan dance as a member of a large group, coordinating your moves together to create living art and heightening your sense of spatial awareness.

name: Cloud Walk
description: Your growing link to cloud dragons has granted you the ability to walk on clouds.

name: Cobra Envenom
prerequisites: Cobra Stance, expert in unarmed attacks
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You are in .You slightly dislocate your joints to lash out with devious intent and the power to envenom your foe.

name: Come and Get Me
description: You open yourself to attacks so you can respond in turn.

name: Comforting Presence
description: Trigger An adjacent ally becomes frightened or stupefied.

name: Command Attention
description: You command the attention of all around you with style, ensuring their gaze falls only upon you until the end of your next turn.

name: Communal Tale
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: Stories are an experience meant to be shared as a group.

name: Consecrate Spell
prerequisites: ability to cast focus spells, divine spells
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You infuse a spell with the power of your faith, consecrating it.

name: Corpse-Killer's Defiance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger You destroy an undead foe.

name: Counterclockwork Focus
description: Frequency once per round You understand the need for law enforcement doctrine to adapt to the ever-changing innovations in technology and arcana.

name: Courageous Assault
description: With a mighty shout, you can stir an ally to attack.

name: Crashing Slam
description: You can dash your foe to the ground with a single blow.

name: Cursebreaker
description: Frequency once per dayUsing various implements and esoteric methods, you can attempt to remove a curse from an unfortunate victim.

name: Cut From the Air
description: Trigger You are the target of a physical ranged Strike.

name: Daring Flourish
description: You make quick use of an opening from your daring stunts.

name: Dazzling Block
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, sparkling targe hybrid study
description: Requirements You are in Arcane Cascade stance.

name: Dazzling Display
description: You perform a bewildering show of prowess, such as by whirling and flashing a weapon, that unnerves foes.

name: Debilitating Shot
description: Aiming for a weak point, you impede your foe with a precise shot.

name: Define “Report”
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Look, getting caught in a lie is a normal part of venture-gossip life.

name: Deflecting Shot
description: Trigger An ally within the first range increment of your firearm or crossbow is hit by an attack, and you can see the attacker.

name: Defy Sorrow
description: Trigger You're dealt mental damage or spirit damage or you fail or critically fail a saving throw against a mental effect.You draw on this spiritual pain to push your body to greater heights.

name: Demanding Challenge
description: If your skill check to challenge a foe is a success, the target of your challenge takes a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls (or -2 if you critically succeed) until the end of your next turn.

name: Deny Support
description: Access Help either the Washboard Dogs or the Diobel Sweepers destroy their rival.

name: Deny the Songs of War
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: To keep the peace, you disrupt those who seek to break it.

name: Derring-Do
description: When you compound panache with even more derring-do, it somehow tends to work out.

name: Destructive Block
description: You can protect yourself more effectively, at the expense of your shield.

name: Determined Dash
description: Nothing can keep you from your enemy.

name: Devoted Focus
description: Your devotion is strong enough to increase your focus to incredible heights.

name: Dimensional Disappearance
prerequisites: dimensional assault focus spell, laughing shadow hybrid study
description: You take advantage of teleportation to better hide your position.

name: Dire Growth
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape is not Small
description: You transform into a primal reflection of your animal shape.

name: Disarming Twist
description: Requirements You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.

name: Disruptive Stance
description: The slightest distraction can provoke your wrath, and you're prepared to foil enemies' actions.

name: Distracting Explosion
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses a concentrate action.Your enemies think they can concentrate on something else while you're nearby?

name: Dizzying Spin Dance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding a fan.You're practiced in using your fans to spin with dizzying speed.

name: Double, Double
description: For each temporary oil or potion you brew during your daily preparations, you brew two copies of it.

name: Drain Vitality
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You have possession of your bonded beast gun.You draw out the bestial magic energy within your bonded beast gun to fortify yourself, purge ongoing harm, and bolster your life force with a sheath of swirling life essence.

name: Draw From the Land
description: Requirements You gained a terrain attunement benefit this turn, and it matched the terrain you're in.

name: Dream Guise
description: You Stride into a willing ally's space, at which point both of your appearances shift into a shared third appearance, usually one that looks like a mix of the two of you.

name: Dual-Weapon Blitz
description: Requirements You are wielding two one-handed melee weapons, each in a different hand.You attack as you weave your way around the battlefield.

name: Dueling Dance (Swashbuckler)
description: Requirements You are wielding only a single one-handed melee weapon and have your other hand or hands free.

name: Eerie Proclamation
prerequisites: expert in Occultism, expert in Survival
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You must be in either natural terrain or in abandoned or relatively unused artificial terrain (such as a darkened alley or haunted house).

name: Eidetic Memorization
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Pathfinders are often asked to study the intricacies of ancient history under less than ideal conditions, and you've trained your brain to make the most of your limited time.

name: Eldritch Debilitations
description: You know how to apply debilitations that are particularly troublesome for spellcasters.

name: Eldritch Reload
description: Requirements Your last action this turn was to make an Eldritch Shot, Cast a Spell from a spell slot, or activate a piece of magical ammunition.You integrate your talent for magic into your use of reloading weapons.

name: Electrify Armor
description: Requirements You are wearing your armor innovation.You electrify your armor to punish foes who dare to attack you.

name: Elemental Shape
description: You understand the fundamental elements of nature such that you can imbue them into your body and manifest as a living embodiment of those elements.

name: Elemental Transformation
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your kinetic gate is deactivated.

name: Emerald Boughs Hideaway
prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication, Emerald Boughs affiliation
description: You use Emerald Bough techniques to create a small extradimensional space called a hideaway that lasts as long as you are conscious.

name: Emissary of Peace
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, master in Diplomacy
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Even when bloodshed is inevitable, you would rather see your foes surrender.

name: Emotional Surge
description: Your heart soars, increasing your power for a moment.

name: Emphatic Emissary
source: Pathfinder #189: Dreamers of the Nameless Spires
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Endure Death's Touch
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, expert in medium or heavy armor
description: Requirements You are wearing medium or heavy armor in which you have expert proficiency.

name: Energy Fusion
description: You fuse two spells together, combining their energy types.

name: Ensnaring Wrappings
description: Trigger Your Strike deals physical damage to a creature that is within reach of your arms and isn't more than one size larger than you.

name: Entwined Energy Ki
description: You can transform your inner power into a type of energy to empower your qi abilities.

name: Everyone Duck!
description: Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, an attempt to Disable a Device on a trap.

name: Exemplar Expertise
description: Your soul has been further tempered in divine power.

name: Expand Spiral
description: Your prayers encompass your companions, granting you the ability to share Pharasma's blessings.

name: Expanded Splash
description: You can throw bombs at just the right trajectory to create especially large and powerful explosions.

name: Expert Captivator Spellcasting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You learn more powerful spells to enchant and deceive.

name: Expert Skysage Divination
description: Your studies of the stars have taught you about the mysteries of the cosmos.

name: Exult in Violence
description: Requirements You critically hit an enemy this turn.You let out a war cry as your blow lands true, and judgment descends on an enemy.

name: Fading
description: Frequency once per Trigger You are targeted with a Strike by someone you can detect.

name: Falcon Swoop
description: Requirements You currently have a fly Speed.

name: Fearsome Brute
description: Fear makes your foes weak and more vulnerable to your attacks.

name: Feast Planner
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You learn the ritual, but you instead prepare dishes for a lavish meal that have the same effect as the drinks from the normal version of the ritual.

name: Feral Lunge
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape grants a fangs or jaws unarmed attack
description: Requirements You're in hybrid or animal shape.

name: Feral Scramble
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape grants a claw unarmed attack
description: Requirements You're in hybrid or animal shape.Sinking your claws in, you propel yourself at shocking speed.

name: Feral Toss
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape grants an antler, horn, or tusk unarmed attack
description: Requirements You're in hybrid or animal shape.

name: Ferocious Charge
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with antlers, head, or horn unarmed attack
description: You've taught your companions to charge directly at an enemy.

name: Fish From the Falls' Edge
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A living creature within 30 feet would die.

name: Flailtongue
description: Your tongue has mutated into a lashing weapon reminiscent of Kabriri's bone-laden flail.

name: Flash Your Badge
prerequisites: Alkenstar Agent Dedication, master in Intimidation
source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powder Keg
description: You make a fearsome show of your authority.

name: Flinging Charge
description: You throw a weapon to distract your opponent as you close the gap to begin your assault.

name: Fluttering Distraction
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An enemy attempts a ranged or melee Strike against an ally within 30 feet.

name: Fly on Shadowed Wings
description: Frequency once per hourYour apparition embraces you, feeding on your magic to become a pair of protective wings.

name: Font of Knowledge
description: Experience or focused study have granted you mastery of a number of topics.

name: Form Up!
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You've trained in battle formations for a plethora of situations.

name: Furious Sprint
description: You rush forward.

name: Gathering Moss
description: Trigger You enter Tenacious Stance.

name: Gaze of Veracity
prerequisites: Hellknight Signifer Dedication, ability to cast focus spells
description: You can channel your mask's power to pierce through lies and see the truth in any situation.

name: Geobukseon Retaliation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin Trigger You would take damage.Your armor has a retractable spike-covered shell reminiscent of Hwanggot's heavily armored geobukseon, or "turtle ships." The shell unfolds across your body, giving you a +4 circumstance bonus to AC and resistance 2 to bludgeoning, piercing, and s

name: Ghost-Path Epiphany
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Deviating from the orthodox path, you tread an inauspicious descent littered with flowers of death; this heretical choice will, in time, earn you the enmity and fear of more traditional cultivators.

name: Giant Snare
description: You can create bigger snares for quick deployment, making it more likely for a creature to walk into your snares.

name: Glutton for Flesh
description: You have developed a capacity to store more flesh within your gaunt body to leave yourself satiated longer.

name: Goblin Jubilee Display
description: Flames and explosions sear the air in a riot of color and devastation that rivals that wrought by even the wildest goblin party.

name: Grave Sight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your ability to sense undead has improved.

name: Great Cleave
description: Your fury carries your weapon through multiple foes.

name: Greater Bloodline
description: You uncover the greater secrets of your bloodline.

name: Greater Deathly Secrets
description: Your undead secrets grow stronger still.

name: Greater Debilitating Bomb
description: You have learned enhanced techniques and alchemical secrets that allow you to expand the range of effects you can impose with your bombs.

name: Greater Magical Edification
description: You've continued to expand your compendium of tools to compile knowledge.

name: Greater Magical Scholastics
description: You broaden your magical studies, allowing you to find the right path, detect hidden objects, and conceal those objects from unscrupulous rivals.

name: Greater Spell Runes
description: You gain more powerful spell runes.

name: Greenwatcher
description: Your experience fighting against and alongside fey creatures is nearly unrivaled.

name: Growth Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, wood is in your elemental philosophy
description: You enhance your spell with elemental wood, causing your magic to expand and grow beyond its original limitations.

name: Haft Beatdown
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You are in Haft Striker Stance.The momentum of each of your attacks feeds into the next blow in the routine, creating a brutal rhythm that enables you to give your target one continuous beatdown.

name: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate
description: Your knowledge of halcyon magic increases.

name: Harden Flesh
description: Requirements You're standing on earthen or stone ground.

name: Harrying Strike
description: Your attack prevents a foe from pursuing your allies.

name: Healing Transformation
description: You can take advantage of shapechanging magic to close wounds and patch injuries.

name: Helpful Tinkering
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou don't just tinker with your own innovation, you fiddle with your allies' weapons as well (for their benefit, of course).

name: Hematocritical
description: Requirements Your last action was a Strike that critically hit a creature that isn't immune to bleed damage.You bathe in the arterial fluids of your enemy, drinking deep of their freed essence to empower your magic and increase your spellcasting efficacy.

name: Heroic Recovery
description: The restorative power of your healing invigorates the recipient.

name: Hilt Hammer
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You know how to turn any weapon into a bone-crushing implement of skeletal destruction.

name: Holy Light
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You raise your arms to the sky and pray fervently, surrounding yourself in a beacon of holy light.

name: Hook 'Em
description: Requirements A rope is within your reach, or you have a rope or grappling weapon in your hand.

name: House of Imaginary Walls
description: You erect an imaginary barrier others believe to be real.

name: Hunting Snag
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

name: I Meant to do That
prerequisites: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication, trained in Deception
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements Your previous action was a ranged weapon Strike that missed a foe within 60 feet.Somehow your stray bullet causes an unintended reaction that creates a problem for your enemy: perhaps a ricochet knocks your foe's weapon away or they stumble over stray debris in a

name: Impose Order (Psychic)
description: Requirements precise discipline subconscious mind You bring discipline to your mind and magic, ensuring that you don't under-perform.

name: Imposing Destrier
description: Under your care, your mount has realized its innate potential.

name: Impressive Landing
description: Trigger You fall at least 10 feet and land on a solid surface.You slam into the ground, shattering it around you.

name: Improved Command Undead
prerequisites: harmful font, Command Undead, evil alignment
description: Undead creatures find it all but impossible to resist your commands.

name: Incredible Companion (Ranger)
description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

name: Incredible Familiar (Animist)
description: Your connection to your apparition and your mastery of spiritual magic reach a new threshold that allows you to channel even more power into the physical form you allow it to take on as your familiar.

name: Incredible Familiar (Familiar Master)
description: Your familiar is infused with even more magic than other familiars.

name: Instant Armor
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: A knight is nothing without their armor, and you know how to keep yours ready.

name: Into the Future
description: You know your spell will be needed not now but in a few moments, so you cast your magic into the future.

name: Invigorating Breath
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You are adjacent to your spirit guide or it is sharing your space.

name: Journey of the Sky Chariot
description: Usage imbued into a body ikon or worn ikonSmall wings, flaming wheels, or another signifier of flight sprout from your ikon as it gains the power to lift you from the ground.

name: Just One More Thing
description: Requirements Your most recent action was to , , or , and you failed but didn't critically fail.After your attempt to influence someone goes poorly, you add another bit of information or ask a pointed question, possibly salvaging your previous attempt.

name: Knockback
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful StrikeThe weight of your swing drives your enemy back.

name: Knockback Strike
description: You focus your strength into a blow powerful enough to push an enemy away from you.

name: Know It All (Eldritch Researcher)
description: Your knowledge of abstruse topics is unparalleled.

name: Lastwall Warden
description: You use your shield to protect your allies, not just yourself, especially against the undead.

name: Lead the Way
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You move forward, creating an opening for others to follow.

name: Lessons of Flux
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You fail a skill check to , , , , or .You apply the persistence and permutation taught by faydhaans to your failures.

name: Lock On
description: Aha!

name: Lunging Spellstrike
description: Requirements You're wielding a staff.

name: Maelstrom Flow
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You're wielding an improvised weapon.You pour energy into an improvised weapon, speeding its destruction to grant it power.

name: Magical Adaptation
description: When an obstacle bars your path, you pull a trick from your sleeve to overcome it.

name: Major Lesson
description: Your patron grants you even greater secrets.

name: Martial Exercise
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've become comfortable in using weapons that you might not have picked up before training with the Swords.

name: Mask of the 12th Step
prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication, expert in Crafting
description: You have reached the 12th Step and been instructed in greater secrets of Razmir's doctrine.

name: Master Monster Hunter
description: You have a nearly encyclopedic knowledge of all creatures of the world.

name: Masterful Obfuscation
prerequisites: Scrollmaster Dedication, master in a skill with the Recall Knowledge action
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've mastered the art of deceiving others about your area of study.

name: Mated Birds in Paired Flight
description: Usage imbued in one or two weapon ikons that both have the thrown trait (see text)Your ikons bond like a pair of one-winged birds.

name: Menacing Prowess
prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication, expert in Intimidation
description: Scaring off multiple people at once is your specialty.

name: Merciful Elixir
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You craft an Elixir of Life using , and that elixir is at least 2 levels lower than your advanced alchemy level You mix a special additive into your elixir that calms the drinker's body and mind.

name: Merciless Rend
description: Requirements Your eidolon hit the same enemy with two consecutive Strikes with its secondary attack this turn and dealt slashing damage with both.Your eidolon rends its foes.

name: Meteoric Spellstrike
description: Requirements You're wielding a ranged or thrown weapon, or have a ranged unarmed attack.

name: Methodical Debilitations
description: You strategically craft your debilitations to lessen or negate an enemy's tactical advantages.

name: Mighty Bulwark
description: Thanks to your incredible connection to your armor, you can use it to shrug off an incredible array of dangers.

name: Mirror Shield
description: Trigger An opponent casting a spell that targets you critically fails a spell attack roll against your AC.

name: Mockingbird's Disarm
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You succeed at a check to or use , and you moved through an enemy's space.

name: Monk's Flurry
description: You gain the action.

name: Nimble Strike
description: You're cunning enough to find an opening in an opponent's attack.

name: Ode to Ouroboros
description: You learn the composition spell, which enables you to temporarily spare your allies from death.

name: Ongoing Strategy
description: You're constantly studying small aspects of everyone's movements, even if you don't have a stratagem in place ahead of time.

name: Open the Blazing Eye
description: Frequency once per dayThanks to your diligence in the study of divine and occult mysteries, you can focus to temporarily attain a perception beyond the ordinary.

name: Overpowering Charge
description: You trample your foes as you charge past them.

name: Overwhelming Energy
description: Druid With a complex gesture, you call upon the primal power of your spell to overcome enemies' resistances.

name: Pact of the Nightblossom
description: You've sworn a pact with Jenway Nightblossom of the Synod of Truth in Dreams, a talented oneiromancer and pactbinder.

name: Pass Through
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Filtering your form through the substance of an object, you can pass through walls, doors, and more.

name: Patron's Whisper
description: You gain the ability to speak to your charge over great distances.

name: Peafowl Strut
description: Requirements You are in .

name: Peerless Warden
description: Your mastery of primal magic has given you access to the greatest secrets of warden magic.

name: Penetrating Fire
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow.You blast a bullet through one foe and into another.

name: Penetrating Shot
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon.

name: Perfect Ki Expert
description: You gain an appropriate qi spell for your School of Perfection: for Unblinking Flame, for Unbreaking Waves, for Unfolding Wind, or for Untwisting Iron.

name: Petrifying Gaze Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have attempted a saving throw against a creature's petrifying gaze or a similar ability or have identified a creature with such an ability in combat
description: Either by witnessing or surviving the petrifying stare of a medusa or similar creature, you have learned to petrify those you lock eyes with.

name: Phenom's Verve
description: You're possessed with an incredibly vivacious spark that separates you not only from ordinary gun users and gunslingers, but even from other phenoms.

name: Plant Shape
description: You can take the shape of a plant creature.

name: Potent Poisoner
description: By concentrating your poisons' toxic components, you make them harder for victims to resist.

name: Practiced Defender
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: After extensive practice with the Swords, you're comfortable enough with your shield to move at a normal pace with it raised.

name: Practiced Reloads
description: You've mastered the reloading techniques and methods usually practiced by only the most dedicated firearm professionals.

name: Precious Munitions
description: You mix flecks of precious materials you've gathered on your journeys into your custom bullets to bring out those properties in your temporary ammunition.

name: Precise Debilitations
description: You attack with great precision.

name: Prevailing Position
description: Trigger You are targeted by an attack or attempt a Reflex saving throw against a damaging effect, and you are in a stance.Your flexibility with stances lets you sacrifice their benefits to better protect yourself.

name: Pristine Weapon
description: Your verdant weapon can cut through the resistances of magical creatures.

name: Protective Bond
description: Trigger You and your eidolon are in a damaging effect's area.

name: Provocator Dedication
description: Access Successfully defeat the eberarks in the Irorium.For you, fighting is as much about style as skill.

name: Pushing Attack
description: Your eidolon has an attack that pushes away enemies.

name: Quicken Heartbeat
description: Frequency once per turn You've replaced your heart with one made of animated quicksilver and living adamantine.

name: Quickened Casting
description: Frequency once per day Bard If your next action is to cast a bard cantrip or a bard spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank bard spell slot you have, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

name: Radiant Armament
description: Your blessed armament radiates power, further enhancing your chosen weapon.

name: Rain-Scribe Mobility
description: You surround yourself in a mantle of Rain-Scribe magic and Stride twice; difficult terrain does not reduce your Speed, even if the difficult terrain has been manipulated by magic.

name: Rapid Recharge
description: Frequency once per day You tap into an arcane trick to recover your ability to meld spells and attacks.

name: Reactive Charm
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are the target of a spell or attack.

name: Rebounding Assault
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or loaded crossbow in one hand and a bludgeoning or slashing melee weapon in the other.You hurl your melee weapon at an opponent, then fire a bullet into the weapon's hilt, making it bounce back to your grasp.

name: Recover Spell
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements An enemy's action disrupted your attempts to Cast a Spell since the beginning of your last turn.

name: Redirecting Draft
description: Trigger You or an ally within 10 feet of you is the target of a ranged physical Strike.

name: Redirecting Shot
description: Trigger An ally misses with a ranged attack that uses a thrown weapon or ammunition.

name: Reflexive Riposte
description: You can riposte almost without a thought.

name: Renewing Cycle
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: The first time each round that you , you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level that last until the start of your next turn.

name: Replenishment of War
prerequisites: expert in your deity's favoured weapon
description: Striking out against your enemies draws praise and protection from your deity.

name: Repurposed Parts
description: You are familiar with the fittings and cogwheels of your snares and can repurpose parts from prepared quick-deploy snares to assemble a new creation on the fly.

name: Resilient Touch
description: Your healing energies create an aura of protection that defends your allies against more than just blades and arrows.

name: Resounding Blow
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon that deals bludgeoning damage.You strike your enemy in the head with such force that their ears ring.

name: Reverberating Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, metal is in your elemental philosophy
description: Your spell disorients your targets with a metallic clangor.

name: Roadkill
description: Requirements You are piloting a vehicle.In your hands, any vehicle is a weapon.

name: Rockslide Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, earth is in your elemental philosophy
description: You enhance your spell with elemental earth, causing chunks of stone to litter the ground.

name: Rocky Flesh
description: Your flesh takes on the hardness of stone.

name: Roll the Bones of Fate
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou roll a handful of bones to learn (or perhaps influence) the future course of events.

name: Rope Mastery
prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication, expert in Athletics
description: Ropes are your tool of choice, and you deploy them in versatile ways.

name: Rubbery Skin
description: Your skin develops a malleable, rubbery quality.

name: Runic Mind Smithing
description: You focus your mind on thoughtforms of fundamental magical forces, shaping them into a property rune that you mentally etch onto your mind weapon.

name: Running Kick
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with a foot, hoof, or talon unarmed attack
description: Your companion weaves in and out of combat, swiftly attacking before getting to a better position.

name: Saving Slash
description: Trigger An opponent critically hits you with a melee attack.

name: Scour the Library
description: Seeing an enemy's attack, you quickly consult multiple scraps of lore in your mind, synthesizing them into the perfect plan.

name: Scout's Pounce
description: Requirements You are from or by all of your opponents, and you aren't within 10 feet of any enemy.

name: Scroll Adept
description: During your daily preparations, you can create two temporary scrolls containing arcane spells from your spellbook.

name: Seal of the Golden Dragon
prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication, Golden Dragon's Bounty
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You would take acid, cold, electricity, poison, fire, or sonic damage.

name: Sense the Strike
prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication, master in Survival
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

name: Shadow Magic
description: You gain the ability to fuse and play with shadows by using focus spells specific to shadowdancers.

name: Shadow of Death
description: Strikes you make with your deity's favored weapon against a creature with the condition have the death trait, causing the target to be instantly killed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Shadow Reservoir
prerequisites: ability to cast spells from spell slots, Shadowcaster Dedication
description: Your own shadow speaks to you, providing knowledge of spells and a reservoir of magical power.

name: Shadow Sneak Attack
description: You gain the class feature, except you deal 1d6 precision damage regardless of your level.

name: Shall not Falter, Shall not Rout
description: You gain the focus spell.

name: Share Weakness
description: Requirements You are Exploiting a creature's Vulnerability using mortal weakness.

name: Shared Avoidance
description: You can project your premonitions of danger to your allies.

name: Shared Synergy
description: You can grant the benefit from Dualistic Synergy to an ally within 30 feet instead of yourself, either allowing that ally to Recall Knowledge, granting that ally temporary Hit Points, or both, depending on the spell's tradition.

name: Shattering Strike (Weapon Improviser)
description: Trigger An improvised weapon that you are wielding becomes broken as a result of a critical success on an Improvised Pummel.

name: Shield of Faith
description: Residual energy from your domain spells bolsters your defenses.

name: Shield of Reckoning
prerequisites: blessed shield, champion's reaction, Shield Warden
description: Frequency once per round Trigger An enemy's attack against an ally matches the trigger for both your Shield Block reaction and your champion's reaction.When you shield your ally against an attack, you call upon your power to protect your ally further.

name: Side by Side (Druid)
description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem, distracting your foes and keeping them off balance.

name: Signature Spell Expansion
description: Your innate connection to magic lets you cast more spells with greater freedom.

name: Signature Spell Expansion (Psychic)
description: Your direct mental grasp of your power lets you cast more spells with greater freedom.

name: Signifer's Sight
description: The magic flowing through your signifer's mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light.

name: Silencing Strike
description: A quick strike to the face or mouth silences your opponent.

name: Silent Sting
prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication, expert in Stealth
description: Trigger You make a Strike with a weapon of light bulk.You quickly hide your weapon to make it difficult to pin the attack on you.

name: Sin Counterspell
description: Your deep connection to a specific sin allows you to easily negate spells that sin opposes.

name: Sinking Jaws
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with a jaws or fangs unarmed attack
description: Like how a constrictor wraps itself around its next meal, your companion tightens its teeth around its constrained prey to squeeze the life out of it.

name: Sixth Pillar Dedication
prerequisites: Dexterity +2, expert in Acrobatics, able to cast spells
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover Compilation
description: You use your physical discipline to channel your magic.

name: Slayer's Presence
description: Your very presence strikes fear into the undead.

name: Sleeper Hold
description: Requirements You have a creature or .

name: Slingshot Maneuver
description: Trigger A willing ally enters a space within your lash's reach using a move action.

name: Sneak Adept
description: It's almost impossible to spot you.

name: Sour Bomb
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can mix ingredients with a powerful sour smell into an alchemical bomb to make its explosion an overpowering stench.

name: Spear of Doom
description: Requirements An enemy hit you with an attack dealing the same damage type as your cursed weakness within the last round, and you are Doomed 1 or greater.The conditions for your doom have been met, and you brace yourself for a battle that will see you either live to fight another day or die a legend.

name: Spectral Advance
description: You gain the devotion spell, which lets you move to an enemy, bypassing hindrances.

name: Spell Swallow
description: Your ostilli has grown strong enough to completely consume a spell cast at you, granting you the action.

name: Spellmaster's Ward
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You can create a number of powerful shielding runes that bolster your defenses against damaging spells by absorbing the worst of the energy to keep you safe.

name: Spinebreaker
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You squeeze your opponent in a vicious bear hug, putting intense pressure on their nerves, joints, or other pain points.

name: Spiritual Flurry
prerequisites: Scion of Domora Dedication, Spiritual Strike
description: When you use Spiritual Strike, hit targets become until the end of your current turn.

name: Spraying Mutation
description: Your ostilli can launch a multitude of darts at once over a short distance.

name: Springboard
description: Requirements Your previous action was a successful spinning talon Strike against an adjacent foe.

name: Spy's Countermeasures
description: You've learned how to analyze and fake your responses to the most common magic used against spies.

name: Staggering Blow
description: Requirements You're riding a megafauna companion that has a melee Strike.

name: Stalwart Standard
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your banner makes it harder for your foes to push your allies around and encourages your allies to protect the innocent.

name: Starlit Spells
description: The stars reveal and punish your enemies.

name: Steal the Sky
description: You can take away the air that keeps a flying foe aloft.

name: Steal Time
description: Frequency once per hour You reach into another creature's timeline and attempt to alter their flow of time.

name: Stonebane
description: Your stonestrike attacks deal 1d6 additional damage against constructs, creatures with the earth trait, and earthen objects, such as a stone door.

name: Strident Command
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners, master in Intimidation, Voice of Authority
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: The common folk heed your demands, and though your true foes rarely bend to your commands, when they do the hesitation can cost them the battle.

name: Stumbling Finisher
description: Your excellent display of fighting prowess leaves your opponent stumbling back.

name: Stunt Performer Stance
description: Requirements You are unarmored.You clear your mind, regulate your breathing, and prepare your muscles in a stance inspired by Kemen Kayton, a graduate of Zimar's Monastery of the Seven Forms.

name: Surrounding Flames
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast wall of fire
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of flame, you can form the wall into a 10-foot-radius hemisphere of fire.

name: Suspect of Opportunity
description: Trigger A creature who isn't, to your knowledge, tied to any of your active investigations takes a hostile action against you in combat.Sometimes something intrudes upon your case unexpectedly, such as an ambush sent to bring your investigation to a close.

name: Sustaining Steel
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, inexorable iron hybrid study
description: Trigger You Cast a Spell using a spell slot.

name: Sweeping Fan Redirection
prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication, Sweeping Fan Block
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding two fans, one in each hand.You can redirect ammunition back at the creature that fired it with sweeping gusts of wind.

name: Sweeping Tail
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with a tail unarmed attack
description: Your companion swings its tail powerfully.

name: Switcheroo
description: Trigger You are targeted by a ranged attack.

name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
description: You learn the composition spell, which enables you to protect an ally against incapacitating conditions.

name: Tactical Debilitations
description: You learn new debilitations that grant you tactical advantages against your foes.

name: Tactical Reflexes
description: You are particularly swift at punishing foes who leave you openings.

name: Tag Team
description: Trigger You or your spotter misses with a Strike against a creature, and the creature is within the other's melee reach or first range increment.

name: Tales of the Road
description: The blessings of Isthralei connect you to the thrum of the stories that underlie all settlements.

name: Tangle of Battle
description: Trigger You critically hit an adjacent enemy.Your vicious strike pulls your foe closer, giving you the opportunity to grab them.

name: Targeting Finisher
description: Your attack harms and hinders your foe.

name: Tempest-Sun Shielding
description: Trigger You or an ally within 30 feet takes damage.

name: Terrain Form
description: Frequency once per day You crumble to pieces, becoming composed of the very terrain to which you're bound, with the effects of the gaseous form spell, or you reconstitute into your normal form.

name: Terrifying Howl
description: You unleash a terrifying howl.

name: Thaumaturge's Investiture
description: Magical equipment and gear are the tools of your trade, and you know you need as many as possible to help you against the supernatural.

name: The Dead Walk
description: You beseech warrior spirits to come forth and aid you.

name: Three Pecks of Dew
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: At this stage of cultivation, your body is as much spirit as flesh.

name: Through Spell
description: Spells you cast can transform briefly into vital essence, traveling harmlessly through living and undead creatures between you and your target, blocked only by solid objects.

name: Tiller's Aid
description: You can use the reaction to help a member of your crop even if you haven't prepared to do so.

name: Tiller's Drive
description: Your Speed bonus from Bellflower Dedication increases to +10 feet.

name: Topple Foe
description: Trigger An ally succeeds at a melee Strike against an enemy you are both adjacent to.You take advantage of the opening created by your ally to tip your foe off their feet.

name: Toppling Tentacles
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast black tentacles
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , replace the spell's standard effects with the following: Tentacles slither along the ground in the area, attempting to hinder anyone within.

name: Torrential Backlash
description: Requirements You are in a curse maelstrom state.Calling upon forbidden practices, you release the curse from within yourself, allowing it free rein to destroy everything around you.

name: Touch of Lunacy
description: In moments of viciousness, your curse can partially infect your prey.

name: Trample Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have seen a creature use Trample or have identified a creature with Trample in combat
description: You Stride up to double your speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, trampling each creature whose space you enter.

name: Trampling Charge
description: Requirements You are riding a mount that has a melee Strike using its legs (claw, talons, hoof, etc.).You urge your mount to charge into the fray, trampling all enemies who stand in your path.

name: Transcendent Deflection
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger An enemy within your reach would damage you or your ally with an attack.

name: Transpose
description: You switch places with your eidolon.

name: Trial by Skyfire
description: Your lips murmur as you portend a great disaster, one you hope you survive.

name: Trick Shot
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded crossbow or firearm.You shoot not at your foe but at an object nearby.

name: Tumbling Opportunist
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements Your most recent action was to or , and you successfully moved through an enemy's space.You use a burst of stamina to perform a breathtaking feat of Acrobatics as you speed through a foe's space, leaving your foe lying flat on their back.

name: Tunnel
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You gain a burrow speed of 10 feet.

name: Turn to Mist
description: Frequency once per hour You turn into vapor, gaining the effects of .

name: Twin Riposte
description: Trigger A creature within your reach critically fails to Strike you.

name: Twin Shot Knockdown
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded crossbow or loaded firearm in each hand.You fire at an enemy while targeting a part of its anatomy that will disrupt its balance.

name: Twin Weakness
description: Requirements You're holding an implement and a weapon, you are using Exploit Vulnerability with mortal weakness or personal antithesis, and the target creature is within reach of both your implement and weapon.

name: Unbelievable Escape
description: Your ability to narrowly evade danger defies all logic.

name: Unbreakable Bond
description: You and your megafauna companion are bound together; as long as you live, it's much harder for your companion to die.

name: Uncanny Dodge
description: You gain the class feature.

name: Unobstructed Shot
description: With a quick use of brute force, you remove an obstacle and take a calculated shot as part of the same motion.

name: Unseat
description: Requirements You are riding your mount and wielding a jousting weapon.With a mighty blow from atop your companion, you attempt to knock an opponent off their mount.

name: Unsheathing the Sword-Light
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements Your is charged, and you're wielding a one-handed weapon in the sword group.Honed through 10,000 battles, your sword's mere light can shatter ambitions and break armies.

name: Unstable Concoction
description: You can mix a wondrous yet volatile liquid into an alchemical consumable if it has an initial effect that uses dice.

name: Unusual Composition
description: You can translate the emotion and power of a composition to other mediums.

name: Uzunjati Recollection
prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling, master in a Recall Knowledge skill
description: You tell a story spontaneously from nearly forgotten facts, delving into your memory and entertaining your audience in the process.

name: Veil of Bugs
description: Your swarm is dense, blotting out vision.

name: Venipuncture
description: Cost all your remaining sanguimancy Hit Points (minimum 3)A shell made up of hundreds of razor-thin needles of blood forms around you before exploding outward, lacerating foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30].

name: Vermillion Threads
prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, unfurling brocade hybrid study
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You use .Your Arcane Cascade sends threads to the four directions, creating a web of strings dyed by your skill and your enemies' blood.

name: Vicious Debilitations
description: The debilitations you dish out seriously impair your foes.

name: Vicious Rend
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with a claw, fist, pincer, or talon unarmed attack
description: Your companion sinks its claws and rips.

name: Vigil's Walls Rise Anew
description: As part of daily preparation, you can drill with a number of allies up to your Charisma modifier.

name: Vindicator's Judgment
description: You can pronounce judgment on your foes, making them magically susceptible to your attacks.

name: Ward Casting
description: Trigger You attempt a flat check for Steady Spellcasting, but you haven't rolled yet.

name: Warden's Step
description: You can guide your allies to move quietly through the wilderness.

name: Waters of Creation
description: Water is the source of life, and you draw upon this primordial force to heal your allies' wounds.

name: Wave Dashes Rocks
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You slam an unlucky foe with the tremendous power of a plunging wave.

name: Weapon-Rune Shifter
source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
description: You learn how to alter the magic of weapon runes by using a crystal as a focusing component.

name: Weighty Impact
description: Your eidolon knocks enemies down.

name: Whirlwind Stance
prerequisites: Staff Acrobat Dedication, expert proficiency in your staff
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are wielding your staff, which must have the parry trait.

name: Wide Overwatch
description: Through a variety of perceptive techniques, careful routines, and upgrades to your enhanced visual gear, you have become able to observe and maintain your overwatch at a much greater distance.

name: Widen the Gap
description: Once you have penetrated a foe's defenses, you can home in on the same spot to exploit your opponent's wound and deal some serious damage.

name: Wind Jump
description: You gather the wind beneath you, allowing you to soar as you jump.

name: Winding Flow
description: Frequency once per round Any journey consists of more than simply reaching your destination.

name: Winter's Embrace
description: Your eyes are accustomed to the harsh glare of the sun on snow and ice.

name: Witch's Communion
description: You can keep watch over multiple charges.

name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
description: You gain the ki spell.

name: A Home in Every Port
description: You have a reputation in towns and villages you've visited, and residents are always willing to open their doors to you.

name: Axuma's Awakening
prerequisites: Exposure to the Well of Axuma
description: Choose two cantrips from the arcane spells list.

name: Axuma's Vigor
description: Your vigor grants anyone using Medicine checks to Administer First Aid to you, or use any of the Treat actions on you, a +2 circumstance bonus to their check.

name: Caravan Leader
description: You know how to get the most effort out of your allies on the road.

name: Incredible Investiture
description: You have an incredible ability to invest more magic items.

name: Incredible Scout
description: When you scout, you are particularly alert for danger, granting your allies precious moments to prepare to fight.

name: Sanguine Tenacity
description: Your blood carries permanent regenerative properties.

name: Acknowledge Fan
description: Your reputation as a Firebrand precedes you, and you need only make a simple gesture or give a look of recognition to amaze those around you.

name: Additional Shadow Magic
description: Choose an additional shadowdancer focus spell you haven't already selected from Shadow Magic.

name: Adept Storyteller
prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling, master in a Recall Knowledge skill
description: Your ability to tell stories rivals those of the finest bards.

name: Advanced Firearm Familiarity
prerequisites: Gunslinger Dedication, expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attack
description: You have familiarity with advanced firearms, treating them as martial weapons for the purposes of proficiency.

name: Advanced Order Training
prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication, Hellknight Dedication or Hellknight Signifer Dedication
description: You gain the greater order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

name: Advanced Seeker of Truths
prerequisites: Eldritch Researcher Dedication, Seeker of Truths
description: You have unlocked deeper secrets to uncovering and hoarding lore.

name: Aegis of Arnisant
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant, Shield Block, master in Religion
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield.

name: Affliction Mercy
description: The divine grace that flows through you grants reprieve from an affliction.

name: Alchemical Power
description: You become an expert in the alchemist class DC.

name: Amplifying Touch
description: Your healing energies empower attacks.

name: Apocalypse Rider Dedication
description: In the darkest hour of the night, a fearsome and terrible steed arrives as a gift from a powerful daemonic patron.

name: Apparition Cloud
description: Trigger You are targeted by an attack.

name: Archfiend Dedication
description: Driven by your Calling, you've begun to make plans for your own personal realm from whence you're destined to rule over an army of fiends.

name: Architect of Flame
description: Flames rise and shape to your will, forming a wall or dome of your design.

name: Ascended Celestial Dedication
description: Your Calling has driven you to perform mortal deeds that will result in your ascension to the ranks of celestials.

name: Assassinate
description: Requirements You have designated a mark using and are completely unnoticed by your mark.You strike with one swift movement, trying to instantly slay your mark.

name: Aura of Faith
description: You radiate an aura of belief that imbues your attacks and those of nearby allies with divine power.

name: Banshee Cry Display
description: You've learned how to unleash a sudden and disruptive noisemaker at just the right moment in your display, a technique that can cause a spellcaster to fumble the phrasing of their magic.

name: Beast Lord Dedication
prerequisites: a mature animal companion or an advanced construct companion
description: Your Calling has united your destiny with a companion, harnessing a connection between you that links your minds, hearts, and souls.

name: Beastmaster's Call
description: Frequency once per turn You quickly call in a primal projection of a non-active companion to provide the companion's support benefit.

name: Billowing Wings
prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication, animal companion with wings
description: You've trained your winged companions to gather air in their wings, whipping up a concentrated gust of wind at opponents, potentially staggering them.

name: Blade of Law
description: You call upon the power of law and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against a foe you have witnessed breaking or disrespecting the law or otherwise acting disorderly.

name: Blade of the Crimson Oath
description: You call upon the Crimson Oath to smite undead and then make a weapon or unarmed Strike against an undead foe.

name: Bleak Humorist
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points by a creature within 30 feet, but not immediately killedYou've watched dozens of morbid comedies depicting Beldam I, Taldor's prankster emperor whose wife accidentally killed him when she struck him with a marble bust after he jumped out

name: Blessed Counterstrike
prerequisites: champion's reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy's damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)
description: Requirements An enemy triggered your champion's reaction since the end of your last turn.You call upon divine power and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against the enemy who triggered your champion's reaction.

name: Blessed Denial
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet would become , , , , or .

name: Blood Component Substitution
description: You can bypass the need for incantations and gestures by drawing energy directly from your blood, causing you to visibly glow the color of your blood and crackle with magical energy.

name: Blood in the Air
description: Requirements An enemy you've damaged with a ranged weapon during the last minute is or from you.Once you've locked on to a target, little can obscure your aim.

name: Blood Sovereignty
description: You wield blood magic masterfully.

name: Bloodline Focus
description: By listening to the beating of your heart, your focus recovers faster.

name: Bloody Debilitation
description: Your attacks slice arteries and veins.

name: Boost Modulation
description: You aren't satisfied with keeping to just one kind of boost from your constant tinkering, so you've learned to modulate between several possibilities at once.

name: Broken Chain Dedication
description: Your Calling was sparked by your outrage at tyrants, after having witnessed a brutal act of oppression that you could no longer abide.

name: Brutal Finish
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon in two hands.

name: Buzzing Death Cicadas
description: Your swarm takes on characteristics of the death cicadas of the Mana Wastes, whose distinctive buzz is said to be a herald of imminent demise.

name: Call the Hunt
description: Requirements You are observing your hunted prey.You instruct your allies on how best to defeat your prey.

name: Cartwheel Dodge
