description: Requirements You aren't or overburdened.

name: Catch and Kill
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: Trigger A creature within your reach uses a move action, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.When you've decided to quash a story, no one can escape from you with any incriminating information.

name: Cautious Word
prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling, ability to cast shield
description: Trigger An enemy hits you with a Strike.

name: Celestial Cacophony
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYour weapon contains a detonation chamber that launches fireworks, sparklers, and black powder pellets that sizzle, twist, and scatter on the ground in a cacophonous manner liable to annoy the entire Celestial Court.

name: Cellular Reconstruction
description: Your ostilli takes control of your nervous system and kicks your cellular functions into overdrive when you're about to die.

name: Chain Reaction
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You fire your gun once, creating a devastating and unpredictable chain of events; perhaps your bullet strikes exactly the right spot on a water tower, causing it to flood and incite a stampede of horses which knock over a lantern that sets a city on fire.

name: Champion's Sacrifice
description: You can suffer so that others might live.

name: Charged Creation
description: Your magic is drawn to your persistent creations.

name: Cheat Death
description: Trigger You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.Somehow you always escape the reaper by a hair's breadth.

name: Choking Smoke
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast heightened to at least 6th level, you can modify the spell's standard effects as follows: Reduce the spell's damage by 6d6.

name: Chorus Companion
description: Animals can be musical partners as much as the subjects or audience.

name: Claw and Talon Flow
description: Requirements You're in either claw stance or talon stance.You fluidly shift between your two stances.

name: Clever Counterspell
description: You creatively apply your prepared spells to Counterspell a much wider variety of your opponents' magic.

name: Coffin Bound
description: You bind your spirit to a coffin filled with soil of your homeland, making it a place of recovery.

name: Collapse Wall
description: Trigger A creature moves into the bombs' splash area.

name: Combat Premonition
description: By narrowing your sense of the future, you can improve that of your allies.

name: Communal Sustain
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Frequency once per round Choose one spell with a sustained duration that one of your allies has in effect.

name: Competitive Eater
description: Gorging on flesh after your stomach is full fortifies you, making you hardy enough to withstand more punishment.

name: Compliant Gold
description: Usage imbued into a melee weapon ikonYou can command your weapon to shrink or grow, for convenience or power.

name: Conflux Focus
description: You imagine how you'll weave magic and combat into future battles, improving your focus.

name: Construct Dynamo
description: Access You are an automaton or are otherwise from the ancient Jistka Imperium.You've learned the secrets of Jistkan construct prostheses, allowing you to incorporate construct components into your dynamo and gain a portion of their magic.

name: Consult the Spirits (Rivethun Emissary)
description: Frequency once per dayYou spend 1 hour communing with powerful spirits of the world to gain insight, information, or advice.

name: Contingency Gadgets
description: You are too brilliant to be caught off guard, and you always have just the right gadget for the situation.

name: Coordinated Charge
description: You heroically dash into the fray, inspiring your allies to follow.

name: Coordinated Distraction
description: Access Help either the Washboard Dogs or the Diobel Sweepers destroy their rival.

name: Corpse Stench
description: Your body exudes an overwhelming scent of decay in a @Template[emanation|distance:10], so putrid that it nauseates creates within that range.

name: Coven Spell
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet Casts a Spell.You rhyme with your ally's incantations or echo their movements, linking your magic to empower their spell in one of two ways:If their spell deals damage and doesn't have a duration, you grant that spell a status bonus to damage equal to its rank.

name: Cracked Mountain
description: Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

name: Crimson Breath
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: Frequency once per dayYou gain a fire breath weapon similar to that of a crimson worm.

name: Critical Debilitation
description: Your debilitations are especially effective on your most powerful attacks.

name: Cut the Bonds
prerequisites: Bellflower Dedication, expert in a melee weapon
description: Select a magical effect that has made an adjacent member of your crop clumsy, grabbed, paralyzed, restrained, or slowed.

name: Daredevil's Gambit
description: If you critically succeed at your Daring Act, you can enter the target's space and remain there until the beginning of your next turn or until the target moves, whichever comes first.

name: Dashing Strike
description: Requirements You are adjacent to an enemy.

name: Deadeye
description: You relax your eyes, taking in the smallest movements of objects, stirring of grass and leaves, and other signs of the presence of hidden things, granting you the ability to locate creatures.

name: Deadly Poison Weapon
description: Your poisons are devastatingly potent.

name: Deep Freeze
description: You vent a jet of supercooled fluid from your innovation, damaging a foe and slowing it down.

name: Defensive Dismissal
description: Trigger A creature you're aware of critically succeeds on a Strike against you.

name: Defensive Recovery
description: Your faith provides temporary protection in addition to healing.

name: Desiccating Inhalation
description: Frequency once per hourYou draw in the moisture from nearby creatures, draining them dry to heal your wounds.

name: Desperate Wish
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You call out a desperate wish to the stars to save a friend.

name: Determined Lore Seeker
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've mastered useful spells that let you find hidden truths others might miss, and a preferred spell comes naturally to you.

name: Diamond Soul
description: You have fortified your body and mind against eldritch effects.

name: Directed Poison
prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication, ability to cast cloudkill
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: When you cast , modify its duration to be sustained up to 1 minute, and modify its standard effect to include the following: The cloud doesn't move away from you each round.

name: Disrupt Qi
description: You carefully target a creature's pressure points to block its inner life force.

name: Distracting Shot
description: The sheer power of your attacks, or the overwhelming number of them, leaves an enemy flustered.

name: Diverse Weapon Expert
prerequisites: Fighter Dedication, expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attacks
description: Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and martial weapons increase to expert, and your proficiency rank for advanced weapons increases to trained.

name: Divine Wall
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield.

name: Dodging Roll
description: Trigger You take damage from an area effect that allows a Reflex save.

name: Domain Fluency
description: You command a deep understanding of the domains related to your mystery.

name: Domain Focus
description: Your devotion to your deity's domains grows greater, and so does the power granted to you.

name: Double Prey
description: You can focus on two foes at once, hunting both of them down.

name: Dragon Shape
description: You can take on the shape of some of the world's most fearsome creatures.

name: Dragon's Rage Wings
description: You sprout dragon wings from your back of the same color as your chosen dragon.

name: Drive-By Attack
description: Requirements You are piloting a vehicle.You can smoothly line up an attack without disrupting your control.You , gaining the effects of the Drive action for the same number of actions you spent to Drive-By Attack.

name: Dueling Dance (Fighter)
description: Requirements You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.

name: Eagle Eye
description: Your practice with crossbows and firearms has sharpened your attention to detail.

name: Eagle Eyes
description: You and your spotter are adept at watching out for one another.

name: Eclectic Polymath
description: Your flexible mind can quickly shift from one spell to another.

name: Educated Assessment
description: You attempt to Recall Knowledge about a creature, and the GM uses the same secret roll result against the creature's Deception or Stealth DC, giving you the information from a Battle Assessment.

name: Effortless Impulse
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Elaborate Scroll Esoterica
description: You've picked up more scraps of magic texts, improving your makeshift scrolls.

name: Emblazon Antimagic
description: Your deity's symbol protects against offensive magic.

name: Embrace the Pain
description: Trigger A creature within your reach damages you with a melee attack.Ignoring your pain, you reach out and grab the creature or weapon that caused you harm.

name: Emergency Medical Assistance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements An adjacent ally is suffering persistent damage.

name: Empiricist's Eye
description: Sharp and piercing, your eyes see all and convey more.

name: Empowered Onslaught
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You critically hit and Sustain a battle aura.When your body and mind are perfectly in sync and pushed to the limit, it can produce even greater results.

name: Enforce Oath
prerequisites: any feat with the oath trait
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You can see a creature you've sworn an oath against.You call on your oath to embolden you in combat.

name: Enigma's Knowledge
description: Your muse whispers knowledge to you at all the right times.

name: Enticing Dwelling
description: Your spirit dwelling is particularly inviting to spirit wisps.

name: Epiphany at the Crossroads
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Escape Timeline
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Eternal Legend Dedication
description: As your renown as a fighter grows, your Calling comes to fruition.

name: Evasiveness (Rogue)
prerequisites: Rogue Dedication, expert in Reflex saves
description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.

name: Evasiveness (Swashbuckler)
prerequisites: Swashbuckler Dedication, expert in Reflex saves
description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.

name: Expert Animist Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Animist Spellcasting, master in Religion
description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

name: Expert Bard Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Bard Spellcasting, master in Occultism
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting or Spellshot Dedication
description: You've learned the deeper secrets of beast guns, making you an expert in the magic they grant you.

name: Expert Cathartic Spellcasting
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Cleric Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Cleric Spellcasting, master in Religion
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Combat Eidolon
description: Your eidolon advances its capabilities in combat.

name: Expert Druid Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Druid Spellcasting, master in Nature
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
description: You learn additional eldritch archer magic.

name: Expert Kinetic Control
description: You become an expert in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

name: Expert Magus Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Magus Spellcasting, master in Arcana
description: You gain the Expert Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Oracle Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Oracle Spellcasting, master in Religion
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Psychic Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Psychic Spellcasting, master in Occultism
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Red Mantis Magic
prerequisites: Basic Red Mantis Magic, master in Religion
description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

name: Expert Rivethun Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Rivethun Spellcasting, master in Religion
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Benefits.

name: Expert Scroll Cache
description: Your scroll collection has vastly grown, both in size and potency.

name: Expert Snowcasting
description: You draw ever more magical cold into your being, learning how to manipulate it to your whims.

name: Expert Sorcerer Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Sorcerer Spellcasting, master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion, depending on bloodline
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Summoner Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Summoner Spellcasting, master in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition
description: You gain the Expert Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Witch Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Witch Spellcasting, master in the skill associated with your patron's tradition
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Expert Wizard Spellcasting
prerequisites: Basic Wizard Spellcasting, master in Arcana
description: You gain the Expert Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Explosive Metamorphosis
description: You use additional primal energy to transform, creating a burst of elemental energy to complement your transformation.

name: Extend Elixir
description: Integrating your own personal energy into the elixirs you create causes them to affect you for longer.

name: Extract Vow of Nonviolence
description: You entice or threaten a weapon, making it swear not to harm you.

name: Familiar's Eyes
description: You use your familiar's senses as easily as your own.

name: Fantastic Leap
description: You launch yourself through the air at a foe.

name: Felling Shot
description: Your ranged attacks can shoot an unprepared foe right out of the air.

name: Festering Wounds
description: Wounds you inflict with your unarmed attacks fester and rot, becoming infected and difficult to heal.

name: Finessed Features
description: You've learned how to build snares that trigger based on visual stimuli.

name: Five-Gods Ram
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in .You attack in an unceasing flurry of charging headbutts.

name: Flesh Wound
description: You fire to ensure that even if your shot doesn't land cleanly, it still lands close enough to deal some damage.

name: Flexible Halcyon Spellcasting
description: You broaden your ability to channel your power into halcyon magic.

name: Flexible Transmogrification
description: You've learned how to transmogrify your eidolon to suit the circumstances of the day.

name: Flicker
description: You use your movements and disguises to make yourself a flickering blur.

name: Flinging Shove
description: Whether you're shoving opponents with a shield or a large weapon, you've learned to push them even further.

name: Flourishing Finish
description: Requirements Your last action was a Strike that dropped an opponent to 0 Hit Points.

name: Focused Shot
description: Requirements You are in .

name: For Love, For Lightning
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Access A character who performs a specialized mission for Clarethe Iomedar has access to this option.

name: Forcible Energy
description: You perform complex manipulations to make the energy from your spells so powerful that your enemies remain vulnerable to it afterward.

name: Foresee Danger
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

name: Foreseen Failure
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A spell you cast has no effect because you critically failed all your spell attack rolls or because all targets critically succeeded at their saving throws.

name: Forewarn
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger An enemy within your overwatch field attempts an attack against an ally who is also within your overwatch field.Your foresight and planning are more valuable than armor as you direct your ally away from danger, but there's a limit to how often you can guide your all

name: Fortunate Relief
description: Your god favors your attempts to remove afflictions and conditions.

name: Frightening Appearance
description: Your dramatic appearances can frighten bystanders.

name: Frostbite Runes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: Thick tattoos, each one a rune fragment from the saumen kar's long-lost language spelling out their pact with their equally lost deity, cover your body and stretch across your limbs, torso, and face.

name: Furious Grab
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike, and either you have a hand free or your Strike used a grapple weapon.

name: Furnace Form
description: Opening your kinetic gate, you allow flames to consume your form and leave you a living flame.

name: Garland Spell
description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell with the fungus or plant trait, a garland of plants grows in a @Template[burst|distance:10] in the spell's range.

name: General's Gambit
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You move strategically forward to draw the enemy's attention away from your allies.

name: Get Used to Disappointment
description: Requirements Your turn begins, and one target within 30 feet failed an attack roll or skill check against you on its last turn.You capitalize on an opponent's failure with smug attitude and swagger, reminding them of the gap in skill between you and your opponent.

name: Ghosts in the Storm
description: Clouds, like eager pets, are drawn to you and to those in your good graces.

name: Gigantic Megafauna Companion
description: The mammoths and other megafauna ridden by your people are larger than any ordinary beast.

name: Gigavolt
description: When you unleash electricity from your innovation, you can bounce it off obstacles, creating a field of electric death.

name: Glacial Prison
description: Intense cold swirls around your foe, covering it in frost that slows it down and turns its body to ice.

name: Gladiator's Roar
description: Frequency once per dayYou can project your voice into a high-pitched screech that damages your foes.

name: Godling Dedication
description: Your Calling allows you to begin walking the path to true deific ascension, inspiring followers as your divine seed grows.

name: Grasping Limbs
description: Your eidolon grabs enemies.

name: Great Bear
description: Frequency once per hour When you transform, you can take on a bear's bulk and size.

name: Greater Despair
description: You increase the frequency of to once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

name: Greater Esoteric Spellcasting
description: Your understanding of magic has evolved, and so has your spellcasting.

name: Greater Physical Evolution
description: You change form readily.

name: Greater Revelation
description: You unlock deeper revelations hidden within your mystery.

name: Greater Spiritual Evolution
description: Your magical blood allows your spells to be fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

name: Greater Sun Blessing
description: Your connection to the Old Sun Gods grows stronger.

name: Green Tongue
description: You share a special kinship with all things green and living.

name: Gruesome Strike
prerequisites: champion's reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)
description: Requirements Your Strikes currently deal extra damage from your champion's reaction.Make a Strike against the creature that triggered your champion's reaction.

name: Guarded Advance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You slowly advance on the battlefield, taking utmost caution.

name: Hedge Maze
description: You sculpt a manicured maze of hedges.

name: Hell's Armaments
description: You've trained with your order's weapon and your Hellknight plate long enough to apply your expertise from other weapons and armor.

name: Hellknight Order Cross-Training
prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication, Hellknight Dedication or Hellknight Signifer Dedication
description: You gain the lesser order benefit of a Hellknight order other than the one to which you belong.

name: Hex Focus
description: Your patron's teachings have allowed you to achieve a deeper focus.

name: Illusory Identity
description: There are times when skills or looks are not enough to convince someone of your identity, and you instead require adequate documentation.

name: Imbue Mindlessness
description: You grasp the mind of an undead creature and temporarily wipe it as empty as a zombie's brain.

name: Improved Dueling Riposte
description: Your weapon whirls and darts, striking foes whenever the slightest opening or moment of weakness presents itself.

name: Improved Knockback
description: When you successfully a creature, increase both the distance you can push the creature and the distance you can move to follow along with the target by 5 feet on a success or 10 feet on a critical success.

name: Incredible Ricochet
description: After your first shot singles out your opponent's position, you direct another that ricochets around obstacles and strikes unerringly.

name: Inescapable Grasp
description: Your grasp has a supernatural quality to it, preventing your foes from easily escaping-with or without magical assistance.

name: Infectious Emotions
description: When you use , one ally within 30 feet gains the catharsis activation benefits in addition to you.

name: Inspirational Focus
description: Your connection to your muse has granted you unusual focus.

name: Instigate Psychic Duel
description: Frequency once per day You attempt to enter a psychic duel with a creature within 100 feet.

name: Intensify Investiture
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Your bond to your invested items enables you to put more of yourself into them.

name: Intercepting Hand
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your particular martial art includes various defensive actions designed to remove your opponent's ability to cause harm.

name: Interfering Surge
description: Trigger A creature you can see Casts a Spell.

name: Invoke Movement
description: Requirements You're under the effects of Enter Spirit Trance.You manifest a form of locomotion of the spirits all around, such as the wings of an animal spirit or the watery flow of a nature spirit.

name: Janatimo's Lessons
description: Thanks to Janatimo's secret techniques, you can weave your knowledge and words into powerful tools to assist your allies in life-threatening situations.

name: Judgement of the Monolith
description: You can use the oaths bound in your ka stone to compel the truth from the living and the dead.

name: Juggernaut's Fortitude
prerequisites: Barbarian Dedication, expert in Fortitude saves
description: Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.

name: Just as Planned
description: Frequency once per hourIn the blink of an eye, you calculate your enemy's movements and know exactly where to aim your next blow.

name: Keen Magical Detection
description: You sense magical dangers.

name: Knight in Shining Armor
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant, expert in light armor, medium armor, or unarmored defense, trained in heavy armor
description: As a knight in shining armor, you train daily in the heaviest armor, expanding your expertise to heavy armor.

name: Know Thy Doom
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are Doomed 1 or greater and your value would increase.As your legend grows, details of your demise become clearer.

name: Lasting Doubt
description: When you cast doubt upon your foes, the effect lasts longer than usual.

name: Legs of Stone
description: You gain a +2 status bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to or you.

name: Liberating Stride
description: Instead of you taking a Step at the end of your , the triggering ally can Stride up to half their Speed.

name: Lich Dedication
prerequisites: living creature, ability to cast 6th-rank or higher spells from spell slots, expert in Crafting, completed ritual to become a lich and crafted a soul cage
description: After years of study and careful planning, you finally completed a soul cage to house your soul and successfully performed a ritual to transform yourself into a lich.

name: Lightning Rings' Overcharge
prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication, Lightning Rings' Intervention
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your familiar can adopt an electrical form to empower weapon strikes.

name: Lightning Snares
description: You can rig a trap with incredible speed.

name: Link Focus
description: Your focus recovers faster.

name: Living Stone
description: Your body becomes living stone.

name: Lunging Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon.

name: Magic Sense
description: You have a literal sixth sense for ambient magic in your vicinity.

name: Magic Sense (Magus)
description: You have a literal sixth sense for ambient magic in your vicinity.

name: Make 'Em Sweat
description: Your line of questioning lets a suspect know you can see right through them, shaking them to the core.

name: Maneuvering Spell
description: Trigger You begin to Cast a Spell that requires at least 2 actions to cast.

name: Manifold Conduit
description: You can manifest multiple spirits at once in a cyclone around you.

name: Master of the Dead
description: You have reached the pinnacle of the reanimator's craft: the ability to raise nearly any corpse or skeleton as a gruesome mockery of the creature it once was.

name: Master Spotter
description: Your incredible perception and trusty enhanced visual gear allow you to see things others miss.

name: Master Spotter (Investigator)
description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

name: Master Spotter (Ranger)
description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

name: Meditative Focus
description: Your meditation is so effective that you can achieve a deep focus with the world around you.

name: Metallic Envisionment
description: You always account for every weakness, allowing your mind to imagine just the right physical form to take advantage of your opponents.

name: Miraculous Intervention
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Trigger An adjacent fiend or undead begins to use a reaction.

name: Mobile Finisher
description: You attack in motion.

name: Mortal Herald Dedication
prerequisites: worshipper of a specific deity, master in Religion or your deity's divine skill
description: You become a mortal herald of your deity, gaining power in return for your service.

name: Necromancer's Visage
prerequisites: ability to create or control undead, cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard
description: Necromantic energy demonstrates your power over undead, creating a demeanor that commands their fear and respect.

name: Necromantic Deflection
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You imbue your shield with life-giving energy to deflect harmful necromantic magic.

name: Night's Shine
description: Your power from the moon and stars becomes strong enough to illuminate the night sky.

name: No Stranger to Death
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Your regular exposure to the insidious putrescence of undeath inured you to its effects.

name: No!!!
description: Trigger A non-minion ally within 60 feet is reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Obscured Emergence
description: You are, by nature, a thing of gloomy woods and barren wilds, and when you choose show yourself, a bit of this gloom clings to you, obscuring your form with strange distortions or mist.

name: Oneiric Influence
description: While Infiltrating a Dream, you can also implant a suggestion in the target's mind.

name: Operatic Adventurer
prerequisites: Acrobat, Celebrity, Dandy, or Gladiator Dedication
description: Your training has focused you for the opera, and it certainly shows.

name: Overwhelming Breath
description: You control your breathing and align it with your qi, exhaling with controlled force in order to overcome your opponent's resistance.

name: Overwhelming Spellstrike
description: Requirements Your Spellstrike is charged.

name: Packed with Flavor
prerequisites: Wandering Chef Dedication, expert in Crafting or Cooking Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Edible morsels you create are particularly potent and bursting with flavor.

name: Pact of the Crossroads
description: You've sworn a pact with Ng the Hooded, the Eldest known as the Lord of the Crossroads, though your only sign of Ng's acknowledgment is the benefits you receive.

name: Pact of the Final Breath
description: You've sworn a pact with a powerful psychopomp-typically an olethros advocate or yamaraj judge-granting you a reprieve before your soul will be collected in exchange for respect for the dead and assistance against the undead.

name: Pale Horse
description: Your mount becomes a grotesque creature of foreboding when you ride it.

name: Paragon's Guard
description: Requirements You are wielding a shield.

name: Perfect Pitch
description: Your ear for harmony has enhanced your ability with musical magic.

name: Perfection's Path
prerequisites: Monk Dedication, expert in at least one saving throw
description: Choose one saving throw (Fortitude, Reflex, or Will) in which you are an expert.

name: Pesh Skin
description: Requirements You are transformed into a plant by a polymorph spell.

name: Play to the Crowd (Dandy)
description: You have a knack for knowing just how to manipulate groups by saying exactly what needs to be said.

name: Plentiful Snares
description: You can prepare incredible numbers of snares each day out of simple ingredients.

name: Pouncing Transformation
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape has a land Speed only
description: By transforming as you move, you attack from odd angles.

name: Predator's Pounce
description: Requirements You are unarmored or wearing light armor You close the distance to your prey in a blur, pouncing on the creature before it can react.

name: Preparation
description: You survey the battlefield, calculating the possibilities.

name: Primadonna
description: Frequency once per hourThe spotlight should always be on you and you alone.

name: Primal Focus
description: Your connection to nature is particularly strong, and the spirits of nature flock around you, helping you replenish your focus.

name: Primal Summons
description: Whenever you summon an ally, you can empower it with the elemental power of air, earth, fire, or water.

name: Prophesied Monarch Dedication
description: Your Calling has culminated in a destiny of rulership, and you're able to forge a mythic bond with noble knights whose destinies become intertwined with your own.

name: Psi Catastrophe
description: You stop holding your power back, unleashing it all in a catastrophic blast.

name: Purifying Spell
description: You purify the water within a creature's body to cleanse them of illness.

name: Rain of Razors
description: Razor-sharp slivers of metal fall from the sky.

name: Rapid Spark
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Rattle the Earth
description: Striking the ground with the gravity of the deepest rocks, you cause an earthquake.

name: Reach for the Sky
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm.You command the room, firing a gun into the air and ordering everyone to surrender and put their hands in the air.

name: Reactive Interference
description: Trigger An adjacent enemy begins to use a reaction.

name: Read the Land
description: You've learned how to commune with the land to learn information.

name: Reaper of Repose
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, master proficiency in a weapon
description: Your skill and fervor allow you to pierce undead defenses and exploit their weaknesses.

name: Reason Rapidly
description: Your mind works through clues at an unbelievable speed.

name: Reclaimant Plea
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, ability to cast divine spells
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You call on the power of the Crimson Oath to gain magical aid.

name: Recollect Studies
prerequisites: Swordmaster Dedication, expert in a skill used to Recall Knowledge
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You're fighting a creature of your level or lower that could be identified by Recall Knowledge with a skill in which you're an expert.

name: Redirect Elements
description: Trigger The spell attack roll for a foe's spell with an elemental trait targeting you fails or critically fails, and the elemental trait is in your elemental philosophy.

name: Reflexive Grapple
description: You've honed your reflexes so well that your lash can begin closing around a target as soon as it makes contact.

name: Reflexive Stance
description: Trigger You roll initiative You enter a stance without a thought.

name: Rejuvenation
description: The call of your unfinished business recreates you after destruction.

name: Resolute
description: You've tempered your mind and become resolute against effects that strain your willpower.

name: Reverberate
description: Trigger A creature or hazard would deal sonic damage to you.

name: Reverse Curse
description: When you counter a curse or misfortune effect, you send it back to destroy its originator.

name: Ricochet Feint
description: While in Ricochet Stance, you can bounce a thrown weapon off a foe to distract them.

name: Ricochet Shot
description: You bounce your shot off a nearby surface to strike your opponent from an unexpected angle.

name: Roar Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have been targeted by a creature's auditory ability that affects an area or have identified a creature with an auditory ability that affects an area
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou unleash a roar so loud that it's felt as deeply as it's heard.

name: Rock Rampart
description: Drawing on your connection to the Plane of Earth, you form a wall of rock and earth.

name: Roll with it (Kingmaker)
description: Trigger Your hunted prey, which must be a giant, hits you with a melee attack.

name: Rugged Survivalist
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've studied survival skills with the School of Swords experts and are comfortable spending long periods of time in the wilderness.

name: Sapping Symbol
description: Trigger While you have your symbol raised, you are about to take damage from a melee attack.

name: Sea Glass Guardians
description: Eerily beautiful elemental water beings race around you, eager to protect and heal you and your allies.

name: Second Ikon
description: You gain an additional ikon.

name: Second Sting
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Secret Eater
description: You have discovered and found favor with the cult within the church of Kabriri known as the Secret Eaters.

name: Secrets of Shadow
description: Your shadow's voice grows ever clearer; it whispers secrets of true power to you and shields your flesh from harm.

name: Self Destruct
description: Trigger Your reanimated clockwork companion is reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Sense Ki
description: You can read the presence of qi in your area.

name: Shadow Illusion
description: With an artful eye, you shape shadows into illusory forms.

name: Shadows Within Shadows
description: Trigger You would be detected by an enemy Seeking you, or an enemy would succeed at a counteract check against a spell making you , , or .

name: Shaped Contaminant
description: Through a combination of careful manipulation and precise breath control, you can deploy inhaled toxins precisely.

name: Share Tincture
description: You use Quick Tincture, and the item you create remains potent until the start of your next turn.

name: Shared Assault
description: In the triumph of battle, you can share the glory with another ally.

name: Shared Overdrive
description: You've experimented enough on your teammates to transfer a substantial number of powered-up gizmos to them, enabling one of your allies to benefit from the full effects and duration of your Overdrive.

name: Shared Replenishment
description: When your deity blesses your warlike acts, you can extend that favor to your allies.

name: Shared Sight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You bestow the mystical vision granted to you by your muse upon your allies.

name: Shared Tide
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape has a swim Speed
description: You Swim up to twice the normal distance.

name: Shared Warding
description: You ward your allies from the attacks of your foes whenever you apply those protections to yourself.

name: Shattering Shot
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or loaded crossbow and are wearing or holding an alchemical bomb.You fling a bomb into the air and then shoot it with your gun before it falls, raining destruction down over a wide area.

name: Shattershields
description: Four plates of pitted metal float around you to intercept attacks.

name: Shepherd of Desolation
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, Survivor of Desolation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You know how to keep others alive in the Gravelands' murkiest shadows.

name: Shield Salvation
description: You can save your shield from total destruction, even after a devastating attack.

name: Shooter's Camouflage
description: You specialize in blending into a particular type of environment, able to disappear after taking your shot.

name: Shoulder Catastrophe
description: Trigger An enemy critically succeeds at a Strike against an adjacent ally.

name: Side by Side (Ranger)
description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem.

name: Signifer Armor Expertise
description: You've spent enough time helping your comrades equip medium and heavy armor that you spread your own expertise to those armors as well.

name: Silver's Refrain
description: You learn the composition cantrip, which aids you when fighting devils.

name: Sing to the Steel
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You strike magical tones that can turn the tide of combat.

name: Six Pillars Stance
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover Compilation
description: Requirements You are unarmored.

name: Slay
description: Requirements Your target is Doomed 2 or greater.You finish your target with a vicious attack.

name: Smooth Hover
description: Trigger You're airborne at the end of your turn.

name: Space-Time Shift
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Speaking Sky
description: You gain the ki spell.

name: Spellmaster's Resilience
description: Your experience with a specific type of harmful magic makes you more resistant to it.

name: Spirit's Wrath
description: You call forth an ephemeral spirit, typically the apparition of an ancestor or a nature spirit, which takes the form of a wisp.

name: Spiritual Aid
description: When you call your spirit guide for aid, its presence bolsters your will and agility.

name: Splendid Companion
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: Your animal companion continues to develop.

name: Spring from the Shadows
description: You leap from hiding and assail your target.

name: Stand Back, I'm A Doctor!
prerequisites: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication, master in Medicine
description: Requirements You are holding healer's tools, or you are wearing them and have a hand free; a creature with the condition is in your reach.You have mastered techniques to aid those at the brink of death, even if they use dangerous Stasian technology.

name: Student of the Dueling Arts
description: Dueling is your art, and your weapon is your instrument.

name: Summoner's Call
description: Trigger You or your eidolon take damage from a foe or hazard.

name: Sunder Spell
description: You draw upon your superstitious fury to destroy a spell.

name: Supreme Invigorating Elixir
description: For the purposes of counteracting effects with invigorating elixirs, treat your level as though it were 2 higher.

name: Surgical Shock
description: With a few well-placed jabs with your fist or weapon, you render your opponent disoriented or ungainly.

name: Surging Blood Magic
prerequisites: Rising Blood Magic, master in Arcana or Religion, depending on your chosen tradition
description: Your blood courses with magic.

name: Swap Investment
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Frequency once per day Your time as a Pathfinder has taught you how to improvise, and you've learned to make use of the resources you find in the field.

name: Sword of Sealing
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your spiritual power pierces both body and soul, pinning your foe in place.

name: Sympathetic Portrayal
description: You portrayed Grand Prince Stavian III in Fall of the Troubled King, a production dedicated to the life and times of the paranoid Taldan ruler whose violent resistance to new policies on succession kicked off the War for the Crown.

name: Tandem Auras
description: You've learned how to maintain multiple auras at once, reinforcing them simultaneously.

name: Tense Negotiator
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You often find that the best way to win a conflict means avoiding a fight in the first place.

name: Terraforming Trickery
description: You know how to channel the transformative aspects of your blood magic to alter your surroundings.

name: Thaumaturge's Demesne
description: You have claimed an area or location as your demesne, granting you the ability to ward and protect it.

name: The Bigger They Are
description: With reckless speed, you dash, jump and swing around a creature to find a more vulnerable spot.

name: Their Master's Call
prerequisites: Undead Master Dedication, Call Companion, at least one inactive undead companion whose remains or anchor are currently in your possession.
description: In a pinch, you pull one of your inactive companions from their rest to provide a companion's support benefit.

name: Thunderous Landing
description: Requirements You currently have a fly Speed and are airborne.You hurl away enemies with the force of your landing.

name: Titan's Stature
description: You grow to even greater size.

name: Too Angry to Die
description: Trigger you stand up from after waking up from being You refuse to yield the battle, even after you've been knocked off your feet and nearly killed.

name: Towering Size
description: Your eidolon becomes even bigger.

name: Tunneling Claws
description: You have elongated claws and enhanced senses, making you uncanny at digging the underground passageways needed to construct ghoul warrens and rob graves without arousing suspicion.

name: Unbalancing Sweep
description: You make a great sweep with your weapon or fists about yourself, knocking creatures off their feet and away from you.

name: Uncanny Bombs
description: You lob bombs unerringly, despite obstructions or distance.

name: Uncanny Suction
description: Your limbs produce strange, sucker-like growths that allow you to adhere to walls, objects, and most other surfaces.

name: Undying Beast
description: You can be injured by non-silver sources but recover with staggering speed.

name: Unshakable Grit
description: You've become hardened by conflict after everything you've faced, and you possess a certain intractable stubbornness.

name: Uplifting Winds
description: The winds are eager to keep you aloft.

name: Venomous Touch
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You've learned to channel the sting of the worm.

name: Vernai Training
prerequisites: Achaekek's Grip, Basic Red Mantis Magic
description: To resurrect a creature you've slain, a spellcaster must counteract your influence on its death.

name: Vexing Tempest
prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication, Tempest Cloud's Speed
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your familiar channels elemental air around it to unleash a disruptive gust that sends creatures flying.

name: Vigilant Benediction
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, alignment permitted by the chosen deity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Unwilling to be outdone by the Crimson Reclaimers and their oath, you've petitioned the gods of good for a sliver of divine magic.

name: Virtuosic Dancer
description: You're so fond of using your Acrobatic feats on the stage that you've begun adding your own flair to these dances on the big stage.

name: Wandering Oasis
description: You're surrounded by soothing energy.

name: Ward Slumber
description: Just before going to sleep, you can perform a 10-minute ward to protect the slumber of up to eight creatures within 30 feet of you.

name: Warden's Focus
description: Your connection with your surroundings deepens and expands, allowing you to draw in more of nature's primal power as you focus.

name: Warped by Rage
description: Usage imbued into a body or worn ikonRage courses through your body, transforming you into a beast of battle.

name: Wave Spiral
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You're in Reflective Ripple Stance.You dip and spin, unleashing a wide whirlpool of water.

name: Whirling in the Summer Storm
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in .Your hands move in a hypnotic and distracting flurry that throws your foes off-balance before you cast them away with a violent pirouette.

name: Whispers of Warning
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You would be hit, but not critically hit, by an attack.Your protective apparitions alert you to an incoming attack.

name: Wild Strider
description: Natural obstacles pose no obstacle to you.

name: Wildspell Dedication
prerequisites: ability to cast spells from spell slots
description: You gain the ability to tap into a powerful well of magic.

name: Wiles on the Wind
description: Speaking lies, you set them loose upon a drifting wind.

name: Wings of the Dragon
description: You can manifest draconic wings to soar through the air at great speed.

name: Wings of the Moon
prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication, your animal shape has a fly Speed
description: You can stay aloft with Fly normally when using the fly Speed from your animal shape, letting you fly long distances without breaks.

name: Witch's Broom
description: A broom is the only steed you need to fly through the night sky.

name: Witchwood Seed
description: You touch a creature to implant a malignant seed in its body.

name: Words of Unraveling
description: You have unlocked abstruse methods to tangle with reality itself, altering the fate of a single individual.

name: Adamantine Mantra
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You attain your true potential as a tutelary spirit.

name: Advanced General Training
description: Over the long course of your adventuring life, your adaptability has let you pick up numerous useful abilities.

name: Airy Step
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature targets you with an attack or other targeted effect, and you can see the attacker.

name: Alter Resistance
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You take acid, electricity, or sonic damage.You focus on your protean forebears to change your energy resistance.

name: Ancestor's Rage
description: You transform into an enormous, otherworldly hyena.

name: Ancestor's Transformation
description: You can commune with ancestor spirits to assume the form of an enormous primeval strix.

name: Anchoring Arrow
description: Frequency once per hourYou can prevent demonic foes from fleeing your wrath via teleportation.

name: Aquatic Adaptation
description: Frequency once per day If you and up to four other creatures are in contact with a body of water deep enough for you to fully submerge, you can spend 10 minutes adapting the creatures to that specific body of water.

name: Aquatic Camouflage
description: You blend into the waves.

name: Arboreal Conversationalist
prerequisites: kijimuna gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access kijimuna gnome heritage or Tian Xia originWith your close connection to primal energies and the First World, you can communicate with trees.

name: Arcane Locomotion
description: You've modified your body to allow you to augment your movement.

name: Arcane Sight
prerequisites: ability to cast the detect magic cantrip
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You've trained yourself to constantly be on the lookout for magical effects, even when focusing on looking out for other things.

name: Arise, Ye Worthy!
description: A touch of valkyrie magic in your blood lets you hold back death's grasp.

name: Astral Blink
description: You've attuned your core to allow you to phase in and out of the Astral Plane, allowing you to teleport periodically.

name: Attuned Electroreceptors
description: You grow specialized organs that allow you to detect even the faintest of heartbeats.

name: Augment Senses
description: You open vestigial eyes, unfurl tympanic flaps of skin, or otherwise enhance your senses.

name: Avenge Ally
description: Frequency once every 10 minutes Requirements You are within 30 feet of an ally with the condition.

name: Awaken Others
description: You can awaken others just through contact and communication.

name: Awaken the Obake
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Not every tool is well cared for, and those that are treated badly might awaken as malevolent spirits.

name: Azarketi Weapon Expertise
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
description: Your mastery with weapons both above and below water is unmatched.

name: Black Cat Curse
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 30 feet you can see would succeed at a save.You hiss a spiteful curse.

name: Bone Investiture
description: You encase yourself in spiritual dinosaur bones to become a Huge dinosaur.

name: Bonekeeper's Bane
description: Whenever an enemy starts its turn adjacent to you, it must attempt a Will saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is highest.

name: Bounce Back
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You lose the condition.

name: Calaca's Showstopper
description: Frequency once per day You've spent many an evening learning songs and tales featuring calacas, death's wandering minstrels.

name: Call of the Green Man
description: You can call forth nearby nature spirits to augment your body.

name: Camouflage Coat
description: You've learned to use your natural camouflage to your advantage, enhancing your ability to blend with your surroundings through careful movements and additional markings or attire.

name: Can't Fall Here
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An adjacent and willing ally would be reduced to 0 HP but not killed.You physically help an ally remain standing and encourage them to push through their pain against dire odds.

name: Cannibalize Magic
description: The fey magic inside of you is a vital part of your body, and you can steal other sources of magic to replenish yours.

name: Caterwaul
description: Frequency once per day Trigger An ally within 30 feet would be reduced to 0 HP but not immediately killed.You give a daring yowl, calling your companion back from the brink of unconsciousness.

name: Ceaseless Shadows
description: You excel at going unnoticed, especially among a crowd.

name: Celestial Mercy
prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials
description: Your celestial powers allow you to remove lesser afflictions with ease.

name: Celestial Strikes
description: Your connection to good arms all your attacks against forces of evil.

name: Ceremony of Growth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You can alter your exoskeleton's size.

name: Cloak of Poison
description: Frequency once per day You secrete a cloak of concentrated poison that harms any who dare attack you.

name: Cobble Dancer
description: You know how to take advantage of foes thrown off-balance by unstable flooring, loose cobblestones, or similar impediments.

name: Cold Iron Stomach
description: You have steeled yourself against potent odors.

name: Combined Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet uses a polymorph effect.Cooperation and coordination are the secrets to getting by in tanuki society.

name: Conrasu Weapon Expertise
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency for , , , , , , and all conrasu weapons() in which you are trained.

name: Consistent Surge
description: Your nanites are incredibly effective, capable of improving your body's efficiency regularly.

name: Continuous Assault
description: You can use once per hour instead of once per day.

name: Coral Reserve
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You are or .

name: Core Rejuvenation
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.Your soul taps into your core's power to push against the grasp of death and allow you to recover consciousness.

name: Crafter's Instinct
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

name: Dalang's Ally
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You move your shadow as a master puppeteer, allowing it to dance around your enemies and serve you in combat.

name: Dance of the Jester
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Through your incredible dance skill, you can embody the character of the Jester, able to take control of the shadows of other players on stage (much to your amusement).

name: Daywalker
description: Whether through painstaking exposure, devoted prayer, or simple luck, you've found a greater affinity for life through the sun's light.

name: Delver
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Subterranean life taught you to swim through the ground like water.

name: Digger
prerequisites: running animal or climbing animal heritage
description: You are used to building homes and defenses underground.

name: Dire Form
description: Your hybrid shape is a hulking beast.

name: Disruptive Stare
description: Trigger A creature within 30 feet attempts to Cast a Spell with the concentrate trait.

name: Draconic Veil
description: Like some dragons, your forebear had the supernatural ability to change their shape to walk among humanoids.

name: Eclectic Sword Mastery
description: You instinctively learn how to use a sword with just a few practice swings.

name: Eldritch Calm
description: Your fey heritage has altered your mindset to more resemble the uncanny perspective of the fey.

name: Elite Dracomancer
description: Your magic rivals that of lesser dragons.

name: Elucidation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You succeed at a saving throw to disbelieve an illusion.You can cut through illusions with such precision that all those around you find their senses sharpened as well.

name: Enlarged Chassis
description: You've empowered your core to support a larger body, granting you size and additional reach.

name: Envenomed Edge
description: With a combination of your poison glands and herbal concoctions, you can consistently deliver venomous attacks when you hit an enemy's weak points.

name: Eternal Memories
description: Frequency once per day You have lived longer than most realize, and due to your many lifetimes of practice you remember almost everything from your previous incarnations now.

name: Explosive Expert
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.Through your extensive training with volatile weapons, you've built up a fair bit of tolerance to your own black powder explosions.

name: Ferocious Beasts
prerequisites: animal companion, Pet, or Bonded Animal, Orc Ferocity
description: Since ancient times, the mightiest orc beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the orc's own blood.

name: Ferry Through Waves
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: 2 or 3 Requirements You are swimming and have a free hand.The waters around you permit you passage, a privilege you can share with a willing ally.

name: Fey Skin
description: While you are more susceptible to cold iron than most of the Wingless, you also have an incredible resilience and a deeper connection to the healing energies of the First World.

name: Fiendish Strikes
description: Your festering connection to the forces of evil infuses your weapons with debilitating malevolence, tearing down creatures of good with every attack.

name: Finest Trick
description: Many fiends—rakshasa rajas and demonic succubi most famously—can take on the forms of others.

name: Flame Jump
description: Frequency once per day Your peri lineage has opened your mind to fire's raw, purging essence.

name: Flames of Vision
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access dokkaebi goblin heritage or Tian Xia originDokkaebi were among the first goblins to pioneer gazing through flames, spectral or physical, to cast their senses far and wide.

name: Flower Chimera
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou call on a guardian of the wild to burst forth from the land to aid you.

name: Form of the Bat
description: Frequency once per hourYou can transform into a harmless bat.

name: Formation Master
description: You can assemble a formation even with members of ancestries that lack the hobgoblins' military discipline, and you can extend these benefits to your hobgoblin allies.

name: Generation Digger
description: You're so adept at burrowing through the earth that you don't even need tools; in fact, you just might be trusted to lead the latest generation dig.

name: Genie Weapon Expertise
description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in Falchions, Ranseurs, Scimitars, Tridents, and all geniekin weapons in which you are trained.

name: Germination of Resolve
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayVitality floods your trammeled soul, offering you rejuvenation, if not quite rest.

name: Ghoran Weapon Expertise
description: It's as if you've been training for a thousand years.

name: Gift of the Moon
description: You can share your power with others, but they can't escape the werecreature's curse as easily as you can.

name: Glamour
description: You unlock a new level of fey power and can manipulate the perceptions of others using a font of First World magic.

name: Hag Magic
description: Through your heritage, you can replicate a hag's magic.

name: Harbinger's Caw
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 60 feet is about to attempt an attack roll or skill check.You caw ominously, cursing the creature with misfortune.

name: Hop Up
description: Trigger You lose the condition.Your frog-like agility awakens as soon as you do.

name: Hydraulic Maneuvers
description: You batter your foes with a torrent of water siphoned from your surroundings.

name: Idol Threat
description: Requirements You're holding something sacred or precious to a creature, such as a relic or personal depiction of their deity or a precious personal memento.

name: Imperial Dragon Potion
prerequisites: heavenscribe kobold heritage, expert in Crafting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: During your daily preparations, you can spend 10 minutes to create a variant energy breath potion, which has the kobold trait in addition to its normal traits.

name: Impose Order
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would critically fail a skill check or suffer an effect with the misfortune trait.You shift the underlying fabric of reality to impose a baseline of order.

name: Impossible Gossip
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You can speak to inanimate objects, finding a magical spark within them similar to the one that animated you.

name: Improved Elemental Bulwark
description: You gain resistance 10 from Elemental Bulwark instead of 5.

name: Improved Signature Weapon
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your signature weapon takes on the properties of mystical materials renowned for defeating undead, spirits, and other such creatures.

name: Incredible Ferocity
description: Given time to collect yourself after a near-death scrape, you can rebuild your ferocity and withstand additional finishing blows.

name: Incredible Luck (Halfling)
description: Even other halflings consider you to be particularly lucky.

name: Incredible Sprint
description: You push yourself, unleashing a burst of sudden speed.

name: Inspirit Hazard
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You Disable a hazard.

name: Instinctive Obfuscation
prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You are attacked by a foe, but they haven't rolled yet.

name: Invisible Trickster
description: You have learned how to become invisible and remain so.

name: Irriseni Ice-Witch
description: You can trace your direct descent from one of the Queens of Irrisen and thus from Baba Yaga herself.

name: Iruxi Spirit Strike
description: Your iruxi unarmed attacks channel the spiritual energy of your ancestors.

name: Jinx Glutton
description: You can once per hour, rather than once per day.

name: Kaiju's Footfalls
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You channel the might and mass of a kaiju.

name: Kashrishi Revivification
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

name: Kijimuna Whistle
prerequisites: kijimuna gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access kijimuna gnome heritage or Tian Xia originYour connection to nature—and trees, in particular—has become so strong that you can summon the plants you befriended in the forests of your youth.

name: Killing Stone
description: Your star orb hides a deadly miasma.

name: Kitsune Spell Expertise
description: Your tails show your magical mastery.

name: Larger than Life
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: When you Change Shape, you can assume the form of a creature that's Large or Huge in size.

name: Lifeblood's Call
description: The impulse to survive and continue fighting resonates deep within you.

name: Light-Bending Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your ability to walk unseen through the world has given you the new moon's blessing.

name: Look but Don't Touch
description: Frequency once per day Many flowers are beautiful to look upon but deadly to touch—and you're one of them.

name: Magitaxis
description: Trigger A creature you could reach with a Stride action Casts a Spell from the tradition matching your magiphage ability.

name: Majestic Presence
description: By taking an impressive stance, the full force of your personality cows lesser beings.

name: Malleable Form
prerequisites: ability to cast at least one polymorph spell
description: Requirements You're polymorphed by a spell that has multiple choices of battle form.

name: March the Mines
description: You march through the earth and lead an ally along.

name: Mask of Fear
description: Trigger You start your turn with the condition.

name: Memory of Mastery
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Flashes of past selves surface in an instant, especially when you're under duress.

name: Metal-veined Strikes
description: Metallic veins grow throughout your body, giving your unarmed attacks a metallic sheen.

name: Miraculous Medic
description: Your ability to heal others is miraculous enough to bring people back from near-death.

name: Mischievous Tail
description: Your tail can bedevil your foes.

name: Mist Strider
description: You condense the moisture in the air, solidifying it so it can hold your weight.

name: Monkey Spirits
description: Vanaras generally consider the spirits of departed monkeys to be less informative or interesting than their own ancestors traveling the cycles of existence, yet these monkey spirits can prove useful when the situation is dire.

name: Nagaji Spell expertise
description: Your magical skill rivals that of accomplished naga spellcasters.

name: None Shall Know
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Even magical means have a hard time prying information from you.

name: One with Earth
description: You've learned to harness your connection to the earth to travel through it.

name: One with the Wild
description: You naturally blend in with the wilderness, becoming camouflaged.

name: Oni Rampage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You're reduced to less than half your maximum Hit Points by a creature within your reach.Nothing invigorates you more than your own freshly spilled blood.

name: Palm-Leaf Silhouette
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can make yourself as flat as a paper doll or shadow.

name: Phantom Charm
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You attempt a check that would be subject to a misfortune effect.

name: Pit of Snakes
description: Mundane serpents obey your summons.

name: Planar Sidestep
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature hits you with a melee Strike.

name: Ponpoko-Pon!
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Whether it's because you play especially vigorously or are simply off-key, the music of your belly drum can physically wound your foes.

name: Primal Rampage
description: You gain and as 4th-rank primal innate spells that you can cast once per day.

name: Pummeling Whirlpool
description: Frequency once per dayYou draw water from the environs, swirling it into a rough torrent around you to punish your foes.

name: Purge Sins
description: Frequency once per day You call on your celestial forebears to rid your body of all toxins and impurities.

name: Quick Spring
description: Ishii Bunji is a skilled tumbler, and learning his technique allows you to push yourself off a foe and propel yourself across the battlefield faster.

name: Radiant Burst
description: Frequency once per day Your skin glows with intensity.

name: Rapid Pheromone Recovery
description: Your supply of pheromones replenish very quickly.

name: Reanimating Spark
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

name: Redirect Attention
description: Through your strong connection with your progenitor, you're able to redirect those attempting to spy on you.

name: Rehydration
description: Frequency once per day You surround your body with a thin layer of water drawn from the moisture in the air.

name: Reimagine
description: You can cast as an innate occult spell.

name: Rejuvenating Embrace
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You rejuvenate your spirit by taking your rest where Mother Earth embraces Father Moon.

name: Resist Ruin
description: Your duskwalker heritage allows you to extend protection against void energy.

name: Resplendent Spellhorn
description: Your magic continues to flourish.

name: Revivification Protocol
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

name: Scrutinizing Gaze
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.Your family's traditions of defending against Geb's undead have granted you a sixth sense for detecting spirits, haunts, and other restless dead, no matter their form or the strength of their presence.

name: Sea Witch
description: You've studied the waves, and they obey your will as extensions of your own fin.

name: Secret Eyes
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You can call forth an invisible eye to let you peek on secrets.

name: See the Unseen
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: You notice things that others can't see at all.

name: Shadow Pact
description: Thousands of years ago, your ancestors made a pact with .

name: Shadow's Assault
description: Your shadow assaults your foes.

name: Shaitan Skin
description: When in danger, you can harden the stone in your skin into armor, much like a shaitan.

name: Sharpened Senses
description: Frequency once per round Your senses have become so sharp that you notice changes subconsciously.

name: Sheltering Jewel
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your head gem has accessed the power of the full moon through your determination to heal and protect your loved ones.

name: Shift the Little Ones
description: With your large size, you need to be careful around your smaller friends.

name: Shinstabber
description: As long as you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as an ally of any size.

name: Shory Aerialist
prerequisites: Garundi, Mauxi, or Tian-Yae ethnicity, Shory Aeromancer or ability to cast fly
description: Unique in Golarion's history, the Shory people developed fighting styles dedicated to combat in the air.

name: Skeletal Transformation
description: You rearrange your bones into a bestial shape.

name: Skeleton Commander
description: You gain the ability to summon your own skeletal minions.

name: Skirt the Light
description: You can travel the border between the Material and Shadow Planes and even bring others along.

name: Skittering Sneak
description: You squish, slink, and skitter from cover to cover with great speed and stealth.

name: Slay Giants Unseen
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: In the darkness, your attacks can bring any red-faced giant to their knees.

name: Slip Sideways
prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, or Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends or the Maelstrom
description: Like many fiends, you have the supernatural ability to teleport yourself to safety.

name: Spell Devourer
description: You don't just resist magic; you devour it.

name: Spew Tentacles
description: You can open your mouth to an immense size and spew forth an impossibly large field of tentacles.

name: Spiritual Headhunter
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your spirit coffin can temporarily detain the spirits of those you kill, allowing you to ask them one last question before they pass on.

name: Spiteful Rake
description: Requirements You have both hands free.

name: Splendid Illusion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You cover your surroundings in outlandish fantasy.

name: Squirm Free
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Trigger A creature grabs, immobilizes, or restrains you.

name: Steadfast Ally
description: Your presence alone is enough to provide your allies with emotional support.

name: Stronger Debilitating Venom
description: Add one of the following to the debilitations from which you can choose when you Envenom.

name: Stubborn Persistence
description: Humans are renowned for their ability to persist through the most grueling of trials that would leave others ready to drop.

name: Suli Amir
description: You have power connected to the powerful jann amirs.

name: Summon Air Elemental
description: You have a connection to the Inner Spheres, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

name: Summon Earth Elemental
description: You have a connection to the Inner Sphere, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

name: Summon Fire Elemental
description: You can summon an elemental ally.

name: Summon Metal Elemental
description: You can summon an elemental ally.

name: Summon Nephilim Kin
description: You have a connection to the Outer Planes, allowing you to summon a divine ally.

name: Summon Water Elemental
description: You can summon an elemental ally.

name: Summon Wood Elemental
description: Your connection to the Plane of Wood allows you to summon elemental allies.

name: Swift Eel Mount
description: Your rapport with your eel lets you guide it to avoid dangers as it swims.

name: Synchronous Slither
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger An ally within your reach leaves a square during a move action they're using and ends their movement adjacent to an enemy.You've learned to travel at your ally's rhythm and use their movement to adjust your own position.

name: Telluric Power
description: You channel strength from the earth beneath your feet to pummel your enemies.

name: Tempest Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your third eye grows stronger and more powerful.

name: Threatening Pursuit
description: Requirements You are not observed by any enemies within 60 feet.

name: Thunder God's Fan
description: Your fan unleashes the fury of the storm.

name: Toppling Dance
description: While sharing a creature's space using Dance Underfoot, your melee weapons and unarmed attacks gain the trip trait, but only against the creature whose space you share.

name: Trample (Centaur)
description: You've trained to stampede right over smaller foes without causing yourself any harm.

name: Translucent Skin
description: Your body is translucent while underwater.

name: Treehealer
description: Frequency once per dayYou can undo the effect of demonic corruption in plants.

name: Truespeech
description: It is paramount that you are understood and you understand others; language need not impede your message.

name: Tumbling Diversion
description: Attempt to an opponent's space.

name: Unbound Freedom
description: Your future is no other person's to control, and the cycles of your fate sometimes step in to protect you when that control would be taken from you.

name: Unbreakable-er Goblin
description: As hard as most unbreakable goblins are to break, you are that much harder to break.

name: Unconventional Expertise
prerequisites: Unconventional Weaponry, trained in the weapon you chose for Unconventional Weaponry
description: You've continued to advance your powers using your unconventional weapon.

name: Unfettered Growth
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: By tapping into the limitless power of the Plane of Wood, you can experience sudden, dramatic growth for a short time.

name: Universal Longevity
description: Frequency once per day You've perfected your ability to keep up with all the skills you've learned over your long life, so you're almost never truly untrained at a skill.

name: Unnerving Terror
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're in yaoguai form.You let out a mighty howl, chant of death, or speak with eerie repetition that plants fear in others.

name: Unrivaled Builder
description: Building things is like solving a puzzle, and you know how to use anything at your disposal to get the job done.

name: Vanara Battle Clarity
description: Your focus in combat is practically unshakable.

name: Vanara Weapon Expertise
description: Thanks to numerous joyous practice exercises, you've become an expert in vanara weapons.

name: Venom Purge
description: Frequency once per day You produce a specialized venom that burns out other toxins and impurities in your body.

name: Very, Very Sneaky
description: You can move up to your Speed when you use the action, and you no longer need to have cover or greater cover or be to or Sneak.

name: Vicious Snares
description: You deal an additional 1d6 precision damage with damage snares you craft.

name: Violent Vines
description: When angered, you can imbue nearby vines with your wrath, provoking them into a murderous rampage.

name: Vishkanya Weapon Expertise
description: Extensive training has granted you an elegant control in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

name: Wandering Heart
prerequisites: arctic elf, cavern elf, desert elf, woodland elf, or any other elf heritage based on adapting to an environment
description: While all elves adapt to their environments over time, you have traveled so widely and become attuned to so many environs that your body now changes more rapidly than other elves.

name: War Conditioning
description: You have extensive training in remote environments, allowing you to move through these areas easily.

name: Warren Digger
description: You've learned to put your sturdy claws to work digging through the earth.

name: Water to Water
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You allow your body to collapse into water, then reconstitute your corporeal form elsewhere.

name: We March On
description: You make sure that your allies push themselves while traveling.

name: Webslinger
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Your natural ability to create silken webs blends with your magical powers, allowing you to create impossibly large webs with great frequency.

name: Wild-Haired Fury
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your broken bones jut at odd angles, yet this pain only adds to your anger and prowess.

name: Wooden Mantle
description: Your connection to the magic of the Plane of Wood allows you to call upon the power of plants and trees to protect yourself.

name: A Miracle of Science!
