description: Once, you dreamed of creating life.

name: Absorb Spell
prerequisites: Spellmaster Dedication, spell repertoire or ability to prepare spells
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You critically succeed at a saving throw against a foe's spell, and that spell is of a level you can normally cast.

name: Aegis for the Innocent
description: Requirements Your nimbus is active.You transfer a portion of your divine spark to an ally, temporarily dimming your nimbus to encase an ally in a barrier of light that repels attackers.

name: Airborne Form
description: Your eidolon can fly.

name: Allegro
description: You can quicken your allies with a fast-paced performance.

name: Alloy Flesh and Steel
description: Elemental energy replaces every cell of your body with raw metal.

name: Anchoring Aura
description: Your aura hampers fiends' teleportation.

name: Arcane Shroud
description: Frequency once per turn Requirements Your most recent action was to Cast a Spell from a spell slot or make a with a spell from a spell slot.Your magic has a powerful aftereffect, briefly granting you a certain spell.

name: Armored Exercise
prerequisites: Swordmaster Dedication, trained in light, medium, or heavy armor
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You've spent time training in your armor alongside other agents from the Swords.

name: Ascend
description: As you strive to ascend to the ranks of celestials, the pull of gravity loosens on your body.

name: Assume Earth's Mantle
description: Enormous pieces of rock cluster around your body.

name: Aura of Determination
description: Your aura protects against powers that would twist the mind and body.

name: Aura of Life
description: Your aura protects against the power of the Void.

name: Aura of Righteousness
description: Your righteous aura dampens evil's might and prevents the unholy from escaping you.

name: Aura of Vengeance
description: When you call upon others to take retribution, you also guide their aim.

name: Awesome Blow
description: Your attacks are so powerful, they can flatten your opponents.

name: Banish Falsehoods of Flesh
description: Your ability to manipulate supernatural energy allows you to deploy divine magic directly against a disguised enemy to reveal them as they truly are, or to cleanse an ally from an unwilling transformation.

name: Barrier of Boreal Frost
description: You form an intricate structure of ice, such as a wall of bricks made of packed snow or a screen of enormous icicles.

name: Behold, a Pale Horse
description: Your apocalypse mount becomes worthier of an eventual Rider of the Apocalypse.

name: Bizarre Transformation
description: The forms you take on defy belief-chimerical sights of twisted antlers or acidic drool.

name: Blast Tackle
description: Requirements You're wielding a two-handed crossbow or a firearm that has the kickback or scatter trait.You throw yourself at an enemy, bracing your weapon against it and pulling it close before releasing a destructive shot.

name: Bloc Tactics
description: You have experience in undertaking direct action and know how to protect the identity and health of you and your allies when doing so.

name: Blood Ascendancy
description: When you would benefit from a blood magic effect through Blood Rising, you can choose to benefit from two different blood magic effects you know.

name: Bloom of Health
description: You shout a rallying cry that inspires the well-being of your kingdom's protectors.

name: Body of Air
description: R or 2 Trigger An enemy you can observe targets you with an attack or other damaging effect.Your gathered air consumes your body, leaving only a cloud of living vapor.

name: Bodysnatcher
description: Your secret-stealing maggots reveal how to devour more than just the flesh and secrets of a victim; you can ingest and assume their whole physical appearance.

name: Bombing Run
description: Requirements You currently have a fly Speed.

name: Bonded Focus
description: Your connection to your bonded item increases your focus pool.

name: Borrow Memories
description: Knowing how someone thinks makes it much easier to know where they'll be, or even replace them altogether.

name: Break the Cycle
description: Sometimes people with no underlying quarrel have been fighting each other simply out of spite.

name: Burning Surge
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell within your aura.You cause a surge of magical energy to flare up, harming that creature and those near it.

name: Cardinal Guardians
description: You focus your divine magic to allow your apparitions to work in concert using the magic from one to weaken an enemy against the power of the next.

name: Channel Divine Spark
description: Frequency once per hourYou embrace your divine spark, unleashing your full potential.

name: Channeling Block
description: You pour divine energy into a desperate block.

name: Chosen Ward
description: You have designated an ally to be you and your companion's ward, making it your primary directive to shield them from harm.

name: Claim Cardinal Domains
description: Your dominion over the divine truths of the world increases.

name: Cleansing Transformation
description: You learn to cleanse bodily toxins alongside the transformations of your shape-changing magic.

name: Come at Me!
description: You're a legendary duelist, welcoming all challengers, enabling you to challenge many foes even while other challenges are active.

name: Complete the Hero's Journey
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Requirements You have Sparked Transcendence of at least two different ikons in the last 10 minutes, and your divine spark currently dwells in a third ikon.As your divine spark travels through each of your ikons in turn, it gains power, culminating its journey when it en

name: Concentrated Assault
description: You and your spotter combine your efforts to bring down your target.

name: Conscious Spell Specialization
description: You become more adept with the spells that are always in your mind.

name: Consecrated Aura
description: Your body radiates vitality energy, making your very presence disorienting to undead and encouraging them to move away from you.

name: Consult Celestial Advisor
description: Frequency once per dayFor many, the Calling of an ascended celestial is a wondrous but challenging path, which they must walk alone.

name: Consume Spell
description: When you successfully Counterspell a spell of the tradition that matches your bloodline, you consume it, replenishing yourself with its energy.

name: Control Tower
description: Your keen senses and ability to process battlefield information have dramatically improved, allowing you to drastically reduce the advantage of unseen foes.

name: Cosmic Cocktail
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayUsing the liquors, vinegars, and fruits or herbs at your disposal, you spend 1 minute to create a cocktail with colors reminiscent of space and its stars.

name: Costume Change
prerequisites: Acrobat, Celebrity, Dandy, or Gladiator Dedication, Quick Disguise, master in Deception
description: Enough of your life has been spent performing that you've mastered the art of the quick change—especially when it comes to armor or invested items.

name: Cratering Drop
description: Requirements Your previous action was Pluck from the Sky using a melee Strike, and the target failed or critically failed its saving throw.You follow up your enemy's fall, driving you both to the earth in a meteoric descent.

name: Crimson Oath Devotion
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, ability to cast focus spells
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You've made the Crimson Oath a part of yourself; you mumble it in your sleep and recite it under your breath as you march.

name: Crusader's Masquerade
description: Requirements You're wearing your in its mask form, and it has the (Religion) familiar ability.Your mask can hide you from the undead.

name: Curse of the Saumen Kar
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: Frequency once per day You activate the runes on your body to create an icy prison around a Huge or smaller creature you can see within 60 feet.

name: Dance of Thunder
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow and are not .Your steps echo with the thunderous retort of exploding black powder as you dance a dance of death.

name: Death's Door
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

name: Decree of Banishment
description: Frequency once per dayYou assume a demeanor of authority and decree banishment upon a foe who has defied your authority.

name: Decree of Prosperity
description: Frequency once per dayYou speak with a gentle encouragement that inspires confidence and competence in your followers.

name: Deep Roots
description: Your mind-control spells send burrowing mental roots that tear at your target's mind when they're removed or run their course.

name: Defensive Roll
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger A physical attack would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

name: Deity's Protection
description: When you call upon your deity's power to fulfill the promise of their domain, you gain divine protection.

name: Demolishing Knockback
description: You make a forceful attack that has the power to push your foe through walls.

name: Desperate Finisher
description: Trigger You complete the last action on your turn, and your turn has not ended yet.

name: Destined Victory
description: Usage imbued into a worn ikonYou demand a battle against your chosen enemy.

name: Determination
description: Frequency once per day Your training allows you to shrug off your foes' spells and conditions when the need is dire.

name: Disruptive Blur
description: You use cacophonous blasts from your gun or distracting shots from your crossbow to cause momentary diversions, letting you move about the battlefield with impunity.

name: Divine Invulnerability
description: Frequency once per dayThough you are not yet a god, you can invoke a measure of omnipotence that makes you high invulnerable.

name: Divine Reflexes
description: At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only for your champion's reaction.

name: Domain Embodiment
description: Your deity contains multitudes, and you can express any aspect of them you desire.

name: Don Thy Fervor
description: With a thought, the passion of your fiendish desires becomes evident in your eyes and posture.

name: Double Poison
description: You can apply two different infused injury poisons to the same weapon, though not to a piece of ammunition.

name: Dragon's Journey
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding two fans, one in each hand.Your movements are like that of a dragon weaving a serpentine path between your enemies and allies.

name: Drain Soul Cage
prerequisites: Lich Dedication, Drain Bonded Item, spellbook
description: You make your soul cage into your bonded item, allowing you to harness its abundant magical energy.

name: Dream Logic
description: You can transmit a sense of dreamy nonchalance.

name: Dual Onslaught
description: When you lash out with both weapons, you leave no room for the target to escape your attack.

name: Earth to Heavens Strike
description: Your blows hamper both a foe's mobility and cognitive functions by focusing first on their lower extremities and then their head.

name: Earworm
description: By endlessly repeating a motif, you implant a memorable song that repeats over and over again in your allies' heads, preparing them to respond to it later.

name: Ebb and Flow
description: You can pull forth both vitality and the void simultaneously to harm your enemies and heal your allies.

name: Effortless Captivation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Enshroud Soul Cage
description: You wreathe your soul cage in an ever-growing collection of obfuscating illusions and protective abjurations to hide it from your enemies.

name: Enterprising Ritualist
description: Elegant and expensive components are no replacement for your skill and practice at ritual casting.

name: Entities From Afar
description: You can call in aberrations to fight for you or to answer questions.

name: Esoteric Reflexes
prerequisites: an implement that grants a reaction
description: Your bond to your implements is so strong that you can use their reactive abilities almost by instinct.

name: Exalted Greatness
description: You improve your exalted reaction with the benefit listed for your cause.

name: Execution
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners, Harsh Judgement
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: Requirements You have condemned a foe with Harsh Judgment.

name: Expanded Swarm
description: Your hive has grown to the point where it is difficult to keep your swarm contained within your body.

name: Explosive Death Drop
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You are in and have a target or .

name: Explosive Maneuver
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike against a foe using your weapon innovation.Thanks to a hidden experimental feature you built into your weapon, your weapon explosively deploys levers, tangling hooks, or similar mechanisms to provide significant assistance when you perform a comb

name: Extend Surge
description: Requirements Your aura is active.You tap deeper into the vortex of magical energy within you.

name: Fast Channel
description: Divine power is always at your fingertips, swiftly responding to your call.

name: Faultless Defense
description: Trigger You would take damage from a Strike made by a creature.As you are struck, your steely determination reminds those who fight you that they are destined to be no more than footnotes in your tale.

name: Fear of God
prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication, expert in Intimidation
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You successfully an enemy.You embed a divine fear into the triggering foe that lasts for 10 minutes.

name: Fit for the Role
description: Not only are you a flamboyant performer, but you've mastered an occult secret that allows you to outfit yourself and your companions with magical visages.

name: Flamboyant Leap
description: Requirements You are capable of using a finisher.You stylishly leap and deliver a powerful finisher.

name: Flash of Omnipresence
description: Frequency once per hourEmpowered with divine energy, you can be at an ally's side in the blink of an eye.

name: Forceful Shot
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Your ranged attacks push your foes away from your allies.

name: Forestall Curse
description: Frequency once per dayYou've learned to hold back your curse.

name: Form Lock
description: Requirements You have a creature or .

name: Giant's Lunge
description: You extend your body and prepare to attack foes outside your normal reach.

name: Grand Talisman Esoterica
description: You've completed your journey in studying esoteric talismans, gaining the ability to place multiple talismans on an item.

name: Graveshift
description: Frequency Once per day Requirements You are standing at the bottom of an open grave adjacent to up to four willing target creatures or objects roughly the size of a creature.

name: Greater Interpose
description: Your divine grace empowers you to avoid hits when you otherwise could not.

name: Greater Merciful Elixir
description: Your additives contain panaceas that can remedy a plethora of maladies.

name: Guarded Domain
description: You and your united companion have elected to become guardians of a particular location or domain.

name: Guiding Finish
description: Requirements You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.

name: Guiding Riposte
description: By shifting your weight and angling your weapon, you guide your opponent to a more favorable position.

name: Halcyon Spellcasting Adept
prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate, master in either Arcana or Nature and expert in the other
description: You refine your halcyon magic.

name: Hammer Quake
description: Requirements You're wielding a non-finesse melee weapon in two hands.You smash the ground with your weapon, knocking nearby creatures to the ground.

name: Hand of the Lich
description: Void energy intensifies your undead form and makes your very touch the antithesis of life.

name: Hasted Assault
description: You can speed yourself up to move and attack more swiftly.

name: Headshot
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow.You attempt to finish your target with a final, well-placed shot.

name: Herald's Weapon
description: Frequency once per hourYour weapon becomes a wrathful instrument of your deity's power.

name: History of Violence
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYour attacks bring with them echoes of previous battles, calling the unquiet victims of your most brutal acts to savage your opponents.

name: Homing Shot
description: Your shots zip around corners and fly at impossible angles to reach your target.

name: Immovable Object
prerequisites: Eternal Legend Dedication, master in Fortitude or Reflex saves
description: You plant your feet in a wide stance, resisting all movement not of your own volition.

name: Impaling Thrust
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon that deals piercing damage.You impale your enemy and hold it in place with your weapon, and leave it bleeding when it gets free.

name: Impossible Riposte
description: Your ripostes can deflect attacks back at their source.

name: Improved Hijack Undead
description: Undead creatures find it all but impossible to resist your commands.

name: Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter)
description: Your weapons are a blur, blocking and biting at your foes.

name: Incredible Recollection
description: You can sift through knowledge locked within your mind at an incredible pace.

name: Induce Imbalance
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in an elemental stance.Your blows can disrupt the delicate balance of elemental energies that keep a body in good health.

name: Infinite Blades Celestial Arrow
description: Usage imbued into a ranged weapon ikonEach shot you launch multiplies itself with spiritual blades, rings, and other missiles that shower upon your foes.

name: Innocent Butterfly
description: You know how to alter the perceptions of others.

name: Instant Opening
description: You distract your opponent with a few choice words or a rude gesture.

name: Instinctual Interception
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You react to movement with hardly a thought, seeming constantly poised to spring.

name: Interweave Dispel
prerequisites: dispel magic in your spell repertoire
description: You weave dispelling energy into a spell.

name: Invigorating Surge
description: Requirements Your aura is active.You alter the aura of magic surrounding you to protect a nearby ally.

name: Iron Lung
description: Your lungs are infused with the resilience of iron.

name: Ironblood Surge
description: Requirements You are in You steel yourself, preparing to resist oncoming attacks and using your muscles to absorb the impact.

name: It Was Me All Along!
prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication or Vigilante Dedication
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your identity is , either by magic or a disguise.

name: It's Not Over
description: Trigger You're reduced to 0 Hit Points Frequency once per dayIn the world of drama, the finale of any performance doesn't have to be the end, and for you, this now extends to life itself.

name: Jousting Mount
description: While riding your apocalypse mount, any two-handed weapon you wield gains the jousting trait with a die size equal to one die size lower than the weapon's normal damage die.

name: Keep up the Good Fight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger A foe's Strike reduces you to 0 Hit Points.

name: Lasting Armament
description: When you sanctify a weapon, it remains sanctified for an extended period.

name: Leave an Opening
description: When you hit hard enough, you leave an opening so your ally can jump in on the action.

name: Lighter than Air
description: Your mysterious steps become even lighter, transcending the mortal world altogether.

name: Lord of the Fiends
description: You consider every fiend a future subject and can assess them at a glance.

name: Manipulate Realm
description: Thanks to your continued belief in your ultimate transformation, you have learned greater control over your manifested realm.

name: Mask of the 15th Step
prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication, master in Crafting
description: You have ascended to the 15th Step and stand among the greatest of Razmir's priests.

name: Meditate on This!
prerequisites: trained in Medicine or Tian Xia Lore
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia originYou meditate to alter your qi, coloring it with your resentment and anger.

name: Might of the Realm
description: Bolstered by the presence of your knights, you strike a mighty blow in the name of your rule.

name: Mist Escape
description: Trigger You are reduced to 0 HP.

name: Mortal Ascension
description: Your power uplifts you, breaking the bonds between you and the ground.

name: Mountain Quake
description: Requirements You are in You stomp, shaking the earth beneath you.

name: Murderer's Circle
description: You Strike a target within reach and then Step to any other open space adjacent to that target.

name: Musical Summons
description: Your studies have given you a deeper understanding of animals and beasts, allowing you to call them to your side as you cast your spell.

name: Mutant Innervation
description: Basic mutagens that affect your mind and thoughts can make you communicate telepathically, protect you from being detected, or let you communicate with anyone.

name: Mysterious Repertoire
description: Your mystery holds unknowable depths of magic not always associated with the divine.

name: Mythic Heightening
description: Frequency once per dayYou overload your minor spells to give them greater effect.

name: Night's Warning
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack and you can see the attacker.

name: Nourishing Gate
description: You can sustain yourself on a single drop of elemental dew or the slightest spark from the Plane of Fire.

name: Of Lions and Wyrms
description: You starred in a war drama depicting First Emperor Taldaris's battles against the Grogrisant, a massive six-eyed lion, and Verksaris the Kingeater, a mighty dragon.

name: One Among the Masses
description: It will take more than a gathered mass of foes to take you down.

name: Only My Doom May Claim Me
description: The power of your legend, fueled by your legendary deeds, resists any weapon that is not tied to your curse.

name: Opening Stance
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Orchard's Endurance
description: Patches of bark appear on the skin of you and your nearby allies.

name: Pact of Eldritch Eyes
description: You've sworn a pact with an entity beyond mortal comprehension, granting you distant visions and insights.

name: Pact of the Death Hunter
description: You've sworn a pact with a psychopomp bent on the destruction of all undeath.

name: Pact of the Fey Paths
description: You've sworn a pact with a powerful fey creature that longs to see the wonders of the Universe.

name: Paragon Companion
description: Your construct companion has reached the pinnacle of form and function.

name: Paragon Reanimated Companion
description: You have reached the pinnacle of necromantic science, creating a mechanical zombie unlike any the world has seen before.

name: Path of Iron
description: Frequency once per minuteWith a burst of effort and speed, you weave a nimble path through your many enemies, striking each in turn as you move past them.

name: Patron's Presence
description: Your patron can direct its attention through your familiar, and its mere presence becomes an ominous weight on the minds of other beings to distract them and blot out their magic.

name: Peculiar Anatomy
description: Your circulatory system contains viscous protoplasmic fluid instead of ordinary blood.

name: Peerless Form
description: Your mastery over your body is perfect enough to hold back the ravages of time.

name: Peony's Flourish
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding two fans, one in each hand.As you spin around and create wide arching circles with your fans, you manifest a mosaic of peonies that confuses your enemies.

name: Perfect Finisher
description: You focus your panache into an impeccable assault.

name: Perfect Ki Exemplar
description: You gain an appropriate qi spell for your School of Perfection: for Unblinking Flame, for Unbreaking Waves, for Unfolding Wind, or for Untwisting Iron.

name: Phase Bullet
description: Frequency once per dayYou can aim your bullets not just in three normal dimensions, but in additional dimensions as well, removing all obstacles between you and your target.

name: Pin to the Spot
description: You Strike a target within reach.

name: Pivot Strike
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are wielding your staff.

name: Plot the Future
description: You spend 10 minutes in contemplation to uncannily predict how events will play out.

name: Pounce Mimicry
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have seen a creature use an ability that lets them Stride and Strike as a single action (such as Pounce) or have identified a creature with such an ability in combat
description: Requirements You're unarmored or wearing light armor.

name: Prayer Attack
description: Requirements You are wielding a sawtooth saber in each hand.You've mastered the signature assassination style of the Red Mantis.

name: Precise Hooks
description: Your body is a varied and deadly weapon.

name: Premonition of Clarity
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You fail a saving throw against a mental effect.

name: Preternatural Parry
description: Trigger You're targeted by a Strike or a spell attack roll, or you're about to roll a saving throw against a spell effect.

name: Purifying Breeze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Requirements Your most recent action was to cast a non-cantrip spell with the healing trait.

name: Putrefaction
description: You spoil the food and water nearby, even within your foes' bodies.

name: Ranged Disarm
description: Requirements You're wielding a simple firearm or simple combination weapon.When using a simple firearm, you can shoot objects right out of your enemy's hands.

name: Rapid Hybridization
description: Trigger You roll initiative.

name: Rapid Reattunement
description: You spend 10 minutes realigning your elemental connections in an elemental trance.

name: Reactive Transformation
prerequisites: Untamed Form, Dragon Shape, Elemental Shape, Plant Shape, or Soaring Shape
description: Trigger variesYou transform reflexively when in danger.

name: Receive Prayers
description: You open your senses so the prayers of mortals can better reach your ears.

name: Reflect Harm
description: You can wrap your magic around you like a cloak that causes those who dare to target you with spells to suffer a similar fate.

name: Reflect Spell
description: When you successfully use Counterspell to counteract a spell that affects targeted creatures or an area, you can turn that spell's effect back on its caster.

name: Regional Specialty
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can create dishes that reflect the food sources endemic to your environment and medicinal food techniques utilizing the cycle of the five elements.

name: Release Me!
description: Requirements An enemy has you or .Your retribution against one who would detain you is swift and dangerous.

name: Reset the Past
description: Frequency once per day You manipulate time to recharge one of your temporal techniques-by revising your past so you never used it in the first place.

name: Resilient Shell
description: Your eidolon is resilient against attacks.

name: Resolute Defender
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You hold your shield together with the power of your faith and conviction, refusing to let wood splinter and steel shatter until the day's battles are won.

name: Revelation's Focus
description: The further extents of your mystery provide an endless wellspring of magic.

name: Revitalizing Finisher
description: Your swagger instills confidence in you and your allies.

name: Rites of Liberation
description: You learn the ritual.

name: Rites of Transfiguration
description: You can adapt your patron's power to transform other creatures into forms more befitting their behavior or your whims.

name: Sacral Monarch
prerequisites: Sacral Lord, master in Occultism or Religion
description: You have come into your full powers and are truly a monarch of your realm, by your own definition at least.

name: Scarred Hide
description: Your hide is an impenetrable mass of scars, accrued over countless bloody conflicts.

name: Scattering Shout
description: With a flex of your mighty thews and a guttural bellow that can make ears bleed, you drive back any enemies surrounding you.

name: Secondary Detonation Array
description: You divert some of your spell's energy into an unstable runic array.

name: Seize
description: Requirements Your last action was a successful fist Strike against a creature no more than one size larger than you.

name: Sense the Unseen
description: Trigger You fail a check to .

name: Sentinel's Orbit
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Just as your constellation traverses the sky, so too can you.

name: Sepulchral Sublimation
prerequisites: ability to permanently create or control undead, cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard
description: Requirements You have at least one undead minion that you permanently control.

name: Shadow Power
description: You can focus the shadows into a powerful blast.

name: Shadow's Web
description: You can launch a wave of shadowy qi outward from your body, damaging your opponents and potentially binding them in place.

name: Shape of the Cloud Dragon
description: You've discovered how to transform yourself into a cloud dragon.

name: Shape of the Dragon
description: You've discovered how to transform yourself into a dragon.

name: Share Eidolon Magic
description: Your eidolon shares innate spells with you.

name: Shared Prey
description: Hunting as a duo, you and your ally both single out your prey.

name: Shatter Space
description: The sheer power of your magic fractures reality.

name: Shattered Sacrament
prerequisites: Halcyon Speaker Dedication, Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting
description: When Vigil fell to Tar-Baphon's Radiant Fire, that lost innocence brought you a deeper understanding of what faith means in the context of your own magic.

name: Shield the Faithful
description: Frequency once per hourYou and those closest to you are protected by your deity's power.

name: Shift Spell
description: Access member of the Magaambya Requirements You have an active spell that affects an area and you are within the spell's range.

name: Shifting Terrain
prerequisites: Rough Terrain Stance, master in Nature
description: Requirements Your terrain attunement matches the terrain you're in and you're in Rough Terrain Stance.You slam your fist into the ground or twirl your arms about to cause the terrain around you to shift and ripple, potentially throwing others off balance.

name: Showstopper
description: Your twirling weapons create a grand distraction that's difficult to look away from.

name: Signature Synergy
description: Your eidolon gains an evolution integral to its form, and it comes more easily than your other synergies.

name: Sixth Pillar Mastery
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover Compilation
description: You align your magical and physical potential.

name: Soaring Armor
description: Whether through a release of jets of flame, propeller blades, sonic bursts, streamlined aerodynamic structure, electromagnetic fields, or some combination of the above, you've managed to free your innovation from the bonds of gravity!

name: Soothing Ballad
description: You soothe your allies' wounds with the power of your performance.

name: Sow Spell
description: You fold your spell into a seed.

name: Speak for the Gravelands
prerequisites: Halcyon Speaker Dedication, trained in Nature, can cast at least one spell with the vitality trait
description: Access You're a member of the Vellumis Scholars.You have learned much of what the Gravelands need and are confident in your ability to speak for them.

name: Specialized Beastmaster Companion
description: Your nimble and savage animal companions become cunning enough to become specialized.

name: Specialized Companion (Druid)
description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability.

name: Specialized Megafauna Companion
description: You've trained your mammoth or other megafauna companion to perform in unusual or extreme situations, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind.

name: Specialized Mount
description: You've trained your mount to perform in unusual or even extreme circumstances, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind.

name: Specialized Spirit Companion
description: Your animal companion gains a unique specialization, spirit-blessed.

name: Spell Network
description: Trigger You cast .Your aura links your friends together with mystic strands.

name: Spell Shroud
description: Your spell shrouds you in a billowing cloud.

name: Spell-Repelling Form
description: Your eidolon evolves to protect itself from the danger posed by spells.

name: Spellmaster's Tenacity
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You critically fail at a saving throw against a foe's spell, and that spell was cast or created with the tradition of magic you selected with the feat.

name: Spinning Release
description: Requirements You have a creature or with your lash.

name: Spirit Guide Form
description: Frequency once per day You fuse with your spirit guide, becoming a hybrid being with enhanced physical and spiritual power.

name: Starlight Armor
description: Frequency once per day You armor yourself in the light of distant suns, shielding yourself from harm.

name: Stay Down!
description: Trigger A foe within your reach Stands.

name: Stealthy Companion
description: You've trained your animal companion to blend in to its surroundings.

name: Stone Communion
description: You gain a unique communion with the earth and stones.

name: Stories of Home
description: Frequency once per dayYou share the joy of every story of long-awaited homecoming you've offered to Isthralei.

name: Strategic Bypass
description: Your plans account for your foes' resistances, enabling you to strike a telling blow.

name: Sunder Enchantment
description: You can focus your superstition to break the magic of an item, in addition to destroying freestanding spells and those active on creatures.

name: Superior Bond
description: When you draw upon your bonded item, you can leave a bit of energy within it for later use.

name: Swift Banishment
description: Trigger You critically hit a creature that is not on its home plane.

name: Tactical Cadence
description: Your remarkable breath control and concise instructions allow you to coordinate your allies more effectively, even in desperate situations.

name: Talismanic Sage
description: Normally, affixing more than one talisman to an item causes the talismans to be suppressed, but when you Affix a Talisman, you can specially treat one item you're working on, allowing it to have two active talismans at once.

name: Tangled Forest Rake
description: Requirements You are in Tangled Forest Stance.You reposition foes with raking attacks.

name: Target of Opportunity
description: Trigger An ally succeeds at a ranged Strike against an opponent in your weapon's first range increment.

name: Targeting Shot
description: You carefully track your prey's position and defenses, allowing you to follow up around obstacles that block your shot.

name: Terrain Shield
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger A Strike would damage you.

name: Terrible Transformation
description: You let out a mighty roar as part of your transformation.

name: Thwart Evil
prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication, master in Religion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature you can see uses a spell or ability that has the evil or void traits.

name: Timeless Body
description: You cease aging.

name: Timeless Nature
description: With primal magic sustaining you, you cease aging.

name: Tongue of Sun and Moon
description: You have transcended the barriers between words and meaning.

name: Towering Transformation
description: Trigger Your size increases due to a polymorph effect.

name: Trespass Teleportation
description: Requirements You are benefiting from Exploit Vulnerability.

name: Triggerbrand Blitz
description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You're wielding a combination weapon.

name: Triumphant Inspiration
description: Trigger You critically hit a foe with a melee weapon Strike or a melee unarmed attack.

name: True Debilitating Bomb
description: You have discovered increasingly devastating ways for your bombs to impede your foes.

name: True Hypercognition
description: Your mind works at an incredible pace.

name: Twinned Defense (Swashbuckler)
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, one in each hand You're always ready to use your off-hand weapon to interfere with attacks against you.

name: Two-Weapon Flurry
description: Requirements You are wielding two weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Two-Weapon Fusillade
description: Requirements You're wielding two weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Unending Emptiness
description: You pool the power of shadow within your eyes, gaining the ability to gather darkness into a turbulent orb of crushing emptiness within your line of sight.

name: United Front
description: Thanks to your powerful speeches, your movement finds allies in all sectors of society and even across enemy lines, all eager to help you accomplish your goals.

name: Unlimited Ghost Flight
description: You put your connection to the material world farther behind you.

name: Unstable Patronage
description: You can act as a magical patron for your charges.

name: Unstable Redundancies
description: Trigger You would attempt the flat check for an unstable action, but you haven't rolled the flat check yet.

name: Vengeful Strike
description: Trigger A creature within your reach succeeds at an attack against you.

name: Verdant Metamorphosis
description: You have turned into a plant version of yourself, gaining the plant trait and losing traits inappropriate for your new form (typically humanoid).

name: Vigorous Anthem
description: You instill magical vigor in your allies when you inspire them to attack.

name: Walk Through the Conflagration
description: You fall through your own kinetic gate, leaving behind an effigy of flame and reappearing majestically near another fire.

name: Warden's Guidance
description: You convey your prey's location to your allies with a series of careful words or gestures.

name: We Are One
description: You and your companion move as one, never tripping each other up.

name: Whirling Blade Stance
description: You enter a mindful stance that creates a deep connection between you and your monk weapons, allowing you to manipulate them with your qi, even at a distance.

name: Whirling Knockdown
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded one-handed firearm and a one-handed melee weapon.You fire your gun while throwing off a target's balance with your melee weapon.

name: Whirlwind Strike
description: You attack all nearby adversaries.

name: Wild Winds Gust
description: Requirements You are in You build air pressure with repeated motions, before releasing an enormous crescent of rushing wind strikes.

name: Wind-Tossed Spell
prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication, air is in your elemental philosophy
description: You enhance your spell with elemental air, using the wind to find your target and carry your magic around cover.

name: Winter's Kiss
description: Whether in the heart of a volcanic passageway or the glacial tundras of the Crown of the World, the only temperature you ever personally experience is an oddly comfortable chill.

name: World-Breaking Footfall
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You are in and are touching the ground.You slam the ground and unleash a fearsome roar, sending broken shards of earth flying in all directions.

name: Worm Form
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You take on the form of a purple worm or transform into a humanoid-worm hybrid, retaining your own head but with a worm's body, transforming into a Huge battle form.

name: Cloud Jump
description: Your unparalleled athletic skill allows you to jump impossible distances.

name: Craft Anything
description: You can find ways to craft just about anything, despite restrictions.

name: Divine Guidance
description: You're so immersed in divine scripture that you find meaning and guidance for any situation in your texts.

name: Legendary Codebreaker
description: Your skill with languages and codes is so great that you can decipher information with little more than a quick read through a text.

name: Legendary Guide
description: You know the wilderness so well that you can help your party travel through it with ease.

name: Legendary Linguist
description: You're so skilled with languages you can create a pidgin instantly.

name: Legendary Medic
description: You've discovered medical breakthroughs or techniques that achieve miraculous results.

name: Legendary Negotiation
description: You can negotiate incredibly quickly in adverse situations.

name: Legendary Performer
description: Your fame has spread throughout the lands.

name: Legendary Professional
description: Your fame has spread throughout the lands (for instance, if you have Warfare Lore, you might be a legendary general or tactician).

name: Legendary Sneak
description: You're always sneaking unless you choose to be seen, even when there's nowhere to hide.

name: Legendary Survivalist
description: You can survive indefinitely without food or water and can endure severe, extreme, and incredible cold and heat without taking damage from doing so.

name: Legendary Tattoo Artist
description: Your craftsmanship at decorating flesh is unparalleled.

name: Legendary Thief
description: Your ability to defies belief.

name: Reveal Machinations
description: You reveal that you played a minor but recurring role in another humanoid's life-or at least convince them that's the case.

name: Scare to Death
description: You can frighten foes so much, they might die.

name: Unified Theory
description: You understand the common underpinnings of the four traditions of magic and magical essences, allowing you to understand them all through an arcane lens.

name: A Thousand Cries for Help
description: You've learned to communicate with creatures from all over the world, overcoming language barriers to lend a hand and help where you're needed.

name: Abjure Harm
description: Trigger You would take damage from an enemy's critical Strike.You're nigh invincible, and it's clear that your foe is so far beneath you that they have no hope of winning.

name: Absolve Sins
description: Your forgiveness is without limit, though the path to penitence can be painful, especially against those who have trespassed against your current mortal form.

name: Adamantine Fists
description: You imbue your unarmed strikes with one of the strongest metals.

name: Advanced Runic Mind Smithing
description: Your mind can hold onto more complicated patterns than ever before.

name: Aura Expertise
description: Trigger Your turn begins.You've become so accustomed to maintaining your battle auras that it's become second nature to you.

name: Auspicious Mount
description: Guided by your ongoing care, your steed has developed incredible intelligence and skill.

name: Avalanche Strike
description: Requirements You are wielding a melee weapon in two hands.You attack all nearby adversaries.

name: Bat Around
description: Your attack moves a foe into a position that your united companion can take full advantage of.

name: Blank Slate
description: Your deceptions confound even the most powerful magic that could spy on you.

name: Bolster Soul Cage
description: Your constant efforts to augment and perfect your soul cage have bolstered its efficiency.

name: Bound in Ice
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Monsters of Myth
description: You become a hybrid of your ancestry and a saumen kar.

name: Breath of Hungry Death
description: Frequency Once per hourYou have uncovered occult mysteries that allow you to unleash the devastating hunger of Kabriri upon your foes with a single exhalation, releasing a massive cloud of flesh-eating gas that glows with a sickly green light.

name: Bring Into the Fold
description: Frequency once per dayNot all who oppress are irredeemable, and given encouragement and some time, they will abandon their cause and join your fight against the very system they used to uphold.

name: Celestial Armaments
description: You imbue a fragment of your divine spark into a weapon, blessing your blade and transforming it into a weapon worthy of the celestial realms.

name: Chastise
description: With but a mere word from your deity, you exploit a foe's fear to see their inner being brought low.

name: Cleansing Spell
description: Infused with celestial light, your magic can more effectively heal wounds and purge afflictions.

name: Cloud Step
description: Using fantastic acrobatic skill, you can walk for brief stretches across insubstantial surfaces.

name: Cognitive Loophole
description: Trigger Your turn ends.

name: Collateral Thrash
description: You smack the foe you're thrashing into someone else.

name: Conduit of Void and Vitality
description: Requirements You have or as a signature spell and an available spell slot to cast it with.You use the unstable energy of your curse to manipulate the most basic of divine magic.

name: Constant Levitation
description: Your power has unbound you from the earth below.

name: Controlled Bullet
description: Frequency once per dayYou guide your weapon's next shot by taking control of the projectile directly, steering it through the air to hit target after target.

name: Converge
description: Trigger You make a successful ranged attack against an opponent who is within your overwatch field, and who is within reach of one or more of your allies who is also within your overwatch field.Informing your ally of an opening created by your shot, you coordinate to set them up to hit the target at

name: Courageous Onslaught
description: You use your performance to orchestrate an onslaught against your enemies.

name: Cross the Threshold
description: You can cast as an occult innate spell once per day.

name: Crown of Rule
description: Usage imbued into a worn ikon or a body ikonThis badge of office proclaims your sovereignty.

name: Cry of Rebellion
description: Frequency once per hourYou let loose a yell of unbridled passion, which fuels your allies, and pounds against your foes.

name: Deadly Grace
description: Your graceful attacks are especially powerful.

name: Death from Above (Eternal Legend)
description: Requirements You are adjacent to a climbable surface at least 10 feet tall.Seemingly to defy gravity, you use a nearby vertical surface to propel yourself upward and then strike downward like the driving rain.

name: Declare Anathema
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou declare a creature you are aware of within 30 feet anathema, causing their friends and strangers to shy away from them.

name: Defend Our Union
description: Trigger You and your companion are within 15 feet of each other, and a foe successfully Strikes your united companion.You can protect your companion from danger with a well-timed attack.

name: Deflecting Cloud
prerequisites: Dragon Disciple Dedication, dragon wings sorcerer bloodline spell
description: Frequency once every 10 minutes Trigger You are the target of a ranged attack.

name: Desperate Wrath
description: Trigger Your turn begins, and your current Hit Points are at half your maximum or less.Your blood boils when you take a beating, and you throw caution to the wind to finish the fight.

name: Didactic Strike
description: When you find a glaring weakness, you can set your allies up to annihilate your foe.

name: Disciple's Breath
prerequisites: Dragon Disciple Dedication, dragon breath sorcerer bloodline spell
description: You unleash your breath weapon without spending focus.

name: Dispelling Slice
description: Your sneak attack slices through the threads binding magic to a target.

name: Dispelling Spellstrike
description: Requirements Your Spellstrike is charged.

name: Dive of the Divine
prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication, fly Speed of at least 20 feet
description: Requirements You are at least 20 feet above the ground.You dive from the sky, bringing down the might of the divine with you.

name: Diverse Mystery
description: You have broadened your understanding of the divine and can tap into the wonders of a different mystery.

name: Dominating Gaze
description: You stare into your target's eyes and enthrall them, shattering their free will.

name: Dragon Transformation
description: You transform into a ferocious Large dragon, gaining the effects of 6th-rank except that you use your own AC and attack modifier, you apply your extra damage from , and the Dragon Breath action uses your class DC.

name: Effortless Concentration
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Electric Counter
description: Trigger You would take damage.

name: Emergency Regeneration
prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication, you have deactivated a creature's regeneration for at least 1 round or have identified a creature with regeneration in combat
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You're reduced to 0 hit points from damage that's neither acid nor fire.You have battled against foes whose bodies naturally regenerate, and while yours doesn't do so all the time, it can happen in a pinch.

name: Enlightened Presence
description: You exude an aura of resolve.

name: Eternal Bane
description: Your life has made you a nexus for your deity's vile power.

name: Eternal Blessing
description: Your deeds have brought your deity's grace to you for all of eternity.

name: Eternal Elixir
description: Your body readily accepts and retains minor changes.

name: Ever-Vigilant Senses
description: Your eidolon has enhanced senses.

name: Exploitive Bomb
description: You can mix a refractile substance into an alchemical bomb to foil resistances.

name: Faith in the Fallen
description: Access You're a member of the Vellumis Scholars.The Gravelands are full of fallen spirits seeking to move on, and you consider it your obligation to assist in that regard.

name: Fatal Bullet
description: You're especially talented at striking your enemies in their most vulnerable areas.

name: Fearsome Fangs
description: Your claws and jaws are brutally powerful and efficient, even by ursine standards.

name: Felicitous Riposte
description: You take advantage of your foe's openings with uncanny odds.

name: Flinging Blow
description: You take a moment to center yourself, then unleash a powerful blow that sends your target tumbling away.

name: Focus Ally
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger An adjacent ally fails, but doesn't critically fail, a saving throw against an effect with the incapacitation trait.

name: Following Smite
description: Requirements Your last action was a Strike made with a weapon or unarmed attack empowered by .You call upon your deity's power and channel it through your weapon.

name: Font of Life or Death
description: As you reach ever higher in your quest to achieve true divinity, the powers of life and death flow evermore easily from you.

name: Force of Nature
description: You're a nigh-unstoppable killing machine, with only silver able to quell your rampage.

name: Forest's Heart
description: Requirements Your attuned apparition grants Forest Lore or Herbalism Lore as one of its apparition skills.You adopt a stance that allows your apparitions to channel spiritual energy down through you to inhabit roots, control vines, and command plant-life from the ground you stand on to fight on your

name: Free from Bonds
description: As a mortal herald, you cannot easily be captured, nor can your allies.

name: Fulminating Synergy
description: When you draw upon your spells' synergy, you create a physical manifestation of their magical resonance and invoke it to harm a foe.

name: Furious Vengeance
description: Trigger An enemy within your melee reach critically hits you with a melee Strike.Your enemy's blow fuels your rage and provokes your immediate retaliation.

name: Fuse Stance
description: You have combined two stances into a single stance all your own.

name: Giant Slayer
description: Your well-placed blows can fell mighty giants.

name: Gift of the Immortal Herb
description: Usage imbued into a body ikonYour blood turns a divine gold, shining in moments its spilled and begetting new life.

name: Gird Champion
description: Your will manifests into divine weapons to protect and arm your followers.

name: Graceful Poise
description: With the right positioning, your off-hand weapon can strike like a scorpion's stinger.

name: Grave Threat
description: You use your imposing demeanor to set up the undead for defeat.

name: Greater Armament
description: Your weapons have greater power available to them.

name: Greater Distracting Shot
description: Even a single missile can throw off your enemy's balance, and more powerful attacks leave it flustered for longer.

name: Greater Mental Evolution
description: Your bloodline's deep connection to mental essence greatly enhances your spell repertoire.

name: Greater Snow Step
description: You can't be impeded by environmental effects that rely on cold or its byproducts.

name: Greater Vital Evolution
description: Vital power surges through you like a font of energy.

name: Hair Trigger
prerequisites: initial deed that allows you to Interact to draw a weapon
description: No one can react faster than you can pull your trigger.

name: Healing Sanctuary
description: When you call upon your deity's power, you also radiate a sense of safety that fortifies your allies.

name: Heraldic Proclamation
description: Frequency once per dayYou proclaim your spell with the might of your god behind you.

name: Imbue Spell
description: Trigger Your previous action was to Cast a Spell.You pass the energy of your magic onto an ally, allowing another to release the spell.

name: Impaling Briars
description: You can fill an area with devastating briars.

name: Imperious Aura
prerequisites: one or more stance impulses that affect your kinetic aura
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Implausible Purchase (Investigator)
description: It seems impossible, but you've analyzed every angle and are able to just keep pulling out exactly the item you need, even in far-flung locations.

name: Implement's Flight
description: By weakening your relation to the ground and strengthening your relation to the sky, you've learned to soar through the air, your implement carrying you as surely as any broomstick or pestle.

name: Improved Reflexive Shield
description: Your shield can help save nearby allies.

name: Improved Twin Riposte (Ranger)
description: At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to perform a .

name: Incorporeal Shot
description: Frequency once per dayYou can concentrate an immense amount of magic to create a piece of ammunition that phases through everything but your target.

name: Instant Return
description: Trigger An enemy misses you with a ranged attack using a type of ammunition appropriate to your weapon (a bullet if you're wielding a firearm).

name: Instrument of Slaughter
prerequisites: champion's reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)
description: Your blessed armament thirsts for the blood of your foes.

name: Instrument of Zeal
prerequisites: Blessed Counterstrike feat or Retributive Strike reaction, champion's reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy's damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)
description: Divine energy fills your weapon.

name: Invisible Hand
prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication, master in Stealth
description: Sometimes your deity requires you to act in the shadows, accomplishing things without drawing attention to yourself—or them.

name: Jester's Gambol
description: Requirements You are attuned to an apparition that grants Circus Lore or Fey Lore as one of its apparition skills.You adopt a stance that makes your movements carefree and sublimely unpredictable, allowing you to move past impediments with ease and resist the attacks and importunateness of natural t

name: Just the Thing!
description: Frequency once per hourNeed to balance on a razor's edge, force open an iron door, or persuade a dragon to negotiate?

name: Kneel Before the Rightful Heir
description: You command that your foes bow down before you or face your wrath.

name: Lead the Pack
prerequisites: Mature Beastmaster Companion, you have multiple animal companions
description: You can have up to two animal companions active at once.

name: Leaping Hedgehog Strike
description: You pounce toward an enemy and then barrel them over with one fluid movement, ending this maneuver with an attack that may catch them off-balance.

name: Legendary Monster Hunter
prerequisites: legendary in Nature, Master Monster Hunter
description: Your knowledge of monsters is so incredible that it reveals glaring flaws in your prey.

name: Lose Your Chains
description: Trigger An ally gains the or condition.You rouse rebellion in the hearts of your allies, inspiring them to break free of their bonds.

name: Mark of the Sage
description: Usage imbued into a worn ikonYour ikon gains a pin, stripe, or similar marking showing you as a master of your craft.

name: Marshall Fiendish Forces
description: You have been in contact with a retinue of fiends, brokering all manner of deals so that they may eventually serve you.

name: Master Captivator Spellcasting
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You master the most powerful spells that enchant and deceive.

name: Master of Many Styles
description: Trigger Your turn begins.

name: Master Qi Spells
description: You have achieved near-total mastery of your qi.

name: Master Siege Engineer
description: What you don't know about artillery isn't worth knowing and your mastery allows you to perform an impossible number of actions as part of a siege weapon's crew.

name: Master Skysage Divination
description: You unlock the most powerful secrets hidden in the stars above.

name: Master's Counterspell
prerequisites: Spellmaster Dedication, master in spell attack rolls and spell DCs
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell that you have prepared, and that spell was cast or created with a tradition of magic in which you have master proficiency in spell attack rolls and spell DCs.

name: Mobile Magical Combat
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You're wielding a melee weapon and have Cast a Spell requiring at least 1 action this turn.

name: Monstrosity Shape
description: You can transform into a powerful magical creature.

name: Monstrous Inclinations
description: Requirements Your attuned apparition grants Forest Lore or Ocean Lore as one of its apparition skills.Your apparitions share with you the monstrous nature of those creatures who dwell in deep seas or ancient woods.

name: Muckraking
source: Paizo Blog: Foolish Housekeeping and Other Articles
description: It seems like your knowledge has come in handy after all and you have your enemy at your feet.

name: Multishot Stance
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0.

name: My Kingdom, My Blood
description: The health of the ruler is the health of the kingdom, and the health of the kingdom is that of its ruler, each bound to the other inextricably.

name: Mystical Flare
description: Requirements Your aura is active.You release a torrent of magic to fill the air with tiny, distracting explosions of light.

name: Needle in the Gods' Eyes
description: With sinews of bronze and thews of iron, you leap to the heavens, piercing the arrogant eyes of the gods.

name: Night Terror
description: Buoyed by your fearsome reputation, your steed can take flight.

name: Noble Sacrifice
description: Trigger One of your designated knights is within 15 feet of you and would take damage from an enemy's Strike.As your knights devote their lives and swords to you, so too do you return their devotion with your own fierce protection.

name: One with the Spirits
description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You're under the effects of Enter Spirit Trance.The spirits you've invoked throughout your life have left behind echoes and spiritual fragments, which you can manifest across your own flesh, temporarily transforming you into something more akin to spirit than mor

name: One-Millimeter Punch
description: Your punches have incredible force and control.

name: Opportune Throw
source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
description: Requirements You are Juggling a thrown weapon.

name: Overwhelming Blow
description: You throw your weight into a powerful attack that leaves you vulnerable.

name: Pact of the Rune Dragon
description: While the students of Cobyslarni are taught to make pacts with many kinds of dragons, a pact with a rune dragon is somewhat more frequent due to their interest in the accomplishments of various academies.

name: Penetrating Projectile
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged or thrown weapon that deals piercing damage.

name: Perfect Distraction
description: You use clever tactics to mislead your foes as you sneak away.

name: Performance Weapon Expert
prerequisites: Provocator Dedication, expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attack
description: Your experience has made you better with a wide variety of weapons.

name: Persistent Boost
description: Your innovation sets foes on fire, covers them in acid, leaves barbed thorns behind, or otherwise deals persistent damage to your foes that sticks around long after you deliver your boosted attack.

name: Persistent Mutagen
description: You've trained your physical form to remain stable.

name: Phoenix's Flight
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're adjacent to or sharing the same space as your familiar.You and your familiar learn the secrets of elemental fire, allowing you to merge together to become a legendary creature—a phoenix.

name: Pierce the Eye
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon.You aim a shot from your weapon directly at a foe's eye, blinding them in the process.

name: Portentous Spell
description: Your spellcasting is rife with strange lights, mild fumes, and other captivating effects that befuddle your foes.

name: Preternatural Polish
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, legendary in Crafting
description: Armor you polish shines with righteous grace.

name: Protect the Royal Line
description: Requirements You're flanked by at least two enemies.You must keep your royal person safe from harm, especially when surrounded by those who would dare approach you.

name: Protective Cycle
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Trigger You take damage from an attack.

name: Purge of Moments
description: Frequency once per hour All things eventually end, a truth that you can put into practice by accelerating your passage through time to shake off harmful effects.

name: Quickened Attunement
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your previous action was Attunement Shift.

name: Rallying Charge (Knight Vigilant)
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, Lead the Way
description: When you lead your allies to the front lines, you leave no one behind.

name: Rapid Switch
description: Frequency once per round Requirements Your aura is active.You've honed your control over your spellsurge aura and can rapidly alter its effects.

name: Realm Strider
description: You can teleport across the battlefield, disappearing and appearing in a burst of hellfire and brimstone, a flash of lightning, a cloud of caustic gas, or other environmental hazard common within your planned realm.

name: Rebounding Smite
description: Trigger You miss with your Strike during .

name: Recharging Transference
description: You can break your spells down into raw magical potential and transfer it to an ally.

name: Reconstruct the Scene
description: You spend 1 minute surveying a small location (such as a single room) to get an impression of events that occurred there in the last day.

name: Remediate
description: Frequency once per hour If your next action is to use your divine font to cast a 3-action or spell, you can harness the residual energy to counterbalance opposing forces.

name: Remember Their Names
description: You peer into the eyes of a target of your Ultimatum of Liberation, as you say aloud the names of their victims, searing them into the oppressor's mind, cursing them to feel their victims' pain.

name: Resounding Cascade
description: Trigger You use Arcane Cascade.

name: Resounding Finale
description: Trigger You or an ally benefiting from your composition spell would take sonic damage.

name: Resurrectionist
description: You can cause a creature you bring back from the brink of death to thrive and continue healing.

name: Resuscitate
description: Requirements You are holding healer's tools or are wearing them and have a hand free.You resuscitate the dead.

name: Ricochet Master
description: You have an eye for angles and can find shots that others believe are impossible.

name: Rivethun Adept
description: Your ability to wield spirit magic has increased.

name: Ruthless Orator
description: Frequency once per hourYou were once cast in the role of Daronlyr XII, one of Taldor's most ambitious rulers who slew his cousin to seize the crown, yet somehow still managed to convince the entire Ulfen Guard to swear loyalty to him simply through his powers of oration.

name: Scintillating Spell
description: Your spells become a radiant display of light and color.

name: Seat of Power
description: Your sheer determination has created a demiplane that houses a grand residence which will serve as the heart of your planned realm.

name: Seven-Part Link
description: Many traditions hold the number seven as significant.

name: Sever Magic
description: Requirements You're holding an implement.

name: Shared Dream
description: You've learned to create a shared dreamscape to communicate with others.

name: Shattering Blows
description: Your forceful blows shatter objects with ease.

name: Shattering Strike (Monk)
description: The force of your considered blow shatters objects and defenses alike.

name: Shield of Grace
description: You protect an ally with both your shield and your body.

name: Shroud of Ghosts
description: Usage imbued into a worn ikonYour ikon is connected to the world of the spirits, allowing you to partially fade into their realm.

name: Siphon Power
description: Frequency once per day Requirements You haven't acted yet on your turn.

name: Song of Grace and Speed
source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
description: You instill great swiftness into your allies.

name: Sonic Strafe
description: Requirements You currently have a fly Speed.

name: Specialized Companion (Ranger)
description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability, and it is now cunning enough to become specialized.

name: Spell Gem
description: Inspired by the degenerate demiliches your kind sometimes devolves into, you've embedded a gem into your brow, fusing it to your necrotic flesh.

name: Spell Tinker
description: You've learned to alter choices you make when casting spells on yourself.

name: Spiritual Spellshape Stance
description: You feed excess magical power into your apparition, allowing it to grow ethereal limbs it can use to help shape and focus your spells.

name: Stand Firm
description: Your words help your ally shake off unease and terror.

name: Steal Death
description: Trigger Another creature within 30 feet gains the or condition or their doomed or dying condition increases.As a harbinger of daemonkind, you gain authority to delay the death of others if it serves your purposes, and in doing so, you bolster the well-being of both you and your mount to allow you so

name: Steal Spell
description: When you use to steal the impossible, you can steal a prepared spell or spontaneous spell from a foe.

name: Stone Body
description: Requirements You are in Tenacious Stance.

name: Storm of Claws
description: Requirements You're in either claw stance or talon stance.

name: Strike Rivers, Seize Winds
description: Frequency once per hour; see textThrough sheer physical force, you can wrestle a river, lasso the winds, punch a hole to the molten center of the planet, or create other environmental disturbances via nothing but your own strength.

name: Studious Capacity
description: Your continued study of occult magic has increased your magical capacity, allowing you to cast spells even when it seems impossible.

name: Stunning Appearance
description: Your sudden appearance leaves your foe unable to respond.

name: Swift Elusion
description: Trigger A foe ends its movement adjacent to you.

name: Target of Psychic Ire
description: Your magic saturates your surroundings with hateful psychic energy.

name: Telepathic Union
description: Your union is so strong, you can communicate with each other without uttering a word, even across vast distances.

name: Tempo Shift
prerequisites: Acrobat or Gladiator Dedication, legendary in Acrobatics
description: Trigger You Delay.

name: Terrifying Mien
prerequisites: Eternal Legend Dedication, master in Intimidation
description: Whether they have heard of your legend or seen your prowess on the field of battle, those already quaking in their boots grow weak when forced to stand against you.

name: The Bitter Scholar's Promotion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Tian Xia's shining cities belie its empires' long shadow of death, darkened by thousands of years of suffering and injustice.

name: The Immortal Attains the Summit
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your cultivation bearing glorious fruit, you behold Heaven's will.

name: Thundering Surge
description: Requirements Your aura is active.Your magic explodes in bursts of excess energy, creating thunderous waves.

name: To War!
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Requirements You are riding your apocalypse mount.You inspire your allies to greater battle prowess while trampling enemies in your way.

name: Too Much to Swallow
description: Trigger You're subject to an effect you could attempt to .

name: Touch Focus
source: Pathfinder Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover Compilation
description: Trigger You begin to Cast a Spell that requires a spell attack roll.

name: Trample (Summoner)
description: Your eidolon Strides up to double its Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, Trampling each creature whose space it enters.

name: Twinned Defense (Fighter)
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, one in each hand.

name: Ubiquitous Snares
description: You can prepare a seemingly impossible number of snares in advance, and you're ready to spring them on unsuspecting foes.

name: Unified Stance
description: Requirements You and your united companion are within 15 feet of each other.You and your companion enter a unified fighting style that allows you to fight in tandem more succinctly.

name: Unwind Death
description: Requirements The target's body must be mostly intact.

name: Vellumis Excision
description: Access You're a member of the Vellumis Scholars.You seek to excise the rot from the Gravelands and have made progress to do so.

name: Vessel's Form
description: Frequency once per day You symbiotically combine your form with that of the entity within you, taking a powerful hybrid form to temporarily boost your abilities in combat while maintaining control.

name: Virulent Strike
description: Those afflicted by certain maladies are closer to death in your presence.

name: Wandering Thoughts
description: Frequency once per round Requirements You used your most recent action to .

name: Ward Mind
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: Requirements You're currently affected by a mental effect that you gained by failing, but not critically failing, a saving throw.

name: Warden's Reload
description: Frequency once per round Requirements Your last action or activity this turn was to cast a warden spell.

name: Wave the Flag
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You wave your banner, inspiring allies to throw off the shackles of fear.

name: Weft and Warp
description: With graceful poise, you perform a dance of dangerous attacks.

name: Whirling Clobber
description: Requirements You have a creature or with your lash.

name: Wither Away
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou hasten the passage of time for a living creature, prematurely aging them into decrepitude.

name: Withstand Death
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: Through repeated exposure, you've trained to resist the damage wrought by undead.

name: You Failed to Account For... This!
description: Trigger A creature you can see targets you with an attack against your AC.When your foes try to attack you, you always seem to have some outlandish invention you can pull out at the last second to protect you from whatever attack they throw at you.

name: Along the Deep River
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin, or you're a follower of Sangpotshi.Once per year, when you die, you turn into an immaterial ball of light.

name: Animal Shape
description: You have full control over your shape and can transform into your inherent animal.

name: Animal Swiftness
description: You move like an animal.

name: Awakened Stride
description: You blend your instinct and intellect to move so fast you seem to be a blur.

name: Axial Recall
description: You have reconfigured the magical resonance of your core to attune to the planar energies of Axis, enabling instantaneous travel to that plane.

name: Azaersi's Roads
description: Azaersi has granted you limited access to the Stone Roads, attuning you to the tiniest sliver of the Onyx Key.

name: Begin Stampede
description: The sight of you charging forward into battle emboldens your allies to follow.

name: Bend Space
description: Not even space itself is a match for the unleashed power of your mind.

name: Benefactor's Majesty
description: Frequency once per dayYou tap into the grandeur of your warren's benefactor.

name: Blazing Aura
description: Frequency once per day.

name: Bone Swarm
description: Frequency once per day You scatter your body and transform into a whirling storm of bones for up to 1 minute or until you spend a single action to return to your normal shape.

name: Boneyard's Call
description: You have a powerful connection to the Boneyard and its courts, granting you the ability to travel to and from the Boneyard.

name: Breath of Calamity
description: Your roar shakes the earth and splits the heavens.

name: Call the Swarm
description: Frequency once per dayYou give a shrill whistle and point, and a massive swarm of rats pours forth from the surrounding terrain to fill a @Template[burst|distance:30] within 120 feet.

name: Cantorian Restoration
description: Frequency once per day Trigger A living creature within 60 feet would die.The energy that flows in your blood can save a life in the direst of times.

name: Ceremony of Sun's Gift
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Your connection to the sun has become an unbreakable bond.

name: Channel the Godmind
description: Frequency once per dayYou tap into the collective consciousness of the Godmind, the governing entity of axiomite society, to rapidly parse near-infinite variables to read your surroundings.

name: Cleansing Light
description: Frequency once per day A burst of light from your horn cleanses your allies of ailments and sends your foes reeling.

name: Convocation of Earth and Moon
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYou call upon Mother Earth and Father Moon to fill you with light.

name: Coral Lifeline
description: Frequency once per day Your coral symbiotes have grown into your bloodstream and are now curled around your heart.

name: Core Cannon
description: Frequency once per dayYour body transforms into a powerful magical cannon.

name: Crone's Cruelty
description: Filled with rancor and hate, you rend the minds of those who displease you.

name: Demon Slayer
description: Frequency once per dayYou can deliver a melee blow to a demon that creates an explosion of holy light to try to finish the demon off.

name: Dissolution's Sovereignty
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: With discipline born from a lifetime in darkness, you convince the shadow of an enemy to fight by your side.

name: Divine Declaration
description: You can call forth a holy or unholy word from the realms beyond to punish your foes.

name: Dominion Aura
description: Frequency once per day For a short time, you fully manifest the expectations of the god destroyer within you.

name: Doom of Sailors
description: Frequency once per day Sailors know that the sight of an angry merfolk might well mean that they never see the shore again.

name: Elude Trouble
description: Trigger A creature missed you with a melee attack.Stride up to your Speed.

name: Eternal Wings (Nephilim)
description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

name: Eternal Wings (Sylph)
description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

name: Favor of Heaven
description: You're one of Hei Feng's chosen people and have the authority of the Celestial Court on your side.

name: Fearsome Form
