description: A fearsome illusion covers you, evoking the terror of the most dangerous animals.

name: Fey Transcendence
description: You become a powerful fey creature, gaining strengths tied to the First World but also some of the weakness against which all fey must contend.

name: Final Form
description: Frequency once per day You embrace your monstrous blood and make it your own, screaming out to the heavens and hells alike in rage, pain, and defiance.

name: First to Strike, First to Fall
description: Whenever you successfully Strike a creature that has not acted in the first round of combat, that creature is until the end of your next turn.

name: Flourish and Ruin
description: You can call upon the vital essence of your spirit to restore life to your allies and call forth vines to ensnare and bludgeon your foes.

name: Forge-Blessed Shot
description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

name: Form of the Beloved Mother
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Access Tian Xia origin or follower of NalinivatiYou channel the blessings of Nalinivati to transform into a manifestation of her will.

name: Form of the Dragon
description: You can briefly transform into a paragon of your draconic ancestry.

name: Fossil Rider
description: Using your ancestors' bones, you manifest their spirits around you in a fossilized form.

name: Fountain of Secrets
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Frequency once per round You constantly remember details about the world.

name: Fox Possession
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You can project a spiritual form to possess another.

name: Gentle Death and Rebirth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You were once born from the energies of the land and nature, and by their power, you can return to life again.

name: Ghoran's Wrath
description: You have such a strong connection to the natural world that you can inspire it to attack at those who threaten you.

name: Great Tengu Form
description: You take on the imposing form of a large, winged spirit.

name: Greater Augmentation
description: You've greatly improved your abilities and your core can support further augmentations.

name: Greater Enhance Venom
description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with to greater vishkanyan venom.

name: Greater than the Sum
description: You call upon the familial bonds you share with other ysoki to defend them in battle.

name: Heroic Presence
description: Frequency once per day The blood of heroes courses through your veins, and you inspire your allies to dig deep and find a new level of resolve.

name: Homeward Bound
description: Frequency twice per week The connection between you and the First World resonates within your body stronger than it does for most gnomes, allowing you to cross the threshold between the Universe and the First World.

name: Hurricane Swing
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You critically hit a foe with a Strike with a slashing weapon.

name: Impaling Bone
description: Once per day, you can cast as a 7th-rank innate occult spell, except the spike is made of bone instead of cold iron.

name: Into the Labyrinth
description: Calling on your connection to minotaurs of myth, you shunt an enemy into a complex maze full of puzzles of your own devising.

name: Irresistible Bloom
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait
description: Frequency once per day You bloom, sprouting flowers and releasing a pleasant smell, becoming irresistible.

name: Kishin Rage
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per dayYour eyes glow a deep red and your body courses with adrenaline as you obtain a fraction of the power of the kishin oni.

name: Kraken's Call
description: Frequency once per dayYou call forth the sleeping krakens of the deep to crush your enemies.

name: Landscape Form
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: While walking down the road on a moonlit night, one might be puzzled to find a shop or hill that wasn't there before.

name: Legendary Laugh
description: Your laugher echoes in the minds of your enemies.

name: Legendary Monster
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your yaoguai form has reached its pinnacle, allowing you to assume (or perhaps, return to) the form of a monster of legend.

name: Lingering Breath
description: Your draconic breath destroys the surrounding environment and leaves your enemies in pain.

name: Magic Rider
description: Your people used powerful magic to travel between distant worlds in the distant past, and the remnants of that magic make such transportation easier for you.

name: Merge with the Source
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or Speaker in Training
description: You're among the most powerful of Speakers and can adopt the form of the spirits you entreat with.

name: Metallic Skin
description: Frequency once per day Duration 1 minute You fortify your natural resistances with elemental metal, covering your skin with thick metal.

name: Mooneater
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You call on the spirit of the dragon that devoured the moon to temporarily swallow a celestial body and blind onlookers with its visage.

name: Moray Ambush
description: Trigger You are and a creature who hasn't detected you passes within 20 feet of you.

name: Necromantic Heir
description: Your affinity for void energy spills outward and grants you a refilling well of necromantic essence.

name: Nodal Regeneration
description: Your body processes magic so effectively that you can induce true regeneration, replacing limbs and restoring organs.

name: Offensive Odor
description: You've mastered your defensive pheromones and have nearly complete control over them.

name: Olethros's Decree
description: Frequency once per dayYou have a connection to olethroses, the enigmatic psychopomps who successfully swayed the yamaraj to permit the creation of the first duskwalkers.

name: Pandemonium Eruption
description: Frequency once per dayYou unleash the pent-up chaos within you, becoming a nexus of unbridled destruction that wreaks unfettered havoc on everyone in your vicinity.

name: Perfected Gamtu
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Your hat embodies the illusory grandeur of a master dokkaebi.

name: Pierce the Light
description: You tear the veil between the Universe and its shadow.

name: Potent Nectar
description: Your nectar becomes particularly dangerous.

name: Prismatic Scales
description: You can cause your scales to glow with scintillating, many-hued colors, protecting you from energy while dazzling foes.

name: Radiate Glory
description: Your inherent glory radiates into the world with all the divine power of the celestial planes for 1 minute.

name: Rallying Cry
description: Frequency once per dayYou call out to your allies and push them to give their all in combat.

name: Rampaging Ferocity
description: Trigger You use .

name: Rampaging Form
prerequisites: Change Shape with a fox alternate form
description: Once per day, when you Change Shape into a fox, you can instead gain the effects of both the canine form of 5th-rank and 7th-rank for 1 minute or until you shift back, whichever comes first.

name: Reckless Abandon
description: Frequency once per day Despite a lifetime filled with questionable decisions, you've managed to survive, as though you have uncanny luck that lets you avoid the consequences of your own actions.

name: Reflect Foe
description: You create a copy of a foe by calling them forth from a nearby reflection, clonally growing them in an instant from one of your hairs or otherwise creating them in a way that matches your own nature as a reflection.

name: Regrowth
description: Your command over your vital essence allows you or an ally to recover from grievous wounds.

name: Reliable Luck
description: You survive danger with surprising regularity.

name: Restitch
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: You've learned how to sew even the most terrible tears and wounds together.

name: Return to the Seed
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Once per month, when you die, you can instead choose to fade away.

name: Scion Transformation
description: You go into hibernation for twenty-four hours and perform a ritual dedicated to your ancestors, undergoing a one-time metamorphosis.

name: Sever the Dreaming Shadow
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: As you whisper to your pusaka, it attempts to cut away an enemy's shadow, leaving them in an eternal sleep.

name: Shadow Self
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You successfully use Stealth to and become from all your current foes, or use Stealth to and become undetected to all your current foes.

name: Soaring Poppet
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Your construction has flaps of cloth or wicker that can keep you aloft.

name: Starshot Arrow
description: The greatest centaurs need not wait until their stories are over to touch the stars in the sky.

name: Start the Festival!
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: No distance can stop tanuki from making their way to a good party.

name: Stone Form
description: You can transform your body into a pure primal manifestation of earth, an elemental.

name: Stonegate
description: Earthen barriers no longer impede your progress.

name: Stonewall
description: Trigger An enemy or hazard's effect hits you or you fail a Fortitude save against one.

name: Storm Form
description: You can transform into an elemental.

name: Stormy Heart
description: The elemental power in your blood is a raging storm.

name: Strength of Eight Legions
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You meditate for 24 hours in a one-time ceremony within a forest or cave; after your seclusion, your frame and limbs swell with warlike might to enact your vows.

name: Symphony of Blood
description: You call forth the blood of your foes to grant you vigor.

name: Ten Lives
description: When your character would die, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17].

name: The Cycle Continues
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would gain the condition or would otherwise die.Death is as natural as breathing to you, and you can move past it as easily as the other troubles in your life.

name: This Too Shall Pass
prerequisites: And Will Do So Once More
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Mortal worries are such simple matters to you that you leave them behind almost as quickly as you experience them.

name: Tidal Shield
description: Frequency once per day You conjure the force of the tides to gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC until the end of your next turn.

name: Trample (Sarangay)
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: You know how to leverage your size and momentum when using your horns attack, and can use your movement speed to overrun your foes.

name: Transcend the Azimuth
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: As the earth drinks the light of sun and moon, so does your steady vow imbibe superlunary forces, ready to be unleashed with a moment's mantra.

name: Trickster Tengu
description: You can transform yourself or the bodies of others to express your displeasure.

name: True Gaze
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Mwangi Expanse
description: Frequency once per hour When you focus your eyes carefully, your gaze can pierce through all obfuscations, even magical ones.

name: True Senses
description: Frequency once per day Your senses are so sharp they pierce through all illusions.

name: Twist Healing
prerequisites: ability to cast heal and harm
description: Your connection to both life and undeath lets you twist the healing power of magic items to suit your own needs and aims.

name: Unbound Leaper
description: Your jumping prowess is unmatched.

name: Underwater Volcano
description: You can cast as a 7th-rank primal innate spell once per day, except that you can only evoke the volcano on the floor of a body of water, and the effects that normally happen to flying creatures happen to swimming creatures instead.

name: Unfettering Prankster
description: You can uplift all around you with your pranks, causing you and your allies to receive divine guidance in all your movements to effortlessly avoid environmental hindrances.

name: Unlimited Pluripotency
description: Within all surkis is the capacity to be whatever they need to be, and you can tap into that capacity even now.

name: Vicious Venom
description: The venom you produce is exceptionally potent and difficult to overcome.

name: Wood Ward
description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack.

name: Wyrmling Flight
description: Your draconic wings have grown large and strong enough for flight.

name: Yamaraj's Grandeur
description: Frequency once per dayYou have been granted a sliver of the power of the yamaraj, the magistrates of the dead who agreed to allow duskwalkers to exist at all.

name: All in My Head
description: Trigger You would take damage from a Strike or spell that doesn't have the death trait or otherwise cause instant death (such as ).

name: All in Your Head
description: Trigger You're about to attempt a Fortitude save or a Reflex save.

name: All Shall End in Flames
description: White-hot fire consumes everything in a cataclysmic sphere of death.

name: Army of One
description: Requirements Your nimbus is active.Even alone, you're a force to be reckoned with—an army of one, so long as you have your celestial armaments.

name: Beasts of Slumbering Steel
description: You conjure metal elemental mounts made of interlocking metal pieces.

name: Black Powder Embodiment
description: Requirements You're wielding a loaded magical firearm or crossbow.You merge your body with your ammunition, enabling you to travel the same path as your bolt or bullet.

name: Blaze of Revelation
description: Requirements You are Cursebound 4.Your mind and body can, for a short time and with great peril, surpass the final limits of your curse.

name: Body Barrier
description: Trigger You and at least one ally are in the area of an effect that requires a Reflex save.When your allies are in danger, you don't hesitate to take the brunt of the blow for them.

name: Branched Tree of Pain
description: Usage imbued into a weapon ikon that deals piercing or slashing damageThe blade of your ikon takes one or more notches, capable of dealing mortal pain to your foes.

name: Brandish Authority
description: With a terrifying pronouncement, you manifest a visible sign of your authority and fiendish power, such as a crown of flame upon your brow, a scepter forged of solidified souls, or a throne comprised of a dozen dragon skulls.

name: Brutal Critical
description: Your critical hits are particularly devastating.

name: Call the Worm
source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
description: You gain , heightened to 9th rank, as an innate primal spell that you can cast once per day, but can only summon a Purple Worm.

name: Celestial Form
description: You take on a celestial countenance, gaining the features of a type of celestial who serves your deity; for example, as an angel, you gain a halo and feathery wings.

name: Chemical Contagion
description: Your injury poisons can spray onto creatures.

name: Conflux Wellspring
description: You've achieved perfect magical and physical balance, allowing magic to flow into and through you more easily.

name: Contagious Spell
description: Your magic can bring devastation to more individuals.

name: Cranial Detonation
description: Frequency once per round Trigger You successfully reduce one or more non-mindless enemies to 0 Hit Points with a spell.

name: Creature of Myth
prerequisites: Beast Lord Dedication, you have a united companion with a specialization
description: Your specialized united companion grows with unparalleled power and strength, becoming a creature of myth.

name: Crowned in Tempest's Fury
description: You become one with a devastating thunderstorm from the Plane of Air, placing a crown of lightning upon your brow.

name: Cut them Down, Burn them Out
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, master proficiency in a weapon
description: Inspired by the sixth line of the Crimson Oath, when you oppose the enemies of Lastwall, you aim to excise the rot from the land itself.

name: Cycle of Souls
prerequisites: liturgist practice, at least one animist stance
description: Trigger Your turn starts.Your spiritual allies guide your movements, allowing you to prepare for the trials before you at a speed faster than thought.

name: Deathless Servant
description: The servants of apocalypse know that it is impossible to cheat death, but your will is sufficient to help you outlive even your strongest enemies.

name: Decree of Execution
description: You proclaim that a foe has violated the sanctity of your realm and must die.

name: Decree of War
description: Frequency once per dayYou declare your current foes as irredeemable enemies, calling your allies down upon them.

name: Deep Lore
description: Your repertoire is vast, containing far more spells than usual.

name: Deepest Wellspring
description: You've glimpsed the furthest recesses of your mind.

name: Deific Font
description: Frequency once per hourYour life force can fuel the stuff of miracles.

name: Devastating Weaponry
description: You release a volley of projectiles from your weapon, or power it to fly in every direction across the battlefield and Strike multiple creatures.

name: Diamond Fists
description: Your body hardens as you combine your attacks, making your finishing blows more damaging.

name: Discordant Voice
description: Your lets loose a discordant shriek that imbues your allies' attacks with powerful sonic reverberations.

name: Divine Apex
description: You can pour divine power into an item, letting the wearer exceed their limits.

name: Divine Effusion
description: The power of your mystery surges through you like a font of divine energy, even when your own magic dwindles.

name: Divine Presence
description: Your spirit becomes one with your deity, granting you the bearing of a god.

name: Echoing Channel
description: Animist When you channel the powers of life and death, your apparition absorbs and enhances the spiritual energy, carrying it to a nearby ally.

name: Echoing Spell
description: You time the components of your spell with exacting precision, setting up a resonance that duplicates the spell's effects.

name: Echoing Violence
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You critically succeed with an unarmed Strike against an opponent.Your powerful attack causes damage that reverberates through your opponent's body, shaking muscle from bone.

name: Effortless Reach
description: Focusing the powers of your ki to augment your blows, you stretch and lengthen your body in ways that defy logic.

name: Elemental Apotheosis
prerequisites: Nourishing Gate, exactly one kinetic element
description: You take on an elemental countenance, appearing like a type of elemental of your element.

name: Emboldened with Glorious Purpose
description: Communing with powerful spirits of the world and other powers far greater than yourself fills your heart with purpose and inspires you to strive for greater accomplishments.

name: Engine of Destruction
description: Your construct unleashes a broad swath of devastation by separating its limbs, deploying hidden armaments, or using a similar technique to wreak havoc.

name: Eternal Composition
description: The world is a stage upon which you are always playing.

name: Eternity-Incinerating Blaze
description: Usage imbued into a weapon ikonThe blaze of your divine spark is hot enough that it burns in not just the present, but the past and future as well.

name: Ever Dreaming
description: You draw no distinction between the sleeping and waking worlds.

name: Exaltation Overwhelming
description: Raising your weapon or fist aloft, you begin to gleam with dazzling radiance.

name: Exultant Blood Magic
prerequisites: Surging Blood Magic, legendary in Arcana or Religion, depending on your chosen tradition
description: The magic in your blood sings an exultant song of battle.

name: Eyes of God
description: You can see things as they truly are.

name: Eyes Unclouded
description: Your senses are enhanced by your divine spark, enabling you to see things as they truly are, piercing through illusions, transformations, and lies.

name: Fatal Shot
description: Frequency once per dayYou modify an arrow or bolt to bring death to your target in a single potent hit.

name: Fated Duel
description: Frequency once per weekYou and your knights are an unbeatable force together, but sometimes it's a monarch's duty to resolve the fate of their kingdom with nothing more than their own trusted weapon.

name: Fiendish Form
description: Your features reshape into those of a type of fiend who serves your deity; for example, as a demon you might have putrid scales, twisted horns, and red eyes.

name: Fight Choreography
prerequisites: Acrobat or Gladiator Dedication, master in Theater Lore
description: You've spent enough time training in stage fighting and teaching a wide range of stunts that you can prepare your companions with directions on how to avoid peril in battle.

name: Final Shot
description: Requirement You're wielding an unloaded firearm.You jam a triple charge of black powder into your weapon to unleash a devastating but risky and inaccurate attack.

name: Five Breaths, One Death
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Requirements You're in an elemental stance, and the target is under the effects of Induce Imbalance.You cycle through the elements in a devastating combination attack.

name: Flash of Omniscience
description: Trigger You turn begins.You briefly see the world as your deity does, recognizing the truth of those around you for a moment.

name: Frightful Aura
description: You're surrounded by a palpable sense of menace and power that's terrifying to behold.

name: Galvanize Spell
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your aura is active.You reabsorb the magic of your spellsurge aura to power a piece of powerful magic.

name: Glory on High
prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication, fly Speed of at least 20 feet
description: You take to the skies to unveil the full magnificence of your deity's power.

name: Grand Scroll Esoterica
description: You've completed the third and final step in your assimilation of scroll esoterica, granting you daily scrolls of incredible power.

name: Grandmaster Qi Spells
description: You have unlocked a qi technique achievable only by those who attain complete mastery of both their body and their spirit.

name: Greater Crossblooded Evolution
description: Your bloodline is extraordinarily complex.

name: Guiding Words
prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication, master in Diplomacy
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYour words speak divine truth, guiding blades and arrows to their mark.

name: Halcyon Spellcasting Sage
prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Adept, legendary in either Arcana or Nature and master in the other
description: Your command over halcyon magic is nearly unmatched.

name: Heightened Instincts
description: You've worked to sharpen your companions' instincts to supernatural levels.

name: Hell of 1,000,000 Needles
description: The landscape fills with monumental filaments of metal.

name: I Knew the Heroes
prerequisites: Uzunjati Recollection, legendary in a Recall Knowledge Skill
description: Your stories aren't mere tales passed down from elder to youth or teacher to student.

name: Ignite the Sun
description: The fires of creation become yours to control.

name: Implausible Infiltration
description: Requirements You are adjacent to a floor or vertical wall.

name: Implausible Purchase (Rogue)
description: You can use even if you have already used it after purchasing goods, and you can Interact to draw the item as a single action instead of a 2-action activity.

name: Implement's Assault
description: Requirements You're holding an implement.

name: Impossible Flurry
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Impossible Polymath
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, or Religion, Esoteric Polymath
description: Your esoteric formulas are so unusual that they allow you to dabble in magic from diverse traditions that other bards don't understand.

name: Impossible Volley
description: Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon with the volley trait and reload 0.You fire a volley at all foes in an area.

name: Imprison Foe
description: Requirements Your last action dealt damage to a creature.Rather than grant your foes the mercy of a swift death, you can consign them to suffer in an extradimensional prison with an appearance of your choosing.

name: Improbable Elixirs
description: Your mastery of alchemical secrets enables you to replicate effects most believe can be achieved only via magic.

name: Improved Swift Banishment
description: You easily banish creatures with your weapon.

name: Incredible Luck (Swashbuckler)
description: You always seem to bounce back from the worst.

name: Infinite Expanse of Bluest Heaven
description: An illusion of a limitless expanse with an impossibly blue sky makes all within feel the sensation of falling...

name: Infinite Possibilities
description: You can prepare a spell slot that exists in your mind as many different possibilities at once.

name: Intense Implement
description: You have an exceptional link to your third implement.

name: Inviolable
description: Your deity punishes creatures that harm you.

name: Invoke Disaster
description: You can invoke nature's fury upon your foes.

name: Lead Investigator
description: You spend 1 minute briefing up to four allies about one of your open investigations.

name: Legend of Combat
description: You can deliver a lightning-fast series of blows and strikes, bringing all the strength of your legend to bear against those who have yet to experience your prowess.

name: Lethal Finisher
description: You stab your foe in a vital organ, possibly killing them outright.

name: Liberty or Death
description: Requirements A creature has been the target of your for at least 1 minuteYou have given a despot enough time to think, and now is the time for them to forfeit their control or die.

name: Look Again
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
description: Frequency once per day If your illusions or enchantments fail to ensnare the minds of others, you can cast them again.

name: Magical Master
description: Your eidolon gains a bevy of lower-rank spells.

name: Mana Detonation
description: You can violently discorporate your form.

name: Manifold Edge
description: You've learned to leverage every possible edge.

name: Marked for Rebuke
description: You declare that an enemy is fit for further punishment in the sight of your deity.

name: Master Animist Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Animist Spellcasting, legendary in Religion
description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

name: Master Bard Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Bard Spellcasting, legendary in Occultism
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Beast Gunner Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting or Expert Wizard Spellcasting
description: You've learned the final truth of beast guns, making you a master in the magic they grant you.

name: Master Cathartic Spellcasting
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Cleric Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Cleric Spellcasting, legendary in Religion
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Druid Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Druid Spellcasting, legendary in Nature
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Magus Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Magus Spellcasting, legendary in Arcana
description: You gain the Master Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Oracle Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Oracle Spellcasting, legendary in Religion
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Psychic Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Psychic Spellcasting, legendary in Occultism
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Red Mantis Magic
prerequisites: legendary in Religion, Expert Red Mantis Magic
description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

name: Master Rivethun Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Rivethun Spellcasting, legendary in Religion
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Benefits.

name: Master Scroll Cache
description: Your scroll collection is incredible, brimming with eldritch power, and you can prepare far more of them than an ordinary scroll trickster.

name: Master Snowcasting
description: You have unlocked the deeper magic of your gelid shard, gaining access to new ranks of spells.

name: Master Sorcerer Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Sorcerer Spellcasting, legendary in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion depending on bloodline
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Summoning Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Summoner Spellcasting, legendary in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition
description: You gain the Master Bounded Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Witch Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Witch Spellcasting, legendary in the skill associated with your patron's tradition
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Master Wizard Spellcasting
prerequisites: Expert Wizard Spellcasting, legendary in Arcana
description: You gain the Master Spellcasting Feat benefits.

name: Masterful Companion
description: Your animal companion shares your incredible hunting skills, allowing it to take down your shared prey with ease.

name: Memory of Nothing
description: With a look and a gesture, you turn a thinking creature's mind against itself, causing the creature to struggle to remember how to perform more complex actions.

name: Mighty Bear
description: The power of the bear within you can expand your physical presence even further.

name: Mighty Dragon Shape
description: You've practiced and increased your draconic might, allowing you to take your draconic form more often.

name: Mighty Wings
prerequisites: Dragon Disciple Dedication, dragon wings sorcerer bloodline spell
description: Your dragon wings are now a permanent part of your body, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Miracle Worker
description: Frequency once every 10 minutesYour alchemical mastery can resuscitate the recently slain.

name: Miraculous Flight
description: With superior engineering and magical application, you have freed your signature vehicle from the bonds of gravity, allowing it to soar through the sky like a dragon.

name: Miraculous Possibility
description: Your deity empowers you to perform minor miracles, allowing you to readily adapt to the fluctuating needs of your duties.

name: Mythic Counter
description: You can overwhelm the magical designs of others with sheer magic power.

name: Mythic Weapon Specialization
prerequisites: Eternal Legend Dedication, greater weapon specialization
description: When you fully embrace your Calling, your blows hit with incredible force that can fell even the mightiest of creatures.

name: Negate Damage
description: Trigger You would take damage.Your armor innovation activates various devices you prepared ahead of time, and you use one of them to reduce the damage you would take by 15.

name: Orichalcum Bond
description: The ancient Thassilonians associated sins with different skymetals, and you've adapted that theory to empower your bonded weapon beyond its normal limits.

name: Pack of the Beast Lord
description: You and your united companion call upon the service of others of its kind, creating figment duplicates of your companion to form a massive swarm of formidable power.

name: Pack Performance
description: Trigger A creature counteracts or disrupts the spell you're casting.

name: Pact of the Living Pact
description: You've sworn a pact with a pact that has somehow survived long after the death of the original pactbinder.

name: Parry and Riposte
description: Your parries and finishers allow you to riposte with the slightest provocation.

name: Pass Vengeful Judgment
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your hierophant invoked your judgment on their previous turnTo prevent yourself from frivolously calling down the terrible power of divine wrath, you have vowed to do so only with the assent of your mortal hierophant.

name: Patron's Claim
description: Your patron partially manifests itself through your familiar to claim a foe's power for its own.

name: Perfect Clarity
description: Trigger You fail or critically fail an attack roll or Will save.You burn out all your rage to ensure that your attack lands and your mind remains free.

name: Perfect Debilitation
description: You have perfected the formulas for bombs that impede your enemies.

name: Perfect Form Control
description: Thanks to magic and muscle memory, you can stay in your alternate shapes indefinitely.

name: Perfect Ki Grandmaster
prerequisites: Perfect Ki Expert or Perfect Ki Exemplar
description: You gain an appropriate qi spell for your School of Perfection: for Unblinking Flame, for Unbreaking Waves, for Unfolding Wind, or for Untwisting Iron.

name: Perfect Shot
description: Requirements You are wielding a loaded ranged weapon with reload 1 or more, and you have not reloaded your weapon since your last turn.

name: Piercing Critical
description: Your attacks with your preferred weapons deal especially devastating wounds.

name: Powerful Sneak
description: You've learned to exploit your enemies' openings.

name: Primal Aegis
description: You surround yourself with a thick field of protective primal energy.

name: Profane Bargain
description: You can strike a profane bargain with a willing, sapient creature.

name: Qi Center
prerequisites: Master of Many Styles, Qi Spells
description: Frequency once per minuteYou center yourself with the universe and draw upon its vast power.

name: Razor's Edge
description: Your curse and your power are one and the same, and you accept both equally.

name: Reach for the Stars
description: The sky's the limit, as long as you've got enough black powder.

name: Rebellious Existence
description: You have tied yourself so absolutely to the cause of liberty that your very existence is an act of rebellion.

name: Rebirth in Living Stone
description: Rock overflows from within you to consume your form before cracking open to reveal your body transformed into living stone.

name: Rejuvenating Touch
description: Your healing energies linger after you cast, providing continual benefits.

name: Reprepare Spell
description: You've discovered how to reuse some of your spell slots over and over.

name: Reprisal of the Fallen
description: You can feel the sorrow, pain, and rage of those fallen to oppression, peering from just behind the veil of death, and you can bring them forth to exact their revenge.

name: Retain Absorbed Spell
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: When you absorb a spell using the Absorb Spell reaction, you utilize secret, techniques that allow you to retain the power and knowledge necessary to cast the spell repeatedly-potentially for a greater period of time.

name: Retributive Focus
description: Frequency once per day Requirements Your focus pool is currently empty.Your enemy's offenses fuel your righteous power.

name: Ride the Tsunami
description: Booming, crashing walls of water, enough to fill a harbor, smash out ahead of you, overwhelming all in their path.

name: Rouse the Forest's Fury
description: Terrifying trees attack your enemies.

name: Sanctified Relic
description: You fill an item with your divine power, granting the wearer your blessings.

name: Savage Critical
description: The wounds you inflict are grievous.

name: School Spell Redirection
description: When you Counterspell a spell with a school matching your specialization, if you critically succeed at your counteract check, or if you succeed while using a spell of a higher level than the spell you countered, you can redirect the spell you countered.

name: Scouring Spark
prerequisites: Ascended Celestial Dedication, Channel Divine Spark
description: When you unleash your divine spark, you become a being of living light that scours away the darkness.

name: Second Thoughts
description: Trigger You cast a mental spell that targets one creature, and it critically succeeds at its Will save.

name: Seven-Colored Cosmic Bridge
description: Usage imbued into a melee weapon ikonYour divine spark shines in a riot of shimmering colors, capable of carrying you through the world as fast as light itself.

name: Shadow Hunter
description: You blend in to your surroundings so well that others have trouble telling you apart from the terrain.

name: Shadow Master
description: The shadows protect you better than any armor can, and they give you power to plunge others into darkness.

name: Shared Clarity
description: You can project your premonitions of clarity to your allies.

name: Shining Glory
description: Requirements Your nimbus is active.With a righteous word, your divine aura inspires your allies to great heroics and causes foes to tremble.

name: Smash from the Air
description: Your expertise enables you to knock away spells.

name: Soaring Dynamo
description: You've built clockwork wings or jets into your dynamo, allowing you to use your prosthesis to fly.

name: Soul Vessel Mount
description: Your mount has a supernatural hunger for mortal souls that you can feed.

name: Specialized Companion (Animal Trainer)
source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
description: The animal companion you gain from the Animal Trainer Dedication feat gains one specialization of your choice.

name: Spirit of Vigil
description: Though the city of Vigil itself has been destroyed, you will carry on its warrior spirit to the end of your days.

name: Spirit's Sacrifice
description: Trigger You would die.Your attuned apparition gathers all of the energy it can through your shared bond and uses that power to disperse itself while channeling the energy back into you, saving your life.

name: Split Hex
description: You siphon some of the power from an offensive hex you cast to direct it at a second target as well.

name: Stand for the Fallen
description: Trigger An ally takes damage that would bring them to 0 Hit PointsYou protect your allies at the cost of your own blood, but your deity shields you from the worst of the harm.

name: Stave off Catastrophe
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Pathfinder Society Guide
description: You fully protect your allies from the worst blows.

name: Stymie the Gods
description: Frequency once per hourBy exerting your will as a nascent god present in the mortal realms, you can hold off the influences of most distant entities, even ones much older and more powerful than yourself.

name: Sunwrecker
description: Usage imbued into any weapon ikonYour weapon has the might of legends, capable of shooting or striking any light out of the sky.

name: Swift Retribution
description: The transgressions of your enemies fuel you to retaliate with divine speed.

name: Swift River
description: Trigger Your turn ends and you have a status penalty to your Speed or are or You flow like water, avoiding all restraints.

name: Terrifying Countenance
prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication, Member of the Grey Gardeners
source: Pathfinder Adventure: Night of the Gray Death
description: You can erect a magical cowl that terrorizes your enemies.

name: The Shattered Mountain Weeps
description: A massive sphere of rock explodes, unleashing a cataclysm of falling debris and deadly shrapnel.

name: The Thousand Lashes of the Weeping Willow
description: You conjure a massive willow tree, which lashes your foes with a thousand branches.

name: Timeline-Splitting Spell
description: Frequency once per day You invest in two futures, then choose the one to make a reality.

name: Tragic Lament
prerequisites: Celebrity or Dandy, legendary in Performance
description: Trigger A creature you're aware of critically succeeds on a Strike against you and would deal damage to you.

name: Triangle Shot
description: Requirements You are in and wielding a bow usable with that stance.You string three arrows to your bow and fire them all at once.

name: Trickster's Ace
description: Trigger You specify the trigger when you make your daily preparations (see Requirements below).

name: Tripartite Omen
prerequisites: Dualistic Synergy, Shattered Sacrament, master in Religion
description: You invoke religious portents to ward yourself against danger without losing sight of the history that led to this point.

name: True Transmogrification
description: You transmogrify your eidolon each day.

name: Turn the Wheel of Seasons
description: The seasons shift rapidly.

name: Ultimate Mercy
description: Your mercy transcends the bounds of life and death.

name: Uncanny Vitae
description: Your warrior spirit is infused with a potent vital essence that imbues your gear.

name: Unerring Shot
description: Your senses are finely tuned to the slightest variations in the air, so much that you can place your shot exactly where you intend to aim it from any range possible with your weapon.

name: Unstoppable Force
description: While you are in the stance provided by , you ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

name: Usurp the Lunar Reins
description: The moon has always been connected to the tides, and now you can grasp that connection.

name: Versatile Spellstrike
description: You can channel the entire realm of possibilities of your spellbook into an attack.

name: Vicious Evisceration
description: You make a vicious strike that maims your enemy.

name: Whirlwind Toss
description: You whirl a foe to smash into all nearby creatures before throwing them far away.

name: True Perception
description: Your perceptive abilities and ability to process sensory information are so far beyond the pale that you notice minute discrepancies in all sorts of illusions and physical transformations.

name: Accurate Flurry
description: Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

name: Alchemical Revivification
description: If you die while under the effect of at least one elixir, the alchemical compounds in your bloodstream bring you back to life at the start of your next turn.

name: All the Time in the World
description: Frequency once per hour Your firsthand experience of the subjective nature of time and space has given you new observational insights.

name: Annihilating Swing
description: You have embraced brute destructive power.

name: Apex Companion
description: You can call upon the essence of every individual animal of a particular species to temporarily transform your animal into an exemplar of its kind.

name: Archwizard's Might
description: You have mastered the greatest secrets of arcane magic.

name: Armament Paragon
description: Add the following property runes to the list you can choose for your blessed armament: , Greater Fearsome, , , and Greater Vitalizing.

name: Assume Godhood
description: You complete your apotheosis into living godhood, allowing you to empower more followers.

name: Astonishing Explosion
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You use to craft an alchemical bomb that deals splash damage and is at least 2 levels lower than your level.

name: Avatar's Audience
description: Your extensive service affords you certain divine privileges.

name: Avatar's Protection
description: Trigger You are critically hit by an enemy.

name: Banishing Blow
description: Trigger You use your champion's reaction, triggered by a fiend within your reach.

name: Become Thought
description: You shed some of your material form, becoming a being of pure thought.

name: Bloodline Conduit
description: Frequency once per minuteYour inborn magical nature lets you redirect ambient energies to fuel your spells.

name: Bloodline Metamorphosis
description: You have learned to manipulate the innate power of your bloodline and adapt it to your needs.

name: Bloodline Mutation
prerequisites: a bloodline based on a specific type of creature
description: You permanently mutate to become more like the creatures of your bloodline.

name: Bloodline Perfection
description: You command the ultimate powers of your bloodline and tradition.

name: Boundless Reprisals
description: With a sixth sense for the flow of combat, you can quickly react to any situation as required.

name: Break the Causal Chain
description: Frequency once per monthSomething terrible has happened.

name: Celestial Rebirth
description: Through your diligence and commitment to heroics, you finally complete your apotheosis into a true celestial.

name: Cenotaph Stance
description: Requirements You're wielding a shield.You take on a stance that marks your location as a place where none will fall.

name: Contagious Rage
description: You can drive your allies into a frenzy, granting them incredible benefits.

name: Craft Philosopher's Stone
description: Your research has paid off, culminating in the legendary philosopher's stone.

name: Cross the Final Horizon
description: Requirements You're in Sky and Heaven Stance.

name: Cunning Trickster Mask
description: Your mask carries the legacy of Verdant Spider, the Speaker of Needs, allowing you to deceive and outwit your foes.

name: Cutting Without Blade
description: While tales of your divine ikons have spread far and wide, you've realized that, as they are all manifestations of your soul, the object itself is unnecessary.

name: Dance of Intercession
description: Frequency three times a day You either performed in or stood witness to the dance used to invoke the Celestial Dragon and can harness a sliver of their power.

name: Deadly Strikes
description: You have honed your body to attack with lethal focus.

name: Demon's Hair
description: Your hair constantly wriggles and writhes like that of your rival, Syu Tak-nwa.

name: Denier of Destruction
description: Requirements You have a spell prepared and you aren't to the source of the damage.

name: Ease the Burden
description: Frequency once per hourYou wash away a creature's pain with a touch.

name: Efficient Alchemy (Paragon)
description: Your daily preparations are particularly efficient and plentiful.

name: Emancipator's Mask
description: Your mask grants you the abilities of Whistling Kite, the Vigilant Seer, who emancipated thousands.

name: Emblazon Divinity
description: Your sacred etchings imbue objects with power.

name: Empyreal Aura
prerequisites: Knight Vigilant Dedication, legendary in Religion
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: As an ultimate foe of evil and protector of the innocent, your very presence is a ward against evil.

name: Endurance of the Rooted Tree
description: Just as the Vale of Aroden retains light and life despite inhospitable surroundings, you can sustain yourself regardless of your environment.

name: Enduring Debilitation
description: Trigger You apply a debilitation to a creature.

name: Enduring Quickness
description: You move as fast and as high as the wind itself.

name: Enter Divine Realm
description: You are granted access to your deity's realm and can travel there quickly.

name: Eternal Boost
description: Your link with your eidolon is so intense that you continuously reinforce its abilities.

name: Eternal Guide
description: Frequency once per weekYour attuned apparitions recognize that you still have essential work to do and refuse to allow you to pass on, gathering up your essence to carry your soul back to the community you call home.

name: Everdistant Defense
description: Trigger A creature within your aura is targeted by a ranged attack or a creature moves through your aura.

name: Everyone's a Suspect
description: You are so suspicious of everyone you meet that you keep mental notes on how to defeat them all-even your own allies.

name: Extradimensional Stash
description: When you perform sleight of hand, you fold space so that objects really do disappear.

name: Fatal Aria
description: Your songs overwhelm the target with unbearable emotion, potentially striking them dead on the spot.

name: Fiend Eternal
description: Through all your machinations and accumulation of power, you have completed your apotheosis and become a true archfiend.

name: Fight Through Oblivion
description: Mortal wounds that would kill other warriors are no more than the flutter of butterfly wings to you.

name: Finish Their Story!
description: Though your tale is immortal, your foes aren't afforded such an advantage and mainly serve only to further your legend.

name: Flash of Omnipotence
description: Trigger Your turn begins.For but a moment you hold the power of a god.

name: Full Automation
description: You become so entwined with your innovations that you can use them without a second thought.

name: Godbreaker
description: Requirements You have a creature or .You have mastered an ultimate grappling technique capable of breaking even the mightiest of foes.

name: Golden Body
description: You perfect your body, refining the flex of every muscle and the bend of every joint to maximum efficiency.

name: Grand Medic's Mask
description: Your mask is infused with restorative magic associated with Ibex, the Flourishing Field, so it constantly repairs itself.

name: Head of the Night Parade
description: You remember the revelry of the Night Parade and call them to your aid in a riotous display.

name: Heart of the Kaiju
description: Witnessing the might of the kaiju King Mogaru, Alru, and Toraloa up close awoke a new ferocity within you.

name: Herald's Strike
description: The power of your blows can send your victim hurling through your deity's realm for a fragment of a second.

name: Hex Master
description: You embody the link to your patron so completely that you can cast your hexes in rapid succession.

name: Hidden Paragon
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You successfully use Stealth to and become from all of your current foes, or use Stealth to and become to all your current foes.

name: Hierophant's Power
description: You have entwined yourself with the natural world, and its full power flows through you.

name: Icy Apotheosis
description: You are as much a creature of cold as whatever ancestry you were born to.

name: Illimitable Finisher
description: Your strikes flow endlessly.

name: Immortal Bear
description: Your body thrums with the primal vitality of the greatest of the ursine beasts.

name: Immortal Ruin
description: Your commitment to ending all life earns you a measure of immortality, setting the stage for you to become a true Rider of the Apocalypse, possibly supplanting one of the Four.

name: Immortal Techniques
description: You flow from technique to technique, renewing yourself as you embrace each style you have mastered.

name: Impossible Snares
description: You can create endless shorter-lived snares, protecting your lair or using them against foes.

name: Impossible Striker
description: Nothing can prevent you from making a sneak attack, even if your opponent can see every blow coming.

name: Impossible Technique
description: Trigger An enemy's attack hits you or you fail a saving throw against an enemy's ability.

name: Inexhaustible Countermoves
description: You can react whenever a foe leaves a gap in their defenses.

name: Just the Facts
description: You fundamentally understand everything to the point where your research can't possibly be wrong.

name: Kinetic Pinnacle
description: No one can match the pace at which elements flow from you.

name: Legacy of Monarchs
description: No matter what might happen to you, your legacy shall never die.

name: Legendary Rider
description: You and your mount move like one being, effortlessly reading each other's signals and synchronizing even in the thick of battle.

name: Legendary Shot
prerequisites: masterful hunter, legendary in Perception, Far Shot
description: You focus on your hunted prey, perceiving angles, air resistance, and every variable that would affect your ranged attack.

name: Legendary Summoner
description: Your ability to summon extends past your other spellcasting.

name: Ley Line Conduit
description: Frequency once per minute You can draw magic from the ley lines of the world.

name: Lightning Qi
description: Frequency Once per 10 minutesQi flows freely from within you.

name: Live the Creed
description: Frequency once per 10 minutesYou've become an unparalleled figure among your faith, able to align your divine abilities with unparalleled swiftness.

name: Living Epic
description: You are a living legend, a being who cannot be claimed by death, as death has already passed you.

name: Living God
prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication, legendary in Crafting
description: You have reached heights of power equaling Razmir himself.

name: Maker of Miracles
description: You are a conduit for truly deific power.

name: May Death Itself Reconsider
description: Your will is so steadfast that even death can't stop you.

name: Mega Bomb
description: You can add a highly explosive additive to an alchemical bomb to turn it into a mega bomb.

name: Mimic Protections
description: By adopting resonant reflections, you have learned to copy the abilities of other creatures as well.

name: Mind Over Matter
description: Your mind's limits are only what you imagine them to be.

name: Moment of Apotheosis
description: For a small moment, you can assume the form of your god.

name: More Real Than Real
prerequisites: Acrobat, Celebrity, Dandy, or Gladiator Dedication
description: Your performances aren't just well-known, they're famous across the land and beyond.

name: Mystery Conduit
description: The power of your mystery enables you access to myriad magic.

name: Mystic Life Force
description: Magic energy sustains you, supporting your form far beyond the capabilities of mere flesh.

name: Omnikinesis
description: You can realign your kinetic gate with a thought.

name: Once and Future
description: Though foul treachery might lay you low or dark magic still your heart, when the people cry out for you in desperate need, you shall rise to protect them.

name: One Life, Two Vessels
description: The minds of you and your companion are so intertwined that, so long as one of you lives, the other continues to exist in the living one's mind.

name: Oracular Providence
description: Your mystery grants you access to deep reserves of truly miraculous divine power.

name: Pack Takedown
description: Requirements You have two active companions.

name: Panache Paragon
description: You find opportunities to perform stylish feats in the moments between others' heartbeats and eye blinks.

name: Paradoxical Mystery
description: The truest depths of your divine mystery are fathomless and contradictory, granting you changing powers that even you can barely begin to fathom.

name: Patron Reborn
description: You have fully realized the ability to serve as a patron.

name: Patron's Truth
description: You have mastered the greatest secrets of your patron's magic and learned a fundamental truth about your patron, even if their identity still remains a mystery.

name: Perfect Encore
description: You develop another incredible creation.

name: Perfect Mutagen
description: You have enhanced the formulas for your mutagens, aligning them perfectly to your physiology.

name: Perfect Readiness
description: You prepare to fire with an instinctive speed and muscle memory that go beyond your conscious thoughts.

name: Pied Piping
description: You learn the composition spell, which enables you to control the actions of weak-minded individuals.

name: Plum Deluge
description: Requirements You have at least three of the same contact poison.

name: Protective Spirit Mask
description: Your mask carries the protective instincts of White Bull, the Horn Forger, and no one will hurt your allies while you have anything to say about it.

name: Quaking Stomp
description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You stomp the ground with such force that it creates a minor earthquake, with the effects of the spell.

name: Reach for Immortality
description: Frequency once per dayYour divine spark is now a bonfire in your soul, bringing you to the very cusp of undying immortality.

name: Reactive Distraction
description: Trigger You would be hit by an attack or targeted by an effect, or you are within an effect's area.

name: Reclaim Spell
description: You have learned to manipulate reflections of magic, similar to the resonant reflections.

name: Reflecting Riposte
prerequisites: Dueling Riposte, Mirror Shield, or Twin Riposte
description: Trigger An opponent casts a spell and you critically succeed at a saving throw against it.

name: Remake the World
description: For the briefest of moments, you can reach into the realm of true gods, gaining the power to shape reality to your will.

name: Ricochet Legend
description: The more obstacles between you and your target, the deadlier your shots become, as you ricochet off multiple surfaces to hit them.

name: Ringmaster's Introduction
description: Requirements The ally hasn't acted in the current combat.

name: Ruby Resurrection
description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points.

name: Sacred Defender
description: You are a great warrior that can stand strong against the fiercest opponents to your cause.

name: Scapegoat Parallel Self
description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn starts or your oracular curse would advance.

name: Sever Space
description: Requirements You are wielding a weapon that deals slashing damage or have an unarmed Strike that deals slashing damage.

name: Shield Paragon
description: Your shield is a vessel of divine protection.

name: Sky Master Mask
description: Your mask holds the legacy of Black Heron, the Wings of Knowledge, who united the aeromancers of the Shory Empire.

name: Slinger's Reflexes
description: Your ability to react to unexpected circumstances is preternaturally sharp.

name: Song of the Fallen
description: The moving power of your songs can stir the spirits of the dead to rise once more and fight alongside you.

name: Spark of Immortality
description: You have become a divine entity, no longer entirely mortal.

name: Spell Combination
description: You can merge spells, producing multiple effects with a single casting.

name: Spell Mastery
description: You have mastered a handful of spells to such a degree that you can cast them even if you haven't prepared them in advance.

name: Spellshape Channel
description: Deep understanding of divine revelations into the nature of vital essence allows you to freely manipulate the energy of life and death.

name: Spellshape Mastery
description: Altering your spells doesn't take any longer than casting them normally.

name: Stalking Feline Mask
description: Like Azure Leopard, the Patient Warden, your mask makes you most at home in the night and teaches you how to use the darkness to hunt.

name: Steal Essence
prerequisites: legendary in Thievery, master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: Requirements A magic item is within your reach.

name: Storyteller's Mask
description: Your mask remembers the stories of Shifting Frog, Storyteller of the Past and Future.

name: Superior Sight
description: Your senses are peerless.

name: Supreme Spellstrike
description: You've made it almost effortless to combine spells and attacks.

name: Surging Interference
description: Trigger A creature Casts a Spell within your aura.You absorb the scattered energy of others' failed spells, using it to recharge your own magic.

name: Swift Paragon
description: The movement of you and your allies is swift and decisive as the judgment of your deity.

name: Symphony of the Muse
description: You have learned how to weave countless performances together into a solo symphony with multitudinous effects.

name: Synergistic Spell
prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate, Fulminating Synergy, legendary in Arcana, legendary in Nature
description: You combine your synergy and spells into a fantastic web of magic, allowing you to cast two spells at once.

name: Tenacious Blood Magic
description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You apply an effect from your blood magic that lasts for 1 round.

name: The Tyrant Falls!
prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication, Invoke the Crimson Oath
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You've reached the apex of the Crimson Oath's power.

name: Thick Hide Mask
description: Your mask grants you the toughness of Elephant, the Conjured Chronicle.

name: Time Dilation Cascade
description: You borrow a bit of time from the future to act now.

name: Tireless Guide's Mask
description: Your mask hosts the legacy of Golden Snake, the Tireless Guide, allowing you to guide others with ease.

name: To the Ends of the Earth
description: Your ability to track your prey has surpassed explanation, allowing you to trace your prey's movements and predict its location with ease.

name: Tower Shield Mastery
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall
description: You've learned how to maximize the defensive abilities of your tower shield.

name: Triple Threat
description: You can divide your attention three ways when hunting.

name: True Channel Spell
description: You are a true conduit for spiritual power, able to unleash the greatest spells.

name: True Shapeshifter
description: You transcend the limitations of form.

name: Twin Eidolon
description: You can transform to match your eidolon.

name: Twin Psyche
description: You've segmented your psyche so it can operate in tandem.

name: Ubiquitous Overdrive
description: You prepare a variety of incredible gizmos on each of your allies, linking them together through careful modification to enable you to power them up all at once.

name: Ubiquitous Weakness
description: You've nurtured your bonds with your comrades, allowing you to share the benefits of your esoterica.

name: Ultimate Flexibility
description: Your experience keeps you on your toes, helping you adopt complex strategies on the fly and face the most dangerous challenges.

name: Ultimate Polymath
description: You can flexibly cast all of your spells, granting a dizzying array of possible options.

name: Ultimate Skirmisher
description: You are so skilled at navigating the wild, your movement is completely unaffected by terrain.

name: Unlimited Demesne
description: You can move your demesne here and there, bringing it wherever your journey takes you.

name: Unlimited Potential
description: Frequency once per minute The laws of magic can limit your mind only if you think you need them, and you've grown past the need for such limits.

name: Unstoppable Juggernaut
description: You have become a brutal, unstoppable force of nature, able to shrug off mortal wounds with ease.

name: Verdant Presence
description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You take damage or cast a primal spell.

name: Vigil's Palisades
description: When you use Persistent Creation, you can create up to three special wooden shields that provide a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and have Hardness 15, 120 HP, and BT 60.

name: Vigilant Mask
description: Your mask grants the extraordinary magical senses of Carmine Jaws, the Hyena who Looks Between.

name: Vitality-Manipulating Stance
description: You have learned to attack meridians and pressure points like your rival Shino Hakusa.

name: Vivacious Afterimage
description: Requirements You have panache.

name: Wake of Devastation
source: Pathfinder Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
description: Requirements You're in .Like a kaiju, you leave a trail of destruction in your wake.

name: Weapon Supremacy
description: Your skill with weapons bends the laws of reality, allowing you to continuously attack with speed that would normally require magical assistance.

name: Whirlwind Spell
description: Requirements Your Spellstrike is charged.

name: Wish Alchemy
description: You have learned Artokus Kirran's most hidden secrets, granting you the ability to create alchemy infused with the power of wishes.

name: Witch's Hut
description: Your home is an animated structure that obeys your commands.

name: Wonder Worker
prerequisites: legendary in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
description: The thaumaturge's path culminates with the working of wonders.

name: Worldsphere Gravity
description: Frequency once per hour Though creating demiplanes usually requires lengthy rituals, you know how to establish minor planar effects in imitation of Syndara's masterpieces.

name: Wrath of the First Ghoul
description: Frequency Once per day The ravenous maggots inside you become capable of exploding forth from your attacks into the wounds of an opponent, whispering telepathic words of destruction that invoke horrific flashbacks of Kabriri's transformation from elf to ghoul or psychic images of hundreds of maggots

name: Zombie Horde
description: You built your reanimated construct companion of modular components from various corpses.

name: Muscle Barrier
description: ST LEVEL BONE SPEAKER MUSCLE BARRIER FEAT 1 NECROTIC BOMB FEAT 2 You can Recall Knowledge on living creatures with an internal or external skeleton using Undead Lore.

name: Bone Speaker
description: You can Recall Knowledge on living creatures with an internal or external skeleton using Undead Lore.

name: Necrotic Bomb
description: You can Recall Knowledge on living creatures with an internal or external skeleton using Undead Lore.

name: Reaper’s Weapon Familiarity
description: You draw the life out of your target using both your weapon and your thralls as a conduit.

name: Bone Spear
description: Player Core 256) Thrall Enhancement Your thralls are well constructed and Spirit Monger Spirit mongers, also known as vitamancers, seek the secrets of the soul and play with the eternal energies of the living and dead.

name: Dead Weight
description: General Feat Toughness (Player Core 263) Thrall Enhancement You can still make use of a destroyed thrall’s flesh.

name: Necromancer Body Shield
description: Necromancer option from the Impossible Playtest.

name: Life Tap
description: General Feat Diehard (Player Core 254) Thrall Enhancement Your thralls, while still being tied to the physical world, have an incorporeal essence.

name: Reach Of The Dead
description: FEAT 1 You channel your necrotic magic through a thrall, expending it in the process.

name: Bony Barrage
description: You launch a massive barrage of tiny bones.

name: Draining Strike
description: FEAT 4 You draw the life out of your target using both your weapon and your thralls as a conduit.

name: Conceal Spell
description: REAPER’S WEAPON FAMILIARITY You draw the life out of your target using both your weapon and your thralls as a conduit.

name: Bone Burst
description: FEAT 6 Trigger A creature adjacent to one of your thralls uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it’s using, and you are within 60 feet of the thrall.

name: Lifesense
description: Your connection to life and death allows you to sense the life force of a creature with a glance.

name: Reclaim Power
description: FEAT 6 Consume Thrall You use your thralls to restore yourself.

name: Quickened Casting
description: TH LEVEL CONGLOMERATE OF LIMBS You accelerate your spellcasting.

name: Zombie Horde
description: Your connection to life and death allows you to sense the life force of a creature with a glance.

name: Become As Spirit
description: FEAT 12 You raise what seems like an endless torrent of walking corpses.

name: Conglomerate Of Limbs
description: You accelerate your spellcasting.

name: Osteo Armaments
description: FEAT 10 You raise what seems like an endless torrent of walking corpses.

name: Necrotic Focus
description: Your understanding of your body on an anatomical level allows you to re-harness your necrotic power, using your body as a source.

name: Reinforced Skeleton
description: Prerequisites bone shaper grim fascination You take on the toughness, and lightness, of bone.

name: Desperate Surge
description: ATTACK FEAT 10 People in life-or-death situations can summon up impossible strength.

name: Vital Conduit
description: Prerequisites flesh magician grim fascination You thicken your skin by adding an impossibly thin layer of dense muscle directly under the surface.

name: Recurring Nightmare
description: You summon a lingering spirit that just won’t stay dead.

name: Living Graveyard
description: You summon a lingering spirit that just won’t stay dead.

name: Skeletal Lancers
description: You create a myriad of swift skeletal warriors.

name: Mortem Ultimatum
description: Legendary Necromancy 19th Death in one hand, life in the other, you shape the cycles of necromancy.

name: Perfected Thrall
description: Using your accumulated knowledge of all forms of necromancy, you create the perfect thrall.

name: Desperate Revival
description: HEALING FEAT 16 You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

name: Effortless Concentration
description: PERFECTED THRALL Using your accumulated knowledge of all forms of necromancy, you create the perfect thrall.

name: Flesh Tsunami
description: You unleash a wave of melted flesh.

name: Bind Heroic Spirit
description: You temporarily bind the spirit of a dead hero into you, gaining some of their talent.

name: Ectoplasmic Aura
description: You and all allies within 30 feet gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC as the air between them and their enemies thickens with ectoplasm.
